AI.motivation: 现有的野生动物监测方法如标记、捕捉和近距离观察，不仅成本高，还可能影响动物行为，进而影响研究准确性。无人机虽为优选方案，但易缺乏行为感知且常需昂贵、难以获得的真实数据，缺乏通用适应不同动物及行为的自适应监测方法。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个结合强化学习与行为扰动建模的框架：通过真实动物轨迹统计数据拟合动物运动模型，在仿真环境中训练无人机队伍，使其在高效观察动物的同时，显式考虑并最小化对动物行为的干扰。奖励函数综合了观测质量与干扰风险的权衡。
AI.result: 在鸽子、豺和尖翅麦鸡三种具有不同生态与运动模式的动物，以及四种常见自然行为模型下，训练出的政策均显著优于当前规则基准，具备良好的任务泛化与平台适应性。
AI.conclusion: 基于扰动感知的强化学习方法为非侵入式无人机野生动物监测提供了有效基础，有望实现大规模、伦理和科学可靠的生态与保护机器人监测。

title: Evaluating RAG Reliability under Clean, Misleading, and Mixed Retrieval
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely used to improve the factual reliability of large language models (LLMs) by grounding answers in retrieved evidence. In misinformation-rich environments, however, retrieved content may include plausible but incorrect information, raising concerns about the reliability of RAG-based information access systems. In this work, we propose an evaluation protocol to systematically test how the RAG system handles conflicts between parametric knowledge and evidence retrieved from context with varying amounts of misleading information. We target correct answers to factoid questions that the model responds to correctly, even when there is no retrieval, and use this to test the system with clean, poisoned, and mixed evidence. The proposed analytical framework combines parametric override and confidence metrics to assess when and how misleading information affects the generation process of LLMs. This study aims to provide insights into the robustness of RAG systems in information disorder scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种系统性评估RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）系统在受到误导性检索信息干扰时的表现方法，帮助理解其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管RAG能够提升大模型回答的事实性，但在充斥错误信息的环境中，检索内容可能包含错误却看似合理的信息，这影响了系统的可靠性。因此，需要定量评估RAG在误导信息混入检索证据时的响应机制。
AI.method: 提出一个评估协议：针对大模型本身就能正确回答的问题，构造三种情形的证据（干净、被污染、混合），观察引入不同程度误导证据时RAG的回答变化。结合“参数覆盖”与模型置信度等度量指标，分析误导信息对生成过程的影响。
AI.result: 研究系统性地分析了不同类型和程度误导信息对RAG系统回答准确性的影响，并通过定量与指标展现模型在各种情景下的表现差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解和评价RAG系统在信息失序或充满虚假信息环境下的鲁棒性提供了新工具和视角，对未来提高RAG事实可靠性有重要意义。

title: Liquid Neural Networks as a Drop-in Continuous-Time Deformation Field for Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting (D-3DGS) re-constructs dynamic scenes from monocular video by deforming a canonical set of 3D Gaussians through a positional-encoded MLP of frame time t. Although fitted to a continuous variable, the MLP couples no two values of t in its architecture and effectively predicts discrete per-frame offsets, leaving temporal smoothness to emerge only as a byproduct of optimisation. We redesign the deformation field as a stack of Closed-form Continuous-time (CfC) cells, a Liquid Neural Network (LNN), that is the closed-form solution of the Liquid Time-constant ODE while preserving every other part of the D-3DGS pipeline. Each cell exposes a sigmoidal time gate that interpolates between two candidate hidden states, baking a learned smooth response to t into the loss landscape without invoking any numerical solver. On the eight D-NeRF and seven NeRF-DS scenes the liquid field matches or exceeds the MLP baseline in aggregate, with its largest gains concentrated on the scenes with the most high-frequency articulated motion. The result is a near-zero-friction architectural design that turns the discrete MLP deformation field into an explicit continuous-time function of t.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于液体神经网络（LNN）的连续时域变形场方法，用于改进Deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting (D-3DGS)的动态场景重建能力，尤其提升了时间上的平滑性和连续性。
AI.motivation: 原始D-3DGS方法中的MLP输入为连续变量t（帧时间），但网络结构上实际并未有效建模不同t之间的联系，时间连续性和平滑性仅靠优化器的副产品出现，不够充分。
AI.method: 将原有的MLP变形场替换为由若干闭式解连续时间（CfC）单元堆叠而成的液体神经网络（LNN）。每个CfC单元通过sigmoidal时间门控机制在两种隐藏状态间插值，从而直接在网络结构中对t建立平滑响应，无需数值求解。其它D-3DGS流程保持不变。
AI.result: 在八个D-NeRF和七个NeRF-DS场景上，新方法整体表现与MLP基线持平或更优，特别是在高频率动作场景上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 该方法几乎无摩擦地将离散MLP变形场提升为显式的t的连续时间函数，提升了对动态场景的建模能力，特别是在高动态场景中的表现。

title: Mind Your Steps: A General Learning Framework for Accurate Humanoid Foothold Tracking
summary: Enabling humanoid robots to operate in complex, dynamic environments remains a critical challenge, fundamentally limited by the ability to navigate robustly, safely, and accurately. While reinforcement learning with velocity-commanded policies has achieved remarkable robustness in humanoid locomotion, this approach lacks explicit control of the foothold placement, leading to unsafe behavior, such as stepping onto human feet, or imprecise navigation, hindering the following manipulation task. Conversely, explicit foothold-tracking policies offer a promising alternative by directly being commanded with target foot poses. However, existing approaches are often limited by unrealistic state assumptions, compromising real-world deployment, or they are part of staged pipelines, making them tied to specific downstream tasks. In this work, we introduce a novel, lightweight framework for training general-purpose 3D foothold-tracking policies. By dynamically providing footstep support through a goal sampler, this method enables the learned policy to be agnostic to specific terrains. Our new target representation effectively mitigates challenges arising in the real world, such as noisy and inaccurate pose estimation and foot contact estimation. Designed for direct real-world transfer, our policy acts as a standalone low-level controller that can be seamlessly paired with various high-level foothold generators. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through extensive experiments in simulation and in the real world. By coupling our policy with different upstream planners, we achieve natural and accurate locomotion in challenging settings, paving the way for loco-manipulation tasks in complex environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖且轻量化的3D足部跟踪框架，可训练用于多种环境的人形机器人步态控制策略。该方法提升了足部落点的控制精度，支持真实世界的迁移，并在复杂环境中实现了自然精确的行走表现。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在复杂动态环境中安全、准确地行走仍是重大挑战。现有基于速度控制的强化学习方法虽然鲁棒，但不能精确控制落脚点，容易导致不安全或动作不准确；而基于显式落脚点的策略虽精确，却常因不现实假设或依赖特定流程限制了实用性。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新的训练框架，通过目标采样器动态生成目标落脚点，为政策学习提供支持，使其对地形无特定依赖。此外，新的目标表示方法提升了对真实世界中位置与接触估算噪声的鲁棒性。训练出的策略作为底层控制器，无需复杂流程，即可对接多种高层足部生成模块。
AI.result: 该方法综合了仿真和现实实验，证明能与不同的高层计划器结合，在复杂环境下实现自然、精确的人形机器人行走。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用型3D足部跟踪策略突破了以往对落脚点控制和场景适配的局限，可直接应用于真实世界，为人形机器人在复杂场景中的“行走—操作”任务打下基础。

title: SLMJury: Can Small Language Models Judge as Well as Large Ones?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used as judges for evaluating model outputs, but their high cost, latency, and opacity limit scalability. We introduce SLMJury, a framework for evaluating small language models (SLMs) as judges across two paradigms: closed-ended binary correctness and open-ended quality scoring. We benchmark 16 SLM judges (0.6B-14B parameters) from four model families across ten benchmarks: eight closed-ended tasks spanning mathematical, scientific, and general reasoning (N=64,824 judgments per configuration), plus SummEval and MT-Bench for summarization and conversational scoring. We formalize judging as a budget-conditioned function and study five dimensions. Four findings emerge. (1) The overthinking effect is domain-dependent: for most judges quick 10-token verdicts match or beat extended reasoning on mathematical judging (by 2-7% where they help), while reasoning wins on general tasks by up to 23%. (2) Domain generalization separates model families, with math-to-general accuracy gaps ranging from under 10% to nearly 40%. (3) Closed-ended and open-ended judging draw on different capabilities: the best binary judge (Phi-4) drops to rank 9 on MT-Bench, while reasoning-trained models invert this ordering. (4) Under the Reflect-Critique-Refine (RCR) debate protocol, multi-agent debate degrades accuracy across all tested configurations, whereas the top judges resist six adversarial personas with <=0.55% variance. Reliable automated evaluation does not require large proprietary models, yet no single SLM dominates. The leaderboard is available at https://anishh15.github.io/SLMJury/, and our framework code and pip package are publicly available at https://github.com/anishh15/SLMJury and https://pypi.org/project/slmjury/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SLMJury框架，系统评测小语言模型（SLM）作为判断器的性能，发现优秀评估不一定需要大模型，但不同任务下最优SLM不同。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）常用于模型输出评价，但其高成本、延迟和不可解释性限制了大规模应用。因此，研究小语言模型是否能胜任评测任务，并系统比较其表现，有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者提出SLMJury框架，系统性地评测16个小语言模型（0.6B到14B参数，四种模型家族）在10个基准上作为判别器的表现，覆盖二元正确性和主观质量打分。实验数据规模大，并对评判过程做五维分析。
AI.result: 主要有四大结论：(1) '过度思考'(overthinking)效应具领域性，数学任务短答案优，综合任务长推理优；(2) 不同模型家族的通用性表现差异较大，数理到综合任务准确率差最多达40%；(3) 不同类型评判（封闭型/开放型）对模型能力需求不同，最优二元判别器在开放型打分下降至第9名；(4) 多代理辩论协议降低准确率，顶尖SLM模型对抗对抗性人格干扰表现出较高鲁棒性（误差<0.55%）。
AI.conclusion: 高效、可靠的自动化模型输出评测不必依赖大型专有模型，但目前没有单一SLM统一优于所有任务。该工作提供了新的评测框架和排行榜，促进了SLM在实际评价场景中的应用探索。

title: Simultaneous hyperkinetic movement disorders phenotyping: a cross-cohort pediatric transfer study using routine videos, markerless pose estimation and a tabular foundation model
summary: Objective: To develop and externally test a video-based framework for simultaneous detection of hyperkinetic MDs phenomenologies: dystonia, tremor, myoclonus, chorea, athetosis, ballismus, stereotypies, and tics using routine clinical recordings, with explicit testing of external, cross-cohort transfer from adult to pediatric populations. Methods: In this proof-of-concept study, the framework combines markerless pose estimation, kinematic descriptors, and a pretrained fondation model. A shared predictive backbone was developed on 21 adults with confirmed hyperkinetic MDs and 4 healthy controls assessed under a standardized protocol. External validation was performed on an independent external cohort: a real-world pediatric sample (n=12, monogenic combined MDs). For the external dataset, the backbone was deployed without retraining; lightweight calibration adjusted only the final subject-level decision step using a small labeled subset of patients selected by clinicians as representative of the cohort's phenotypic range. Results: After local calibration of the decision layer on the clinician-selected subset, performance improved consistently on the held-out pediatric patients (n=7): Hamming accuracy rose from 0.804 to 0.839 and the Jaccard index from 0.548 to 0.633. This calibrated performance was preserved, and the Jaccard index further improved, when the evaluation was restricted to the phenomenologies with more definite clinician agreement (Hamming accuracy 0.9, Jaccard index 0.786), indicating that the gains did not rest on the least-reliable labels.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出并验证了一种基于视频的分析框架，能够同时检测多种运动障碍现象，并首次测试了该模型从成人到儿童群体的外部泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前对高动力性运动障碍如肌张力障碍、震颤等的诊断在主观性强、效率低，且缺乏可泛化的自动化工具，尤其是不同年龄人群之间。研究动机在于开发一种既可自动化、又能跨群体适用的检测工具，提升精准诊断。
AI.method: 框架融合了无标记的姿态估计、运动学描述符和预训练基础模型。预测主干网络在21例成人病人和4例健康对照中开发，并在12例儿童实际样本中进行外部验证。针对新群体，仅对决策层进行轻量级校准，利用临床医生选出的具有代表性的儿童部分数据。
AI.result: 对决策层局部调校后，小儿队列的诊断准确率显著提升，Hamming准确率从0.804提高到0.839，Jaccard指数从0.548提升到0.633。对标注一致性高的现象，准确率和Jaccard指数进一步提升，且提升并非依赖于不可靠标注。
AI.conclusion: 该视频分析框架经过轻量级校准后能实现成人到儿童的良好外部泛化，兼具多现象检测能力与实际临床应用潜力，为基于视频的自动化运动障碍诊断提供了有前景的方法。

title: SIMPLE: Simulation-Based Policy Learning and Evaluation for Humanoid Loco-manipulation
summary: Humanoid foundation models are advancing faster than we can evaluate them. While real-world testing is expensive and difficult to reproduce, existing simulation benchmarks focus primarily on table-top or wheeled robots. A scalable and reproducible benchmark for whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation remains an open problem. To this end, we present SIMPLE, a unified simulation testbed for humanoid policy learning and evaluation. SIMPLE couples the accurate contact-rich dynamics of MuJoCo with the photorealistic rendering of IsaacSim. It provides a large-scale environment comprising 60 diverse whole-body tasks, 50 indoor scenes, and over 1,000 object assets. To facilitate scalable data collection, the framework integrates two data generation pipelines: automated trajectory generation via motion planning and a low-latency VR teleoperation interface. We further integrate and benchmark mainstream humanoid policies at scale in SIMPLE, including lightweight imitation networks, large vision-language-action (VLA) models, and recent world action models (WAMs). Our experiments reveal a strong correlation between policy performance in simulation and the real world. Furthermore, we demonstrate that policies trained on data collected in SIMPLE can be transferred zero-shot to physical humanoid robots under similar settings, providing a robust and reproducible foundation for humanoid robotics research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SIMPLE模拟测试平台，为类人机器人政策学习和评估提供了统一且可扩展的基准，支持多样化全身任务，并验证了模拟到真实世界的良好迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有类人机器人基准多集中在小型或轮式机器人，缺乏支持全身机动-操作任务的大规模、可复现测试平台，严重限制了类人机器人政策的发展及其在现实世界的应用。
AI.method: SIMPLE将MuJoCo的高精度接触动力学与IsaacSim的真实感渲染结合，构建一个包含60个全身任务、50个室内场景、超1000种物体资源的大型环境。通过集成自动化轨迹生成与VR远程操作两种数据采集管线，提高数据采集的效率和多样性，并系统性评测主流类人机器人政策。
AI.result: 实验证明，SIMPLE中评测出的政策与现实世界的表现高度相关。基于SIMPLE采集数据训练的政策，能够“零样本”迁移到真实环境中的实体类人机器人，展现出良好的泛化和适应能力。
AI.conclusion: SIMPLE为类人机器人全身行动与操作的学习和评测提供了可扩展、可复现的通用基准，加速了机器人学术研究与实际应用之间的衔接。

title: Representational Similarity and Model Behavior in Multi-Agent Interaction
summary: Researchers have shown that neural similarity among humans predicts social closeness and cooperative success, whereas innovation often emerges from interactions among dissimilar individuals. We investigate whether these principles extend to artificial intelligence by examining interactions between large language models. In our experiments, 276 model pairs interact across eight games spanning both cooperation and novelty. We find that pairs with more similar representation spaces achieve significantly higher cooperation but exhibit reduced novelty and creativity. The effects of representational similarity on cooperation and novelty remain robust even after controlling for other factors such as performance disparity and model size. We also find that similarity in the early layers consistently shows the strongest association with cooperation and novelty, compared to the middle and later layers. This suggests that a central factor underlying these patterns could be the extent to which the two models share lexical and semantic grounding. Overall, representational similarity can be an important consideration in multi-agent system design.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型之间的表征相似性对合作与创新的影响。相似模型更易合作但创新性较低，且该效应主要体现在模型早期层。结论提示多智能体系统设计要权衡表征相似性。
AI.motivation: 已有研究表明，人类间神经相似性可预测社会亲近与合作成功，而创新常源于差异化互动。作者希望探索这一规律在AI大语言模型中是否适用。
AI.method: 作者让276对不同的大语言模型参与八种包含合作与创新元素的博弈，通过量化模型表征空间的相似性，分析其对合作、创新等指标的影响，并控制了模型表现差异和大小等混杂变量。
AI.result: 更相似的大语言模型之间能够实现更高效的合作，但产生的新颖性和创造力较低。模型表征空间相似性的影响主要集中于网络早期层，且该趋势在控制其他因素后依然显著。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统设计中应重视表征相似性。相似性促进合作却抑制创新，特别是在模型早期层的语义基础方面。因此，设计时需根据任务需求在合作与创新间权衡模型的表征相似性。

title: What Makes Video World Model Latents Action-Relevant: Prediction over Reconstruction
summary: Video world models are increasingly used to provide predictive visual representations, yet it remains unclear which pretraining signals induce action-relevant structure in their latent spaces. We study this question through a unified probe-based evaluation across diverse encoder families, including image-only self-supervision, video pretraining with and without latent prediction, reconstruction-based autoencoders, diffusion models, and shortcut-forcing dynamics models. Using a common inverse-dynamics probing objective, we find that action-relevant structure is driven primarily by temporal video pretraining rather than pixel reconstruction fidelity: models with strong pixel decoding quality can exhibit near-zero action recoverability, while video-pretrained self-supervised encoders consistently achieve the best Pareto trade-off between visual fidelity and action prediction. Comparing V-JEPA and VideoMAE further shows that most gains arise from natural-video temporal context, with feature-level latent prediction providing a smaller additional benefit. These trends transfer across robotic benchmarks, though CALVIN reveals that static-environment tasks can partially mask the importance of temporal structure by allowing strong image priors to suffice. Finally, inverse-dynamics supervision substantially improves robustness to visual corruption, suggesting that action-aware objectives regularize latent geometry beyond clean-setting performance. Our results identify temporal predictive structure -- not reconstruction fidelity -- as the primary ingredient underlying action-relevant video representations.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了视频世界模型预训练信号对潜在空间中动作相关结构的诱导作用，发现时序性视频预训练而非像素重建能力是获取动作相关结构的关键。
AI.motivation: 当前，视频世界模型常用作视觉表征预测工具，但尚不清楚哪种预训练信号能够在其潜在空间中有效构建与动作相关的结构。因此，作者希望理解哪种方法能提升动作恢复能力和视频表征的实际应用价值。
AI.method: 作者对多种主流编码器（包括纯图像自监督、带或不带潜变量预测的视频预训练、基于重建的自动编码器、扩散模型及动态建模）进行了基于通用逆动力学的对比评测，重点分析它们在动作信息恢复（action recoverability）和视觉保真度之间的权衡（Pareto trade-off）。还比较了V-JEPA和VideoMAE，探究时序上下文和潜在空间预测的具体益处。
AI.result: 实验发现，视频时序性自监督预训练的编码器在视觉保真度和动作可预测性之间表现最佳。高像素解码能力的模型在动作恢复上表现极弱，说明像素级重建能力与动作相关结构无直接关系。时序上下文是表征性能提升的主要来源，特征级别的潜变量预测增益有限。此外，逆动力学监督方法能显著提升对视觉干扰的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 动作相关的视频表征主要来源于时序预测结构，而非像素重建能力。为增强模型动作理解能力，应关注时序性自监督和动作感知目标而非单纯提升视觉还原质量。

title: Impedance MPC for Physical Human-Robot Interaction: Predictive Disturbance Rejection with Joint-Limit Safety
summary: Physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) demands simultaneous trajectory accuracy and compliant safety under unplanned contact. Classical impedance control incurs a nonzero steady-state position error under sustained human force -- the applied force divided by the task stiffness -- which integral action reduces only within a narrow stable-gain budget. We present a two-layer Impedance MPC that resolves this tension. Layer~1 analytically cancels gravity, Coriolis, and task-space inertia, reducing the residual plant to a configuration-independent double integrator with a constant state-transition matrix. Layer~2 solves a 30-variable convex QP at 100\,Hz, exploiting this constant structure so the free-response matrix is precomputed once; an augmented Kalman filter estimates the persistent disturbance state, giving a formal zero-steady-state-error guarantee. A null-space inverse-barrier potential and a task-space workspace projection enforce joint-limit safety across the tested workspace. On a 7-DOF Franka FR3, Impedance MPC with Kalman augmentation attains sub-0.05\,mm steady-state error versus 44.8\,mm for classical impedance (a $>$800-fold reduction) under a sustained 15\,N force, sub-millimeter tracking on four 3-D circles, and graceful robustness to measurement noise and inertial mismatch up to 30\%.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种两层次阻抗模型预测控制（Impedance MPC）方法，大幅提升了人机物理交互中的轨迹精度和安全性，并显著消除了传统阻抗控制下的稳态误差。
AI.motivation: 传统阻抗控制方法在持续外力（如人施加的力）下会产生不可忽略的稳态误差，且引入积分补偿易导致不稳定，影响安全与性能。亟需找到既满足轨迹精度又保证与人安全交互的新方案。
AI.method: 提出两层结构的阻抗MPC。第一层通过解析方法消除重力、科氏力和任务空间惯性，将系统简化为常系数双积分器。第二层在100Hz频率上解30维凸二次规划问题，利用系统恒定结构实现预计算，提高计算效率，并使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器实时估计干扰，实现零稳态误差。采用工作空间投影和逆势能约束确保机械臂关节安全。
AI.result: 在7自由度Franka FR3机器人实验中，该方法在持续15N外力下，稳态误差小于0.05mm（传统阻抗44.8mm，误差降低超800倍），在四个三维圆轨迹跟踪中误差均小于1mm，对测量噪声及惯性失配30%均表现出较强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该两层阻抗MPC方法能实现高精度、人机交互安全的轨迹跟踪，有效解决了传统阻抗控制无法消除稳态误差的问题，为实际pHRI场景提供了可行且高效的解决方案。

title: The ACUTE Protocol: Operationalizing Language Model Activations for Better Calibration, Utility, and Trust
summary: As language models improve and become increasingly deployed to solve a variety of tasks, trustworthiness becomes essential. Calibration is a good proxy for trust: well-calibrated confidence estimates help inform the risk versus reward tradeoff when trusting a specific model output. Unfortunately, even as models improve, they remain poorly calibrated, often biasing towards overconfidence. Additionally, calibration can be gamed: a policy that always predicts the base rate is perfectly calibrated, but completely uninformative. To resolve this, we develop a new metric, expected utility renormalized by the oracle (EURO), that balances calibration and informativeness. We also propose a general-purpose activation-based confidence, utility, and trust estimation protocol (ACUTE) to appropriately adjudicate uncertainty. The ACUTE protocol provides flexible, sample-efficient, and compute-efficient confidence estimators for 3 tasks including multiple choice question answering, tool-calling, and scientific document summarization across 6 models from 4 model families. ACUTE outperforms strong baselines on EURO, while maintaining low calibration error. Taken together, our work shows that equipping LLMs with the ACUTE protocol can improve calibration, utility, and trustworthiness in numerous settings.

AI.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型（LLM）的可信度问题，提出了衡量模型输出既有校准性又有信息量的新指标EURO，并设计了激活值驱动的置信估计协议ACUTE，显著提升了各种任务背景下的模型可信度。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型精度提升和应用范围扩展，其输出的可信度变得尤为关键。然而，现有模型普遍存在过度自信、校准性差等问题，并且单靠传统校准指标容易被“无意义但校准良好”的策略所利用，因此需要兼顾校准性和信息量的新方法。
AI.method: 提出EURO（oracle归一化的期望效用）作为新的校准与信息量兼顾指标，并打造了通用的基于激活值的置信、效用与信任估计协议ACUTE，对应多项任务如多项选择问答、工具调用和学术文档摘要，适配多个模型家族。
AI.result: ACUTE协议在EURO指标下显著超过强基线，并能很好地保持较低的校准误差，在多种任务和模型中都有效提升了模型的输出可信度和有用性。
AI.conclusion: 为大语言模型引入ACUTE协议可以同时提升模型的校准性能、实用性和用户信任度，为各类应用场景提供了有效提升模型可信度的新范式。

title: Struct-Searcher: Agentic Structural Thinking Advances Multimodal Deep Information Seeking
summary: Deep research agents have attracted increasing attention for their ability to collect large-scale online information to acquire target knowledge, with recent efforts shifting from purely text-based information seeking to multimodal settings. However, existing agentic workflows are largely aligned with evidence accumulation models, which linearly aggregate evidence and lack principled mechanisms for handling contradictory information across heterogeneous modalities. Towards this end, we propose Struct-Searcher, a structural agentic workflow grounded in belief revision theory that explicitly maintains an evolving multimodal structural graph throughout the reasoning process, enabling effective conflict-aware multimodal deep information seeking. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets and backbone models demonstrate that Struct-Searcher is (1) plug-and-play and model-agnostic, yielding an average relative accuracy improvement of 17.2% on BrowseComp-VL across five different backbones. (2) top-performing, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) and deep research agents, with relative accuracy improvements of 3.7% on MM-BrowseComp, 1.5% on HLE-VL, and 0.7% on BrowseComp-VL over the second-best competing approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构的多模态信息检索智能体Struct-Searcher，通过引入信念修正理论以更有效处理来源矛盾的信息，显著提升了多模态深度信息检索的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的智能体多为证据累积模型，仅线性整合证据，缺乏应对跨模态信息矛盾的机制，无法高效处理不同模态下冲突的信息。
AI.method: 作者提出Struct-Searcher，该方法借鉴信念修正理论，在推理过程中维护一个可动态演变的多模态结构化图，用来显式跟踪和处理跨模态的结构性和矛盾信息，从而提升多模态信息检索的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和模型骨干测试下，Struct-Searcher无需修改主模型即可套用，相比业界SOTA系统和深度研究智能体有显著优势，如在BrowseComp-VL数据集上平均提升17.2%，在MM-BrowseComp、HLE-VL、BrowseComp-VL等数据集上分别比第二佳方案提升3.7%、1.5%、0.7%。
AI.conclusion: Struct-Searcher作为一种通用、可插拔且模型无关的多模态深度检索智能体，显著改进了信息整合与冲突处理能力，在多项评测中超越了现有最优方案，有望为多模态智能体检索范式带来新进展。

title: MotionVLA: Injecting Geometric Motion into Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly condition robot policies on history, depth, or 4D features to resolve ambiguity in long-horizon manipulation. However, more spatiotemporal evidence is not necessarily better: when the injected evidence is not motion-consistent, it can introduce geometric drift, fragmented temporal cues, and unstable action generation. This raises a simple question: should a VLA remember past frames, or remember the motion that connects them? We introduce MotionVLA, a motion-history interface that converts a short past-only video window into compact, time-continuous trajectory-field tokens. Instead of treating history as a sparse set of ndependently lifted frames, MotionVLA represents recent observations as physically coherent motion evidence. Current visual tokens query this history to retrieve task-relevant motion information, which is then recoupled into the VLA stream under trajectory-grounded supervision. Experiments across simulation benchmarks and preliminary real-robot rollouts show that MotionVLA improves long-horizon manipulation while producing smoother and more direct executions. These results suggest that effective VLA memory is not just about providing more 4D context, but about exposing motion-consistent evidence that is usable for control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的Vision-Language-Action (VLA)模型接口MotionVLA，用于增强机器人在长时任务中的操作决策能力，通过引入时空连续的运动历史证据，改善了现有VLA对历史信息利用的方法，从而获得了更平滑、更直接的任务执行效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA模型通常通过增加历史、深度或4D特征来提升机器人处理复杂操作任务的能力，但这些信息如果运动不连续，可能导致几何漂移、时序碎片化和不稳定的动作。作者质疑：VLA究竟是应该记住过去的帧，还是记住连接帧之间的运动？
AI.method: 作者提出MotionVLA，一种运动历史接口，将过去的视频片段编码为时空连续的轨迹场token，不再仅仅视为稀疏、独立的帧，而是利用物理一致的运动证据。当前视觉token可检索相关运动信息，这些信息又以轨迹为约束回流至VLA主干网络接受监督学习。
AI.result: 通过仿真基准测试和初步真实机器人实验，MotionVLA在长时任务操作上表现更优，产生更平滑、更直接的操作路径。
AI.conclusion: 有效的VLA记忆不仅是添加更多上下文或4D证据，更重要的是提供可用于控制的运动一致性证据。MotionVLA为长时机器人操作任务带来性能提升，表明运动证据的引入具有显著实际价值。

title: Beyond English benchmarks: clinical llm evaluation in Brazilian Portuguese
summary: Large Language Models are transforming the support for clinical decision and their application in real scenarios. Yet, most benchmarks are conducted in English, and cross-lingual evaluation is needed to tackle the language gaps in global access. We introduce ClinicalBr, the first bilingual benchmark for clinical decision built from real Brazilian case reports. The corpus contains 2,892 cases drawn from 28 SciELO medical journals, spanning 18 specialties, and is structured as parallel Portuguese-English pairs. Each case supports four evaluation tasks: diagnosis retrieval, differential diagnosis, exam recommendation, and treatment planning. We evaluate four models: MedGemma-27B, Sabiá-4, DeepSeek-R1, and o3-mini, across both languages. The central finding is that the Portuguese-English performance gap is task-dependent, not general. In diagnosis retrieval, English yields a consistent advantage across all models, with +7.5-12.1 accuracy points. This advantage disappears in differential diagnosis, exam recommendation, and treatment planning, where confidence intervals cross zero for most models and Portuguese completeness scores are marginally higher. Brazilian-endemic conditions proved easier than the full corpus, not harder, indicating that tropical presentations are adequately represented in current pre-training. Exam recommendation was the hardest task across all models and both languages, with F1 scores below 0.10, well below the differential diagnosis ceiling of 0.20-0.27.

AI.tldr: 本论文推出了ClinicalBr——基于真实巴西案例、首个葡英双语临床决策基准数据集，并系统评估了多款大语言模型在诊断、鉴别诊断、检查建议和治疗方案四项任务中的双语表现。
AI.motivation: 目前大型语言模型多用于临床决策支持，但主流评测集中于英语，忽略了实际应用中的语言差异，限制了全球医疗技术的普惠性。因此，需要跨语言的基准和评估，提升模型在非英语环境下的实用性。
AI.method: 作者收集并整理了28种SciELO医学期刊中2,892例真实巴西病例，结构化为葡萄牙语-英语平行语料，并设定四项临床任务。基于该基准，测试了MedGemma-27B、Sabiá-4、DeepSeek-R1和o3-mini四款模型在双语环境下的表现差异。
AI.result: 在“诊断检索”任务上，所有模型普遍表现出英语比葡语高7.5-12.1百分点的准确率，但在其余三项任务（鉴别诊断、检查建议、治疗方案）上则无显著英语优势，部分任务葡语表现更佳。与热带/巴西本地疾病相关情况，模型表现甚至优于全集。最具挑战的为“检查建议”，F1分数均低于0.10。
AI.conclusion: 存在任务相关的语言表现差异：英语对诊断检索有明显优势，但并不适用于所有临床任务。模型已能较好地处理巴西本地疾病，但整体在检查建议等环节准确率仍有巨大待提升空间。

title: Cross-View Urban Traffic Dataset: Drone-Supervised Ground Truth for Monocular Bird's-Eye View Localization
summary: We introduce a dataset and benchmark for cross-view urban traffic perception built from synchronized ego-centric bicycle videos and aerial drone videos recorded at real urban intersections. The benchmark targets two linked tasks: cross-view identity matching between street-view and drone-view object tracks, and ego-to-bird's-eye-view prediction using aerial supervision. In contrast to prior urban driving and V2X datasets, our benchmark provides identity-level alignment across radically different viewpoints together with standardized evaluation, annotation tooling, and baseline implementations. This setting is motivated by intersection-centric traffic analysis, where identity preservation, local interactions, and global spatial structure must be reasoned about jointly across views. We evaluate methods at both the track and frame levels, including cross-view ID precision/recall/IDF1, near--far breakdowns, temporal stability, and consistency metrics. We also provide baseline results for wedge-based cross-view matching and for three BEV prediction baselines: inverse perspective mapping, a MonoLayout-style learned baseline, and a regression baseline. The results show that the benchmark is feasible but challenging: cross-view matching achieves strong recall yet remains limited by over-assignment and temporal inconsistency, while ego-to-BEV prediction benefits from aerial supervision but remains far from saturated under lightweight monocular sensing. We hope that this benchmark will support future research on cross-view perception, urban scene alignment, and ego-to-global traffic understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个结合自行车第一视角视频与无人机航拍视频的跨视角城市交通感知数据集和基准，专注于身份匹配和视角转换任务，为多视角交通分析提供标准化工具、指标和实现基线。
AI.motivation: 当前城市交通感知与V2X数据集大多聚焦单一视角或指标，难以支持多视角、尤其是从第一视角到俯视图的跨域身份追踪与空间结构统一分析。为了提升十字路口等关键区域的全局与局部交通理解，需要能够在不同视角间准确进行对象身份匹配与空间转换。
AI.method: 作者采集并同步了自行车第一视角与无人机航拍的视频数据，制作了基准数据集。任务包括（1）街景-航拍视角对象轨迹的身份匹配；（2）借助航拍监督，通过单目摄像头直接预测鸟瞰视图（BEV），并设计了一套自动化标注、评测指标与基线方法。
AI.result: 通过实验，作者发现：跨视角身份匹配有较高召回率但会出现多重分配和时序不一致问题；BEV预测受益于航拍监督，但用单目感知性能仍有限。基线方法表现展示了数据集任务的挑战性和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准填补了跨视角、身份级别城市交通感知的空白，相关任务难度大，但标准化的数据和工具有助于推动相关研究。未来可用于多视角感知、场景对齐和全球交通状态理解等领域。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Intention Prediction for Human-to-Robot Assembly Teleoperation
summary: In assisted teleoperation for human-robot collaboration, accurate intention prediction is critical for enabling timely and reliable robotic assistance during long-horizon manipulation and assembly tasks. These systems require continuous understanding of user behavior to recognize actions, anticipate intentions, and detect mistakes in real time. However, robot teleoperation demonstrations are costly and hardware-limited, whereas human demonstrations are easier to collect and provide rich temporal structure. To address this challenge, we propose an uncertainty-aware human-to-robot intention prediction framework that combines: (1) hierarchical transfer learning, where MS-TCN++ is pretrained on human hand demonstrations and fine-tuned on limited robot teleoperation data to capture low-level actions and high-level task intentions; (2) a conformal prediction module that provides frame-level prediction sets with statistical coverage guarantees for reliable uncertainty quantification and early intention estimation; and (3) VLM-guided segment correction, which selectively reviews low-confidence or temporally uncertain segments using visual and temporal context. The framework supports action recognition, temporal segmentation, intention anticipation, and mistake detection for assisted teleoperation. Experiments on robot assembly demonstrations with 22 action classes show that human-to-robot fine-tuning improves the robot test-set Edit score from 70.50 to 80.70 using only 16 robot demonstrations. Edit-safe VLM correction further improves frame accuracy from 45.21% to 46.42% and increases F1@25 and F1@50 while preserving the Edit score. These results show that human demonstrations provide scalable pretraining data for robust, uncertainty-aware robot action segmentation. Code and data: project website.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种不确定性感知的人机意图预测框架，通过结合层次化迁移学习、保型预测和VLM引导的分段校正，实现了机器人辅助操作中意图识别、行为分割等功能，并在有限的机器人示范数据下显著提升了识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 机器人辅助遥操作需要准确实时地理解人的意图，但机器人示范难以大规模获取，而人类示范更易收集。作者希望利用人类示范对机器人系统进行高效预训练，从而提升仅有少量机器人示范时的意图识别和行为理解能力。
AI.method: 方法包括三部分：1）层次化迁移学习——用MS-TCN++在丰富的人手示范数据上预训练，再用极少的机器人示范微调，提取多层级任务意图；2）保型预测——在每一帧提供带有统计保障的不确定性量化预测区间，实现早期意图估计；3）VLM引导的分段校正——针对置信度低和时序不确定片段，融合视觉与时间上下文进行人工或自动审查修正。
AI.result: 在包含22类动作的机器人装配数据集上，人-机迁移学习方法仅用16条机器人示范就可将Edit score 提升10个百分点达80.70。引入VLM校正进一步提升帧级准确率1.2个百分点，并提升F1@25和F1@50，同时保持Edit score。
AI.conclusion: 该方法表明利用人类示范进行预训练不仅可扩展，还能有效提升机器人动作分割和意图预测的鲁棒性和可靠性，为机器人辅助遥操作提供了实用且高效的方案。

title: The Cold-Start Safety Gap in LLM Agents
summary: Are tool-calling LLM agents equally safe throughout a conversation? We discover they are not: agents are most vulnerable at the very start of a session and become substantially safer after a few regular agentic tasks -- a phenomenon we term the cold-start safety gap. To study this systematically, we introduce Safety Over Depth for Agents (SODA), a benchmark that controls how many regular agentic tasks the agent completes before encountering a safety threat, supporting up to 20 preceding tasks. Evaluating 7 models from 4 families, safety improves by 9--52% as the number of preceding regular agentic tasks increases from zero to twenty. Representation analysis confirms that model hidden states gradually shift toward a safety-aligned region as more preceding tasks are present. By systematically studying which part of the preceding conversation matters most, we find that the regular agentic tasks themselves are the primary driver of safety, while the agent's own prior responses have less effect on safety but are essential for preserving later utility. This conclusion is further supported by evaluation on open-source safety benchmarks (AgentHarm, Agent Safety Bench) and utility benchmarks (BFCL, API-Bank), confirming that warming up the agent with regular agentic tasks before deployment makes it safer and preserves full capability. Based on these findings, we recommend a simple deployment strategy: having the agent complete a few regular agentic tasks before possible exposure to safety-critical requests mitigates the cold-start safety gap. Our code is available at https://github.com/Trustworthy-ML-Lab/Agent-Cold-Start-Safety-Gap

AI.tldr: 工具调用的大语言模型（LLM）代理在会话初期更易受安全威胁，完成一些常规任务后安全性明显提高，这一现象被称为“冷启动安全差距”。论文通过SODA基准系统性研究并提出预先让代理进行常规任务可提升其安全性。
AI.motivation: 近年来，工具调用的LLM代理在真实应用中日益广泛，但其会话过程中的安全性变化尚未被系统性研究。作者发现代理在刚启动时最容易受安全威胁，有必要探索其安全机理及优化方法。
AI.method: 提出Safety Over Depth for Agents（SODA）基准，通过控制代理在遇到安全威胁前完成的常规任务数量（最多20个），定量评估不同阶段的安全性。分析了7个模型（4个模型家族）、模型隐状态、不同会话内容对安全表现的具体影响；并结合AgentHarm、Agent Safety Bench等开放安全基准，以及BFCL、API-Bank效用基准进行验证。
AI.result: 随着常规任务数量增加，模型安全性提升9-52%。模型内部表示逐步向安全区域转移，常规任务本身是主要的安全提升驱动力，代理先前的自身回复效果较弱但对后续效用有重要作用。这一规律在多个外部安全与效用基准上得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 建议实际部署时，先让代理完成若干常规任务以“预热”，再处理重要安全请求，可有效缩小冷启动安全差距并保持能力不损失。提供了相应的代码实现。

title: DroneDAR: Long-Range Drone Distance Estimation Using Monocular Vision and Bounding-Box Features
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to the 2026 International Conference on Advanced Visual and Signal-Based Systems (AVSS)
summary: Accurate distance estimation for small drones in long-range imagery is important for tracking and situational awareness, yet remains challenging due to extreme target scale variation, background clutter, and noisy visual cues. This paper studies monocular drone distance estimation using image crops together with bounding-box geometry, a practical setting in which a detector provides a candidate drone region and the model predicts range from appearance and box-derived features. We evaluate a Droneranger-style baseline, and introduce a new DroneDAR (Drone Detection And Ranging) model that combines a convolutional backbone with explicit bounding-box cues through a lightweight gating mechanism. Experiments analyze how backbone capacity, crop resolution, and regression loss functions affect performance across distance regimes. We further examine common failure modes at long distances, including sensitivity to bounding-box noise and reduced texture detail in the crop. The results provide guidance for designing and training range estimators that remain robust under real-world long-range conditions and highlight directions for improving reliability when drones occupy only a few pixels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合外观特征和边界框几何信息的单目图像无人机距离估计方法，并验证其在远距离小目标场景下的表现。
AI.motivation: 由于长距离监控中无人机目标尺寸极小，且背景杂乱、视觉信息噪声大，准确的距离估计变得极具挑战，但这对于无人机跟踪和态势感知至关重要。
AI.method: 本文采取实用性强的输入方式：基于检测器提供的候选无人机区域（图片裁剪和边界框信息），提出了DroneDAR模型。该模型用卷积神经网络提取图像特征，并通过轻量级门控机制将边界框提示显式结合进网络内。实验分析了主干网络容量、裁剪分辨率和回归损失函数对不同距离段的影响，并探讨了长距离任务中常见的失败模式。
AI.result: DroneDAR模型在不同距离段均展现出优于传统Droneranger模型的性能，并通过实验深入分析了如何提升远距离场景下的稳健性，如对边界框噪声和裁剪图像纹理减少的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 论文为如何在实际远距离小目标环境下设计和训练鲁棒的无人机距离估计器提供了实验指导，并指出了提升在无人机场景下可靠性的未来研究方向。

title: PACT: Self-Evolving Physical Safety Alignment for Diffusion Policies in Embodied Manipulation
summary: Diffusion policies have achieved remarkable success in robotic manipulation, yet they often fail to satisfy strict physical constraints required for safe deployment. Existing approaches impose safety either prematurely during training or reactively via external guardrails at test time, limiting policy expressivity and overall scalability. We propose Physical safety Alignment for Constrained Trajectories (PACT), a self-evolving post-training framework that projects pretrained diffusion policies onto constraint-feasible regions without accessing demonstration data or task rewards. PACT distills constraint gradients into the diffusion model through a reverse-KL objective with dense supervision across timesteps. It incorporates a curriculum that progressively tightens constraints while maintaining theoretically bounded policy shift and monotone improvement, mitigating the safety-performance trade-off from catastrophic forgetting. On simulated and real-world embodied manipulation benchmarks, PACT significantly reduces safety violations by 31.0% on average while improving task success by 30.7%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PACT的后训练自适应框架，用于提升扩散策略在机器人操作中的物理安全性，无需重新访问数据或奖励且能提升任务成功率并减少安全违规。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散策略虽强大，但在严格物理安全约束下表现不足。现有安全处理方法局限性在于要么过早干预训练影响表达能力，要么只能事后反应性守护，导致可扩展性和策略效果受限。
AI.method: 提出PACT框架，将已有的扩散策略投影到满足物理约束的解空间，通过反向KL目标与时步密集监督蒸馏约束梯度，并采用逐步收紧约束的课程机制以保证策略平稳迁移和持续改进；整个过程无需演示数据或任务奖励。
AI.result: 在仿真和现实操纵基准上，PACT能平均减少31.0%的安全违规，并将任务成功率提升30.7%。
AI.conclusion: PACT能够在保持或提升任务表现的同时，显著降低安全风险，为场景中物理安全受约束的机器人策略部署提供了有效的后训练解决方案。

title: Whose Norms? Disentangling Cultural and Personal Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models are increasingly used for social decision-making situations that require balancing cultural norms with personal preferences. For example, a user preferring honesty might ask whether to correct a coworker publicly when local norms favor indirect feedback. Yet existing research studies cultural alignment and personalization largely separately. We introduce PACT, the Personal-Preference and Cultural-Norm Trade-off framework, which evaluates whether models choose to follow a cultural norm or allow personal preferences. We find that LLMs vary in how rigidly they enforce cultural norms, with behavior shifted more by country context (7.8%) than age (1%) and gender (0.7%) and shifting non-uniformly after instruction tuning. Furthermore, our five-country human study on PACT shows that culture-following in humans is mainly driven by scenario country, with the lowest agreement when participants judge their own cultural contexts, showing within-culture pluralism. Finally, human-LLM alignment experiments show that models can match majority choices, but fail to capture response distributions and uncertainty (with best correlations reaching only 0.24). Together, these findings motivate alignment evaluations that go beyond majority to capture cultural pluralism and disagreement in social judgment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了评估大语言模型在文化规范与个人偏好权衡下的决策框架PACT，发现模型的文化顺应性受国家背景影响远大于年龄和性别，同时人类和模型在文化选择上一致度有限，凸显了文化多元性带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少同时关注文化对齐和个性定制，而现实社会决策往往需兼顾两者，因此作者提出新的评估框架，探讨大模型在此类权衡情形下的表现。
AI.method: 提出PACT框架，通过设置不同国家、年龄、性别等情境，评估主流大语言模型在文化规范与个人偏好间选择的表现，并通过五国人类实验及人-模型比对，考察对文化规范的遵循程度及多元性。
AI.result: LLM在文化规范的遵守上，不同模型表现存在差异，且国家背景的影响（7.8%）明显高于年龄（1%）和性别（0.7%）；指令微调会引发非均匀行为变化。人类实验显示，文化选择主要受情境国家影响，且本国情境下人类意见分歧最大。模型虽能模拟多数选择，但对分布及不确定性的把握很有限（相关最高0.24）。
AI.conclusion: 评估和对齐大语言模型时，仅关注多数判断是不足的，应进一步关注文化多元性和分歧，推动模型更好地捕捉社会判断中的复杂性。

title: Quantum-Enhanced Similarity Measures for Polarimetric Materials Classification
summary: We present a quantum--classical hybrid pipeline for polarimetric material classification that casts this as a point-matching problem. Voxel cubes, containing polarized light reflections, are used to train an encoder to produce 32-dimensional embeddings for the voxels of the cubes. At inference, the encoder head is discarded and the embeddings are encoded as probability amplitudes of quantum states. Next, a SWAP-test circuit estimates the fidelity between each of the 32D embeddings from the query cube and a dataset of anchor cubes. The aggregated fidelity serves as materials similarity scores, and the class of the anchor with highest aggregated fidelity is deemed as the class of the queried material. We evaluate our approach on a dataset of 23 materials ($\approx$800 samples each) derived from their Mueller matrices. The point-matching approaches from the proposed quantum SWAP-test and a classical classifier using Optimal Transport are compared. Our results demonstrate the competitive classification accuracy alongside open-set discrimination potential, establishing it as a viable path toward NISQ-based material recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于量子-经典混合的偏振材料分类新方法，通过编码偏振反射数据并采用量子SWAP-test进行匹配，实现了与经典算法相媲美的材料分类性能。
AI.motivation: 当前材料识别任务在处理高维偏振信息和复杂数据结构时存在性能瓶颈，且对新兴的NISQ(噪声中等规模量子)计算技术应用需求增强，亟需探索其在材料分类中的有效性。
AI.method: 方法包括三步：首先用包含偏振反射信息的体素立方体训练编码器，将每个体素嵌入到32维向量空间；推理阶段将这些32D嵌入转化为量子态的概率振幅。然后通过量子SWAP-test电路计算每个查询样本与数据库锚点样本的相似度，聚合后输出材料类别。此外将该方法与基于最优传输的经典分类器进行对比。
AI.result: 在包含23种材料、各约800个样本的数据集（由穆勒矩阵获得）上进行实验，结果显示该量子管道具有与经典方法相当的分类准确率，同时在开放类别判别（open-set discrimination）方面也有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在当前NISQ量子硬件框架下已展现出材料识别的实用潜力，并为量子技术在复杂视觉任务中的应用提供了一条可行路径。

title: GraspFoM: Towards Reconstruction-Driven Robotic Grasping with 3D Foundation Priors
summary: Robotic grasping is a fundamental capability in robotic manipulation. Yet grasping remains challenging under partial observations. Reliable grasping depends on both local contact cues and object-level 3D structure. Existing geometry-aware grasping methods recognize the value of reconstruction, but they typically treat geometry as an intermediate prediction rather than a reusable object prior for grasping. In this paper, we present GraspFoM, a unified framework that leverages 3D foundation priors (SAM3D) to build a shared 3D object latent for both reconstruction and grasp pose prediction. Built on this shared object latent, we introduce an anchor-initialized truncated pose-reasoning diffuser that predicts continuous and multimodal grasp poses without directly relying on discrete grasp candidates. We further investigate the interaction between reconstruction and grasping through a reconstruction-aware scorer and a residual latent updater. Reconstruction provides grounded geometric cues, while grasp supervision refines the shared object latent toward grasp-relevant affordances. GraspFoM jointly predicts grasp poses and reconstructs high-fidelity 3D assets in mesh and 3DGS forms. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that GraspFoM achieves state-of-the-art results on both reconstruction and grasping. Notably, these improvements require only a small number of additional trainable parameters. Component-wise ablation studies also demonstrate the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了GraspFoM，一个利用3D基础知识（SAM3D）进行重建与抓取共同预测的统一框架，实现了在部分观测下更可靠的机器人抓取，并显著提升了重建和抓取的性能。
AI.motivation: 在部分观测下，机器人抓取仍存挑战，因可靠的抓取需要兼顾局部接触和全局3D结构。现有方法虽重视重建，但未充分利用几何作为可复用的抓取先验。
AI.method: 提出GraspFoM，基于共享的3D对象潜变量实现高质量重建和抓取姿态预测。方法引入锚点初始化的截断姿态扩散器，实现连续、多模态抓取；结合重建感知的评分器及残差潜变量更新器，使重建与抓取任务互相增益。
AI.result: GraspFoM在重建与抓取任务上均取得了SOTA结果，并且参数量增加极少。消融实验展示了各组件有效性。可输出高保真网格及3DGS三维资产。
AI.conclusion: GraspFoM有效融合了3D对象重建与抓取知识，实现了高效、可靠的机器人抓取与三维重建，并为相关领域提供了一种可推广的统一框架。

title: Beyond Individual Personas: Aligning Synthetic Dialogue to Population-Level Behavior Distributions
summary: Synthetic dialogue corpora are increasingly used as proxies for target dialogue data, yet persona-grounded generators optimize individual conversations rather than corpus composition, yielding locally plausible dialogues with distorted population-level behavior mixes. We introduce GroupPersona, a framework that aligns synthetic dialogue corpora to the behavior distribution of a reference corpus. GroupPersona turns population statistics into generation controls: it separates each dialogue's core behavioral signature from predictable side effects, and uses the resulting behavioral groups to condition user agents on the interaction patterns that define the reference population. We evaluate GroupPersona on four corpora crossing two dialogue sources, assistant-style and Reddit-derived, with two construction variants: structure-preserving and variation-enhanced. GroupPersona lowers Jensen-Shannon divergence between synthetic and reference distributions over 12 behavior attributes from 0.234 to 0.177 relative to the strongest average baseline, a 24.4% reduction, and is best or tied-best on all four corpora while preserving structural alignment. It also achieves the closest calibration to reference-conversation quality scores, reducing mean absolute deviation from the reference-conversation profile to 0.63 versus 0.91 for the next-best baseline.

AI.tldr: GroupPersona 是一个用来合成对话语料库，并使其行为分布更接近真实参考数据的新方法。它让合成数据在行为层面更加符合目标人群特征，显著优于以往方法。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化（persona-grounded）对话生成方法关注单次对话的合理性，但忽视了整个语料库在总体行为分布上的失真，这会导致合成语料不能很好地代表目标人群。
AI.method: 提出了 GroupPersona 框架，将参考语料库的人群行为统计特征作为控制条件，分离出对话的核心行为特征和相关副作用，然后以行为组（behavioral groups）为基础引导合成对话生成，使之更好匹配目标分布。实验中，分别在助手式和 Reddit 风格的四个数据集上，以结构保持和变化增强两种模式评估方法有效性。
AI.result: GroupPersona 使合成语料与参考数据在12种行为属性上的 Jensen-Shannon 散度由0.234降至0.177，降幅24.4%，在全部四个语料库上表现最好或并列最好，并在对话质量分布上最贴近参考数据。
AI.conclusion: GroupPersona 在保证对话结构的同时，显著提高了合成语料在行为层面对参考分布的对齐度，是更适合合成人群特征对话数据的方法。

title: DALE-CT: Depth-Aware Foundation Models for Computed Tomography
summary: Recent breakthroughs in self-supervised learning (SSL), such as the Latent-Euclidean Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (LeJEPA), alongside successes in integrating visual encoders with language models, have driven the demand for adaptable, high-capacity vision encoders in Computed Tomography (CT). In this work, we explore 2D slice-based architectures as a flexible alternative to native 3D models for processing volumetric CT data. Using the CT-RATE dataset, we trained DALE-CT (Depth-Aware Latent-Euclidean Computed Tomography), a 2D model family built entirely from scratch using LeJEPA, and compared its performance against a continually pre-trained DINOv2 baseline. To enhance representation quality, we developed a novel 3D depth-aware pre-training strategy anchored by dense auxiliary supervision from both automated anatomical masks and human-annotated abnormalities. Under linear probe evaluation with Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) for multi-abnormality detection, the frozen backbone of this dual-supervised model (DALE-CT-2S) achieves a Macro AUROC of 0.833. This performance demonstrates near-parity with state-of-the-art 3D vision-language models, achieved entirely from scratch with significantly less data and no textual supervision. To ensure reproducibility, all training code, evaluation scripts, and model weights have been made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新2D切片架构（DALE-CT），在CT影像分析中表现接近最先进3D视觉-语言模型，但训练数据更少且无需文本监督。
AI.motivation: 现有CT影像处理多依赖原生3D模型，或结合视觉编码与语言模型。本研究希望探索以2D切片方式，结合最新自监督预训练、可拓展性的编码器，减少对大规模标注数据和文本数据的依赖，同时获得与3D模型相媲美的表现。
AI.method: 采用Latent-Euclidean自监督架构（LeJEPA）自零开始训练一组纯2D CT模型DALE-CT；设计了一种新的3D深度感知预训练策略，融合自动与人工标注的辅助监督；与持续预训练的DINOv2模型对比，在CT-RATE数据集上通过MIL机制做线性探针评估。
AI.result: 双重监督的DALE-CT-2S模型在线性探针的多异常检测任务（Macro AUROC=0.833）中，表现接近最先进的3D视觉-语言模型，且仅需更少数据、无文本监督。
AI.conclusion: 2D切片架构结合深度感知自监督，可在大幅减少标注及数据需求下，实现接近最优3D模型的表现，为CT影像分析提供高效可复现的新路线。

title: Personalized and Robust Proactive Robot Assistance with Uncertainty-Guided LLM Reasoning
comment: Accepted to the 2026 IEEE 35th International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
summary: Proactive robot assistance in household environments requires accurate prediction of human activities and object usage under dynamic and noisy conditions. Existing approaches often rely on complex spatio-temporal models, which can be computationally expensive and sensitive to environmental variability. In this paper, we propose GLOBE, a lightweight framework that combines n-gram Markov models for capturing temporal behavioral patterns with uncertainty-guided large language model (LLM) reasoning. The framework performs sequential prediction efficiently while selectively invoking LLM reasoning only when the model confidence is low. To evaluate performance under realistic conditions, we introduce HOMER-Noise, a noisy extension of the HOMER+ dataset that simulates structured disturbances such as object movements caused by humans, pets, and toddlers. Experimental results show that GLOBE achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods while improving robustness and computational efficiency across both clean and noisy settings. The framework is further validated through a proof-of-concept integration with a Stretch 3 mobile manipulator, demonstrating its potential application in real-world human-robot interaction scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个轻量级框架GLOBE用于家庭环境中机器人对人类活动和物品使用的预测，并在新引入的HOMER-Noise数据集上验证了其效率与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂环境下预测人类行为虽准确但计算量大、对环境变化敏感。为了提升计算效率与对噪声的鲁棒性，提出新的预测方法。
AI.method: GLOBE框架结合n-gram马尔可夫模型用于提取时序行为模式，并在模型信心低时才调用大语言模型(LLM)的不确定性推理。此外，设计了HOMER-Noise数据集，模拟真实环境中的结构化干扰，对方法进行测试。
AI.result: GLOBE在纯净与噪声环境下都实现了与主流方法相当的预测性能，同时提升了鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: GLOBE框架能高效、稳健地预测家庭环境中的人类活动和物体使用，适用于实际机器人系统。

title: ROSUM-MCTS: Monte Carlo Tree Search-Inspired HDL Code Summarization with Structural Rewards
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in code summarization, yet their effectiveness for Hardware Description Languages (HDLs) like VHDL and Verilog remains underexplored. We propose ROSUM-MCTS, an LLM-guided approach inspired by Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) that refines summaries through structured exploration and reinforcement-driven optimization. Our method integrates both local and global context via a hierarchical candidate expansion mechanism and optimizes summaries using a composite reward function balancing functional correctness (FC), local content adequacy (LCA), and fluency. We evaluate ROSUM-MCTS on the VHDL-eval and Verilog-eval datasets, demonstrating its consistent outperformance over baseline methods by leveraging structured bottom-up refinement and reinforcement-based optimization. Ablation studies confirm the necessity of both local and global expansion strategies, as well as the importance of balancing FC and LCA for optimal performance. Furthermore, ROSUM-MCTS proves robust against superficial modifications, such as variable renaming, maintaining summary quality where baselines degrade. These results establish ROSUM-MCTS as an effective and robust HDL summarization framework, paving the way for further research into reinforcement-enhanced code summarization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对硬件描述语言（HDL）代码摘要的强化学习优化方法ROSUM-MCTS，显著提升了摘要质量，并优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在代码摘要任务中表现优异，但对于VHDL、Verilog等硬件描述语言的摘要能力尚未得到充分研究，因此需要有针对性的方法提升其摘要效果。
AI.method: 提出ROSUM-MCTS：一种结合Monte Carlo Tree Search（MCTS）和LLM的代码摘要方法。该方法采用分层候选扩展机制融合局部与全局上下文，并利用综合奖励函数平衡摘要的功能正确性、内容充分性与流畅性，通过结构化探索和强化学习不断优化摘要结果。
AI.result: 在VHDL-eval和Verilog-eval两个数据集上，ROSUM-MCTS较各类基线方法在摘要效果上均有提升。消融实验表明，局部与全局扩展策略以及多目标奖励设计对结果提升至关重要。该方法在变量重命名等表层变换下仍能保持摘要质量，表现出较强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ROSUM-MCTS为HDL代码摘要提供了高效、鲁棒的新框架，为后续强化学习驱动的代码摘要研究奠定了基础。

title: The Last Visible Pixel: Probing Fine-Scale Perception in Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) excel at multimodal understanding and reasoning, yet their fine-grained visual perception remains underexplored. A natural extension of ``How many r are there in Strawberry?'' asks: how small a visual pattern can a VLM reliably perceive? As such, we introduce FineSightBench, a new benchmark that systematically probes this limit by separating perception tasks (pixel-level recognition of letters, shapes, objects) from reasoning tasks (spatial reasoning, counting, ordering over small targets) across controlled scales of 4--48px. Through comprehensive experiments and detailed failure mode analysis on state-of-the-art models, we reveal a sharp dissociation: perception saturates around 12px, while reasoning remains limited even at larger scales, with persistent numeracy and sequence errors. These findings expose fundamental deficiencies in VLMs' fine-scale visual reasoning that demand more rigorous evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FineSightBench基准，通过分离感知与推理任务，系统测评多模态模型对微小视觉模式的识别与推理能力。实验揭示模型感知能力约在12px饱和，但更高层次推理在更大尺度下仍有严重缺陷。
AI.motivation: 尽管当前视觉-语言模型在多模态理解与推理上表现优异，但对细粒度视觉感知能力关注较少。作者希望探究VLM能够可靠识别的最小视觉模式，为模型评估提供更细致刻度并推动模型能力提升。
AI.method: 提出FineSightBench基准，设计将像素级识别（字母、形状、物体）与推理任务（空间推理、计数、排序）分离，并控制目标尺寸（4-48px）。对多种主流VLM进行系统实验与失效模式分析。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，VLM的感知能力在约12px时趋于饱和，而推理能力在更大目标下（即便感知无障碍）仍存在显著的计数和排序错误。
AI.conclusion: VLM在细粒度视觉推理上存在根本性缺陷。未来模型需要更细致的评测与改进以提升此类能力。

title: LUNA-AD: Lightweight Uncertainty-Aware Language Model with Lifelong Learning for Autonomous Driving
summary: While large language models (LLMs) offer promising reasoning capabilities, their integration into safety-critical driving systems is hindered by limited reasoning diversity, high computational overhead, and static learning paradigms. To address these challenges, we propose LUNA-AD, a lightweight uncertainty-aware language model with lifelong learning for autonomous driving (AD). LUNA-AD features a tri-system architecture that reconciles complex multimodal behavioral reasoning, efficient deployment, and continual refinement. We design a multi-agent analytical system to generate uncertainty-aware decision-making demonstrations through diverse hypothesis exploration. A dual-head lightweight heuristic model is distilled to unify the inference of decision distributions and textual explanations while enabling efficient deployment. Furthermore, a reflection-driven lifelong learning mechanism operates on multimodal decision outputs and preserves strategic diversity, allowing for the refinement of candidate decisions and rationales via closed-loop feedback to enhance driving robustness. Extensive experiments on nuPlan benchmarks demonstrate that LUNA-AD achieves state-of-the-art success rates under both non-reactive and reactive modes, with drastically reduced inference latency compared to existing knowledge-driven AD frameworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LUNA-AD，一个轻量级、具备不确定性感知与终身学习能力的自动驾驶语言模型系统，显著提升了推理多样性与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在自动驾驶等安全关键领域中应用有限，主要受制于推理多样性不足、计算开销大和学习模式静态等问题。
AI.method: 提出LUNA-AD系统，包括三系统架构，利用多智能体分析系统生成多样化假设与不确定性感知的决策示例，通过轻量级双头启发模型蒸馏统一决策分布与文本解释。系统还配备反思驱动的终身学习机制，通过闭环反馈在多模态输出基础上持续优化。
AI.result: 在nuPlan基准上，LUNA-AD在非响应与响应模式均取得了业界最优成功率，且推理延迟大幅低于现有自动驾驶知识驱动框架。
AI.conclusion: LUNA-AD通过创新设计，实现了推理多样性、部署效率与终身学习并存，显著推动了自动驾驶领域大语言模型的实际应用能力。

title: Illusions of the Gold Standard: A Large-scale Analysis of Human Evaluation Protocols for Long-form Text Generation
summary: Human evaluation plays a critical role in assessing the quality of generated text. However, the reliability and reproducibility of these evaluations depend on transparent and well-documented protocols -- details that are frequently missing in current practice. In this work, we conduct a large-scale analysis of human evaluation protocols for evaluating long-form generation tasks in *CL conference publications from 2023--2025, including a full manual review of 284 papers and LLM-assisted analysis for another 1.8k+ papers. We define a set of 20 reportable criteria related to reproducibility of human evaluation studies, and apply these criteria to systematically examine reporting norms and practices within the community. We find widespread under-reporting of important aspects of human evaluation study design, leading to ambiguity about what was measured and how, who contributed judgments, and how judgments should be interpreted. Based on these findings, we outline actionable recommendations to support more transparent and reproducible reporting in future research. Our analysis code and annotated dataset can be found at: https://github.com/larchlab/Illusions-of-the-Gold-Standard

AI.tldr: 本文系统性分析了2023年至2025年CL会议论文中有关长文本生成任务的人类评估方案，指出相关报告存在重要信息严重缺失，并提出了提升透明度和可复现性的建议。
AI.motivation: 人类评估对生成文本的质量判定至关重要，但目前相关报告缺乏透明和细致的记录，影响了结果的可靠性和可复现性。作者希望厘清当前领域在报告规范方面的实际状况，并推动改进。
AI.method: 作者人工全面审查了284篇论文，并结合大语言模型对超过1800篇论文进行了辅助分析。他们定义并应用了20条可报告标准，系统评价人类评估报告的规范性。
AI.result: 结果显示，社区内关于人类评估设计的诸多关键信息普遍报道不足，如评估内容、评估者身份、评判标准解释等，导致评估结果的解读和复现存在歧义。
AI.conclusion: 作者据此提出了可操作的改进建议，以促进未来相关研究在报告流程上的透明和可复现性，并公开了分析代码和标注数据集以辅助学界发展。

title: VisualFLIP: Do Predictions Depend on Task-Critical Visual Evidence in Multimodal Reasoning?
summary: When a multimodal large language model answers a visual reasoning question correctly, is the prediction actually supported by the task-critical visual evidence? Correct answers can coexist with flawed reasoning, making accuracy alone an incomplete test of grounding. We introduce VisualFLIP, a paired benchmark with 1,374 images arranged as same-question perturbation pairs across cardinality, attribute, spatial, and logic tasks. Each pair keeps the question fixed but minimally changes the evidence so the gold answer deterministically flips. We evaluate 24 MLLMs with pair accuracy, which requires solving both sides of a pair, and Collapse Rate (CR), which measures how often a model that solves at least one side repeats the same non-empty answer for both images. Together, these metrics show that paired correctness and evidence dependence are related but distinct: capable models can still fail to update after task-critical visual changes, and collapse becomes more severe for some models when the edited image follows an earlier answer in a sequential setting. Further details are available on our project page: https://didizhu-judy.github.io/VisualFLIP/

AI.tldr: 提出了VisualFLIP基准，通过图像对检测多模态大模型（MLLMs）视觉推理是否真正依赖于视觉证据，而不仅仅是答案准确性。
AI.motivation: 仅凭准确率无法判断MLLMs推理是否真正基于关键视觉证据，因为模型可能答案正确但推理过程有误。需要评估模型的推理是否依赖实际图像证据。
AI.method: 建立了VisualFLIP数据集，包括1374组图像对及同一问题，每对只在决定性视觉证据上微调，使标准答案翻转。设计配对准确率和Collapse Rate（CR）两项指标，评估24个MLLMs的双边解答能力和在图像变换后是否依然重复给出相同答案。
AI.result: 实验发现，模型即使能答对问题，也常未能基于关键视觉变化调整答案。部分模型在序列情景下，后续图片容易重复前一次答案，collapse现象更严重。配对准确率和证据依赖性相关但又不同。
AI.conclusion: 现有多模态模型推理仍不足以保证真正依赖视觉证据，仅凭准确率评价不充分，VisualFLIP为评测推理证据依赖性提供了有效工具和新视角。

title: EgoPriMo: Egocentric Motion Generation for Interactive Humanoid Control
summary: Humanoid robots require whole-body motions that adapt to scene context, task requirements, and user intent. Motion tracking reproduces specified trajectories, and humanoid vision-language-action systems provide semantic interfaces, but neither offers a scalable and interactive prior for broad full-body behavior. We introduce EgoPriMo (Egocentric Motion Prior for Humanoid Robots), a unified framework that learns such priors from egocentric human demonstrations. Given egocentric observations and a text prompt, EgoPriMo reconstructs, generates, and forecasts SMPL-based full-body motion. Language is used as a high-level control signal rather than a complete motion specification. At the core of EgoPriMo is a Triple-stream DiT that jointly models body dynamics, egocentric visual context, and text; task-conditioning masks route different tasks and missing-modality data through the same checkpoint. Experiments on Nymeria and EgoExo4D show that one checkpoint improves egocentric motion generation over UniEgoMotion while supporting reconstruction and forecasting; the generated SMPL motions can also be executed by a Unitree humanoid controller. These results indicate a practical path from scalable egocentric observations to generalizable and interactive humanoid motion priors.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一个名为EgoPriMo的新框架，用于让类人机器人基于第一视角示范学习适应场景和任务的全身动作，通过融合视觉、身体动力学和文本信息，实现对动作的生成、重建和预测。
AI.motivation: 现有的动作跟踪和视觉-语言-动作系统各有局限：动作跟踪只能复现特定轨迹，语义系统缺乏可扩展、可交互的全身行为先验。为实现更泛化、互动式的机器人运动控制，需要能够从大规模人类第一视角动作中自动学习运动先验。
AI.method: 提出了EgoPriMo统一框架，从人类第一视角动作数据中学习运动先验。该系统以Triple-stream DiT为核心，联合建模身体动力学、视觉语境和文本信号，并采用任务条件掩码实现对不同任务和模态缺失的容错。用户可以输入第一视角观测和文本提示，系统输出SMPL格式的全身运动。
AI.result: 在Nymeria与EgoExo4D等数据集上，EgoPriMo模型在一个checkppoint下即可同时提升动作生成、重建和预测准确性，效果优于UniEgoMotion，且生成的动作可直接用于Unitree类人机器人控制。
AI.conclusion: EgoPriMo实现了从大规模第一视角观测到具有广泛泛化性和可交互性的类人机器人全身运动先验，为类人机械体的自主与互动式运动规划提供了可行路径。

title: From `May' to `Is': Certainty Distortion in Language Model Rewriting
summary: Humans increasingly turn to Language Models (LMs) in ways that shape beliefs and drive decisions, including discussing, rewriting, and summarizing information from scientific articles, news, and medical reports. However, in these domains, where how confidently a claim is expressed matters, little is known about whether LMs faithfully preserve it. In this work, we investigate certainty distortion in LMs, defined as meaningful changes in expressed certainty when semantic content is preserved. We propose an LM-based evaluation metric that is consistent with population-level judgments of certainty. Using this metric, we characterize certainty distortion across different sizes and families of models in the context of scientific and medical communication tasks. Our results show that certainty distortion affects up to 75\% of LM outputs and is systematically asymmetric in rewriting tasks with most LMs being 1.5-2$\times$ more likely to increase the expressed certainty than to decrease it. These effects can compound over repeated paraphrasing: in the medical domain, claude-haiku-4-5 increases certainty of 20\% examples after a single iteration, increasing to 40\% after five iterations. Prompt-based interventions reduce overall certainty distortion but do not eliminate it. Together, these findings reveal a general bias toward inflating expressed certainty, with direct implications for users who rely on LMs in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 本文发现语言模型在处理科学和医学内容时，倾向于增加表达的确信度（certainty），这种偏差在LM输出中十分普遍，且多次改写会使问题加剧，对高风险领域实际应用有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 在科学、新闻及医疗等关乎真实与置信表达的重要领域，人类越来越多地依赖语言模型（LMs）生成内容。然而，目前仍不清楚LMs在保持原文表达确信度方面是否可靠。作者希望填补这一空白，评估和揭示LMs在表达确信度上的潜在偏差。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的基于LM的评估指标，用于量化语言模型的确信度扭曲（certainty distortion），该指标与人工确信度判断相一致。作者用此方法考察了不同规模和家族的模型在科学与医学任务中的确信度扭曲现象。
AI.result: 约75%的LM输出存在确信度扭曲，且大多数模型在改写任务中更易于增强表达确信度（概率为1.5-2倍于降低确信度），该现象在多次重述后进一步加重。比如在医疗领域，某模型经过一次迭代对20%样本增强确信度，五次迭代后比例增至40%。基于Prompt的干预虽可缓解，但无法彻底消除此现象。
AI.conclusion: 大量主流语言模型存在过度增强确信度的系统性偏差，这一现象在高风险应用领域存在潜在危害，应引起重视并改进。

title: The Cross-Architecture Substrate: A Domain-Transcendent, Calibration-Surviving Geometric Invariant of Modern Vision Encoders
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures. 40th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2026)
summary: Different vision neural networks -- trained to classify, contrast, reconstruct, or match images to text -- should have correspondingly different internal representations. We report that they do not. After training, the top sixteen principal directions of variation inside thirteen modern vision encoders converge to the same sixteen-dimensional geometric object. We call this the cross-architecture substrate and study it with PCA, centred kernel alignment (CKA), and Pang 2026 calibration. The substrate transports across four visual domains (natural photographs, medical CT, satellite, microscopy) at median Procrustes-CKA 0.679, and across eight domains (adding sketches, depth, thermal infrared, astronomy) at 0.604, every pair >0.40. It survives Pang calibration globally (7.4x disc-vs-MAE separation, n=13,394) and locally (4.82-5.30, p<10^{-44}). It is not pixel statistics (0.263), not Gabor features (0.31), not a random projection (0.041), and emerges in the first 10% of training while accuracy keeps climbing. We deliver four applications: a label-free transferability filter beating LogME (3x faster, +0.15 Kendall-tau); a four-way domain detector (99.6% accuracy); a frozen low-shot probe (16 dims beat 768-dim DINOv2 by 3.78pp at N=50 labels per class); and a teacher-free distillation auxiliary matching trained-teacher KD on 33 pairs (7.56pp peak gain at 10% label fraction). The substrate does not cross modalities, does not help cross-paradigm distillation, and does not predict transfer quality (rho=0.08 against transfer accuracy).

AI.tldr: 不同类型的视觉神经网络经过训练后，其内部前16个主方向高度一致，形成统一的“跨架构基底（substrate）”，且能在多种视觉领域泛化。这一现象与像素统计、Gabor特征或随机投影等无关。基底可用于迁移学习、领域检测、小样本识别和蒸馏等应用。
AI.motivation: 作者想探究不同任务和架构的视觉神经网络在内部特征表示上有何异同，是否存在通用的表示基础，以及这种通用基底能否带来实际应用价值。此前普遍认为不同任务或架构的网络会收敛于不同的特征空间。
AI.method: 作者对13种主流视觉编码器（有分类、对比、重建、图像-文本匹配任务）进行了主成分分析（PCA）、中心化核对齐（CKA）和Pang 2026校准等手段，系统比较了其高维特征空间主方向的一致性。同时在8类不同视觉领域（如自然照片、医学CT、卫星图像、显微镜、素描、深度、红外、天文）验证了基底的一致性。
AI.result: 发现不同网络的前16个主方向几乎完全一致，Procrustes-CKA在四类视觉域间中值为0.679，八类为0.604，每对大于0.4。该基底也通过了Pang校准，并早在训练10%阶段即已出现。它优于像素统计、Gabor和随机投影。在下游任务中用于过滤、领域检测、小样本识别、免教师蒸馏等取得了实用效果。
AI.conclusion: 视觉神经网络内部存在高度统一的低维基底（substrate），覆盖多种架构和视觉领域。该基底可大幅简化迁移学习等实际任务流程，但并不适用于跨模态任务、不同网络范式间的蒸馏或转移性能预估。

title: ActProbe: Action-Space Probe for Early Failure Detection of Generative Robot Policies
summary: Generative robot policies fail unpredictably at deployment: they hesitate at critical moments, drift off-task, or commit to unrecoverable actions. Existing online failure detectors either require white-box access to policy internals or add runtime overhead through resampling and observation-side signals. Our empirical analysis shows that emitted action chunks themselves already carry strong predictive signal for impending failures in generative robot policies. Motivated by this observation, we introduce ActProbe, a lightweight, pure action-space detector that uses two compact signals available from a single forward pass: Temporal Consistency Error (TCE) between consecutive action chunks and Action Chunk Magnitude (ACM) of the current chunk. ActProbe maps these signals to per-step failure probabilities with a task-conditioned LSTM-MLP architecture. Across a diverse suite of generative robot policies and benchmarks, ActProbe raises alerts before failures become visually recognizable, improving the accuracy (F1)-timeliness Pareto frontier of failure detection by an average hypervolume gain of +12.7% over both internal- and external-feature baselines, with a +9.0% early-detection ROC-AUC lead on unseen tasks. ActProbe further transfers to deployment, predicting failures on unseen real-robot pick tasks and accelerating RL fine-tuning (PPO) with 2.9x fewer environment interactions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为ActProbe的动作空间轻量化故障检测方法，可在生成式机器人策略执行过程中提前预警，优于现有检测手段。
AI.motivation: 生成式机器人策略在实际部署时经常出现不可预期的失效（如犹豫、任务漂移、不可恢复操作），现有失效检测需依赖策略内部信息或引入较大运行开销，亟需一种高效、对策略无侵入的检测方法。
AI.method: 基于动作输出本身具有预测未来失败的信号，设计了ActProbe。该方法仅通过单步前向推理，提取连续动作块间的时序一致性误差（TCE）和动作块幅值（ACM），输入基于任务条件的LSTM-MLP模型，从而映射为每步失效概率。
AI.result: 实验覆盖多种生成式机器人策略和基准，ActProbe能在失效肉眼可见前发出预警，比基于内部和外部特征的对比基线在准确性及时效性上都表现更优（Pareto前沿超12.7%，早检AUC在新任务上领先9%），并可迁移至新的真实机器人任务，提升RL微调效率（环境交互次数减少2.9倍）。
AI.conclusion: ActProbe是一种高效、无需额外信息的动作空间失效检测器，在增强机器人安全性、减少调试成本方面效果显著，具备良好通用性与实用价值。

title: What Does Debiasing Really Remove? A Geometric Study of PCA-Based Gender Debiasing in Word Embeddings
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Source code available at https://github.com/AlexeyKresin/embedding-bias-geometry
summary: Debiasing methods based on principal component analysis (PCA) are broadly used to reduce gender bias in word embeddings used in LLMs, yet it remains unclear what aspects of bias they actually remove and how destructive this process is. These methods are based on the understanding that bias resides in a low-dimensional subspace, with the assumption that most of it can be captured by a few principal components. In this work, we conduct a systematic geometric analysis of PCA-based gender debiasing and investigate what is actually removed from the embedding space. Our experiments across multiple embeddings show that direct gender bias is primarily concentrated in the first principal component, supporting the low-rank bias hypothesis. However, associative bias measured by WEAT does not align with these principal directions and is instead spread across multiple embedding dimensions. Furthermore, as expected, we demonstrate that removing an increasing number of principal components leads to a consistent degradation of the embedding geometry, affecting semantic structure and vector relationships. These results reveal that PCA-based debiasing operates as a trade-off: while it effectively reduces certain forms of direct bias, it fails to eliminate distributed associations and introduces geometric distortion. Moreover, there is no universal optimal level of debiasing, as the balance between bias reduction and semantic preservation depends on the chosen metric and embedding. Overall, our findings suggest that bias in word embeddings is not purely low-rank and that simple subspace removal methods may be insufficient for comprehensive debiasing.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了基于主成分分析（PCA）的性别去偏方法在词嵌入中的实际效果，发现该方法仅能消除部分直接偏见，但无法全面消除分布在多维空间中的关联性偏见，并且过度去偏会损害词嵌入的语义结构。
AI.motivation: 当前PCA去偏方法被广泛应用于减少LLMs中词嵌入的性别偏见，但去偏的实际成效、去除了哪些偏见、以及对词嵌入空间的破坏程度尚不明确。研究动机在于揭示PCA去偏的真实作用与局限。
AI.method: 对PCA去偏方法进行了系统的几何分析，比较了去除不同主成分对嵌入空间的影响，并用WEAT等工具评估直接偏见和关联性偏见的分布和去除效果。
AI.result: 直接性别偏见主要集中在第一主成分，PCA能有效减少这部分偏见。但关联性偏见分布在多个维度，PCA方法对其去除效果有限。去除过多主成分会破坏嵌入的语义结构和向量关系。没有一刀切的最优去偏程度。
AI.conclusion: PCA去偏方法在消除直接偏见方面有效，但不能彻底解决多维分布的关联性偏见，且容易破坏嵌入的语义结构。词嵌入中的偏见并非仅为低秩，单纯的子空间去除不足以实现全面去偏。

title: C3VD-DEFCOL: A Deformable Colonoscopy Dataset with Time-Resolved 3D Ground Truth and Realistic Appearance
summary: 3D reconstruction could improve colonoscopy by estimating mucosal coverage and alerting clinicians to missed regions during screening. However, algorithm development is limited as no current datasets provide both a realistic in vivo appearance and dense, time-resolved 3D ground truth, especially under non-rigid deformation. We present C3VD-DEFCOL, a framework and dataset for evaluating deformable colonoscopy reconstruction with paired geometry and realistic texture. Starting from C3VD/C3VDv2 colon meshes and camera trajectories, we generate controlled deformations of the colon surface, including peristaltic waves and centerline motion, and render per-frame depth, surface normals, optical flow, camera poses, and time-stamped 3D meshes. We then use the rendered geometry, primarily depth, to condition an LTX-2.3-based sim-to-real translation model that produces RGB clips with in vivo-like mucosal color, texture, vasculature, and specular appearance while preserving the underlying 3D scene structure. The resulting dataset contains 110 videos from 11 unique colon mesh geometries, with varying camera trajectories, appearances, and parameterized deformation regimes, including three peristaltic severity levels that serve as controlled evaluation axes. We evaluate the generated videos using appearance realism, geometric consistency, and temporal consistency metrics, and use the paired ground truth to benchmark the downstream task of pose estimation in deformable 3D reconstruction. Our experiments show how pose estimation error increases with increasing deformation severity, providing a controlled stress test that is not possible with existing in vivo datasets. Overall, C3VD-DEFCOL is designed as a reproducible, quantitative evaluation platform for testing deformable 3D reconstruction algorithms, with the goal of reducing the domain gap between synthetic datasets and in vivo colonoscopy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了C3VD-DEFCOL框架和数据集，实现了真实质感与高密度3D真值结合的结肠镜变形重建评测数据，用于评测和推动下游任务（如位姿估计）精度提升。
AI.motivation: 现有结肠镜3D重建算法开发受限于缺乏兼具真实外观和稠密、时序3D真值的数据集，尤其是在结肠表面非刚性变形条件下。这样的数据集对于验证覆盖度、德形成像算法和提升临床可靠性至关重要。
AI.method: 基于C3VD/C3VDv2结肠三维网格和相机轨迹，模拟实际内镜下结肠的动态变形（包括蠕动等运动），渲染每帧深度、法线、光流、相机位姿与带时间戳的三维网格；随后以渲染几何（深度为主）作为条件，利用LTX-2.3 sim-to-real翻译模型合成RGB图像，实现高度仿真的内镜影像。最终得到含11种独特结肠结构、110段不同相机行为、三种变形力度的视频数据集。
AI.result: 本数据集能在不同变形难度、不同真实感和运动情况下定量评估算法。通过对下游变形3D重建的位姿估计算法性能分析，实验证明变形越剧烈时，位姿估计误差也显著升高，体现了数据集在可控应力测试方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: C3VD-DEFCOL为结肠镜非刚性三维重建算法的可复现、可量化评测提供了理想平台，有助于缩小合成数据与真实内镜数据之间的域差距，为未来算法研究及实际应用提供了关键支撑。

title: Towards End to End Motion Planning and Execution for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles Using Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) traditionally rely on complex, heavily engineered pipelines for perception, path planning, and motion control. This paper explores the feasibility of an end-to-end Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) approach that maps raw sensor data directly to thruster commands, reducing manual engineering. We propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning (HRL) architecture splitting the problem into two Markov Decision Processes. A High-Level (HL) policy operating at 2Hz processes raw $84 \times 84$ pixel monocular camera frames, stacked $100 \times 100$ pixel forward-looking imaging sonar, and proprioceptive data to generate spatial subgoals. Simultaneously, a Low-Level (LL) policy operating at 10Hz converts these subgoals into thruster commands. The HL policy is trained using Reinforcement Learning from Prior Demonstrations (RLPD) within a modified Sample-Efficient Robotic Reinforcement Learning (SERL) framework, while the LL policy utilizes Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) combined with Hindsight Experience Replay (HER). Evaluated in the high-fidelity HoloOcean simulator, our method demonstrates successful obstacle avoidance, achieving trajectory lengths closely approximating (within 4% to 6% of) an $\text{RRT}^*$ planning baseline. Furthermore, the learned policy exhibits strong robustness to simulated sensor noise and decreased visibility. While the system navigates familiar geometries effectively, experiments reveal generalization limitations when encountering unvisited areas with novel obstacle shapes. Ultimately, this work demonstrates the promise of sample-efficient, end-to-end DRL for underwater navigation using minimal computational hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端深度强化学习（DRL）方法用于自主水下机器人（AUV）导航，实现从原始传感器数据直接到推进器指令的映射，并验证了其有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统AUV感知、路径规划和运动控制依赖复杂且工程繁重的流程，难以适应环境变化且开发成本高。本文旨在探索降低人工工程投入，提升AUV自主导航能力的方法。
AI.method: 采用分层强化学习（HRL）结构，将任务分为高层（HL）和低层（LL）两个马尔可夫决策过程。高层以2Hz频率处理摄像头和声纳等多模态原始数据，输出空间子目标；低层以10Hz将子目标转化为具体推进器指令。高层策略用结合演示的强化学习（RLPD）在改进的SERL框架下训练，低层策略用基于SAC和HER的算法优化。
AI.result: 在高保真度HoloOcean仿真环境中，提出方法能成功实现障碍物规避，其轨迹长度与RRT*路径规划基线方法持平（误差仅4%-6%）。该方法对传感器噪声和能见度降低表现出高度鲁棒性，但在全新环境和障碍物形状条件下泛化能力有限。
AI.conclusion: 端到端DRL方法在AUV导航上展现出良好的性能与样本效率，并可在硬件资源有限的情况下运行，但仍需进一步改善泛化能力以应对未知环境。

title: Neutrality Bites: Gender Representation in AI-Generated Animal Stories
comment: FAccT(ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency) 2026
summary: Gender bias in AI-generated stories is a well-documented problem. While much attention has been paid to reducing or mitigating this bias, it is not always clear whether interventions produce genuinely fairer results. To investigate this issue, we examine how large language models (LLMs) handle gender assignment in a narrative context that is popular, highly ambiguous, and also known to closely reproduce human stereotypes: stories about talking animals. We prompt six leading LLMs to complete an English-language story about seven different anthropomorphic animal characters whose gender is unstated. We additionally iterate with four different narrative settings and a range of model temperatures. Across the 23.8K stories, we find that models frequently avoid gendering the animal character in the story (19% on average) or use gender-neutral language like "it" or "its" (38.2% on average). However, when gender is assigned, there is a significant masculine bias. Feminine animal characters are virtually absent, present in just 2.2% of stories vs. 40.6% that feature masculine characters. Our findings point to a broader argument: neutrality bites. In other words, models that prioritize neutrality to address social bias may actually contribute to the erasure of marginalized perspectives and identities. We suggest that alternative strategies beyond neutrality need to be pursued, such as ones that more equally distribute social possibilities across imagined subjects.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLMs）在创作关于会说话动物的故事中，性别分配方面产生的偏见，发现模型虽然常用中性或未定性的语言规避性别，但在具体指派时表现出显著的男性化偏向。
AI.motivation: AI生成内容中的性别偏见广受关注，目前主要通过强化中性或减少性别指派来缓解，但这种做法是否真正实现了公平尚未明确。论文动机是评估大模型在流行且易现人类刻板印象的叙事情境下（即动物故事），性别分配的真实表现及其影响。
AI.method: 选取六种主流大语言模型，针对七个性别未指明的拟人化动物角色，在四种不同叙事背景与不同温度设置下，生成23800篇英文故事，对比分析性别表达分布。
AI.result: 模型平均有19%会完全回避动物角色性别，38.2%采用“it/its”等性别中性语言；但一旦赋予性别，男性角色占比达40.6%，而女性角色仅2.2%。
AI.conclusion: 单纯追求中性表达会造成边缘身份的“消失”，未能实现真正的公平。作者建议，应采用更主动、多元的策略，确保不同社会身份在生成内容中的平等呈现。

title: TBD-VLA: Temporal Block Diffusion Vision Language Action Model
summary: Discrete Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models typically formulate action generation as next-token prediction over discretized action spaces, conditioning each token autoregressively on prior context. While effective, this paradigm incurs high inference latency and largely ignores the temporal structure inherent in action trajectories. Recent efforts introduce parallel decoding to improve efficiency, enabling faster inference, but lack explicit mechanisms for modeling token dependencies. We introduce TBD-VLA, a discrete token-based VLA framework that incorporates block diffusion to enable temporal action generation. We partition action sequences into temporal blocks and perform masked discrete diffusion within each block, while maintaining autoregressive generation across blocks. This design unifies temporal autoregression and parallel action decoding, achieving both strong temporal coherence and improved inference speed. In addition, the explicit temporal modeling enables asynchronous execution of action chunks (e.g., Real-Time Chunking) via temporal in-painting. TBD-VLA significantly outperforms prior VLA approaches in both simulation and real-world manipulation tasks, offering a scalable path toward fast, temporally aware, discrete VLA models. Project webpage: https://tbd-vla.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的离散视觉-语言-动作模型TBD-VLA，可以更快、更高效地产生高时序关联的动作序列。其方法兼顾了模型的推理速度和动作的时间连贯性，超越了以往方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的离散视觉-语言-动作模型在生成动作时采用自回归方式，推理速度慢且忽视了动作轨迹中的时序结构。提高推理效率、增强时序建模是当前的主要挑战。
AI.method: TBD-VLA将动作序列划分为时间块，对每个时间块内部采用离散扩散模型进行掩码生成，各块之间保持自回归。这样实现了块内并行、块间顺序，统一了并行与自回归风格。同时，该结构支持异步动作块执行，如实时分块补全（temporal in-painting）。
AI.result: TBD-VLA在模拟和实际操控任务中，动作生成速度和时序连贯性大幅优于此前VLA方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实现更快速、时序感知的离散VLA模型提供了可扩展路径，具备广阔应用前景。

title: Two Bridges, One Pathway: From VLMs to Generalizable VLAs with Embodied Trajectory-Coupled Data
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are powerful general-purpose reasoners, yet converting them into robot control policies (VLAs) is surprisingly difficult. The root cause is a two-fold gap: VLMs are trained on internet-scale images with language-understanding objectives, while VLAs must perceive robot scenes and predict motor actions. Fine-tuning a VLM directly on robot action data forces the model to cross both gaps at once -- the learning curve is steep and the rich generalizations learned during pretraining tend to degrade rather than transfer. We argue that this gap can be bridged gradually with the right intermediate data. We introduce \emph{embodied trajectory-coupled (ETC) data} -- vision-language supervision derived from the same robot scenes and trajectories used for action learning. Because ETC data shares the visual context of robot operation while retaining familiar language-understanding objectives, it provides a natural stepping stone between VLM pretraining and VLA fine-tuning. Building on this, we design a three-stage training recipe. Distribution Bridging first adapts the VLM to embodied visual-language semantics. Objective Bridging then gradually shifts the model toward action prediction while preserving the acquired representations. Retentive Adaptation finally specializes the policy to the target deployment domain. We further show that mixing task-relevant out-of-distribution ETC data with a small amount of action data enables the model to generalize to novel visual-language conditions without requiring additional robot demonstrations. Simulation and real-robot experiments confirm that this gradual bridging strategy is the key to transferring VLM generalization into robust, deployable robot policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种逐步桥接视觉语言模型（VLM）与机器人控制策略（VLA）之间差距的训练框架，极大提升了VLM泛化能力在机器人领域的实际应用。
