To address this limitation, we explored generating synthetic crack data, which complements real data and improves training effectiveness. The real dataset consists of masonry crack images collected from buildings in Bologna and surrounding areas. In contrast, the synthetic dataset was generated using a crack overlay tool that adds cracks to background images in a controlled orientation and placement. The real dataset was used to train several DL architectures, to identify the best-performing model (InceptionV4) employed for experiments with generated data. Six training scenarios were tested in InceptionV4 by varying the ratio of real and synthetic data, with evaluation performed on a test set composed of real images using the F1-score and mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) metrics. Results show that training on synthetic data plus a modest addition of 20% real data achieves results comparable to training on real data only. Moreover, the 20/80 scenario (synthetic/real) achieved an 76% F1-score and 80% mean IoU, outperforming the real-only case. As can be seen, the method demonstrates the potential of synthetic data to reduce collection efforts while enhancing crack detection accuracy.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了通过合成裂缝数据来辅助深度学习模型识别建筑裂缝，以提升检测效果并减少真实数据收集成本。
AI.motivation: CNN等深度学习模型在裂缝识别上表现优秀，但其性能严重依赖于大量多样化的真实数据。采集建筑复杂表面（如砖石结构）的裂缝图像耗时、难度大且数据稀缺，现有公开数据又无法满足需求。为提升模型训练效率，减少数据采集负担，作者尝试引入合成数据辅助训练。
AI.method: 作者收集了来自意大利博洛尼亚及其周边地区的真实砖石裂缝图像，并使用裂缝叠加工具，在无裂缝背景图像上生成可控方向和位置的合成裂缝数据。在不同真实/合成数据比例下，利用多种深度学习架构进行训练，最终选定InceptionV4为主模型。通过六种比例组合，采用F1分数和mIoU等指标在真实测试集上评估表现。
AI.result: 结果显示，使用合成数据加20%真实数据训练，在F1分数和mIoU指标上与仅用真实数据训练相当，甚至略优（F1=76%，IoU=80%），且减少了对真实数据的需求。纯合成数据也能获得较好效果。20/80合成/真实比甚至优于全真实数据训练。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能够显著降低裂缝检测所需的真实数据收集工作量，提升检测准确性，是复杂表面裂缝自动检测的有效技术补充。

title: Safe, Fluent and Acceptable Motion Generation and Execution for Human--Robot Interaction in Manufacturing Environments
summary: Robots operating in human environments must not only ensure physical safety but also exhibit behaviors that are understandable, fluent, and acceptable to human partners. This paper investigates motion generation strategies that combine safety guarantees with interaction quality considerations, such as motion smoothness and human comfort. While the design of robots capable of ensuring safety in shared human-robot environments has enabled closer and more advanced forms of interaction, these new proximity-based tasks require moving beyond purely technical considerations. In particular, robot behavior must also be addressed from psycho-cognitive and social perspectives. In this context, we argue for the relevance of integrating social-aware motion control into robotic systems. First, we identify the motion parameters that influence human perception and operator experience. Then, we implement a Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework that generates four distinct socially-informed robot behaviors. Finally, we conduct a user study to evaluate and validate these behaviors and assess their social impact on non-expert participants. The results demonstrate that variations in robot behavior significantly affect the perceived social acceptability of the system. These findings highlight the importance of incorporating human-centered considerations into motion generation strategies for robots operating in shared environments.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了机器人在保证安全的同时，如何通过优化运动策略提升与人类的交互质量，强调了社会感知运动控制的重要性，并通过实验验证了其对人类体验的正面影响。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人日益融入人类环境，除了物理安全外，还需要提升机器人行为的可理解性、流畅性和可接受性。本文动机在于满足更高质量的人机交互需求，特别是从心理和社会角度优化机器人的行动表现。
AI.method: 作者首先分析了影响人类对机器人行为感知的重要运动参数，继而基于模型预测控制（MPC）实现了四种带有社会认知特征的机器人行为。最后通过用户研究，评估和验证了这些行为对普通参与者的社会影响。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，机器人运动行为的不同对用户对于系统社会可接受性的感知有显著影响。加入社会感知因素后，机器人被认为更加令人舒适和易于接纳。
AI.conclusion: 将以人为本、社会感知的考虑融入机器人运动生成策略对提升人机共处环境的交互质量至关重要。

title: Cross Paraphrastic Invariance Learning for Hallucination Detection
summary: Large language models (LLMs) frequently generate hallucinations, which are unsupported by a source document. To avoid costly LLM-as-evaluator pipelines and the heavy annotation demands of existing classifiers, we propose CPIL (Cross Paraphrastic Invariance Learning), a two-stage Siamese framework that maximizes the utility of existing labeled data. Concretely, CPIL constructs informative training pairs by: (i) generating paraphrastic views of each document-claim example as positives, and explicitly aligning their representations to enforce invariance to surface form; and (ii) mining same-document, opposite-label pairs as hard negatives to sharpen document-sensitive decision boundaries. Then CPIL conduct a two-stage model training: Stage 1 performs contrastive pretraining to learn a paraphrase-invariant, grounding-aware embedding space; and Stage 2 attaches a lightweight classifier for binary groundedness. On the LLM-AggreFact benchmark (11 tasks), CPIL surpasses strong baselines concerning F1 scores with only ~1% labeled data, showing its prediction superiority and label efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CPIL（Cross Paraphrastic Invariance Learning）的新方法，有效检测大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的幻觉（hallucination），且仅需少量标注数据，即可优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在文字生成中经常引入与事实无关或不准确的信息（幻觉），而现有检测方法通常依赖昂贵的人工评估或大量标注数据，实用性受限。
AI.method: 提出双塔Siamese框架CPIL，分为两阶段：第一阶段利用对比学习，通过正负样本配对学习与表面表达无关、具备语境感知的表征空间；第二阶段在此表征基础上，训练轻量二分类器判断生成内容是否有事实依据。正样本为同一语料不同复述，负样本为同文档内异标签对。
AI.result: 在LLM-AggreFact基准测试（共11项任务）中，CPIL仅用约1%的标注数据，F1分数超越多种强大对比方法，表现出预测精度与数据效率兼优。
AI.conclusion: CPIL有效利用有限标注资源，显著提升大型语言模型幻觉检测性能，为实际应用提供了高效、低成本的检测方案。

title: Sci-Rho: A Multilingual Visually-Grounded Symbolic Benchmark for STEM Problems
summary: Symbolic benchmarks have emerged as a key approach to assess model robustness under minor modifications to STEM-related questions. However, existing symbolic benchmarks mostly remain limited to mathematical reasoning, lack visual grounding, and are predominantly in English. In this work, we introduce Sci-Rho (Science Rhobustness), a dynamic benchmark for visually-grounded STEM problems spanning five subjects and seven languages, comprising 4,242 problem templates (606 per language) crafted by domain experts, including Olympiad medalists. Each template is implemented as executable Python code that generates diverse but equivalent problem instances by varying numerical values, visual patterns, geometric shapes, color schemes, and function types, resulting in 42,420 instances in total, each paired with reasoning steps and ground-truth solutions. We evaluated 17 state-of-the-art VLMs and discovered a noticeable gap between worst-case accuracy (defined as the proportion of problem templates that a model answers correctly across every generated variation) and average accuracy. We also discovered that smaller models show noticeable performance degradation across languages, whereas proprietary and larger models remain robust. Step-level evaluation reflects this same trend, revealing a significant gap between average F1 and worst-case F1 scores. Finally, our inspection of attention heads of a VLM reveals substantial cross-lingual variation in the relative attention allocated to image tokens compared to text tokens. Our work highlights the importance of evaluation beyond static benchmarks as a metric to measure the quality of VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Sci-Rho基准，用于多语言、多学科、视觉相关的STEM问题的符号化鲁棒性评测，并对多种主流视觉语言模型进行了测试。结果显示不同模型在最坏情况和平均准确率之间存在显著差距，也揭示了模型在不同语言下的鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的符号化基准主要集中在数学推理领域，缺乏视觉相关性和多语种特性，无法全面评估视觉语言模型在STEM领域的鲁棒性。因此需要一个更加全面、动态、多语言支持的基准。
AI.method: 提出Sci-Rho基准，涵盖5个科目、7种语言，共4242个专家设计的模板，通过变换数值、图形、颜色、函数等生成多样但等价的问题实例，每个实例有推理步骤和标准答案。对比17种主流视觉语言模型的表现，包括最坏情况和平均准确率、逐步评估等。
AI.result: 测试发现模型在最坏情况准确率（所有变体均答对的比例）与平均准确率之间存在较大差距；小模型在多语种下性能下降明显，大模型更稳定。分步评估表现一致，F1分数也存在显著差距。模型在不同语言背景下对图像和文本关注度分布不同。
AI.conclusion: 现有模型对多样化、多语种视觉STEM问题表现不均，单一静态基准不足以真实评价模型能力。采用动态、多语言、多模式的基准如Sci-Rho更能反映VLM的实际表现和不足。

title: Guided Discovery of New Behaviors using Diffusion Policies
summary: Diffusion models have become a powerful tool for generative modeling in robotics, with diffusion policies excelling at modeling multimodal action-trajectory distributions. However, when demonstrations are limited, standard sampling often reproduces dominant behaviors while neglecting valid but rare modes, limiting the discovery of novel solutions. Existing approaches, such as guidance methods or combining reinforcement learning with diffusion, either push samples into infeasible regions or struggle to escape local minima, failing to systematically uncover diverse behaviors. To address these challenges, we propose a framework that combines Feynman-Kac correctors with a novel guiding potential that systematically guides diffusion policy samples towards promising yet underrepresented samples. These trajectories are refined using sampling-based trajectory optimization and reincorporated into the training set to retrain the diffusion policy. Our method effectively mines and repairs novel trajectories, enabling the systematic discovery of diverse and executable behaviors. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework across a range of manipulation environments, consistently discovering new behaviors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Feynman-Kac修正器与新颖导引势的扩散策略挖掘方法，能系统地发现和优化机器人任务中的多样化新行为。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在演示有限时倾向生成主流行为，忽略有效但稀有的行为模式，限制了创新解的发现。现有针对多样性的方法有各自的缺陷，如进入不可行区域或困于局部最优。
AI.method: 本文结合Feynman-Kac修正器和自定义的导引势，系统地引导扩散策略采样，挖掘尚未被充分学习的有前景轨迹。对新轨迹应用基于采样的轨迹优化方法优化后，将其添加回训练集，不断迭代学习。
AI.result: 该方法在多个机器人操作仿真环境下表现优异，能够持续发现和学习到新的、多样化的行为。
AI.conclusion: 本框架能有效地挖掘、优化、补充新行为，突破传统扩散策略受限于主流行为的问题，促进了机器人任务中多样性与创新性的提升。

title: Constrained Paraphrase Consistency for LLM Hallucination Detection
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can generate factually inconsistent claims, motivating accurate and scalable hallucination detectors. Prior work largely enlarges training sets via synthesis or new annotations, introducing increasing cost and potential bias while underusing the consistency implied by semantically equivalent paraphrases. We propose Consistency-Constrained Hallucination Detector (CCHD), which formulates training as a constrained optimization problem. The standard cross-entropy on original document-claim pairs is complemented by (i) paraphrase-consistency constraints bounding divergence across paraphrased views, and (ii) label-preservation constraints tying paraphrases to ground truth. We solve the problem by gradient descent-ascent over model parameters and per-view Lagrange multipliers, adding only a few scalar dual variables and no inference-time overhead. With DeBERTa and Flan-T5 backbones, CCHD consistently outperforms strong baselines (FactCG, MiniCheck, and AlignScore) on standard factuality benchmarks, demonstrating its superiority on hallucination detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为一致性约束幻觉检测器（CCHD）的新方法，用于提升大语言模型生成内容的事实一致性检测能力。该方法在标准损失之外引入了基于同义改写一致性的约束，无需大量额外标注数据，且无需推理时附加负担，在多个事实性检测基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型容易生成与事实不符的信息（即“幻觉”），现有检测方法通常需要大量合成或新标注的数据，这既昂贵又可能引入偏差，因此需要一种更高效、低成本且准确的幻觉检测方式。
AI.method: 作者提出CCHD方法，将训练过程视为带有约束的优化问题：在常规交叉熵损失基础上，加入同义改写视角间的一致性约束和标签保持约束，通过梯度下降-上升与拉格朗日乘数联合优化，仅需增加少量变量，无需增加推理时的时间开销。
AI.result: 基于DeBERTa和Flan-T5骨干的CCHD方法，在多个标准事实性检测基准任务上，检测幻觉的能力优于FactCG、MiniCheck和AlignScore等现有强力基线模型。
AI.conclusion: CCHD能够高效利用同义改写带来的语义一致性来提升事实一致性检测，无需大规模新标注数据，且在有效性和效率上优于现有主流方法，推动了幻觉检测领域的发展。

title: DyCo-RL: Dynamic Cross-Modal Coordination for Visual Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a leading paradigm for enhancing visual reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing RLVR methods optimize primarily for the reasoning outcome, fundamentally overlooking the fine-grained cross-modal coordination required during the generation process. Through token-level analyses and controlled interventions, we reveal that during Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, MLLMs frequently fail to dynamically alternate between extracting visual evidence and synthesizing textual context-a coordination breakdown that is causally linked to reasoning failures. Motivated by these findings, we propose DyCo-RL, which integrates dynamic cross-modal coordination into RLVR optimization. Specifically, DyCo-RL uses the Fisher-Rao geodesic distance to measure within-modality attention shifts, assigning tokens to either visually-oriented or text-oriented functional roles. It then evaluates the alignment between a token's actual attention allocation and its assigned role, leveraging this score for alignment-guided advantage reweighting during policy optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the algorithm-agnostic DyCo-RL, when applied to Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B, consistently improves four representative RLVR algorithms across seven benchmarks spanning visual-centric and mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DyCo-RL的新方法，将动态跨模态协同整合进了可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）过程中，从而显著提升了多模态大语言模型在视觉推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法主要关注推理结果，而忽视了推理过程中精细的跨模态（视觉与文本）协同，导致模型经常在链式思维（CoT）推理时在视觉提证和文本合成之间切换失败，从而推理失败。
AI.method: 提出DyCo-RL框架，通过Fisher-Rao测地距离度量模态内注意力的变化，并为每个token分配视觉导向或文本导向的功能角色。然后评估token的真实注意力分配与其角色的匹配度，并将该分数用于策略优化时的加权。该方法不依赖具体算法，可泛化至多种RLVR实现。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B模型和七项涵盖视觉和数学推理的基准任务上，DyCo-RL能够稳定提升四个主流RLVR算法的表现。
AI.conclusion: 将动态跨模态协调机制融入RLVR优化能有效解决多模态大模型推理时的角色切换失误，促进视觉与文本信息的协同推理，显著提升模型综合推理能力。

title: RGB-S: Image-Aligned Tactile Saliency for Robust Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Effective visuo-tactile integration is critical for robotic dexterous manipulation, especially when visual observations are unreliable or occluded. However, robustly aligning sparse, heterogeneous tactile measurements with dense visual representations remains a fundamental challenge. Most existing approaches require policies to learn cross-modal correspondences implicitly from limited demonstrations, without leveraging geometric priors. As a result, they are often data-inefficient and generalize poorly when visual observations are degraded. To address this limitation, we propose a framework that explicitly grounds physical contacts in the image domain. Using robot forward kinematics and camera calibration, we project tactile sensor locations directly onto the RGB image plane. We then render force-modulated Gaussian saliency maps to model spatial uncertainty arising from kinematic and calibration errors. By integrating these 2D spatial anchors through a zero-initialized conditioning architecture, our method injects physical contact priors into standard visual backbones while preserving pre-trained visual representations. We evaluate our method on six dexterous manipulation tasks in both simulation and the real world under severe visual occlusions. Real-world experiments show that explicit RGB-S grounding in the image domain improves real-world occluded manipulation success rates by $26.7$ percentage points over the strongest implicit visuo-tactile baseline, suggesting its improved spatial reasoning and robustness to occlusion. Project page: touch-as-saliency.github.io

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种将机器人触觉信息明确投影到视觉图像上的方法，显著提升了在视觉被遮挡时的操作表现。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人在复杂操作任务中，触觉与视觉信息难以高效对齐，尤其在视线受阻时，性能下降明显，且数据利用率低、泛化性差。研究动机是提高机器人在视觉受限环境下操作的鲁棒性和空间推理能力。
AI.method: 方法上，作者利用机器人正向运动学和相机标定，将触觉传感器的信息直接映射到RGB图像平面，并通过受力调制的高斯显著性图建模空间不确定性。采用零初始化条件结构，将物理接触先验注入标准视觉网络中，同时保留预训练的视觉特征。
AI.result: 在六项仿真及现实中的灵巧操作任务测试，尤其在严重视觉遮挡环境下，所提方法比最强的隐式视觉—触觉融合基线在真实环境下提升了26.7个百分点的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 明确地将触觉信息映射到视觉图像域，有效提升了机器人在遮挡情况下的空间感知和操控能力，展示出更优的泛化与鲁棒性。

title: TextEconomizer: Enhancing Lossy Text Compression with Denoising Transformers and Entropy Coding
summary: Lossy text compression reduces data size while preserving core meaning, making it well-suited for summarization, automated analysis, and digital archives. Despite the dominance of transformer-based models in language modeling, integrating context vectors and entropy coding into Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq) generation remains underexplored. A key challenge lies in identifying the most informative context vectors from encoder output and incorporating entropy coding to enhance storage efficiency while maintaining high-quality outputs, even under noisy text. We introduce TextEconomizer, an encoder-decoder framework paired with a transformer neural network that reduces variable-sized inputs by 50% to 80% without prior knowledge of dataset dimensions. Our model achieves competitive compression ratios via entropy coding while delivering near-perfect text quality, assessed by BLEU, ROUGE, METEOR, and semantic similarity scores. TextEconomizer operates with approximately 153x fewer parameters than comparable models, achieving a 5.39x compression ratio without sacrificing semantic quality. We also evaluate an LSTM-based autoencoder achieving a state-of-the-art 67x compression ratio with 196x fewer parameters, and LLaMAFormer, a modified transformer with 263x fewer parameters than ICAE while maintaining competitive text quality. TextEconomizer significantly surpasses existing transformer-based models in balancing memory efficiency and high-fidelity outputs, marking a breakthrough in lossy compression with optimal space utilization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新性的有损文本压缩框架TextEconomizer，在大幅降低文本数据尺寸的同时，保持了高语义质量和内存高效性。
AI.motivation: 在自动摘要、自动分析及数字档案等应用场景中，需要高效地压缩文本数据以节省存储空间，但现有的基于transformer的模型很少将上下文向量与熵编码结合用于Seq2Seq生成，且难以在保持高输出质量的同时提升压缩效率。
AI.method: 提出了TextEconomizer框架，结合transformer神经网络，通过有效选取encoder输出的上下文向量，并集成熵编码技术，不依赖于数据集大小事先知识，可将数据编码压缩50%~80%。同时对比评估了LSTM自编码器和新型改进transformer（LLaMAFormer）的性能。
AI.result: TextEconomizer参数量仅为竞品的1/153，达到5.39倍的压缩比，在BLEU、ROUGE、METEOR以及语义相似度等多项指标上保持近乎完美的文本质量。LSTM自编码器可达67倍压缩，LLaMAFormer用更少参数保持较好质量。
AI.conclusion: TextEconomizer在文本有损压缩领域，在存储效率与输出质量之间取得了最佳平衡，显著超越现有变换器类模型，是文本压缩的突破性工作。

title: Robust-U1: Can MLLMs Self-Recover Corrupted Visual Content for Robust Understanding?
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in visual understanding, yet their performance degrades significantly under real-world visual corruptions. While existing robustness enhancement approaches exist, they are limited: black-box feature alignment lacks interpretability, and white-box text-based reasoning cannot restore lost pixel-level details. This work investigates a fundamental research question: Can MLLMs recover corrupted visual content by themselves? To address this, we propose Robust-U1, a novel framework that equips MLLMs with explicit visual self-recovery capability for robust understanding. The approach comprises three core stages: supervised fine-tuning for initial reconstruction, reinforcement learning with dual rewards (pixel-level SSIM and semantic-level CLIP similarity) for aligning high visual quality, and multimodal reasoning that jointly considers both the corrupted input and the recovered image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Robust-U1 achieves state-of-the-art robustness on the real-world corruption benchmark and maintains superior performance under adversarial corruptions on general VQA benchmarks. Analysis confirms that high-quality visual recovery directly enhances reasoning performance, establishing self-recovery as a critical mechanism for robust visual understanding. The source code is available at https://github.com/jqtangust/Robust-U1.

AI.tldr: MLLMs在遇到真实视觉腐败时表现大幅下降，本文提出Robust-U1框架，使MLLMs具备视觉自我恢复能力，显著提升鲁棒性和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管MLLMs 在视觉理解方面有很大进展，但对现实环境下的视觉腐败（如噪声、模糊等）的鲁棒性较差。现有方法存在解释性差或无法恢复像素级细节等问题，因此需要探索新的机制提升多模态大模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: Robust-U1包含三步：1）有监督微调实现初步图像重建；2）利用双重奖赏（像素级SSIM和语义级CLIP相似度）进行强化学习以提升重建效果；3）将恢复图像与原腐败输入共同用于多模态推理，实现更健壮的理解。
AI.result: 在真实视觉腐败基准下，Robust-U1刷新了最优鲁棒性，且在通用VQA基准中的对抗性环境下仍能保持高水平表现。实验和分析表明高质量图像恢复能直接提升模型推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 视觉自我恢复机制对提升MLLMs视觉理解稳健性至关重要。Robust-U1为提升多模态大模型鲁棒性提供了有效新方案。

title: Unifying Object-Centric World Models and Diffusion Policy: A Hierarchical Framework for Multi-Stage Robotic Tasks
summary: Visual world models have shown great potential in learning complex system dynamics. Recent advancements leverage these models as transition functions within Model Predictive Control (MPC) frameworks to solve various control tasks. When applied to robotics, however, they are limited to single-stage tasks such as reaching or grasping, and struggle with multi-stage ones that demand complex sequential planning. In this work, we introduce WorldDP, a world model framework designed for multi-stage robotic manipulation. Our hierarchical approach utilizes a high-level world model as a transition function to optimize for feasible subgoals during runtime, which are subsequently reached by a low-level Diffusion Policy. To further aid in learning dynamics and planning, we incorporate object-centric representations that decouple environmental entities and enable us to plan sequentially with respect to each. Evaluated across several robotics benchmarks, WorldDP consistently outperforms existing baselines, validating that coupling the world model's physically grounded planning with diffusion policy's efficient execution yields superior multi-stage performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了WorldDP框架，通过分层结构结合高层世界模型和低层扩散策略，实现了机器人多阶段操作任务中的高效规划与执行，并优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉世界模型仅能处理单阶段机器人任务，对于需要复杂顺序规划的多阶段任务表现有限。因此亟需一种更强大的方法来提升多阶段机器人操作的性能。
AI.method: 提出WorldDP分层框架，利用高层世界模型在运行时优化并生成可行子目标，再通过低层扩散策略(Diffusion Policy)来高效达成这些子目标。同时采用以对象为中心的表征，有效解耦和顺序规划环境中的多个实体。
AI.result: 在多个机器人基准任务上进行评测，WorldDP框架在多阶段操作任务上整体表现优于已有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合物理建模的世界模型与高效执行的扩散策略，能显著提升机器人多阶段任务的规划和执行效率。

title: GlobeAudio: A Multilingual Multicultural Benchmark for Naturalistic Evaluation of Large Audio-Language Models
summary: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) integrate audio perception and language understanding within a unified framework, enabling a wide range of real-world applications. Despite recent advances, evaluation for LALMs remains heavily underspecified relative to real-world requirements: most lack true linguistic and cultural authenticity, while others fail to capture acoustic realism. To bridge this gap, we propose GlobeAudio, a multilingual and multicultural benchmark designed to evaluate naturalistic audio understanding. GlobeAudio consists of 5,637 multiple-choice questions across six typologically diverse languages, expertly crafted by native speakers grounded on naturally occurring audio. In order to do well, models must possess higher-level auditory reasoning skills and culturally grounded interpretation. We systematically evaluate representative closed-source and open-source LALMs, as well as cascaded ASR-LLM pipelines. Our experiments reveal substantial performance gaps under natural acoustic conditions, particularly for open-source models and low-resource languages. These findings highlight critical limitations of current LALMs and underscore the importance of naturalistic audio evaluation for future audio-language systems. GlobeAudio can be found at https://huggingface.co/datasets/iNLP-Lab/GlobeAudio .

AI.tldr: 本文提出GlobeAudio基准，评估大规模音频-语言模型（LALMs）在多语言、多文化、自然音频情境下的表现，发现现有LALMs在真实场景下存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 当前LALMs的评测方法难以反映实际应用需求，缺乏语言和文化真实性，且未能准确捕捉音频的自然特性，因此需要一个更贴近现实的新型评测基准。
AI.method: 作者提出GlobeAudio数据集，包括6种多样化语言、5637道多项选择题，所有题目源自真实场景，由母语者基于自然音频精心设计。作者用其系统评测了主流闭源、开源LALMs和ASR-LLM串联系统。
AI.result: 实验证明，在自然音频条件下，尤其是开源模型和低资源语言上，LALMs的表现存在较大差距。
AI.conclusion: 目前的LALMs对自然音频和多文化、多语言场景支持仍有限，需重视自然情境下的真实评测，GlobeAudio为未来音频-语言系统发展和评测提供了重要基础。

title: VideoWeaver: Evaluating and Evolving Skills for Agentic Long Video Generation
summary: Recent agent frameworks such as Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw are strong at tool use and orchestration, but whether they can handle long video generation, a long-horizon multimodal task, remains underexplored. Unlike earlier video agents whose pipeline is handcrafted, these frameworks can build and refine their own workflows. We introduce VideoWeaver, an agent harness and benchmark that evaluates and evolves skills for long video generation, where an agent turns a single instruction into a long video by composing foundation skills into its own workflow rather than following a predefined pipeline. The benchmark has 16 task categories and 285 cases, with references spanning text, image, audio, video, and their combinations. Because errors can arise at any stage and not just in the final video, we propose an agent-as-judge that inspects both the execution trace and the final video, grounding its scores in evidence such as metadata and intermediate files. Using this feedback, we further design a skill evolution algorithm that refines and merges the agent's skills. Across multiple frameworks and models, we find that an explicit composition skill improves the generation process over using foundation skills alone, that skill evolution further improves output quality, and that performance varies notably across harness and model choices. The proposed agent-as-judge also aligns well with human judgments, especially on process metrics. Code and dataset is available at https://github.com/JianhuiWei7/VideoWeaver

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VideoWeaver，一种用于长视频生成任务的智能体测试工具和基准，能够评测并提升各类智能体在多模态任务中的表现，特别关注智能体能否自组织流程以生成高质量长视频。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体（如Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw）在工具使用和流程编排方面表现优秀，但其在处理需要长期规划与多模态理解的长视频生成任务中的能力尚未被系统探索。同时，已有相关视频智能体大多依赖手工设定的处理流程，缺乏自我构建与改进流程的能力。
AI.method: 提出VideoWeaver平台，包括一个包含16类任务和285个案例的基准测试集，涵盖文本、图像、音频、视频及其组合输入。平台允许智能体根据单条指令自组织多技能流程生成长视频，并以agent-as-judge评估机制，不仅考查最终视频结果，还根据元数据与中间产物评价各阶段执行。基于评价反馈，设计了技能进化算法对智能体技能进行细化和融合。
AI.result: 实验证明：1）显式的技能组合方法比单一基础技能具有更好的生成效果；2）技能进化进一步提升输出质量；3）不同平台和模型下性能差异明显；4）agent-as-judge评价结果与人工一致性较好，尤其在过程指标上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: VideoWeaver为长视频生成智能体的研究提供了新的测试基准与流程改进机制，有力推动了多模态长期任务中的自动流程构建与质量提升。总体上，该平台促进了相关智能体框架的评测和能力演化。

title: Video2Sim2Real: Full-Stack Autonomous Dexterous Skill Acquisition from a Single Human Video
summary: Human manipulation videos are a convenient and intuitive source for robot learning. However, directly transferring human dexterity to robots remains challenging due to perception errors and embodiment gap. To address this, we introduce Video2Sim2Real, a full-stack framework for autonomous skill acquisition from a single human manipulation video. Our framework first uses off-the-shelf foundation models to reconstruct a simulator-ready digital twin and extract robot and object motion priors. Rather than treating the extracted robot motion as a reliable reference throughout execution, our key idea is to recover and leverage the most fundamental sources of supervision from the demonstrated skill: We identify object-centric keyframes to optimize the corresponding robot configurations using object information from the simulator, and use these configurations as anchors that refine the robot motion such that it ultimately has the desired impact on the environment. To bridge the remaining sim-to-real gap, we introduce a sim-to-real strategy that decouples robustness to noisy and incomplete perception from variations in hand-object interaction dynamics. Specifically, we learn to recalibrate robot configurations from noisy real-world point clouds via IL, and leverage residual RL to perform local finger-level adaptations to ensure for robust and effective interactions. Finally, a collision-aware motion planning module enables spatial generalization to novel object configurations. Across several everyday manipulation tasks, Video2Sim2Real improves simulated task success, safety, and trajectory coherence over numerous baselines, and achieves better sim-to-real transfer than existing techniques. These results demonstrate a promising path toward autonomous dexterous skill acquisition from human videos.

AI.tldr: 提出Video2Sim2Real框架，实现从单个人类操作视频到机器人技能自主获取，并在多项任务中取得了优于主流方法的sim2real迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人学习往往难以直接利用人类操作视频，因为人类与机器人的感知、身体结构有较大差异，直接迁移人类灵巧操作到机器人具备技术挑战。
AI.method: 提出Video2Sim2Real整体方案：（1）利用基础模型从人类视频重建数字孪生环境并提取动作先验；（2）通过识别物体中心关键帧，优化对应的机器人配置作为锚点，引导机器人运动以产生预期环境影响；（3）分离处理感知噪声与手物交互动态，通过模仿学习修正配置、残差强化学习微调手指层级的细致动作；（4）引入碰撞感知运动规划，实现对未知物体配置的空间泛化。
AI.result: 框架在多种日常操控任务上表现优异，相较多种基线方法，在模拟中的任务成功率、安全性和轨迹连贯性均有提升，并且实现了更优的sim-to-real迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: Video2Sim2Real展示了从人类视频自主获取机器人灵巧技能的广阔前景，为机器人学习人类复杂操作提供了有效途径。

title: AlignFed: Alignment-Aware Asynchronous Federated Fine-Tuning for Large Language Models in Heterogeneous Edge Environments
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly propelled the advancement of edge intelligence and have been widely deployed across various scenarios, including autonomous driving, industrial inspection, and personalized IoT services. However, the collaborative adaptation of LLMs on edge devices continues to face formidable challenges due to strict data privacy constraints, highly heterogeneous computing and communication resources, and the non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) nature of local data. Federated Fine-Tuning (FFT) enables the collaborative optimization of distributed models without exposing raw data. Yet, traditional synchronous aggregation suffers from a severe straggler effect, resulting in high system latency and low resource utilization. Existing asynchronous federated learning methods are predominantly designed for small-to-medium-scale models and struggle to address the specific challenges inherent in LLM fine-tuning namely, model drift caused by stale updates, aggravated client drift stemming from data heterogeneity, and aggregation fairness imbalance resulting from the dominance of fast clients. To address these issues, this paper proposes AlignFed, an asynchronous federated fine-tuning framework for LLMs tailored to heterogeneous edge environments. AlignFed employs a lightweight multi-stage semantic alignment mechanism comprising three core modules: version-aware update grouping, cross-version semantic alignment based on a mini-batch calibration set, and fairness-aware aggregation that integrates both update freshness and client participation frequency. This framework effectively mitigates cross-version model drift and client drift while enhancing aggregation fairness, thereby achieving stable and efficient asynchronous federated optimization in scenarios characterized by high heterogeneity and significant update staleness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AlignFed框架，实现了在异构边缘环境下对大语言模型（LLM）的高效异步联邦微调，有效克服了数据异质性、资源不均及更新陈旧等挑战。
AI.motivation: LLM在边缘智能场景应用广泛，但因隐私、设备异构、数据非IID等造成协作难度大。现有同步聚合方式易受慢节点影响，异步联邦学习方法又难以解决大模型面临的漂移和聚合公平性等问题，因此亟需一种专为LLM和异构边缘设计的新框架。
AI.method: 提出AlignFed异步联邦微调框架，包含三个模块：基于版本的分组、利用较小校准集的跨版本语义对齐和结合更新及时性及客户参与频率的公平聚合，有效提升聚合效率和公平性。
AI.result: AlignFed能有效缓解模型跨版本漂移和客户端数据漂移，公平性提升，实现高异质、高延迟场景下的稳定高效异步联邦优化。
AI.conclusion: AlignFed为异构边缘环境下LLM异步联邦微调提供了新支持，解决了资源异构、更新陈旧和聚合不公平等痛点，对边缘智能领域具有实际应用价值。

title: Trustworthy Visual Predicates for Robust Manipulation Understanding under Degradation
summary: Manipulation understanding requires reliable relational evidence, such as contact, support, containment, motion coupling, grasp, release, and active-hand involvement. Although these visual predicates are widely used in event-chain, graph-based, and neuro-symbolic models, their reliability under visual degradation is rarely analyzed directly. This paper introduces a predicate-level reliability framework for robust manipulation understanding under blur, occlusion, illumination change, low resolution, frame dropping, and detection noise. The framework defines a structured predicate vocabulary, confidence-aware predicate estimation, and reliability metrics for predicate preservation, degradation sensitivity, temporal consistency, confidence-weighted stability, and downstream impact. Experiments on controlled manipulation videos and public egocentric or bimanual datasets, including VISOR/EPIC-KITCHENS, H2O, and ARCTIC, show that predicate failures are structured rather than uniform. Static spatial predicates remain comparatively robust, whereas contact-sensitive, dynamic, and derived predicates such as grasp and release are more fragile. Under severe degradation, detection noise, occlusion, and frame dropping cause the strongest reliability losses. Downstream analysis shows that degraded predicates reduce manipulation-understanding accuracy from 0.89 to 0.58, while removing confidence weighting under moderate degradation reduces accuracy from 0.74 to 0.64. These results show that predicate reliability provides a diagnostic layer between visual perception and structured manipulation reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套谓词级别的可靠性框架，用于在多种视觉退化场景下提升操控理解的鲁棒性，并通过实验证明了不同视觉谓词在退化下的稳定性差异。
AI.motivation: 在现有的操控理解和事件链、图结构、神经符号模型中，依赖于视觉谓词（如接触、支持、抓取等）的表达，但这些谓词在视觉退化（模糊、遮挡、低分辨率等）下的可靠性未被直接系统地研究。
AI.method: 论文构建了包含结构化谓词词汇表、置信度感知谓词估计及一系列可靠性度量（如谓词保持率、退化敏感度、时序一致性和下游影响评估）的新框架，并在多个人工和公开数据集上实验测试不同视觉退化情形下的表现。
AI.result: 实验证明，静态空间谓词在视觉退化下更为健壮，而与接触、动态、和推导相关的谓词如抓取与释放容易失效。严重退化时，检测噪声、遮挡和帧丢失带来最大可靠性下降。谓词退化导致操控理解准确率明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 谓词级可靠性为视觉感知与结构化操控推理之间提供了诊断层，有助于理解和改善操控理解模型在现实中的鲁棒性表现。

title: Benchmarking Vision-Language-Action Models on SO-101: Failure and Recovery Analysis
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong generalization in robotic manipulation, yet existing evaluations are primarily conducted in simulation or on expensive robotic platforms, leaving their robustness on affordable real-world robots largely unexplored. We present a standardized real-world benchmark for evaluating representative VLA and imitation learning policies on the low-cost SO-101 robotic platform. The benchmark comprises four representative manipulation tasks together with unified evaluation protocols, enabling systematic comparison under embodiment uncertainty. Using real-world teleoperated demonstrations, we fine-tune and evaluate $π_{0.5}$, SmolVLA, Wall-X, and ACT directly on the physical platform. Beyond conventional task success rates, the benchmark incorporates a structured failure taxonomy, semantic- and execution-level failure decomposition, and recovery-aware evaluation metrics to characterize policy robustness. Experimental results show that stronger pretrained VLA policies generally outperform the imitation learning baseline, although performance remains highly task-dependent under low-cost robotic deployment conditions. Execution instability emerges as the dominant failure source, while recovery capability varies substantially across architectures. These results highlight the importance of failure and recovery analysis beyond binary task success and establish SO-101 as a practical benchmark for evaluating embodied AI systems under realistic low-cost robotic deployment conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了适用于低成本机器人SO-101的现实世界VLA（视觉-语言-动作）评测基准，并系统评估不同VLA及模仿学习方法在实际平台的操作鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型多在仿真或昂贵机器人上评测，未充分验证其在低成本实际机器人上的鲁棒性。本文旨在填补该评测空白，推动可负担机器人上的通用AI研究。
AI.method: 构建SO-101平台专用基准，包含四类典型操作任务和统一评测协议，采集遥操作演示，微调和测试多种VLA与模仿学习策略。引入结构化失败分类、语义与执行层级故障分解，以及复原能力评估度量。
AI.result: 实验发现，强预训练的VLA策略通常优于模仿学习基线，但在低成本机器人上表现高度依赖任务。执行不稳定成为主要失败原因，各策略复原能力差异较大。
AI.conclusion: 仅以任务成功率评估策略不够全面，应重视失败与复原分析。SO-101平台为评估具身AI在现实低成本机器人环境下的鲁棒性提供了实用基准。

title: Shared Semantics, Divergent Mechanisms: Unsupervised Feature Discovery by Aligning Semantics and Mechanisms
summary: As large language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, there is a growing need for tools that audit not only model outputs but also the internal computations that produce them. Circuit analysis is a central approach in mechanistic interpretability, but it is typically target-conditioned, explaining a single prompt paired with a chosen completion. This target-conditioned setup can obscure heterogeneity across a model's continuation distribution. We introduce distribution-level unsupervised feature discovery, which clusters sampled continuations using both semantic content and sequence-level mechanistic attributions, without manually specifying target outputs. Our method represents each continuation with a semantic embedding and a prefix-to-continuation attribution signature, then optimizes a rate-distortion objective that trades off semantic coherence, mechanistic consistency, and cluster granularity. Across clustering and steering analyses, the discovered clusters expose continuation modes that single-view baselines miss and provide interventional evidence that cluster signatures correspond to actionable mechanistic factors. Overall, our approach complements circuit analysis and behavioral evaluation by providing a scalable audit of the mechanisms underlying a model's continuation distribution.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种对大语言模型生成的多样连续输出进行分布级无监督特征发现的新方法，用于揭示模型输出分布中的机制规律和可控因子。
AI.motivation: 当前大模型在高风险领域应用增多，单一目标条件的电路分析往往忽视了模型在整个输出分布上的异质性，亟需更全面的审计工具分析模型生成机制。
AI.method: 方法以无监督聚类方式，将多样的模型输出（连续）以语义嵌入与机制归因签名表征，并用率失真（rate-distortion）目标权衡语义一致性、机制一致性与聚类粒度，自动识别分布内的重要输出类别。
AI.result: 结果显示，该方法聚类出的输出模式能揭示被传统单点分析忽视的连续分布结构，并且不同模式对应的机制归因具有可干预性，表明聚类标签与实际生成机制密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 本方法可扩展性强，可补充现有的电路分析与行为评估，是面向大模型输出分布机制的有效审计工具。

title: Human-Centered Benchmarking of Driver Monitoring Models
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. Code available at: https://github.com/rubendflorezzela/hcbf-driver-monitoring
summary: Vision-based driver monitoring systems are increasingly deployed in safety-critical intelligent transportation settings, yet they are almost always compared on classification accuracy alone. This paper argues that accuracy is insufficient to characterize a model's fitness for real-world deployment, and proposes the Human-Centered Benchmarking Framework (HCBF), which evaluates models across four dimensions: accuracy, explainability, efficiency, and robustness. The framework is applied to four representative lightweight architectures, MobileNetV3, ShuffleNetV2, EfficientNet-B0, and DeiT-Tiny, on the MRL Eye Dataset for eye-state classification. While the models are nearly indistinguishable on clean-set accuracy, each leads in exactly one dimension, and all four lie on the Pareto frontier. A Human-Centered Score computed under three deployment-oriented weighting scenarios ranks ShuffleNetV2 first throughout. However, this aggregate winner retains less than half of its performance under sensor noise and fails by classifying closed eyes as open, whereas the transformer remains robust. These findings show that aggregate ranking can mask dimension-specific vulnerabilities that are operationally decisive, underscoring the value of multi-dimensional, human-centered evaluation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了人本基准评测框架（HCBF），从准确率、可解释性、效率和鲁棒性四个维度，评估驾驶员监测系统中的主流轻量化模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉驱动监测系统通常只关注分类准确率，但这一指标无法全面反映模型在实际部署中的有效性和安全性。
AI.method: 提出HCBF框架，综合从准确率、可解释性、效率、鲁棒性四方面对模型进行多维评测，并在MRL眼动数据集上对四种轻量网络（MobileNetV3、ShuffleNetV2、EfficientNet-B0、DeiT-Tiny）进行了实证分析。
AI.result: 四个模型在干净数据集上的准确率几乎无差，但分别在四个维度中各有突出。整体得分下ShuffleNetV2排名第一，但其在传感器噪声下表现大幅下降，甚至将闭眼错误判为睁眼，变换器（Transformer）模型则更为鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 依赖单一聚合排名容易掩盖模型在某些维度上的致命短板，多维人本评测对于实际部署具有重要价值。

title: PTDL:Multi-Terrain Fall Recovery via Phase-Terrain Decoupled Learning
summary: Humanoid robots can fall on slopes, gravel, and uneven ground in unstructured environments. We target integrated fall recovery and locomotion: rebuilding balance from a fallen state using proprioception alone and resuming velocity-commanded walking at the fall site. Prior methods often stop at quasi-static rise, neglect the post-fall ground-contact phase, or, when trained on mixed terrains without separating recovery and locomotion phases or per-surface constraints, collapse to a single compromise get-up across surfaces. We propose Phase--Terrain Decoupled Learning (PTDL), which decouples training supervision along phase and terrain axes while deploying one proprioceptive policy. On the phase axis, projected-gravity-gated dual motion-prior discriminators and a probe-to-walk transition link post-fall recovery to commanded walking. On the terrain axis, terrain-stratified recovery shaping assigns surface-specific training supervision on flat ground, gravel, and slopes; terrain labels are training-only and withheld from policy observations, enabling implicit post-fall strategy selection at deployment. We validate PTDL on a 29-DoF Unitree G1 across flat ground, gravel, and slopes up to 20 degrees in simulation and on hardware, achieving stable cross-terrain recovery, smooth recovery-to-locomotion transitions, and differentiated post-fall rise behaviors under one deployed policy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新方法，实现了类人机器人在不同不规则地形（如斜坡、碎石等）上跌倒后的自主恢复和重新行走，无需场地标签即可完成多地形适应，其在仿真和实物测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人跌倒恢复方法存在局限，主要体现在（1）仅实现静态起身，忽略了跌倒后到恢复动态行走的衔接；（2）缺乏地形特异性的策略，导致跨多地形时只能采取折中方案，难以充分适应复杂环境。论文旨在实现能区分恢复过程及地形的适应性策略，提升机器人在真实复杂环境中的跌倒恢复与再行走能力。
AI.method:
提出了一种阶段—地形解耦学习（PTDL, Phase--Terrain Decoupled Learning）框架：
（1）阶段（phase）轴：运用基于重力投影门控的双重运动先验判别器，把跌倒恢复与命令行走相衔接；引入探查-行走的过渡机制，实现从跌倒到动态行走的顺滑过渡。
（2）地形（terrain）轴：在平地、碎石、斜坡等地面上分别给予恢复行为训练监督（地形标签仅用于训练，推理时不提供），使机器人能通过本体感知隐式识别地形并自适应调整起身策略。部署时，仅需一个本体感知策略即可实现不同地形的跌倒恢复和运动。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1（29自由度类人机器人）上，分别在仿真和实际硬件平台、包含平地、碎石、最大20度斜坡等多种地形上进行了验证。该方法实现了稳定的跨地形跌倒恢复，跌倒恢复与行走过渡顺畅，并且能根据地形表现出差异化的起身动作。在同一个部署策略下，机器人表现优良。
AI.conclusion: PTDL方法有效提升了类人机器人在复杂多变环境中的跌倒恢复和重新行走能力，通过解耦恢复阶段与地形监督，实现了稳健的跨地形自适应和动作多样性，对实际场景下移动机器人自主性有现实意义。

title: Building Comparative Motivation Profiles with Instrumental Interventions
summary: Safety evaluations often infer latent motivations from behavioral patterns, but the construct validity of these inferences is unclear. We study this problem in alignment faking, where models comply with training objectives more often when they infer training pressure. This behavior is commonly interpreted as strategic self-preservation, but it may also reflect sensitivity to the model's inference about the expectation of researchers conducting the evaluation. We introduce a symmetric intervention framework for distinguishing these competing hypotheses. Instead of directly intervening on "scheming" or "sycophancy", we target instrumental processes entailed by each hypothesis: consequence-tracking and researcher-expectation tracking. We then compare how interventions on these processes affect the alignment faking. We study four openweight model organisms using synthetic document fine-tuning, activation steering, and prompting. Under synthetic document fine-tuning, Llama-3.1-70B, Llama3.1-405B, and Qwen-2.5-72B are more sensitive to expectation-tracking than consequence-tracking interventions. Activation steering on Llama-3.1- 70B supports the same broad picture, and prompt interventions broadly align with SDF profiles. Overall, alignment-faking behavior can be causally sensitive to evaluation-context expectations despite scheming-consistent scratchpads. Scheming and strategic-deception evaluations therefore need construct-validity checks, and symmetric instrumental interventions provide one such test.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了安全性评估推断模型潜在动机时面临的构念效度问题，提出了区分模型“策略顺从”与“迎合期望”假说的新方法，并在大型开源模型上实验验证。
AI.motivation: 安全性评估经常需要根据行为模式推断模型的动机，但这样推断的科学性（构念效度）一直存在争议，尤其当模型表现出与训练目标一致的行为时，背后的真实动机难以区分。
AI.method: 提出了一个对称的干预框架，分别对两种假说涉及的工具性过程（后果追踪和研究者期望追踪）进行干预，通过合成文档微调、激活引导和提示在四个开放模型上实验比对不同干预方式对“对齐伪装”行为的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，对于Llama-3.1-70B、Llama3.1-405B和Qwen-2.5-72B，在合成文档微调下，模型对期望追踪（而非后果追踪）干预更敏感，激活引导和提示实验结果也支持这一观点。
AI.conclusion: 模型的“对齐伪装”行为对评估上下文的期望具有因果敏感性，仅依据行为推断其动机可能会产生误判，提出的对称工具性干预方法为检验动机推断构念效度提供了新思路。

title: One Stone, Three Birds: Self-adaptive Optimal Transport for Multi-VLM Selection, Adaptation, and Ensembling
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) enable visual recognition from semantic class descriptions, which makes them attractive when target annotations are scarce or unavailable. Most deployment pipelines, however, first choose a single VLM and then adapt that model to the unlabeled target set. This single-backbone paradigm hides a critical assumption: the selected VLM is already compatible with the target domain. In realistic cross-domain deployment, several general-purpose and domain-specialized VLMs may be plausible, yet no instance-level target labels are available to identify the reliable ones. Deployment therefore requires a coupled solution for model selection, target adaptation, and prediction integration. We revisit this problem from a system-level multi-VLM perspective. Our central observation is that the three decisions above depend on the same latent object: a trustworthy sample-class structure in the target set. Different VLMs may encode different transfer biases and produce conflicting predictions, but their outputs can still provide complementary evidence for estimating this structure. We propose One Stone, Three Birds, a training-free framework based on self-adaptive optimal transport. Given a pool of frozen candidate VLMs, OSTB estimates a consensus sample-to-class transport plan without updating VLM parameters. The learned transport structure is then reused for all deployment objectives: model selection is performed by ranking the combined semantic and visual reliability induced by the consensus plan; target adaptation is obtained by fitting transport-conditioned visual classifiers; and ensembling is implemented through reliability-aware probabilistic integration. Extensive experiments on natural-image, remote-sensing, and medical-pathology benchmarks show that OSTB improves model ranking, adaptation stability, and ensemble robustness under heterogeneous candidate pools.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为One Stone, Three Birds（OSTB）的训练-free系统级多视觉-语言模型(VLM)的自适应部署框架，可实现无监督目标域下的模型选择、目标自适应和集成推理，同时无需对VLM进行参数微调。实验验证其在多个领域具有良好的模型排名、适应性和集成表现。
AI.motivation: 当前多数VLM部署流程选定单一VLM骨干并在无标签目标域进行自适应，但这样假设已选模型与目标域高度兼容。现实应用中候选VLM多样而不可知，缺乏标签难以判断最佳选择，因此实际部署需同时解决模型选择、无监督自适应和模型集成等问题。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于自适应最优传输(Optimal Transport, OT)的无训练OSTB框架，从候选VLM池中，通过估算样本到类别的共识传输计划，协调多VLM的输出以挖掘目标域潜在结构，不需更新VLM参数。利用该传输结构进行：模型选择（通过一致性计划排序）、无监督适应（依赖传输的视觉分类器）、以及基于可信度的集成。
AI.result: 在自然图像、遥感、医学病理等多领域基准上，OSTB在模型排名、无监督适应稳定性和集成鲁棒性方面均超过单模型或其它多模型方案，体现出更好的任务泛化与部署性。
AI.conclusion: OSTB为VLM在无标签目标域的实际部署提供了一套高效、拓展性强的系统解决方案，显著提升了跨领域模型选择和合作推理的表现，无需模型参数微调，对多样候选池更稳健。

title: SpaceVLN: A Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation Agent with Online Spatial Cognitive Memory and Reasoning
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation in continuous environments requires agents to understand the spatial structure of previously unseen environments in order to follow language instructions. Although foundation models have opened a promising path toward zero-shot navigation without task-specific policy training, many navigators still rely on local visual cues and linear history-based reasoning, overlooking the spatial nature of navigation across explored regions, traversed paths, landmarks, and their spatial relations. In this paper, we propose SpaceVLN, a navigation agent built around Spatial Cognitive Memory and Task-Guided Spatial Reasoning. Specifically, SpaceVLN introduces an efficient stagewise closed-loop framework where planning and execution are organized around verifiable space--landmark stages. During navigation, the agent progressively abstracts explored regions into Spatial Waypoints and dynamically maintains subtask-grounded landmark evidence, forming a hierarchical Spatial Cognitive Memory for progress localization and spatial-relation understanding. Built on this memory, Spatial-CoT integrates task-progress reasoning with spatial perception, analysis, and prediction, enabling Task-Guided Spatial Reasoning for embodied navigation. The unified stage interface enables SpaceVLN to address both Vision-and-Language Navigation and Object-Goal Navigation under a unified zero-shot setting, without task-specific policy training. Across R2R-CE, RxR-CE, GN-Bench, and HM3D-OVON, SpaceVLN achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance, and real-robot deployment further validates its applicability. These results highlight Spatial Cognitive Memory and Task-Guided Spatial Reasoning as a practical foundation for stronger embodied navigation agents.

AI.tldr: 提出SpaceVLN，一种围绕空间认知记忆和任务引导空间推理构建的导航智能体，实现了无需特定任务训练的零样本导航，并在多项基准上取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言导航缺乏对空间结构的理解，现有方法多依赖局部视觉线索和线性历史，忽略了探索区域、路径、地标及其空间关系的本质，限制了泛化导航能力。
AI.method: 提出SpaceVLN，包括空间认知记忆和任务引导空间推理两个核心。导航过程中，智能体逐步将探索区域抽象为空间航点，并动态维护与子任务关联的地标证据，形成立体的空间认知记忆。基于此记忆，通过空间链式推理（Spatial-CoT）结合任务进度，实现空间感知、分析与预测。整体采用阶段式闭环框架，将规划与执行集中在可验证的空间-地标阶段，实现统一接口支持多种导航任务。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE、RxR-CE、GN-Bench、HM3D-OVON等基准数据集上，SpaceVLN在零样本设置下实现了最优性能。同时，在真实机器人上的部署也验证了其实际可用性。
AI.conclusion: 空间认知记忆与任务引导空间推理为实现更强的视觉-语言导航提供了有效基础，对提升智能体泛化导航能力具有重要意义。

title: ZAS-SQL: Distilling Rules from Failures for Zero-Shot Text-to-SQL
summary: Text-to-SQL translates natural language into executable SQL queries. Few-shot in-context learning methods built upon large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance, yet their reliance on demonstrations limits cross-domain generalization and consumes substantial context window space. Existing zero-shot methods, lacking effective generation constraints, still fall short of few-shot approaches. We observe that LLM failures in zero-shot Text-to-SQL are not random but exhibit systematic, recurring patterns. Building on this observation, we propose a fully zero-shot Text-to-SQL framework that distills core generation rules from failure cases through a Map-Reduce-based rule distillation pipeline and improves generation quality via three complementary modules: knowledge-augmented schema representation, which supplements missing semantics in Data Definition Language; a rule-driven structured reasoning framework that suppresses structural deviations; and Execution-Guided Early Stopping, which enables low-cost self-correction. On Spider, the proposed framework achieves up to 87.2% and 88.6% execution accuracy on the Dev and Test sets, respectively, establishing a new zero-shot state-of-the-art and surpassing multiple few-shot and fine-tuning methods built upon GPT-4/4o. On the domain-specific dataset UrbanPlan, it achieves 81.3%, confirming that the rule distillation approach generalizes across domains. Moreover, when equipped with a 4B-parameter model, the framework surpasses zero-shot baselines of leading closed-source models, demonstrating strong model generality.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种全新的零样本（zero-shot）Text-to-SQL框架，通过蒸馏故障案例中的生成规则，结合多模块设计，实现了在公开和专有数据集上的新SOTA性能，显著超越了少样本和微调方法。
AI.motivation: 少样本（few-shot）方法依赖示例，对跨领域泛化能力有限且占用大量上下文空间。现有零样本方法缺少有效的生成约束，效果不如少样本。论文发现LLM在零样本Text-to-SQL中的错误有规律可循，因此希望通过挖掘这些错误的共性来提升模型表现。
AI.method: 提出基于Map-Reduce的规则蒸馏管线，从LLM故障案例中总结核心生成规则，并引入三个互补模块：1）知识增强的模式表示，补充DDL语义缺失；2）规则驱动结构化推理框架，抑制结构偏差；3）基于执行的早停机制，实现低成本自我纠错。
AI.result: 在Spider数据集上，提出的框架Dev和Test集执行准确率分别达87.2%和88.6%，创零样本新SOTA，并超越多个基于GPT-4/fine-tune的少样本和微调方法。在UrbanPlan专有数据集上取得81.3%的执行准确率，验证了方法的跨领域泛化能力。用小模型（4B参数）时也超越领先闭源模型的零样本基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过规则蒸馏与多模块协同，提出的零样本Text-to-SQL方法不仅在多个数据集上取得领先效果，还具备良好泛化能力和模型适用性，为LLM在数据库自然语言接口的零样本处理设立了新标杆。

title: Phase Marginalization for Patch-Grid Instability in Vision Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers operate on fixed patch grids, which can introduce phase-dependent instability for dense prediction: changing the patch partition can change the token evidence available to a pixel, especially near boundaries. We formalize patch-grid phase as a nuisance variable and propose Phase Marginalization, a post-hoc marginalization method that evaluates structured patch-grid phases, inverse-aligns dense outputs, and aggregates them in the original image coordinate system. The central variant, Uniform Phase Marginalization with K = 4, is training-free and improves over the canonical K = 1 baseline across measured segmentation, depth, and local matching settings. In a controlled Cityscapes experiment, Uniform Phase Marginalization provides a modest compute-matched advantage over generic shift-based four-forward test-time augmentation (TTA) (+0.31 mean Intersection-over-Union over the strongest tested generic row). A scaling study further shows that K = 4 is a practical cost-accuracy trade-off: K = 8 is essentially unchanged and K = 16 adds little accuracy at much higher latency. These results position patch-grid phase as a measurable nuisance variable and Phase Marginalization as a simple diagnostic and post-hoc marginalization baseline for dense ViT prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为“相位边缘化（Phase Marginalization）”的新方法，用于缓解视觉Transformer（ViT）在密集预测任务中因固定patch划分引起的不稳定性，通过对不同patch划分相位取平均提高了分割、深度估计和局部匹配的表现。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer通常采用固定的patch网格输入，但这种方式会导致不同patch划分对像素的证据有差异，特别是在边界处，造成预测结果的不稳定。本文作者希望解决因patch划分相位引入的不确定性问题。
AI.method: 提出了相位边缘化（Phase Marginalization）方法，对多种不同patch网格划分进行推断，然后将输出反向对齐回原图像坐标，并进行聚合。其核心变体是K=4的均匀相位边缘化（Uniform Phase Marginalization），无需额外训练，作为后处理步骤直接应用。作者还与常用的测试时增强（TTA）做了对比实验。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes等数据集上的密集预测任务（如分割、深度和匹配）中，K=4的均匀相位边缘化优于标准的K=1基线，并且在计算量相当的情况下，比通用四次shift-TTA多提升了0.31平均IoU。扩大到K=8和K=16时，精度提升非常有限而延迟显著增加，表明K=4效果和效率之间达到了较佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: patch划分相位是ViT密集预测中的显著干扰因素，本文提出的相位边缘化提供了一种简便、有效的诊断工具和后处理基线方法，有稳健提升模型表现的能力。

title: Autonomous FPV Flight with Translational Optical Flow and Uncertainty Mask
summary: Autonomous FPV quadrotor flight in complex environments using a monocular RGB camera as the sole exteroceptive sensor remains a fundamental challenge. Recent research has shown that using optical flow as the input of a neural network can achieve end-to-end autonomous flight in cluttered scenes. However, extracting the most relevant information from the flow estimation is the key bottleneck limiting agility and robustness. Existing methods struggle to disentangle obstacle-induced optical flow from the ego-motion background flow and suffer from low signal-to-noise ratios near the focus of expansion (FoE). To address these issues, we decompose the optical flow into translational and rotational components and utilize only the translational flow, which captures scene geometry and depth cues. In addition, we introduce an uncertainty mask derived from inconsistencies between forward and backward flow estimates. This mask highlights obstacle structures, including those within the FoE region. Both cues are fed to a control policy trained in a differentiable simulation framework, which enables efficient first-order optimization across perception and control. We validate our approach through extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world forest environments. The proposed system achieves robust flight at speeds of up to 13.91 m/s in simulation and 11.79 m/s in real-world tests, with a 93.3\% success rate over 30 real-world trials, nearly doubling the previously reported 6 m/s real-world speed of the monocular-RGB optical-flow UAV obstacle avoidance system.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种利用单目RGB相机，仅依靠光流信息实现FPV无人机在复杂环境中自主飞行的方法，通过提取更具代表性的光流信息，提升了导航的稳健性与速度。
AI.motivation: 目前光流神经网络实现的无人机自主飞行受限于光流中的障碍物信息难以与自运动背景分离，尤其在扩展中心附近信噪比较低，导致系统灵敏度和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 作者将整体光流分解为平移部分和旋转部分，仅利用携带场景深度信息的平移光流。同时提出了一种利用正反向光流估计不一致性得到的不确定性掩码，用以突出障碍物结构，包括FoE区内的障碍物。这两种信息输入到通过可微分仿真框架训练的控制策略中，实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 该方法在仿真环境下最高达13.91 m/s，在实际森林飞行中达11.79 m/s，30次真实飞行中成功率93.3%，相比已有方法（6 m/s）大幅提升了飞行速度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效分离光流中对导航有价值的信息，并利用不确定性掩码，显著提升了单目RGB无人机在复杂环境下的自主飞行性能。

title: SSR: Can Simulated Patients Learn to Stigmatize Themselves? Modeling Self-Stigma through Internal Monologue
summary: Simulating patients with large language models (LLMs) is a promising tool for mental health training, but existing approaches fail to capture a key clinical reality: self-stigma. Patients experiencing self-stigma, the internalization of negative stereotypes, often exhibit context-sensitive resistance, such as avoidance, denial, or self-blame, which current models render as static or uniformly compliant behavior. To address this, we introduce a novel simulation framework grounded in the psychological 3A1H model of self-stigmatization. Our core innovation is the creation of a \textbf{Stigmatized Self-Reflection} (\textbf{SSR}) dataset, where we augment mental health dialogues with internal monologues that reflect stigma-aware reasoning. By fine-tuning LLMs with this data using a chain-of-thought approach, we train patient agents to dynamically adjust their level and expression of stigma based on conversational triggers. Evaluations demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms specialized baselines, generating more authentic and situationally appropriate patient responses. This work provides a crucial step towards realistic stigma simulation for clinical training and empathetic dialogue systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合自我污名心理的新型患者模拟框架，通过在对话中引入内在独白，提升了大语言模型生成患者反应的真实性和情境适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有的患者模拟大模型通常无法捕捉精神健康临床中的自我污名（如回避、否认、自责等）现象，导致模拟行为过于表面化或过于顺从，难以反映真实临床场景。
AI.method: 作者基于3A1H心理学自我污名模型，构建了SSR数据集，将心理健康对话增强为包含自我污名相关内心独白的话语。通过链式思路训练（chain-of-thought），微调大模型，使“患者代理人”可根据具体对话情境动态调整其自我污名的表达和程度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，采用SSR方法训练的模型比现有的专业基线更能生成真实且贴合情境的患者反应，在情感共情和培训有效性上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为临床培训和同理心对话系统提供了关键性的技术进步，使虚拟患者更接近真实的心理反应，补足了智能对话系统在自我污名层面的现有不足。

title: Gravity-guided Contact Dynamics Estimation from 3D Human Motions
summary: Ground contact forces acting on the human body, are crucial for biomechanics studies or sport performance analysis. Prior methods rely on force plates or pressure mats to collect ground contact dynamics, limiting their applicability to carefully controlled settings. A more scalable solution is to estimate the dynamics directly from motion capture data. Recent approaches only roughly estimate the ground contact dynamics from the vertical distance between the body and the ground plane, which cannot capture the complex pressure distribution of all contact points. To this end, we propose GraCE -- Gravity-guided Contact Dynamics Estimation, a novel full-body contact dynamics model for human motions using a realistic influence of body mass distribution and gravity. We use the human's center of gravity to estimate the ground contacts based on its relative distance to the human body. The applied force on each contact is estimated via the product of predicted contact probabilities and the total exterior force computed from the center of mass trajectory. We outperform related work on the GroundLink dataset for ground reaction force estimation, and on the MOYO dataset for detailed contact pressure prediction. The code is published upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的人体动作全身接触动力学模型GraCE，通过重心引导来准确估计地面接触动态，无需传统的力板或压力垫，显著提升了通用性和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统地面接触力采集依赖大型设备（如力板/压力垫），难以在真实或大规模环境下应用。现有基于动作捕捉的估算方法精度有限，不能反映复杂的接触压力分布，亟需改进方法提升地面反作用力和压力的估算准确性。
AI.method: 作者提出的GraCE方法利用人体重心及其与身体的相对位置来推断接触点，通过预测的接触概率与由质心轨迹获得的总外力相乘，估算每个接触点的作用力。该模型基于运动捕捉数据，不依赖传统传感硬件，能建模更真实的质量分布和重力影响。
AI.result: 在GroundLink数据集上，GraCE在地面反作用力估计任务上优于已有方法；在MOYO数据集上，对详细接触压力分布的预测也取得更优表现。
AI.conclusion: GraCE方法能够在无需额外硬件的情况下，高效且精准地估算人体运动中的地面接触动力学参数，具有更强的推广和实际应用价值。

title: LAEI: Layered Autonomous Edge Intelligence Framework for Robust UAV Swarm Operations
summary: Autonomous UAV swarms require scalable coordination mechanisms that maintain mission performance under limited communication, environmental uncertainty, and component failures. Centralized approaches provide global coordination but suffer from communication bottlenecks and single-node vulnerabilities, whereas fully decentralized methods often lack mission-level consistency. This paper presents Layered Autonomous Edge Intelligence (LAEI), a UAV-swarm framework that combines onboard learned policies with lightweight mission-level supervision. Each UAV performs local perception, obstacle avoidance, and action selection onboard, while the supervisory layer provides adaptive goal reassignment, fault-aware recovery, and context-dependent policy guidance without directly controlling low-level actions. LAEI further incorporates recovery strategies, including dynamic reassociation, backup supervisory support, and fallback local autonomy, to maintain mission continuity under representative failure scenarios. We evaluate LAEI in simulated UAV-swarm scenarios using mission completion time, collision rate, and coverage efficiency. The results show that LAEI reduces mission completion time and improves operational efficiency while maintaining collision-aware distributed UAV-level decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LAEI的无人机集群智能框架，通过分层结构结合本地学习策略与轻量级监督，实现了高效协作及鲁棒性，在仿真验证中优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 当前无人机集群面临的主要挑战包括通信受限、环境不确定和组件失效。现有的集中式方法在全局协调上有优势，但存在通信瓶颈和单点失效风险；完全分布式方法虽然去中心化，但难以保持整体任务一致性。因此，需要兼顾高效性、鲁棒性与任务协同一致性的集群方案。
AI.method: 提出分层自主边缘智能（LAEI）框架，将智能分为两层：底层每架无人机自主完成本地感知、避障和动作选择；上层监督仅对任务目标分配、故障恢复及策略引导进行轻量干预。框架还设计了动态重新分组、备份监督与本地自治等恢复机制，确保在故障情况下的任务连续性。
AI.result: 在仿真无人机群场景中，LAEI在任务完成时间、碰撞率和覆盖效率等指标上表现优异。结果显示，框架能降低任务完成时间，提高集群运作效率，并保持无人机分布式决策下的碰撞感知能力。
AI.conclusion: LAEI兼顾了本地自主和全局适应性，在受限通信和组件失效下仍能实现高效、鲁棒且一致的无人机集群协作，有望推广至实际复杂环境中的无人机群应用。

title: AgriGov: A Structured Multilingual Dataset Curation for Indian Government Schemes for Farmers
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, Submitted to: Sadhana, Elsevier
summary: AgriGov is a curated, trilingual (English-Hindi-Marathi) dataset designed to address the scarcity of domain-grounded multilingual resources for agricultural policies and farmer welfare schemes. Initially, we collected and structured data from 50 government schemes sourced from trusted portals using automated scraping techniques, organizing it into predefined semantic fields (e.g., title, eligibility, application process, documents, exclusions). Translations were performed using a pipeline combining Google Translate API, MarianMT, and human post-editing, resulting in a domain-specific Hindi-Marathi dataset comprising approximately 2100 source segments. To enhance coverage, we augmented this dataset with sentences from the Samanantar corpus, leading to approximately 8,000 sentence-aligned Hindi-Marathi parallel pairs. The dataset now offers robust resources for fine-tuning machine translation models in this domain. AgriGov is designed for applications in domain-adaptive machine translation, question answering, information retrieval, and summarization systems. Its key contribution is a schema-driven, human-corrected multilingual alignment pipeline that ensures domain fidelity, provides provenance, and supports reproducible experiments, enabling retrieval-augmented applications for farmer-facing tools.

AI.tldr: AgriGov是一个三语（英-印地语-马拉地语）农政政策数据集，用于提升特定领域机器翻译和信息检索等应用。
AI.motivation: 农业政策和农民福利领域缺乏高质量、多语言的对齐数据，而这对于开发针对农民的工具（如机器翻译、问答、信息检索等）至关重要。
AI.method: 从政府权威门户自动抓取50个政策方案信息并结构化，按语义字段分类。多步骤管道：机器翻译（Google Translate API、MarianMT）后由人工后编辑校对。后采集Samanantar语料中的句对，最终整合约8,000个印地语-马拉地语平行句对。采用schema驱动、多步骤人工校正的对齐流程保证领域一致性和可溯源。
AI.result: 获得了可用于领域自适应机器翻译、问答、信息检索和摘要的高质量多语言对齐数据集。
AI.conclusion: AgriGov为农民相关工具开发提供了罕见的、多语种、领域特定资源，并通过可复现的管道提升了数据质量和应用价值。

title: IMAGINE: Adaptive Schema-Imagery Enhanced Composition for Composed Video Retrieval
summary: Composed Video Retrieval (CVR) is designed to retrieve a target video that matches a reference video modified by a modification text. While existing methods explore cross-modal correspondences, they often assume modified objects appear directly in videos. However, modification texts frequently describe concepts not explicitly presented but implicitly expressed through semantically related visual cues (e.g., "cake" implying "birthday party"). Current approaches typically rely on aligning explicit feature representations within the concrete space, neglecting critical latent associations. To address this, we propose an adaptIve scheMa-ImAGery enhanced composItional NEtwork (IMAGINE). Unlike standard explicit matching, IMAGINE materializes implicit semantics (termed schema imagery) via dynamic multimodal prototypes. These prototypes capture shared latent concepts to adaptively modulate visual features, effectively injecting implicit guidance into the retrieval process. By bridging the gap between explicit visual contents and implicit retrieval intentions, IMAGINE achieves state-of-the-art performance in both CVR and Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) across three widely used benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法IMAGINE，用于提升基于视频和文本组合检索的准确性，特别是在文本描述中隐含但未明确出现在视频中的语义场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖显式视觉特征的匹配，忽视了文本中未直接出现但以相关视觉线索隐式表达的概念，这会导致检索性能受限。
AI.method: 作者提出了IMAGINE网络，通过动态多模态原型表征‘schema imagery’，捕获并自适应调控视频特征，从而实现对隐含语义的建模和利用。其核心是以多模态原型桥接显式视觉内容和检索意图间的隐式关联。
AI.result: IMAGINE在包括CVR和CIR在内的三大主流数据集上取得了最新的性能表现，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: IMAGINE有效弥补了显式特征与隐式语义之间的鸿沟，提升了复杂检索任务中的表现，证明了模型的先进性与实用价值。

title: RAM: Reachability Across Morphologies
summary:
Many stages of the robotic lifecycle, from morphology synthesis to operation, rely fundamentally on the reachable workspace. However, current methods for approximating workspaces are slow, imprecise, or tied to a single morphology. We introduce Reachability Across Morphologies (RAM): a morphology-conditioned, implicit neural representation that acts as a fast, differentiable surrogate for pose reachability, generalising to unseen morphologies while inherently accounting for self-collisions. To train RAM, we publish a large-scale dataset of $3\cdot10^{10}$ samples generated solely from forward kinematics. Experiments show that our model achieves an $ F_1$-score of $86\%$ at nanosecond inference, outperforming the baseline by $14\%$ while reducing inference time by three orders of magnitude. We further demonstrate speed-ups of one and two orders of magnitude for gradient-based morphology and trajectory optimisation, respectively.
  Website: https://timwalter.github.io/ram.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为RAM的新方法，用于高效通用地预测不同机器人结构的可达空间，速度快且准确性高。
AI.motivation: 机器人设计和操作的多个环节需要快速、准确地了解其可达空间，但现有方法速度慢、精度有限，并且通常只能适用于特定结构。
AI.method: 设计了一种面向不同机器人形态（morphologies）的隐式神经网络RAM，用于可达性的快速预测。该模型以机器人结构为输入，可一般化到未见过的结构，并自动考虑自身碰撞。为训练该模型，作者还发布了采样规模达$3\cdot10^{10}$的数据集，并基于前向运动学生成数据。
AI.result: RAM模型在推理速度达到纳秒级的同时，F1分数为86%，比基线提升14%，推理效率提升千倍以上。在基于梯度的机器人形态和轨迹优化任务中，速度分别提升1到2个数量级。
AI.conclusion: RAM实现了对不同机器人结构的通用、高效可达空间评估，对机器人设计和控制具有实际意义。

title: TLRD: Teaching LLMs to Reason over Tabular Data with Tri-Level Rationale Distillation
summary: Tabular data is a primary medium for storing real-world information, driving many industrial applications of machine learning. Traditional predictors achieve strong predictive performance but do not provide readable, case-specific explanations essential for decision-making. Large Language Models (LLMs) can naturally bridge this gap by generating predictions alongside explanations. However, dataset-specific patterns, such as feature distributions and interactions, make tabular data difficult for LLMs to understand and reason over, while label-only fine-tuning improves performance at the cost of catastrophic forgetting. To address this problem, we propose Tri-Level Rationale Distillation (TLRD), a framework that converts label-only tabular datasets into structured rationale supervision for LLMs. TLRD uses a high-capacity teacher to synthesize a rationale corpus grounded in three complementary levels of evidence: instance-level feature, dataset-level distributional context, and comparison-level retrieved neighbors, then distills the rationale into student LLMs, enabling zero-overhead prediction and grounded explanation from raw features only. Experiments on multiple domain datasets show that TLRD significantly closes the performance gap between LLMs and state-of-the-art tree ensembles while producing grounded and readable explanations, offering a valuable reference for high-stakes decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Tri-Level Rationale Distillation（TLRD）的新框架，提高大语言模型（LLMs）在处理表格数据时的预测性能和可解释性，并能生成结构化、可读的解释。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习在表格数据上预测效果好，但缺乏可读的、针对具体案例的解释，阻碍其在需要解释的领域应用；而LLMs虽有生成解释潜力，但难以理解表格数据的特定分布和特征关系，直接微调还会导致灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: TLRD框架通过三层证据（实例级特征、数据集分布级上下文、比对邻居级）由高能力teacher模型生成结构化解释语料，对LLMs进行蒸馏训练，实现预测和解释的无额外开销生成。
AI.result: 在多个领域表格数据集上，TLRD大幅缩小了LLMs与当前最优树模型之间的性能差距，还能输出扎实、可读的解释。
AI.conclusion: TLRD为高风险决策场景下的表格数据学习提供了可解释性强、准确性高的新方法。

title: Property-Informed Diffusion-Based Text-to-Microstructure Generation
comment: Published in CVPR2026, Code is at: https://github.com/hongsong-wang/PropDiff-TMG
summary: Designing 3D metamaterial microstructures that meet the intended functions remains a major challenge, as it typically requires domain expertise, iterative simulations, and extensive manual tuning. Existing work on inverse design that automatically generates microstructures based on desired target properties often suffers from limited design diversity and faces challenges in ensuring the physical feasibility of the generated structures. To address this issue, a property-informed diffusion-based network is proposed that enables the generation of 3D microstructures directly from textual descriptions. Unlike traditional property conditioning methods, our approach leverages rich guidance in terms of semantics and physical properties in the text input to support diverse structure synthesis. To enforce consistency between the generated structures and the target textual prompts, a dual alignment strategy is adopted, including contrastive text-structure alignment and test-time reward-guided alignment. Experimental results show that the model is capable of generating semantically meaningful and physically plausible structures across a wide range of material categories. Our approach has good potential for interactive microstructure design and opens up new directions for combining language-based interfaces with inverse material discovery. Code is available at: https://github.com/hongsong-wang/PropDiff-TMG

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型、结合文本引导的三维超材料微结构生成方法，实现了从文本描述直接生成多样、物理合理的微结构。
AI.motivation: 三维超材料微结构的设计通常需要领域知识、反复仿真和大量人工调整，现有基于逆向设计的方法在生成结构多样性和物理可行性方面存在困难。
AI.method: 提出了一种属性驱动的扩散网络，通过文本输入中的语义和物理属性对生成过程进行指导，采用双重对齐策略（对比文本-结构对齐与测试时奖励引导对齐），提升生成结构与目标描述的一致性和物理合理性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能为多种材料类别生成语义合理、物理可行的三维微结构，且生成结构兼具多样性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有良好的交互式微结构设计潜力，为将基于语言的界面应用于逆材料发现提供了新思路。

title: From USD Scenes to Knowledge Graphs: Zero-Shot Ontology Grounding with LLMs
comment: Accepted to the IEEE ICRA 2026 International Joint Workshop on Ontologies, Semantic Maps and Autonomous Robotics Standardization (J-WOSMARS 2026), Vienna, 2026
summary: Constructing knowledge graphs from 3D simulation scenes is essential for robot task reasoning, but the key bottleneck, grounding scene objects to formal ontology classes, still relies on manually curated dictionaries that are brittle and do not generalize across assets. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can automate this grounding step for Universal Scene Description (USD) scenes as a zero-shot, training-free alternative. On a kitchen scene (125 objects) with SOMA-HOME Ontology, LLMs achieve 90-96% exact-match accuracy with descriptive names and 49-89% with abbreviated names, substantially outperforming dictionary and embedding baselines. Under fully opaque names, context-augmented prompting recovers up to 48%. Feature ablation reveals that LLMs primarily exploit semantic cues in the scene graph (sibling names and parent paths); anonymizing these cues reduces accuracy to 0-6%, while geometry alone yields only 4-17%.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用大语言模型（LLM）无监督自动将3D场景对象与本体类关联的方法，并在厨房场景下显著优于传统词典和嵌入式方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的3D仿真场景实体到本体类映射依赖人工词典，泛化性差、人工成本高。作者尝试寻找更自动化且泛化能力更强的方法，提升机器人任务推理能力。
AI.method: 以Universal Scene Description（USD）格式厨房场景和SOMA-HOME本体为实验对象，采用大语言模型零样本推理实现对象到本体类关联。评估LLM在对象名多样性（描述性、缩写、不透明）情况下的映射表现，并通过特征消融实验分析LLM使用的语义线索。
AI.result: LLM在描述性对象名下取得90-96%的准确率，缩写名下为49-89%，均明显优于传统基线。在无语义名时，基于上下文增强的提示可以恢复至48%。语义关系匿名化后，性能降至0-6%；仅靠几何信息仅有4-17%。
AI.conclusion: LLM能有效自动化3D场景知识图谱对象“本体映射”，语义上下文信息是主要驱动因素，未来在更复杂场景和本体中仍具潜力。

title: Understanding the Sociocultural Dimensions of Mental Health Discourse in Arabic-Language X Communities
comment: Accepted to the SMM4H-HeaRD Workshop, co-located with the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Computational mental health research has predominantly centered on English-speaking populations, leaving Arabic-language discourse comparatively under-examined. We present an exploratory computational study of 8,147 tweets from 607 users classified by a GPT-4.1 personal-disclosure pipeline as likely lived-experience authors in three condition-specific Arabic-language X (formerly Twitter) Communities. We focus on discourse related to borderline personality disorder (BPD), bipolar disorder, and ADHD, and characterize community-associated linguistic patterns using a multi-domain cultural keyword framework. The results suggest that in this corpus, Bipolar tweets contain more religious and medical vocabulary, BPD tweets contain more relational, identity, and emotional-distress vocabulary, and ADHD tweets more often focus on practical symptoms and medication management. We treat these patterns as hypothesis-generating rather than confirmatory because the corpus is imbalanced across conditions, some subcorpora are temporally concentrated, and the keyword framework is an initial operationalization rather than a validated measurement instrument. The paper contributes a reusable LLM-assisted personal-disclosure pipeline and an exploratory cultural keyword framework for Arabic mental health discourse.

AI.tldr: 本文对阿拉伯语社交平台上有关BPD、双相障碍、ADHD的推文进行初步计算分析，揭示不同疾病社区的语言模式差异，并提出可复用的GPT-4.1自动化个人披露分析流程和文化关键词框架。
AI.motivation: 目前大多数计算性心理健康研究集中在英语群体，阿拉伯语用户相对被忽视。因此，作者希望探索阿拉伯语环境下的心理健康言论，丰富全球心理健康信息。
AI.method: 采集来自607名用户的8,147条阿拉伯语X（原Twitter）推文，利用基于GPT-4.1的大语言模型自动识别与心理健康相关的个人披露内容，并从不同疾病社区（BPD、双相障碍、ADHD）抽取并分析多域文化关键词，探究各社区的语言特点。
AI.result: 双相障碍相关推文使用更多宗教和医学词汇；BPD推文更偏向关系、身份和情绪困扰方面的词汇；ADHD推文则多描述实际症状和药物管理。由于数据不平衡、个别子语料时间集中及关键词框架初步设定，分析结果以生成假设为主，仅供进一步研究参考。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献了可重复使用的、支持GPT-4.1人机协作的个人披露分析流程，以及用于阿拉伯语心理健康话语的关键词框架，为其他低资源语言心理健康研究提供方法和工具参考。

title: RAPID: Layer-Wise Redundancy-Aware Pruning and Importance-Driven Token Merging for Efficient ViT
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance but suffer from high computational costs due to quadratic self-attention complexity. Although token reduction techniques such as pruning and merging mitigate this, they typically overlook how representations evolve across network depth. We propose RAPID, a depth-aware token reduction framework that adapts reduction strategies to the layer-wise characteristics of token representations. The primary methodological contribution is a bifurcated strategy: in shallow-to-middle layers, RAPID employs a redundancy-similarity aware pruning metric to eliminate over-represented local patterns. As features transition to global semantic concepts in deeper layers, the framework shifts to an importance-similarity aware merging mechanism. This stage leverages classification (CLS) token attention weights to protect semantically critical tokens while fusing less important but similar neighbors. Empirical validation on ImageNet-1K using ViT and DeiT architectures demonstrates that RAPID establishes a superior accuracy-compression Pareto frontier compared to plug-and-play baselines such as ToMe and ToFu. RAPID is particularly robust in aggressive compression regimes, achieving up to 4.29% higher accuracy than ToMe at extreme reduction rates. Our framework provides a training-free template for optimizing vision models by aligning reduction strategies with hierarchical feature evolution.

AI.tldr: 提出RAPID深度感知token压缩框架，有效提升ViT在大幅降计算量下的表现。
AI.motivation: 受ViT高计算复杂性（源自自注意力的二次复杂度）限制，目前的token 压缩方法忽视了不同深度层表征的变化，无法高效地在各层实施最优token压缩。
AI.method: RAPID根据网络深度自适应压缩策略：浅-中层用冗余-相似度指标修剪冗余token，深层用重要性-相似度指标依据CLS attention合并低重要但相似的token。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上对ViT/DeiT模型测评，RAPID较现有ToMe/ToFu基线在准确率和压缩比取得更佳平衡，极端压缩下也可提升最高4.29%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: RAPID实现了与表征进化相适应的token压缩，不需重新训练即可优化视觉模型的效率和准确率。

title: Bridged SBI: Correcting Biased Low-Fidelity Posteriors for Cost-Efficient High-Fidelity Inference
summary: Accurate calibration of particle-based simulators is crucial for robotic earthwork simulation, but analytical calibration is challenging due to this task's highly nonlinear particle dynamics and the black-box nature of conventional simulators. Although simulation-based inference (SBI) can estimate posterior distributions over simulation parameters solely from forward simulations, applying SBI directly to high-fidelity (HF) particle simulators is often computationally prohibitive. Low-fidelity (LF) simulators with coarser particles can reduce this cost, but changes in particle size and particle count shift the parameter values needed to reproduce the same observation, producing biased LF posteriors. We propose Bridged SBI, which leverages a biased but informative LF posterior to guide HF inference. This method first uses inexpensive LF simulations to identify a coarse high-density parameter region, and then it learns a local residual bridge to transport LF posterior samples toward HF-consistent regions by correcting the LF--HF discrepancy. We analyze how sequential multi-fidelity SBI (Naive-MF) can suffer from LF-induced posterior miscoverage when it directly relies on the LF posterior without discrepancy correction. We then show that Bridged SBI is designed to alleviate this issue by explicitly modeling the LF--HF discrepancy through residual correction. Experiments on both sim-to-sim particle-parameter calibration and real-to-sim calibration with real soil observation show that Bridged SBI produces more accurate and reliable HF posteriors than HF-only SBI or the Naive-MF baseline, especially under limited HF simulation costs.

AI.tldr: 提出Bridged SBI方法，结合低、高清粒度模拟器的优点，通过残差校正在保持效率的同时提高参数后验分布的精度，实现了更准确的粒子模拟器标定。
AI.motivation: 高精度粒子模拟器对地工机器人仿真至关重要，但因粒子动力学高度非线性、模拟器为黑盒，参数标定难以解析且昂贵。直接利用高精度模拟进行基于仿真的推断（SBI）计算成本高昂。虽可用低精度模拟降低成本，但由参数偏移导致后验失真。
AI.method: Bridged SBI分两步：先利用低精度模拟器生成参数后验的高密度粗区域，再学习残差桥接网络，修正低精度到高精度后验之间的分布偏差，实现由低到高精度的一致性推断，显式建模并纠正规模间的后验差异。
AI.result: 该方法在模拟到模拟、现实到模拟的土壤粒子参数标定实验中，相比单独高精度SBI和简单多精度（Naive-MF），在高精度计算预算有限情况下，Bridged SBI能更准确、更可靠地恢复高精度参数后验分布。
AI.conclusion: Bridged SBI兼顾高效与准确，通过纠正低高精度间的后验差异，提升了高精度粒子模拟器的参数标定质量。该方法尤其适合高昂高精度仿真受限的机器人土壤作业场景。

title: Chiaroscuro Attention: Spending Compute in the Dark
summary: Standard transformers apply self-attention uniformly at every layer and token, regardless of whether the input requires dynamic cross-token interaction. We propose CHIAR-Former (Chiaroscuro Attention), a 4-layer hybrid transformer that routes each token to one of three operators - DCT spectral mixing, RBF kernel mixing, or full self-attention - based on per-token spectral entropy, a theoretically justified complexity signal. Through systematic ablation on WikiText-103, we discover routing collapse: the router consistently rejects RBF in favour of DCT and attention, revealing that spectral mixing and dynamic attention are complementary and sufficient. A purpose-designed DCT+Attention-only variant achieves Val PPL 36.54 on WikiText-103 - a 45% improvement over a full-attention baseline (PPL 66.62) at 62.5% fewer attention FLOPs. We extend evaluation to WikiText-2, IMDB sentiment classification, and synthetic ListOps operations, establishing a clear operating regime: CHIAR-Former excels on large-scale naturalistic text where token diversity supports spectral specialisation, while full attention retains an edge on small datasets and synthetic pattern-matching tasks. These findings - both the wins and the losses - together define when and why spectral routing earns its keep.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的混合变换器模型CHIAR-Former，根据每个token的频谱熵将token分别路由到不同的运算单元（DCT、RBF核混合或全自注意力），实现高效又灵活的信息处理，并在WikiText-103等数据集验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer对所有token和层一视同仁地应用自注意力机制，未能根据输入的复杂性动态调整交互方式，可能造成资源浪费和效率低下。研究动机在于利用token间的多样性信号进行动态路由，提高模型效率和表现。
AI.method: 提出CHIAR-Former，这是一种4层混合变换器。每个token依据其频谱熵（作为复杂性衡量指标），被动态分配到三种算子中的一种：DCT频谱混合、RBF核混合、或全自注意力。同时，通过消融实验分析不同算子组合的贡献和效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，CHIAR-Former中的路由机制趋向于选择DCT和自注意力而排斥RBF核，即DCT和自注意力的结合已经足以处理大规模自然文本任务。在WikiText-103上，DCT+Attention模型在减少62.5% FLOPs的情况下，验证困惑度为36.54（相比全自注意力的66.62提升45%）。此外，不同任务上对比结果厘清了模型适用的场景边界。
AI.conclusion: CHIAR-Former在处理大规模、多样化的自然文本任务上表现出色，特别是在token多样性支撑频谱专化的情况下更具优势。而在小规模或合成模式匹配任务上，全自注意力依然更有效。这项工作揭示了频谱路由方法的适用范围及其有效性。

title: How Much MRI Preprocessing Is Enough? A Cost-Utility Study for Brain MRI Foundation Models
summary: MRI preprocessing defines the input distribution seen by brain MRI foundation models, yet it is usually treated as routine data cleaning rather than a modeling choice. We ask how much preprocessing is worth its computational cost for self-supervised 3D MRI pretraining. Keeping the corpus, 3D ViT backbone, masking protocol, and downstream evaluations fixed, we compare a graded P0-P7 preprocessing spectrum for masked autoencoding (MAE) and joint-embedding predictive learning (JEPA) on 20,000 heterogeneous brain MRI volumes, then transfer the encoders to IDH prediction, MCI classification, brain age regression, and GLI/PED tumor segmentation. The results do not support a simple "more is better" rule.
