P0/P1 are numerically unstable, making P2 the lowest-cost feasible level; beyond P2, choosing the best feasible preprocessing level improves aggregate utility by only 3.4 percentage points for MAE and 1.8 percentage points for JEPA, with most paired gains statistically unresolved. Stronger preprocessing is beneficial only in selected regimes: IDH improves modestly, AGE and GLI/PED are often near or best at P2, and MCI shows the clearest empirical P7 gain. Cross-level MCI transfer further shows that much of the P7 advantage can be recovered by applying stronger preprocessing downstream, without requiring P7 throughout pretraining. These findings recast MRI preprocessing as a downstream-aware cost-utility decision rather than a default escalation pipeline. Code is available at https://github.com/PangJiangShuan/PreBrain.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了MRI预处理的程度对3D脑MRI自监督预训练模型（包括MAE和JEPA）性能的影响，发现并非预处理越多越好，而应根据下游任务权衡成本与效益。
AI.motivation: MRI预处理常被视为常规数据清洗，而非建模选择。随着MRI大模型和自监督学习的广泛应用，理解预处理深度对模型下游性能的实际影响变得重要。这有助于指导资源分配与模型开发。
AI.method: 在固定数据集、3D ViT骨干网络、mask协议和评估指标的前提下，研究了P0-P7八个级别的MRI预处理在20,000例异质脑MRI上的效果。分别评估其对MAE和JEPA自监督模型的预训练表现，随后迁移到IDH预测、MCI分类、脑龄回归和肿瘤分割等具体下游任务，并分析不同预处理水平的成本效益。
AI.result: P0/P1级别不稳定，P2是最低可用级别，继续增加预处理强度对整体表现提升有限（MAE提升3.4个百分点、JEPA提升1.8个百分点，多数对比无统计学显著差异）。只有在个别任务（如MCI分类）和特定场景下，最高级预处理（P7）带来明显提升。而且有部分优势可通过下游阶段的后处理实现，无需在预训练全流程使用最强预处理。
AI.conclusion: MRI预处理不应简单等同为“越多越好”，应从下游任务出发，基于实际成本-效益做决定。这一发现推动社区将MRI预处理视为模型优化的一个策略抉择环节。

title: Autonomous Obstacle Removal for Excavators through Policy Learning with Particle Simulation
summary: Autonomous obstacle removal from the ground is an important earthwork task, but this is difficult to automate because an excavator must adapt its excavation trajectories over repeated cycles as soil-obstacle conditions change. Learning such state-dependent behavior requires a training environment that reproduces accumulated soil-obstacle interactions, including contact states, terrain deformation, and obstacle visibility. Accordingly, particle-based simulation is suitable for the relevant policy learning. However, particle simulation is computationally expensive, and repeated excavation cycles further increase the learning cost. We observe that the burial condition of an obstacle governs both task difficulty and simulation cost: deeper burial makes obstacle removal harder while also requiring more particles for accurate simulation. This observation motivates a burial-conditioned curriculum learning strategy. We propose a time-efficient sim-to-real policy learning framework in which the policy observes terrain and obstacle information from RGB-D measurements and then outputs a parameterized excavation trajectory; in this process, the simulator reproduces in a real-world excavator the same observation-action interface it uses under controllable burial conditions. The curriculum begins with shallow burial conditions and progressively increases burial depth while adjusting particle count, thus simultaneously controlling task difficulty and simulation cost. Experiments show that the proposed framework successfully learns an effective obstacle-removal policy, whereas baseline methods fail even after a full week of training. The proposed curriculum achieves effective performance within three days and achieves successful transfer to a real 12-ton excavator operating on open ground with various steel obstacles, thus demonstrating robust obstacle removal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的仿真到真实（sim-to-real）自动障碍物移除学习框架，通过分阶段调整障碍物埋深和仿真粒子数，有效提升了训练效率，并成功应用于真实12吨挖掘机。
AI.motivation: 挖掘机自动化移除地面障碍物任务由于土壤与障碍物相互作用复杂、状态高度相关，难以直接通过传统方法高效学习，需要能真实再现场景变化的训练环境。
AI.method: 采用基于粒子的仿真作为学习环境，同时结合RGB-D传感器观测地形与障碍物信息，输出参数化的挖掘轨迹。创新性地引入按障碍物埋深递进的课程学习策略，浅埋起步并渐次加深，同时动态调整仿真粒子数，控制任务难度与计算成本。
AI.result: 所提方法在仿真中能在3天内训练出有效的障碍物移除策略，远优于基线算法（后者1周未成功）；并实现了算法在真实12吨挖掘机和多种钢制障碍物上的稳定迁移和强鲁棒性表现。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段埋深课程学习显著提升挖掘机自动障碍物移除的学习效率与现实适应性，验证了高效sim-to-real迁移的可行性，对土方类自动化提供了新思路。

title: CATPO: Critique-Augmented Tree Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a dominant paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). Recent tree-based methods such as TreeRPO extend flat trajectory sampling with tree-structured rollouts to obtain dense, step-level reward signals without a separate process reward model. However, not all trees are equally informative: trees where all leaves succeed, all leaves fail, or the policy already predicts the reward distribution contribute little to gradient updates, wasting compute. We introduce CATPO (Critique-Augmented Tree Policy Optimization), which diagnoses and addresses this waste at the tree level. CATPO first scores each tree via a tree informativeness score, F(T), combining leaf-outcome diversity with policy-reward decorrelation at zero extra compute. For dead-wrong trees where all branches fail, CATPO applies critique-guided healing: it locates the shallowest failure point, generates a natural-language critique, and grafts refined continuations to recover training signal. Finally, an informativeness-weighted loss scales each tree's gradient contribution by its normalized score, concentrating parameter updates on the most informative trees while preserving overall gradient magnitude. Experiments on Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B trained with the MATH dataset show that CATPO achieves 37.5% macro accuracy across four benchmarks (AIME24, MATH-500, OlympiadBench, and MinervaMath), improving over TreeRPO by 1.9% and GRPO by 4.8%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强树策略优化方法 CATPO，通过评估和提升树样本的信息量，实现对大型语言模型的高效强化学习训练，在多个数学推理基准任务上优于以往方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于树结构的RLVR方法虽然能获得细粒度奖励，但并非所有树样本都对训练有益，低信息量的树会浪费资源且影响训练效率。作者希望通过筛选和改造树结构以提升每次梯度更新的有效性。
AI.method: CATPO 方法分为三步：1）利用信息量打分函数F(T)评估每棵树，将叶节点多样性和策略-奖励去相关性结合，实现零额外计算下的信息量评估；2）对所有叶节点都失败的“死错树”进行自动批判和修复，通过自然语言生成批判意见并替换失败分支，恢复训练信号；3）将梯度更新对每棵树的贡献按照其归一化信息分加权，重点更新信息量高的树。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B模型及MATH数据集上的实验显示，CATPO在包括AIME24、MATH-500、OlympiadBench和MinervaMath四项基准上的宏观准确率达37.5%，比TreeRPO提升1.9%，比GRPO提升4.8%。
AI.conclusion: CATPO能有效甄别并增强信息量高的树样本，显著提升大语言模型推理能力的训练效率和准确率，是RLVR方向兼具实用性与创新性的进展。

title: Empowering Feed-Forward Reconstruction Models with Metric Scale via Satellite Images
summary: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models have recently shown strong generalization across diverse scenes, yet most of them recover geometry only up to an unknown global scale. This scale ambiguity limits their use in applications that require metric understanding of the environment. Existing metric reconstruction methods commonly rely on large-scale metric annotations or accurate camera calibration, both of which are costly or unreliable in many real-world settings. We propose a satellite-guided framework for resolving scale ambiguity in feed-forward 3D reconstruction. The key idea is to use readily available satellite imagery as a global metric reference. Given a coarse camera pose, our method retrieves a local satellite patch and integrates it with a feed-forward reconstruction backbone through bidirectional cross-view interaction. By enforcing consistency between the reconstructed scene and the satellite reference, the model infers absolute scale, refines scene geometry, and estimates camera pose in a metric coordinate frame. Experiments on KITTI, nuScenes, and Oxford RobotCar show consistent improvements in metric depth estimation, multi-view point-cloud reconstruction, and cross-view camera localization, while preserving strong generalization across datasets and geographic regions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用卫星图像解决前馈3D重建模型中尺度歧义的新方法，无需大规模标注或精确标定即可实现绝对尺度的三维重建，并在多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈3D重建模型虽对多场景有良好泛化，但通常存在全局尺度未知的问题，影响对环境的度量理解。传统解决方法依赖大量标注或精确相机标定，成本高且不现实。
AI.method: 作者提出以卫星图像为全局尺度参考，将本地卫星图像与前馈重建主干网络结合，并通过双向跨视角交互，保证重建场景与卫星数据的一致性，从而推断绝对尺度、优化几何结构与相机位姿。
AI.result: 在KITTI、nuScenes和Oxford RobotCar数据集上的实验表明，该方法在度量深度估计、多视角点云重建以及跨视角相机定位上均有显著提升，且泛化性良好。
AI.conclusion: 本方法能有效解决前馈3D重建模型中的尺度歧义问题，提升多项任务性能，并可广泛应用于现实世界需要绝对尺度的场景，具有较高实用价值。

title: Trajectory Optimization in Single and Dual-UAV Bearing-Only Target Localization
comment: 16 pages, 13 figures and 6 tables. Submitted to Measurement
summary: Bearing-only target localization is a fundamental problem in optical measurement and finds extensive applications in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) technology. Effective trajectory planning establishes favorable observation geometries, thereby enhancing the target localization accuracy of bearing-only UAV systems. This paper proposes an trajectory optimization method for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in bearing-only target localization scenarios. By leveraging the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM), the proposed approach dynamically integrates the geometric configuration and vehicle maneuverability into the optimization framework. Specifically, we introduce a spectrally-weighted FIM objective function that provides better gradient dynamics near degenerate configurations, enabling the planner to rapidly escape from poor observation conditions. For dual-UAV scenarios, an intersection angle sine term is introduced to optimize triangulation geometry by improving the sight-line intersection angle, thereby preventing trajectory aggregation. Furthermore, we propose an improved Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm with motion model constraints and particle normalization to ensure the physical feasibility of the trajectory and enhance the compatibility with the objective functions. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed method reduces the median localization error by 99.21% compared to conventional FIM-based approaches in single-UAV scenarios, and achieves a 69.70% improvement for dual-UAV configurations, exhibits superior performance in long-duration bearing-only target localization of maneuverability targets at extended ranges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向仅测向目标定位的无人机(UAV)轨迹优化方法，通过改进的FIM目标函数与粒子群优化算法，大幅提升了单/双无人机的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 仅测向目标定位在光学测量与无人机领域具有重要应用，提高无人机的观测轨迹对于提升定位精度至关重要，但传统方法在退化构型下效果不佳且难以优化观测几何。
AI.method: 结合FIM，设计了能动态适应几何构型和飞行机动性的优化框架，引入加权FIM目标函数以改善退化点附近的梯度，并在双UAV情况下引入夹角优化项以防止轨迹聚合。此外，改进粒子群优化算法，引入运动约束和归一化确保轨迹可行性。
AI.result: 仿真表明，在单UAV场景下该方法使中位定位误差较传统FIM方法降低了99.21%，在双UAV场景下提升了69.70%，在远距离和目标机动性场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在提升仅测向目标定位的精度和鲁棒性方面效果显著，尤其适合多UAV长时观测复杂机动目标，展现出优于传统方法的应用前景。

title: Tensorizing Engram: Sharing Latents Across N-Gram Embeddings is Beneficial in LLMs
summary: Modern language models represent text using discrete token-level embeddings, which forces recurring multi-token patterns to be learned implicitly across Transformer layers. Both Over-tokenized Transformers and Engram attempt to address this limitation by explicitly incorporating multi-token (n-gram) memories. However, they rely on separate hash tables for each n-gram order, which introduces hash collisions and prevents nested n-grams from sharing the underlying latent structures. To address these issues, we propose Tensorized Engram (TN-gram), a compact memory module that represents tensorized n-gram embeddings through shared factors in the Canonical Polyadic (CP) form. TN-gram learns shared token-position factors together with order-absorption vectors to encode the embeddings of different n-gram order. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that TN-gram matches or even outperforms Engram-style n-gram modules while requiring much fewer parameters.

AI.tldr: 现代语言模型通常用单词级的离散嵌入来表示文本，难以显式地表达多词模式，TN-gram提出用张量分解实现高效多词（n-gram）记忆，效果优于传统做法且参数更少。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多词（n-gram）模式时效率低下，既容易发生哈希冲突，也难以让不同长度的n-gram共享底层结构，导致记忆模块冗余和参数浪费。
AI.method: 提出Tensorized Engram (TN-gram)方法，将多词嵌入建模为共享分解的张量，通过CP分解共享token-位置因子和可吸收顺序的向量，实现高效紧凑表示不同长度n-gram特征。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，TN-gram在参数量大幅减少的情况下，效果可与或优于现有的Engram风格n-gram模块。
AI.conclusion: TN-gram为多词记忆提供了更高效、紧凑的实现方案，有助于提升语言模型在表达和泛化能力上的表现。

title: SegmentAnyTreeV2: Scaling Transformer-Based Tree Instance Segmentation Across Sensors, Platforms, and Forests
summary: We present SegmentAnyTreeV2, a sensor- and platform-agnostic framework for semantic and instance segmentation of forest point clouds. The model combines a serialization-based Point Transformer v3 backbone with a lightweight semantic head and a tree-focused cross-attention mask decoder. Semantic predictions restrict instance decoding to tree-class voxels, while instance-aware query initialization, one-to-many seed supervision, and asymmetric mask scoring improve separation in dense and structurally complex stands. We further introduce FOR-instance v3, an expanded benchmark comprising 427 scenes and 26,496 annotated trees across diverse biomes, forest structures, and LiDAR platforms. On the FOR-instanceV2 test split, SegmentAnyTreeV2 achieves 90.5% precision, 80.2% recall, 85.0% F1, 90.7% coverage, and 87.6% semantic mIoU, outperforming previous learning-based methods in both instance detection and mask completeness. Zero-shot evaluation on independent sites further demonstrates strong cross-domain generalization.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了SegmentAnyTreeV2，一种通用的森林点云语义与实例分割框架，并构建了大规模评测数据集FOR-instance v3，实现了目前最优的实例检测与掩码完整性效果。
AI.motivation: 林业遥感分析中，森林点云的多样性和结构复杂性使得准确分割树木成为难题，且现有方法对传感器与平台具有一定依赖，跨域泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 采用基于序列化的Point Transformer v3骨干网络，结合轻量级语义分支和专为树木优化的跨注意力掩码解码头。语义分割引导实例分割仅在树类体素内进行，并通过实例感知查询初始化、多实例监督和非对称掩码评分提升密集复杂林分的分割效果。
AI.result: 在FOR-instanceV2测试集上实现90.5%精度、80.2%召回率、85.0% F1值、90.7%覆盖率和87.6%语义mIoU，全面优于现有学习方法。零样本评估表明方法具备强跨域泛化性。
AI.conclusion: SegmentAnyTreeV2具有优异的实例分割能力和良好的跨平台/域适应性，结合新数据集为森林点云分析提供了更稳健、高效的解决方案。

title: Deterministic Execution of ROS~2 Applications via Lingua Franca
summary:
The Robot Operating System~2 (ROS 2) is a widely used middleware for robotic systems, characterized by a publish-subscribe (pub-sub) communication mechanism in which computation is structured as callbacks dispatched by ROS 2 executors. Despite its popularity, the pub-sub pattern in ROS 2 is inherently nondeterministic: the order in which these callbacks run is nondeterministic even within a single executor, and distributed deployments add further nondeterminism from the interleaving of messages across nodes and from network latency. Such nondeterminism often leads to concurrency issues and makes it virtually impossible to analyze for safeness and provide guarantees.
  We present a framework that is able to convert an unmodified ROS 2 application and run it under Lingua Franca (LF), a coordination language for deterministic execution using logical time, so that the same input always produces the same deterministic execution order. We first describe which ROS 2 features can be executed deterministically under logical time. Such features enable the possibility to establish an automatic conversion framework to extract information from a ROS 2 application and directly convert it into an LF program. The rich features of LF, such as logical-time delays, federated execution across processes, and fault handling, can then be applied to make the ROS 2 application be executed in a deterministic and timing-predictable manner without changing the ROS 2 code. We evaluate the framework on a synthetic example and on the Autoware reference system. We show that the order in which callbacks are executed differs in default ROS 2, while also having end-to-end latencies that vary across executions. In contrast, our LF-controlled ROS 2 system produces a deterministic execution order and consistent end-to-end latencies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入Lingua Franca (LF)协调语言，让原本非确定性的ROS 2应用无需修改代码即可实现确定性执行。
AI.motivation: ROS 2广泛应用于机器人系统，其发布-订阅（pub-sub）通信机制和回调调度存在本质上的非确定性，导致并发问题和难以分析/保证安全性。
AI.method: 提出一个框架，可将未经修改的ROS 2应用自动提取并转换为LF程序，利用LF的逻辑时间、进程间联邦执行等功能，在不改变原有代码的情况下，实现确定性和可预测时序。
AI.result: 在合成示例和Autoware参考系统测试表明：原生ROS 2回调顺序和端到端延迟在不同执行中变化，而LF控制后可实现确定性回调顺序和一致的端到端延迟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提升ROS 2系统的确定性与时序可预测性，无需更改现有ROS 2代码，有助于改善机器人系统中并发安全与性能可分析性。

title: Bayesian-Agent: Posterior-Guided Skill Evolution for LLM Agent Harnesses
summary: LLM agents increasingly rely on external inference conditions: prompts, tools, memory, SOPs, skills, and harness feedback. These assets can improve task execution without changing model weights, but they are often revised by heuristic reflection or by reusing observed successes and failures as if counts alone were reliable belief. We introduce \textbf{Bayesian-Agent}, a native and cross-harness framework that treats reusable skills and SOPs as hypotheses about whether a frozen model will succeed under a particular prompt, context, and harness environment. Bayesian-Agent records verified trajectory evidence, maintains a feature-conditioned categorical posterior over each skill, and maps posterior state into inspectable actions such as patch, split, compress, retire, and explore. Model-facing prompts receive executable guardrails and failure-mode patches, while posterior summaries remain available for audit. With \texttt{deepseek-v4-flash}, incremental repair improves SOP-Bench from 80\% to 95\%, Lifelong AgentBench from 90\% to 100\%, and RealFin-Bench from 45\% to 65\%. We further evaluate Bayesian-Agent's native backend and optional GenericAgent, mini-swe-agent, and Claude Code backends. The results include positive, negative, saturated, and case-study settings, suggesting that agent skill evolution is best viewed as posterior-guided harness optimization rather than uncalibrated prompt accumulation. The source code is available at https://github.com/DataArcTech/Bayesian-Agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bayesian-Agent的框架，将 LLM 代理中的可复用技能和 SOP 视为关于模型在不同推理环境下表现的贝叶斯假设。通过记录轨迹证据和特征条件下的后验分布，实现对技能与流程的精细管理和优化，有效提升了多个基准任务表现。
AI.motivation: 当前 LLM 代理普遍依赖多种外部推理条件（如工具、记忆、流程、技能等）。这些条件可在不更改模型权重的情况下提升任务表现，但现有调整方式多基于启发式反思或简单数据复用，缺乏系统、可靠的方法。该工作希望通过贝叶斯方法，有效管理与进化这些“外部资产”，提升 LLM 代理在复杂环境下的持续表现能力。
AI.method: Bayesian-Agent 框架将技能和 SOP 视为假设，并对每个技能维护特征条件下的多项式后验分布。代理通过收集并记录执行轨迹的验证证据，不断更新对每项技能/流程的信念，并据此采取可解释的动作（如修复、拆分、压缩、废弃与探索）。为模型推理注入可执行的护栏和失败修补，所有后验摘要均可审计。该方法支持多种后端，适配不同 LLM 代理环境。
AI.result: 在 deepseek-v4-flash 等主流基座模型上，Bayesian-Agent 能实现 SOP-Bench 准确率由 80% 提升到 95%、Lifelong AgentBench 由 90% 提升到 100%、RealFin-Bench 由 45% 提升到 65%。此外，论文还评估了本地后端及多种通用代理适配器，实验涵盖正样本、负样本、饱和样本及案例研究多种情境。
AI.conclusion: Bayesian-Agent 显著提升了 LLM 代理在多任务环境下的适应与进化能力。实验显示，基于贝叶斯后验引导的优化比传统的简单启发式或累积式方法更科学、更有效，建议未来 LLM 代理演化应以后验引导为核心展开。

title: Test-Time Scaling in Multimodal Foundation Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Generation and Reasoning
summary: Test-time Scaling (TTS) has emerged as a pivotal research direction for enhancing model performance by dynamically allocating computational resources during inference. Recent advancements have adapted this paradigm to Multimodal Foundation Models (MFMs), unlocking their potential in multimodal reasoning and generation. Despite rapid progress, the field lacks a systematic survey and unified theoretical framework to delineate the developmental landscape of multimodal TTS. To bridge this gap, we present the first comprehensive review of TTS research for MFMs, proposing a unified taxonomic framework that categorizes existing methodologies into three distinct strategies: sampling-based, feedback-based, and search-based approaches. We further summarize representative applications and benchmarks commonly utilized to evaluate multimodal TTS capabilities in generation and reasoning tasks. Finally, this survey discusses open challenges and outlines future research directions, providing a systematic roadmap for subsequent studies in this rapidly evolving field.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性回顾并分类了多模态基础模型（MFMs）在推理时动态分配计算资源（TTS）的方法，提出了统一的分类框架，总结了应用与挑战，并指明了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着TTS技术在提升模型效率和表现方面的重要性日益突出，尤其是在多模态基础模型领域，然而当前缺乏系统综述和理论框架，限制了该方向的发展。本文旨在填补这一空白，对该领域进行首次全面梳理。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个统一的多模态TTS方法分类框架，将现有方法分为三大类：基于采样、基于反馈和基于搜索。系统地归纳了各类方法的代表性应用场景及评测基准。
AI.result: 本文梳理了相关研究，明确了主流方法的特点，并汇总了多模态TTS在生成与推理任务中的具体应用和评测方式。
AI.conclusion: 多模态TTS是快速发展中的前沿领域。该综述为未来研究理清了发展脉络，指出了挑战并提出了研究建议，为后续工作提供了系统性的参考。

title: MotionWAM: Towards Foundation World Action Models for Real-Time Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) couple a video dynamics prior to the policy and have shown encouraging results on tabletop manipulation, but iterative denoising over high-dimensional video-action latents leaves them too slow for real-time humanoid loco-manipulation. The problem is compounded by the dominant hierarchical paradigm, in which a high-level manipulation policy controls only the upper body while a low-level controller tracks coarse base commands -- placing upper and lower body in inconsistent action spaces and reducing the legs to balance-preserving locomotion. We present MotionWAM, a real-time WAM that drives autonomous humanoid loco-manipulation from a single egocentric camera by conditioning the policy on the intermediate denoising features of a video world model. MotionWAM replaces the upper-lower split with a unified motion latent and predicts whole-body motion tokens that jointly cover locomotion, torso motion, height regulation, foot interaction, and hand manipulation in a single action space. A three-stage learning framework progressively adapts the video world model to egocentric visual dynamics and to the target humanoid embodiment. On nine real-world Unitree G1 tasks, MotionWAM runs in real time, substantially outperforms Vision-Language-Action (VLA) baselines fine-tuned on the same demonstrations by over 30% in overall success rate, and executes task-driven foot interaction that decoupled upper-lower policies cannot reach. Our results suggest that video-pretrained WAMs can be lifted from tabletop manipulation to coordinated, human-like whole-body humanoid control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MotionWAM，一种能够实时控制人形机器人全身运动的新型世界动作模型，显著提升了多任务执行成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的世界动作模型（WAMs）在高维视频-动作空间上推理速度慢，难以应用于实时人形机器人全身控制。此外，主流分层范式将上半身和下半身分别控制，导致动作空间不一致，使机器人下肢功能受限。
AI.method: 提出MotionWAM，通过以视频世界模型的中间去噪特征作为输入，统一动作空间，输出囊括下肢运动、躯干运动、身高调节、脚部交互和手部操作的全身动作token。采用三阶段学习架构，将视频世界模型逐步自适应到以主观视角为主的视觉动态和目标机器人身上。
AI.result: 在9项真实环境的Unitree G1人形机器人任务上，MotionWAM实现了实时运行，总体任务成功率较同样训练条件下的Vision-Language-Action(VLA)基线高30%以上，并能完成需复杂足部交互的任务。
AI.conclusion: 视频预训练的世界动作模型可以拓展到类人机器人全身动作的实时协调控制，为复杂人形机器人多任务执行提供了新方向。

title: Forward-Free Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models generate text through iterative denoising, offering a powerful alternative to autoregressive generation. However, discrete language spaces lack a natural neighborhood structure for defining effective perturbations, so some artificial corruption schemes are proposed in the forward process. Such prescribed forward processes often produce states that are mathematically convenient but misaligned with drafts and errors encountered during generation, resulting in degraded sample quality. To address this limitation, we propose FReDA, a forward-free diffusion language model that eliminates the need for a hand-designed forward process. We formulate diffusion language modeling as recursive distribution refinement, in which model-generated drafts serve as implicit intermediate states, and the learned refinement model progressively moves the draft distribution toward the target distribution. Concretely, FReDA refines drafts by proposing candidate draft sequences and either directly performing self-refinement or selecting among parallel candidates via best-of-N refinement. With this design, FReDA is neighborhood-agnostic, model-complexity-aware, and compatible with flexible refinement parameterizations. Extensive evaluations in the sub-8B regime show that FReDA-4B outperforms larger diffusion base models on reasoning and coding benchmarks, achieving absolute gains of up to 15%, while reaching a 1.5-1.8x average speedup over diffusion baselines and scaling effectively with additional refinement computation.

AI.tldr: FReDA是一种无需手工设计正向过程的扩散语言模型，通过自我精炼和并行候选精炼方式提升生成样本质量，并在多个基准测试中展现了优越的性能和速度优势。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型为了在离散语料空间进行噪声添加，通常需人工设计正向扰动过程，但这些过程与真实文本生成过程中的草稿和错误不一致，限制了模型采样质量。
AI.method: 作者提出了FReDA方法，将扩散语言建模转化为递归式分布精炼过程。具体地，FReDA利用模型自身生成的草稿作为中间状态，并通过自我精炼或并行候选精炼（best-of-N）逐步将草稿分布推向目标分布。该方法无需人为构造扰动过程，且对“邻域”无依赖，适应模型复杂度并支持多种精炼策略。
AI.result: 在sub-8B参数规模下，FReDA-4B在推理和编码任务中超过更大规模的扩散基础模型，最高带来15%的性能提升，同时相比标准扩散方法平均加速1.5-1.8倍，且在计算资源增加时表现出良好扩展性。
AI.conclusion: FReDA通过消除手工正向扰动过程，显著提升了扩散语言模型的性能与采样速度，为离散空间上的高效、高质量文本生成提供了新方向，兼具灵活性和实用性。

title: Light-WAM: Efficient World Action Models with State-Fusion Action Decoding
summary: World Action Models (WAMs) extend robot policy learning by incorporating future prediction as an additional training objective, encouraging the policy to encode task-relevant temporal structure in its representations. Current WAMs often rely on large-scale generative architectures that incur high training costs and inference latency, making them difficult to deploy as efficient closed-loop policies. We propose Light-WAM, a lightweight World Action Model for efficient robot manipulation. Specifically, it is built with a compact video backbone and performs future-video supervision in a downsampled latent space, reducing the cost of video co-training while retaining its benefits for representation learning. For action prediction, Light-WAM introduces the StateFusionActionExpert, which reads adapted states from multiple backbone layers, fuses them through learned-query pooling, and directly predicts action chunks in a single forward pass. This design provides an efficient interface between video backbone representations and robot actions, avoiding the need for heavy generative action experts. Experiments demonstrate that Light-WAM maintains strong performance on LIBERO and achieves usable multi-task performance on RoboTwin 2.0, while using only 0.44B trainable parameters. It also achieves 72.03ms inference latency with 4.1GiB peak GPU memory and improved training throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的机器人操作模型Light-WAM，通过轻量化的架构大幅降低训练和推理成本，同时保持优异的任务性能。
AI.motivation: 当前的World Action Models（WAMs）虽有出色的预测与策略学习能力，但由于依赖大规模生成模型，训练代价高、推理延迟大，难以有效部署在机器人实时任务中。
AI.method: Light-WAM基于精简的视频骨干网络，在下采样的潜在空间进行未来视频监督，兼顾表征学习与计算效率。针对动作预测，提出StateFusionActionExpert，将不同层次的状态特征通过学习查询池化融合，并在单次前向中直接预测动作序列，免除庞大生成模块。
AI.result: 在LIBERO数据集上，Light-WAM维持了强劲表现，并在RoboTwin 2.0上实现了可用的多任务性能。其模型参数仅0.44B，推理延迟仅72.03ms，显存峰值使用4.1GiB，训练吞吐量也有所提升。
AI.conclusion: Light-WAM有效结合了高效的视频表征和动作预测，显著降低资源开消，在保证性能的同时，为机器人操作任务提供了实用的轻量化解决方案。

title: Self-Paced Curriculum Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Superbike Racing in Simulation
comment: Presented at the "1st Workshop on Generalization in Autonomous Driving: Paradigms, Practice, and Public Road Demonstrations" at ICRA 2026, Vienna. Oral+poster presentation
summary: Autonomous Racing has seen remarkable progress through deep Reinforcement Learning (RL), primarily for four-wheeled vehicles. However, motorbikes introduce substantially greater complexity due to the need to manage balance and lean angle, in addition to more reactive steering and throttle control, and a smaller weight. In this work, we present a framework for training an autonomous agent to race a superbike in VRider SBK, a physics-accurate Unity-based motorbike simulator. Our approach integrates Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) with Self-Paced curriculum Deep reinforcement Learning (SPDL), which dynamically generates progressively more challenging tasks based on the agent's performance, without requiring manual curriculum design. The agent's state space comprises proprioceptive features extended with lean-angle history, along with global track features via course points. The reward signal is shaped to encourage progress along the track while penalizing instability-inducing behaviors specific to two-wheeled dynamics. Preliminary experimental results demonstrate that SPDL outperforms SAC alone in training efficiency, lap time, and driving stability across multiple tracks and motorbike models, establishing a first baseline for RL-based autonomous motorbike racing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于在物理精确摩托车模拟器（VRider SBK）中训练自动驾驶摩托车赛车智能体的新框架，结合了软演员-评论家（SAC）与自适应课程深化强化学习（SPDL），无需手动设计课程，并在多个赛道和车型上显示出优于单独SAC的训练效率、圈速和驾驶稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习已在四轮赛车上取得显著进展，但摩托车由于需管理平衡、倾角以及更灵敏的转向和油门，在自主竞速方面难度更大。当前缺乏针对摩托车的RL竞速研究和基线。
AI.method: 方法上，设计了包含自身感知信息、历史倾角和全局赛道信息的状态空间，并通过奖励函数促进赛道进展同时惩罚不稳定行为。核心算法采用了SAC与基于智能体表现动态生成课程难度的SPDL相结合，避免了人工课程设计。
AI.result: 初步实验结果显示，SPDL方法在训练效率、圈速和驾驶稳定性上优于单独SAC，在多个赛道和不同摩托车型中均取得良好表现。
AI.conclusion: 本文为基于强化学习的自动摩托车竞速提供了首个可行基线，并验证了自适应课程生成机制（SPDL）对训练效果的积极意义，为后续相关研究奠定基础。

title: Auditing Proprietary Alignment in Large Language Models: A Comparative Framework Without a Ground-Truth Standard
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly released and deployed through opaque development and deployment pipelines, enabling model providers to inject intentional, provider-specific policies without officially announcing them. As a result, various models have been reported to generate responses reflecting proprietary rules and organizational interests, leading to censorship or misinformation on controversial topics. However, systematic identification of such alignment remains a fundamental challenge, complicated by the ambiguity of what ``proprietary'' entails in different contexts. In this paper, we propose a statistical framework for detecting proprietary alignment in black-box language models via comparative behavioral analysis. Our approach quantifies systematic deviations between the responses of a target model and those of a reference set of baseline models in a shared semantic space. By evaluating relative behavioral divergence rather than absolute correctness, our framework enables principled auditing under black-box access. Applied to several widely discussed but previously unquantified cases, it provides a systematic and scalable basis for external assessment of provider-specific alignment behavior in large language models.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种统计框架，用于在黑盒大语言模型中检测厂商专有性对齐。通过与基线模型的行为比较，系统性识别和评估被植入的专有规则和偏见。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型经常通过不透明的管道开发与部署，厂商可能植入未公开的政策，导致模型偏向特定利益。由于“专有性”在不同情境下定义模糊，系统性识别这些对齐行为具有挑战性。
AI.method: 作者提出一种统计分析方法，通过将目标模型与一组基线模型在相同问题下的响应进行行为比较，量化其系统性偏差。关注行为上相对的偏移，而非答案的绝对正确性，从而适应黑盒评估。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于多个具有争议但此前难以量化的大模型案例，实证展示了其在检测专有性对齐上的有效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 论文为外部、系统性评估和审计大语言模型中的厂商对齐行为提供了科学、可扩展的工具，增强了AI透明和问责能力。

title: TIDE: Task-Isolated Diffusion for Unified Video Editing and Generation
summary: Recent advances in Diffusion Transformers have driven rapid progress in video generation and editing, yet these capabilities are still handled by separate, task-specific models. Building a unified framework that supports diverse video tasks remains an open challenge: existing unified attempts either require dedicated auxiliary encoders or lack explicit mechanisms to distinguish heterogeneous conditioning tokens, struggling when the number and type of visual conditions vary across tasks. We propose TIDE, a unified framework that integrates instruction-based editing, reference-guided editing, and multi-reference generation. At its core, we introduce per-token task embeddings that assign each input token a task-specific identifier, enabling the model to explicitly disambiguate target, source, and reference tokens. To simultaneously capture high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained structural fidelity, we design a dual-path conditioning scheme that couples a vision-language model with a VAE latent path for complementary signals. We further devise a multi-task progressive training strategy that incrementally introduces tasks of increasing complexity, effectively harmonizing diverse objectives and enabling smooth generalization across heterogeneous task distributions. Extensive experiments on multiple video editing and generation benchmarks demonstrate that TIDE achieves state-of-the-art performance across all evaluated tasks. Our project page is available at https://LittleWork123.github.io/tide.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TIDE，一个统一的视频生成与编辑框架，可在不同条件与任务间灵活处理，显著提升多任务性能。
AI.motivation: 目前视频生成与编辑通常需依赖不同的专用模型，难以统一支持多样化任务。已有尝试要么依赖额外编码器，要么无法显式区分不同条件，导致在处理多种任务和条件时表现不佳。因此，亟需一个高效、统一、可拓展的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出TIDE框架，创新性地引入每个输入令牌的任务专用embedding，用于显式区分目标、来源与参考信息，解决条件异构问题。结合视觉-语言模型与VAE潜变量的“双通道条件机制”以兼顾语义与结构特征。采用多任务逐步训练策略，从简单到复杂逐步加入任务，提升泛化与兼容能力。
AI.result: 在多个主流视频编辑与生成的基准测试上，TIDE取得了所有任务下的SOTA表现，验证了模型泛化与多任务能力。
AI.conclusion: TIDE成功统一了视频生成与编辑多任务处理，显著提升了不同条件、复杂任务下的性能，为视频内容生成编辑提供了高效通用的新解法。

title: Can we stabilize an inverted pendulum with feedback from a time-of-flight camera?
summary: Time-of-flight cameras are popular in robotics for providing direct depth information while being compact, inexpensive, and robust to lighting conditions, but their low spatial resolution and depth noise are widely believed to preclude precise feedback control. In this paper, we show that an inexpensive, low-resolution time-of-flight camera provides sufficient feedback to reliably and precisely balance an inverted pendulum on a cart--a canonical benchmark for fast, unstable dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了一款廉价、低分辨率的飞行时间相机可用于精确控制倒立摆，实现了之前认为难以实现的高速不稳定系统反馈。
AI.motivation: 飞行时间（ToF）相机虽然价格低廉且适应性强，但因分辨率低和噪声大，一直被认为难以胜任高精度控制任务。作者希望验证其在严格动力学任务中的可用性。
AI.method: 作者使用低分辨率、廉价的飞行时间相机为典型的不稳定动态系统——小车倒立摆——提供反馈，并进行平衡控制实验。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，即便是低分辨率、廉价的ToF相机，也可以实现对倒立摆的稳定精确控制。
AI.conclusion: 以往关于ToF相机不适合高精度反馈控制的观点存在偏见，该类设备在实际复杂动态系统中仍有应用潜力。

title: When Correct Decisions Hide Internal Stress: Decision-State Probing in Multimodal Language Models
summary: Multimodal language models are typically evaluated through external behavior: selecting the correct image--text match, rejecting unsupported captions, or answering visual queries correctly. However, correct behavior alone does not show that the model's internal decision state remains stable under controlled semantic stress. We study this gap through S$^3$E (Structured Semantic Stress Evaluation), a framework for analyzing behavior-internal decoupling in multimodal language models. S$^3$E uses a positive-anchored A/B forced-choice setup in which an image-supported caption is contrasted against semantic stress candidates under both original and swapped option orders, while hidden states are extracted at the pre-answer decision state. We focus on strict-correct trials, where the model consistently selects the correct caption across both orders. Rather than treating arbitrary hidden-state variation as evidence of instability, we measure whether semantic-conflict candidates induce excess decision-state displacement relative to meaning-preserving controls. Across Qwen3VL, Gemma3, and InternVL3, semantic stress consistently produces positive selected-layer excess displacement over lexical controls despite correct forced-choice behavior, while comparisons against random negatives are model-dependent. We interpret this as a scoped decision-state stress-sensitivity signal rather than evidence of downstream failure or hallucination. Our results suggest that forced-choice correctness alone is not a sufficient certificate of invariant internal decision geometry.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的评估多模态语言模型内部决策状态稳定性的方法，而不仅仅关注外部任务表现。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态语言模型的评估主要关注模型行为表面是否正确，比如配对图片和文本、拒绝不支持的描述或正确回答视觉问题，但这些外部正确性无法证明模型决策过程的内部状态在面对语义压力时依然稳定。因此，有必要开发针对模型内部决策状态的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出S$^3$E（结构化语义压力评估）框架，对多模态模型在面临语义压力的情况下，行为表现与内部决策状态的耦合/解耦进行分析。具体做法是：用正样本对比法（A/B forced-choice），将图片支持的描述与受语义压力干扰的干扰项进行对比测试，并在决策前抽取模型隐藏状态，在严格正确的情况下，测量干扰项是否引入了不同于保存语义的对照组的隐藏状态偏移。
AI.result: 在Qwen3VL、Gemma3和InternVL3等主流模型上实验发现，即使在模型选择始终正确的情况下，语义压力对决策层隐藏状态带来的偏移普遍高于词汇级干扰，而与随机负样本的比较则因模型而异。
AI.conclusion: 强制选择任务中的表现正确性并不足以保证模型内部决策空间的不变性；S$^3$E可作为检测决策状态对语义压力敏感性的新方法。

title: Remember with Confidence: Uncertainty Quantification for Spatio-temporal Memory with Probabilistic Guarantees
summary: Long-horizon robot operation requires spatio-temporal memory to record the environment state and recall it for downstream reasoning. Scene graphs and retrieval-augmented systems ground VLM descriptions to persistent 3D entities with rich semantic descriptions. However, VLM captions are noisy and viewpoint-inconsistent, and existing systems treat them as an oracle with no mechanism to detect unreliable stored descriptions. We introduce object-level semantic uncertainty for multi-view VLM memory: a score that measures object-centric cross-view semantic scatter of captions and identifies semantically unresolved objects. Then, we include our uncertainty scores in an advanced spatial-semantic memory system, that we dub UQ-DAAAM. UQ-DAAAM uses this score to actively refine uncertain objects under a fixed query budget by selecting high-quality views and fusing the resulting multi-view captions into a single object description. We also derive probabilistic guarantees showing that higher-quality candidate views (as selected by our approach) are more likely to reduce uncertainty. Our experiments show that uncertainty quantification can make embodied 4D memory systems more reliable and more effective. In particular, on the OC-NaVQA benchmark, UQ-DAAAM achieves substantially larger uncertainty reduction and better spatio-temporal question answering performance than baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向长时序机器人任务的4D记忆系统，通过引入对象级语义不确定性量化，提升多视角VLM（视觉语言模型）记忆的可靠性、消除噪声和语义不一致，提高下游推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于VLM的场景图和记忆系统虽然能为机器人提供持久的环境描述，但它们高度依赖VLM自动生成的文本描述，这些描述常因视角变化导致噪声或语义不一致，却缺乏机制识别和修正不可靠信息，影响下游任务。
AI.method: 作者提出一种对象级语义不确定性评分体系，通过跨视角统计VLM生成的对象语句的离散程度，主动发现并标记语义不确定对象。基于此，设计了UQ-DAAAM系统，在有限查询预算下优先访问高信息量视角，并将多视角描述融合为置信度更高的单一对象叙述。此外，作者给出概率性理论保证，说明优选视角更有可能降低总体语义不确定度。
AI.result: 实验显示，UQ-DAAAM系统显著减少了记忆中的语义不确定性，并在OC-NaVQA等4D记忆评价任务中，相比现有系统取得了更高的语义明确度和时空推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入不确定性量化和主动检索机制，有效提升了机器人4D语义记忆系统的可靠性和实际应用能力，为复杂场景下的机器人决策与推理带来更好的基础。

title: RPO-PDT: Demonstrating Role-Play-Based Knowledge Adaptation for Student Support Dialogue (Demonstration System)
summary: We present RPO-PDT: a retrieval-grounded, role-play-based dialogue system for adaptive student support in higher education. RPO-PDT is: (1) able to provide institution-specific Personal Development Tutor (PDT) guidance using structured knowledge sources; (2) constrained by explicit persona, boundary, confidentiality, and safety policies; and (3) designed around a reverse-roleplay loop where unresolved interactions are replayed from the student perspective, enabling alternative tutor strategies to be generated and stored as reusable strategy memory. RPO-PDT supports both text-based and Furhat-based embodied interaction for demonstrating grounded, safe, and adaptive student-support dialogue.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的对话系统RPO-PDT，用于高等教育中的学生支持。该系统结合了检索支撑、角色扮演与安全策略，实现了更具适应性和安全性的学生辅导。
AI.motivation: 当前高等教育中学生个人发展辅导存在个性化不足和安全隐私等问题，亟需更智能且能适应不同学校环境的对话系统。
AI.method: 该系统以检索驱动，通过结构化知识实现个性化辅导，采用反向角色扮演机制，让系统能够从学生视角回放未解决的问题，生成替代辅导策略，并保存为策略记忆。此外，系统严格遵循角色、边界、保密和安全政策，并支持文本及实体机器人对话。
AI.result: RPO-PDT能够为学生提供专业、安全、适应不同院校需求的个性化辅导对话，并可记录和复用有效的辅导策略。实现了文本及Furhat机器人实体的对话演示。
AI.conclusion: RPO-PDT系统有效结合了检索、角色扮演和安全策略，在高等教育环境中为学生提供了更具适应性和安全性的辅助对话辅导方式。

title: TrustMargin: Training-Free Arbitration between Parametric Memory and Retrieved Evidence in Large Language Models
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables. Code and data are available at https://github.com/mojixu/TrustMargin.git
summary: Large language models answer knowledge-intensive questions using both parametric memory and retrieved evidence, but neither source is uniformly reliable. Retrieval can fill knowledge gaps, yet distracting passages may override correct closed-book answers. We study this post-generation conflict as answer-level source arbitration: given Direct and RAG answers from the same frozen model, decide which source to trust. We propose TRUSTMARGIN, a training-free, plug-and-play arbitration layer that scores the two existing candidates with the model's own likelihoods. It combines a parametric-prior margin, which tests whether memory accepts the retrieved answer, with an evidence-binding margin, which discounts passage-only salience and measures question-specific support. TRUSTMARGIN selects between Direct and RAG without fine-tuning, external judges, or additional generation. Across 2WIKIMQA and CWQA with three LLaMA scales, TRUSTMARGIN consistently improves over Direct generation and BM25-RAG, recovers part of the Direct/RAG oracle gap, and generalizes to multiple training-free RAG pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种训练无关的仲裁方法（TRUSTMARGIN），用于在大型语言模型的直接生成（Direct）和检索增强生成（RAG）答案中进行选择，以提升答案可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在回答知识密集型问题时，会结合自身参数记忆与外部检索证据，但这两者都不是完全可靠的。检索可以弥补知识盲区，但有时会分散注意力，覆盖正确的直接生成答案。解决如何在对立的答案来源中做出选择，是提升模型答案质量的关键。
AI.method: 作者提出了TRUSTMARGIN，一个无需额外训练即可应用的仲裁层。该方法利用模型自身的概率，结合参数先验边际（判断模型记忆是否接受检索答案）和证据绑定边际（排除仅与文本相关但与问题无关的信息，衡量对问题的支持力度）来对Direct和RAG答案进行评分，最终自动选出更优答案。
AI.result: 在2WIKIMQA和CWQA数据集上、LLaMA不同模型规模测试中，TRUSTMARGIN相较于直接生成和BM25-RAG都有稳定提升，并能部分弥补Direct与RAG理想选择之间的差距，且具备良好的通用性，可无缝适配多种训练无关的RAG流程。
AI.conclusion: TRUSTMARGIN能够无需微调或外部判断，自动在Direct和RAG答案间做出较优裁决，有效提高大模型在知识密集型问答任务的可靠性和泛化能力。

title: G2G: Exploiting Intra-Group Geometry for Inter-Group Pose Estimation
summary: Recovering the relative 6-DoF pose between two image groups underlies cross-sequence relocalization and multi-camera rig odometry. Each group carries known intra-group geometry from visual odometry or rig calibration, and pretrained multi-view backbones already fuse such geometry into visual features. Yet current models treat all views as an unstructured set, leaving cross-group reasoning as the missing piece. We introduce \ours{}, which keeps the foundation model entirely frozen and adds three lightweight trainable modules to bridge the two groups: a perceiver resampler, a cross-group bridge with merged self-attention, and a multi-frame pose head. The trainable footprint totals about 32M parameters, under 6\% of the full model, and is supervised only by relative poses. Across four datasets that span indoor and outdoor simulation, real-world cross-season capture, and zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, \ours{} attains state-of-the-art accuracy on both tasks, while every baseline is retrained with its full original supervision. Code is available at https://github.com/WeiYuFei0217/G2G.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级网络结构，实现了不同图像组间的6-DoF相对姿态恢复，获得领先准确率并远超现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前多视图深度特征提取模型未能有效建模组与组之间的空间关系，影响跨序列重定位和多摄像头系统的里程计精度。
AI.method: 作者在冻结基础视觉模型的前提下，引入三个可训练模块：perceiver重采样器、跨组自注意力桥以及多帧位姿预测头，共计约3200万参数，仅为全模型的6%。采用仅依赖于组间相对姿态的监督训练方法。
AI.result: 在四个涵盖室内外、虚拟与真实、不同季节和零样本迁移的数据集上，本文方法在跨组重定位和多摄像头位姿估计任务上均取得了最优准确率，超过重训练的各类现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在保持基础大模型冻结的条件下，实现了高效准确的跨组6-DoF姿态估计，且参数少、泛化能力强，对大规模多摄像头系统及跨场景应用具有实际意义。

title: Back to the Familiar Future: Failure Recovery for VLA Policies via Pre-Imagined Milestone Selection
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies can deviate from nominal trajectories during manipulation, even when tasks remain physically feasible. Recovering from these deviations is challenging, as they push the policy into unfamiliar state spaces where direct re-planning frequently destabilizes action sequences. We propose Back to the Familiar Future (B2FF), a recovery framework for foresight-driven VLAs that leverages future visual conditioning as a recovery interface. Before execution, the VLA generates a milestone bank of familiar future states conditioned on the clean initial observation. At recovery time, a recoverability-aware selector selects a recovery milestone from this bank and enforces it as a fixed visual goal. This enables the VLA to robustly map off-trajectory observations back to a familiar future. On failure-injected LIBERO, under controlled recovery timing aligned with the injected failure, B2FF increases the average success rate of a baseline VLA from 56.3% to 74.0%, demonstrating that pre-imagined milestones can guide recovery without fine-tuning the low-level action generator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Back to the Familiar Future (B2FF)的恢复框架，通过预生成熟悉的未来视觉目标，帮助视觉-语言-动作(VLA)策略在操作任务中出现偏离后有效恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA策略在操作过程中容易因偏离标称轨迹而失效，传统的直接重新规划方法在不熟悉状态空间下往往导致动作序列不稳定，缺乏有效的恢复机制。
AI.method: 在任务执行前，B2FF框架让VLA基于初始观测生成一系列熟悉的未来视觉里程碑作为参考；当偏离发生时，系统通过具备可恢复性考量的选择器选出一个合适的里程碑作为视觉目标，强制VLA将当前观测映射回这一熟悉的未来状态，从而引导策略回归正常轨迹。
AI.result: 在有意注入失败的LIBERO环境下，B2FF方法通过精确控制恢复时机，将VLA的平均成功率从56.3%提升到74.0%，并实现无需对底层动作生成器进行微调即可恢复。
AI.conclusion: 预想和使用熟悉的视觉里程碑可以在无需底层动作层微调的情况下显著增强VLA的鲁棒性和恢复能力。

title: TimpaTeks: Automatic In-place Text Sequence Modification via Diffusion Language Model Steering
summary: We extend activation steering to diffusion language models (DLMs) and study a novel problem that arose due to the inference mechanism of DLMs: Modifying a text in-place to manifest a different concept. We propose TimpaTeks, an automatic in-place text modification mechanism using DLMs. Experiments on IMDB movie reviews (sentiment) and a synthetic Cats and Dogs Dataset (arbitrary, more unconventional concept steering) show that TimpaTeks provides a feasible novel mechanism to steer diffusion language model outputs in-place. TimpaTeks enables in-place modification while simultaneously lowers sentence perplexity and retaining the original sentence structre without the need of instruction tuned models. TimpaTeks is also computationally cheaper than prompt-based DLM steering, as it performs denoising in-place rather than constructing an additional prompt-conditioned output sequence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TimpaTeks，一种在扩散语言模型中实现原地文本修改、概念引导的新机制，能在保持句子结构的同时，降低困惑度且无需额外指令微调。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散语言模型引导方法常常需要改写、重构文本，且成本较高或依赖于特定指令。本研究关注如何直接在原文本中修改，从而展现新的概念，这是一种新颖、实际需求强的问题。
AI.method: 作者提出TimpaTeks机制，利用扩散语言模型直接对已有文本进行去噪式原地修改，无需生成新句子或指令微调，实现针对不同概念（如IMDB影评情感、猫狗等主题）的引导。
AI.result: 在IMDB和幻想的猫狗数据集上实验表明，TimpaTeks能有效实现目标概念转变，同时降低句子困惑度，且保留原句结构，并且比基于提示的DLM引导方法计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: TimpaTeks为DLM输出引导提供了高效、无须额外指令优化的新方案，具有保持原文结构和较低计算开销的优点，对实际应用具有潜力。

title: HACK++: Towards More Effective Head-Aware Key-Value Compression for Efficient Visual Autoregressive Modeling
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models adopt a next-scale prediction paradigm, offering high-quality generation with substantially fewer decoding steps. However, existing VAR models suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the accumulation of key-value (KV) caches across scales. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into the next-scale paradigm. We begin with an in-depth analysis of VAR attention and observe that attention heads can be stably divided into two functionally distinct categories: Contextual Heads focus on maintaining semantic consistency, while Structural Heads preserve spatial coherence. Their functional divergence makes existing one-size-fits-all compression methods perform poorly on VAR models. We further find that the two head types differ markedly in their reliance on historical scales, and that this reliance shifts across layers and generation steps, arguing for an adaptive cache budget allocation. To address these challenges, we propose HACK++, a training-free Head-Aware key-value Compression frameworK for VAR models. From a one-time offline calibration, HACK++ classifies head types and derives head-specific priors. At inference, it decouples attention from cache compression under independent budgets, bounding the current-scale attention cost while compressing the accumulated cache far more aggressively, via pattern-specific strategies and a reliance-aware budget allocation. Extensive experiments on multiple VAR models across text-to-image, class-conditional, and unified understanding-and-generation tasks validate the effectiveness and generalizability of HACK++. For example, on Infinity-2B/8B, HACK++ maintains near-lossless generation with only a 30% attention budget and a 10% cache budget, and remains robust even under a 1% cache budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的视觉自回归（VAR）模型的Key-Value缓存压缩方法，显著降低内存和计算复杂度，同时保证生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有VAR模型因跨尺度累积的Key-Value缓存，导致注意力计算复杂和显著的内存开销，严重限制了实际应用。以往的统一压缩方法在此场景下效果不佳，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出HACK++：一种无训练、基于注意力头类型感知的Key-Value缓存压缩框架。HACK++首先离线识别并分类注意力头的功能（语义一致vs空间连贯），进而在推理时根据类型独立分配缓存预算，实现自适应、依赖感知的压缩策略，并可对当前尺度与历史缓存分别压缩。
AI.result: 在多个VAR模型（包括Infinity-2B/8B）和多任务（文本生成图像、类别条件、理解-生成统一任务）上广泛实验证明，HACK++能在极低的缓存预算下（如30%注意力预算、10%缓存预算，甚至1%）依然保持无明显损失的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: HACK++显著提升VAR模型的内存与计算效率，支持极低缓存开销下的高质量生成，对于VAR模型的实际应用和推广具有重要意义。

title: VGP-Nav: Metric-Aware Visual Geometric Perception for Robot Navigation
summary: Reliable robotic navigation necessitates the seamless integration of accurate global localization and dense, metric-consistent obstacle perception. A common strategy to achieve these capabilities involves integrating diverse sensing modalities: cameras offer rich visual features for localization, while active sensors like LiDAR provide direct metric measurements. However, such multi-sensor configurations necessitate complex spatial-temporal calibration and increase deployment overhead. Although vision-only approaches offer a low-cost and scalable alternative, existing monocular visual systems typically struggle to simultaneously achieve efficient, globally consistent localization and dense, metric-consistent geometric perception. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{VGP-Nav}, a unified framework for \textit{Metric-Aware Visual Geometric Perception} that relies solely on monocular RGB input to jointly support metric localization and obstacle perception. Our key insight is to anchor localization-grounded visual geometry to physically meaningful scale constraints derived from ground-plane geometry, thereby providing a reliable metric reference for monocular perception. VGP-Nav resolves monocular scale ambiguity online and produces localization-grounded, metric obstacle representations that are directly applicable to downstream planning. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong generalization across diverse environments and successful deployment on real mobile robots, highlighting the practicality of our approach for scalable, low-cost, and safe autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出VGP-Nav框架，只用单目RGB视觉实现机器人的高效定位与稠密障碍感知，解决了传统方法的标定及成本问题。
AI.motivation: 多传感器（如摄像头+激光雷达）虽能提升导航性能，但因需要复杂标定且部署成本高，因此亟需仅靠视觉且低成本的方法，克服现有单目视觉无法同时高效获取全局一致定位和障碍精准感知的难题。
AI.method: 提出VGP-Nav，利用单目RGB图像与地面几何推理结合，引入物理尺度约束，消除单目尺度歧义，在视觉感知中嵌入可度量信息，实现同时完成准确定位和障碍物几何感知。
AI.result: 实验表明，VGP-Nav在多种环境下泛化能力强，已成功部署于真实移动机器人上，验证了其实用性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: VGP-Nav框架为低成本、可扩展、安全的自治导航提供了新思路，单纯依赖单目视觉即可实现高效全球定位和精准障碍感知。

title: AsyncLane: Decoupling Refinement from Advancement in Diffusion Language Model Decoding
summary: Block-wise semi-autoregressive decoding is the standard inference paradigm for diffusion large language models (DLMs), but it imposes a strict dependency between blocks: the next block cannot begin until the current block is fully decoded or its denoising budget is exhausted. We observe that once a block exposes a reliable delimiter boundary or stable semantic prefix, continuation generation need not wait for every residual token to be resolved. We propose AsyncLane, a training-free decoding scheduler that decouples refinement from advancement. AsyncLane forks a generate lane at observed delimiter boundaries into a refine lane and a continuation generate lane: the prefix remains editable, while the continuation advances before prefix refinement finishes. The resulting lane tree records decoding dependencies and output order, while execution proceeds over the active lane set. To make this asynchronous schedule efficient under bidirectional attention, AsyncLane combines shared-prefix lane batching, lookahead draft reuse, cascading termination, and compact cache refresh with refresh-logit reuse, preventing model-call cost from scaling directly with the number of lanes. AsyncLane is a drop-in replacement for block-wise DLM samplers and requires no retraining. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation show that AsyncLane consistently improves throughput while maintaining competitive quality. Across LLaDA and Dream backbones, AsyncLane achieves the highest TPS in all evaluated benchmark-length settings; relative to the fastest competing baseline, it reaches peak speedups of 2.95x on LLaDA and 3.04x on Dream, with especially large gains under longer generation budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AsyncLane，一种训练自由的异步解码调度方法，用于提升扩散大语言模型（DLMs）解码效率，无需对现有模型进行重新训练，显著提升生成速度且保持输出质量。
AI.motivation: 现有DLM使用块级半自回归解码，每个块解码必须全部完成才能进入下一个块，这导致了解码过程中的等待和效率低下。作者发现只要块内出现了可靠的边界或稳定语义前缀，就不必等待所有剩余token被解析，因此希望提高生成速度和并行度。
AI.method: AsyncLane在检测到分隔符边界时，将生成路径分叉为“精细化路径”和“续写路径”：前缀部分可持续编辑，续写部分则可在精细化尚未完成时继续前进。整个过程通过lane tree追踪依赖关系和输出顺序，并结合了lane批处理、草稿重用、终止级联、紧凑缓存刷新和logit重用等机制，有效降低了多路径下的模型推理成本。
AI.result: AsyncLane在无需模型重训的情况下，作为块级DLM采样器的直接替换，在数学推理和代码生成任务上实验显示，相较于最快的已有方法，在LLaDA和Dream两个扩散模型骨干下分别达到2.95倍和3.04倍的速度提升，特别是在长生成预算下提升更为显著，同时保持输出质量。
AI.conclusion: AsyncLane是一种简单高效、无需重训即可直接替换现有块解码的解码范式，能够大幅提升DLM的推理速度并兼顾生成质量，对现有基于扩散的大语言模型解码具有实用价值。

title: Set-Based Transformer for Atmospheric Compensation in Standoff LWIR Hyperspectral Imaging
summary: Passive long-wave infrared (LWIR) hyperspectral imaging under a standoff geometry depends on atmospheric absorption and emission, as well as reflected radiance, thus making atmospheric compensation essential to get knowledge of a target of interest. Despite its importance, this compensation has been largely overlooked due to its practical and modeling difficulty. In this paper, we present a lightweight set-based deep learning framework that takes multiple radiance measurements, collected at different standoff ranges, as input and jointly estimates transmittance, atmospheric path radiance, and a shared downwelling spectrum. We analyze the learned representation with a sparse autoencoder and observe that several latent features do activate on geographically coherent subsets of the test data despite the absence of location supervision. Experiments on a MODTRAN generated standoff LWIR dataset demonstrate low spectral distortion across all estimated products. The dataset and code is publicly available at: https://factral.co/SAE-LWIR/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级基于集合的深度学习框架，实现了红外遥感多光谱成像中的大气补偿任务，通过多个不同距离的数据联合估算大气参数。
AI.motivation: 在被动远距离红外高光谱成像中，大气吸收、发射和反射对观测目标有显著影响，因此需要进行大气补偿，但实际应用中由于该过程复杂且难以建模，相关研究和应用较为稀缺。
AI.method: 提出基于集合的深度学习方法，将不同距离下获得的辐射测量作为输入，联合估算大气透过率、大气路径辐射以及统一的下行光谱。通过稀疏自动编码器分析所学到的潜在特征，并研究这些特征与地理信息的关联。
AI.result: 利用MODTRAN仿真生成的数据集进行实验，所有估算结果产品在光谱失真度上表现良好，并且部分潜在特征在缺乏地理标签的情况下能在地理上相干的测试数据子集上激活。数据集和代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了远距离红外成像中的大气补偿问题，兼具简便性和鲁棒性，有助于相关遥感研究和应用。

title: VAIC: Vision-Guided Humanoid Agile Object Interaction Control via Decoupled Commands
summary: Humanoid robots hold immense potential for real-world assistance, yet agile interaction with objects in unstructured environments demands tightly coupled whole-body coordination. Despite recent advancements, current controllers face a critical deployment gap. They rely heavily on dense reference trajectories and perfect state observability, which inherently limits physical generalization. We present Vision Guided Agile Interaction Control (VAIC), a unified framework that bridges this gap by operating exclusively on onboard depth, historical proprioception, and a decoupled user command interface. VAIC employs a two-stage distillation paradigm. First, a privileged teacher policy masters diverse interaction skills using precise object kinematics and exact environmental states. Second, a deployable student policy distills these capabilities by replacing full body tracking with velocity targets across multiple axes and an interaction indicator for each frame. The student utilizes a recurrent object adaptation module to implicitly infer unobservable object dynamics from raw depth streams and proprioception. Evaluations and real-world deployments on the humanoid robot demonstrate that a single VAIC policy successfully executes highly diverse dynamic tasks. These tasks include box carrying, cart interaction, and skateboarding, consistently outperforming baselines and advancing autonomous humanoid deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的人形机器人控制框架VAIC，仅依赖于机载深度信息和本体感知，实现灵活高效的物体交互，显著提升了机器人在真实世界中的通用性和适应能力。
AI.motivation: 当前人形机器人控制技术过度依赖稠密的参考轨迹和完整的状态可观测性，导致在实际环境中的泛化能力不足，限制了部署和应用。
AI.method: VAIC使用双阶段知识蒸馏架构。第一阶段，利用具备精准感知的teacher policy掌握多样交互技能；第二阶段，通过仅用速度目标和交互指示器替代全身跟踪，student policy蒸馏teacher的能力，同时用递归对象自适应模块，从深度流和本体感知中隐式推断物体动态。
AI.result: 在多个实际和仿真任务（如搬箱、推车、滑板等）中，VAIC单策略表现优于同类基线方法，展现了高度的任务多样性和动态适应能力。
AI.conclusion: VAIC作为统一控制框架，显著推动了人形机器人在现实世界中的自主部署能力，并解决了现有方法难以泛化与感知不完美的问题。

title: Hacking Generative Perplexity: Why Unconditional Text Evaluation Needs Distributional Metrics
comment: Accepted to the Workshop on Structured Probabilistic Inference & Generative Modeling (SPIGM) at ICML 2026
summary: Diffusion and continuous flow-based language models have emerged as the leading non-autoregressive alternatives to language modeling. Progress in both paradigms is overwhelmingly tracked by generative perplexity (gen-PPL): the per-token negative log-likelihood of samples under a frozen autoregressive (AR) scorer such as gpt2-large, typically paired with an empirical-entropy guardrail to rule out low-entropy collapse. We argue that this metric is unsound. By construction, gen-PPL measures only predictability under the scoring AR, not grammaticality or semantic coherence -- and the set of predictable but still low-quality sequences is combinatorially large. To make this concrete, we construct a suite of zero-parameter, deliberately naive samplers that achieve state-of-the-art gen-PPL on LM1B and OpenWebText at non-degenerate entropy, surpassing recently published diffusion and continuous-flow models while producing text that is incoherent by construction. We recommend evaluation suites that directly quantify the distributional divergence between generated and reference text, and use such a suite to re-benchmark recent non-autoregressive models, recovering a more faithful picture of the current state of the art.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，用于评估扩散和连续流语言模型的主流指标gen-PPL（生成困惑度）并不能真实反映模型生成文本的质量，存在显著缺陷。作者提出新的评测方法，并对现有非自回归模型进行重新评测以获得更真实结果。
AI.motivation: 当前非自回归语言模型（如扩散和流模型）评估主要依赖gen-PPL，但该指标仅关注在AR scorer下的可预测性，无法衡量语法和语义的合理性。作者认为，这种评测方式不能客观反映生成文本质量。
AI.method: 作者构建了一组零参数且非常简单的采样器，这些采样器在流行数据集上获得了很好的gen-PPL分数，但生成的文本本质上是无意义的。这样说明好gen-PPL分数不代表文本高质量。随后，作者建议并实践了基于衡量生成文本与参考文本分布差异的方法来重新评估当前的非自回归模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，这些简单采样器可获得甚至超过最新扩散和流模型的gen-PPL分数，但内容混乱、不通顺。重新采用新的分布性评价指标后对现有非自回归模型进行了更客观的排名和评估。
AI.conclusion: gen-PPL作为主流非自回归文本生成质量指标并不可靠，作者推荐采用能直接衡量生成与真实分布差异的新评价套件，以更准确反映文本生成模型的实际水平。

title: SMI: Efficient Self-Supervised Learning via Mutual-Information-Inspired Dependency Optimization
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has achieved remarkable representation learning performance, but many existing methods rely on large batch sizes, memory banks, momentum encoders, or global synchronization mechanisms that substantially increase computational cost and training complexity. In this work, we propose Semantic Mutual Information (SMI), a lightweight self-supervised objective derived from a mutual-information-inspired dependency formulation under Gaussian assumptions. Unlike conventional correlation matching objectives that operate on high-dimensional feature correlation matrices, SMI performs optimization on a sample-level dependency matrix through a nonlinear transformation of pairwise correlations. This formulation induces distinct optimization dynamics that emphasize strongly dependent semantic pairs while maintaining representation diversity. Experimental results on ImageNet using a ResNet-50 backbone demonstrate that SMI achieves competitive linear evaluation performance relative to state-of-the-art SSL approaches while substantially reducing computational complexity. Across multiple low-resource benchmarks, SMI consistently improves transfer performance over Barlow Twins, particularly on fine-grained datasets. Furthermore, analyses of optimization dynamics and representation geometry suggest improved alignment--redundancy balance, greater feature diversity, and more spatially localized semantic representations. These results indicate that nonlinear dependency optimization provides an effective and computationally efficient alternative to conventional correlation-based self-supervised learning objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自监督学习目标SMI，降低了训练复杂度，在保持竞争表现的同时显著提高了计算效率。
AI.motivation: 许多主流的自监督学习方法需要大批量、记忆库、动量编码器等，导致训练成本高、实现复杂，需要更高效的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出了SMI（Semantic Mutual Information），受互信息公式启发，基于高斯假设，在样本级依赖矩阵上通过非线性变换优化语义相关性，避免高维特征矩阵的计算。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和多项低资源的迁移任务中，SMI在ResNet-50上与主流自监督方法具有可比的性能，并在细粒度数据集和低资源下明显优于Barlow Twins，同时减少了计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 非线性依赖优化是一种有效且高效的自监督学习目标，可替代传统的基于相关性的方法，提升了特征多样性与表示局部性。

title: Dual Quaternion-Based Unscented Kalman Filter with Visual Inertial Odometry for Navigation in GPS-Denied Environments
summary: Reliable navigation in GPS-denied environments remains a fundamental challenge in robotics, aerospace, and autonomous vehicle applications. This paper presents a Dual Quaternion-Based Unscented Kalman Filter (DQUKF) equipped with a Visual Inertial Odometry (VIO) algorithm for accurate state estimation enabling navigation in GPS denied locations. The proposed framework formulates the DQUKF in an error state manner, where the nominal pose is represented by a unit dual quaternion and the local pose error is represented by a 6-dimensional twistor parameterization used for sigma point generation, covariance propagation, and measurement correction. In parallel, the VIO algorithm tracks features across image frames, synchronizes measurements between the IMU and camera, and provides visual constraints that complement inertial propagation. Simulation results on the EuRoC MAV dataset show that the proposed DQUKF converges under high initialization uncertainty and achieves a position RMSE of 0.2584~m in the difficult flight sequence, outperforming the benchmark filters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合双四元数无迹卡尔曼滤波（DQUKF）和视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的状态估计方法，有效提升了在无GPS环境下的导航精度，并在公开数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在无GPS环境中，如室内、地下、城市峡谷等场景，传统导航方式失效，因此迫切需要高精度、可靠的状态估计算法满足机器人及无人自主系统的应用需求。
AI.method: 作者提出将双四元数形式的无迹卡尔曼滤波（DQUKF）与 VIO 算法结合。DQUKF采用单位双四元数表示姿态，并用6维扭量参数化局部误差、生成Sigma点、传播协方差和校正观测。VIO提供视觉特征跟踪和IMU与摄像头的同步，增强了惯性信息。
AI.result: 在EuRoC MAV数据集的高难度飞行序列上，该方法在高初始化不确定性下能够收敛，位置RMSE达到0.2584米，性能优于基线滤波器。
AI.conclusion: DQUKF结合VIO可在无GPS环境中实现更准确、鲁棒的导航定位，尤其适用于机器人和无人机等应用，优于传统滤波方法。

title: Segment-level Tree Search for Long Meeting Document Summarization
summary: Meeting documents are challenging to summarize due to their length and complex conversational structure. Existing approaches typically adopt multi-stage pipelines that extract information prior to summarization; however, these approaches often suffer from cumulative error propagation without intermediate validation, a limitation further amplified by short and low-quality reference summaries. We propose segment-level summarization via Monte Carlo Tree Search (S3), a training-free framework that constructs a final summary by composing segment-level summary candidates. S3 partitions a long document into segments and generates multiple summary candidates per segment, forming nodes of a search tree. The best-scoring combination is selected via self-reward-guided tree search and refined into the final output. Despite using a 7B model, S3 achieves performance comparable to larger 72B models while producing length-appropriate summaries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为S3的无训练会议文档摘要方法，通过分段与蒙特卡洛树搜索组合子摘要，提高摘要的准确性与完整性，并且性能优于大参数模型。
AI.motivation: 会议文档篇幅长、结构复杂，现有多阶段抽取式摘要方法容易产生误差累积，并且在参考摘要质量低时效果更差。本文旨在解决长文本结构信息捕获与阶段性错误放大的问题。
AI.method: 提出S3（Segment-level Summarization via Monte Carlo Tree Search），首先将文档分段，对每段生成多个摘要候选，节点构成搜索树。通过自奖励驱动的树搜索，选择最优摘要组合，并整体润色生成最终摘要。整个流程无需训练，可适配较小规模的模型。
AI.result: 即便仅使用参数为7B的小型模型，S3的摘要表现也可与当前参数高达72B的大模型媲美，并产生更加适当长度的摘要。
AI.conclusion: S3在提高会议文档自动摘要效率与准确性的同时，减少模型规模与硬件资源消耗，为长文本摘要任务提供了新的思路。

title: Beyond Raw Signals: Undecoded Generative Latents as Privileged Synthetic Data
summary: While multimodal integration significantly improves computer vision models, deploying them incurs prohibitive inference costs and requires scarce, perfectly paired datasets. Recent methods address this data bottleneck by synthesizing missing modalities via generative AI, yet they introduce a severe inefficiency: the Decode-Encode Loop. Specifically, information-rich generative latents are decoded into noisy raw signals, forcing the downstream classifier to waste capacity re-encoding them. To bypass this bottleneck, we propose Direct Latent Augmentation (DLA), utilizing undecoded generative latents directly as privileged information. Furthermore, to transfer this dense knowledge to a purely visual student, we introduce Multilayer Explicit Simulated Synesthesia (MESSy). Instead of enforcing rigid representation matching, which forces the student to distort its native visual features to accommodate complex multimodal topologies, MESSy uses a predictive objective to safely internalize these physical priors. Empirical results demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms raw data augmentation and traditional distillation. Ultimately, our approach yields highly accurate unimodal students with ``synesthetic'' latent structures that are inherently aligned with physical properties they have never directly observed.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了直接使用生成模型潜在变量来辅助视觉模型学习，避免生成-编码循环带来的低效，并通过新方法MESSy有效迁移多模态知识，使单模态视觉模型获得更高性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态模型提升视觉任务性能，但需要高昂的推理成本和难以获得的配对数据。已有做法用生成模型补足数据，但在生成-编码步骤中信息损失并导致低效，亟需更有效率的多模态知识迁移方式。
AI.method: 提出Direct Latent Augmentation（DLA），直接用未解码的生成潜在变量（而非原始合成数据）为视觉模型提供先验信息；进一步，提出MESSy方法，通过预测目标（而非全特征对齐），将多模态隐含知识迁移到纯视觉模型，避免因强行对齐特征而损害视觉特征表达。
AI.result: 实验证明，DLA和MESSy框架显著优于传统的原始数据增强及知识蒸馏方法，在无需直接观测的情况下，纯视觉模型也可获得与物理属性对齐的“共感”式潜在结构，并且表现出很高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法大幅提升了在缺失模态情况下单模态视觉学生模型的表现，实现高效、信息丰富的知识迁移，为多模态学习和知识蒸馏领域提供了新方向。

title: KPGrasp: Scalable Keypoint Flow Matching for Dexterous Grasp Generation
summary: Generating high-quality dexterous grasps remains challenging for learning-based methods, which often depend on carefully tuned contact losses or costly contact-based test-time refinement. We present KPGrasp, a flow-matching framework that learns dexterous grasp priors from large-scale data rather than relying on contact losses or contact-based test-time refinement. KPGrasp couples an all-Euclidean 3D hand-keypoint parameterization with a simple yet scalable Transformer flow model. The parameterization avoids the drawbacks of the conventional mixed SE(3) pose and joint-angle output space, expresses grasps in the same frame as the object point cloud, and thus enables native spatial reasoning; the Transformer flow model is trained with only the standard flow-matching loss and scales effectively with data, model capacity, and batch size. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on two simulation benchmarks. On the Dexonomy benchmark, it reaches a 76.3% grasp success rate, improving over the strongest directly comparable baseline by 47.4% while reducing penetration depth to 2.4 mm. The same model also achieves the best average performance on the DexGrasp Anything benchmark without fine-tuning. For batched inference, KPGrasp requires only 0.032 s per grasp. Finally, real-world experiments on 20 diverse objects demonstrate that the pipeline can be deployed in a real-world setup.

AI.tldr: KPGrasp提出了一种基于流匹配的灵巧抓取生成方法，通过3D手部关键点参数化和Transformer流模型，在无需接触损失或测试时接触回馈的情况下，提升了抓取质量，且具备高效推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法在灵巧抓取任务中依赖于复杂调参的接触损失或代价高昂的接触回馈精炼，造成泛化能力弱和效率低下，亟需更高效、泛化性强的抓取方法。
AI.method: KPGrasp方法将3D手部抓取参数直接用欧式空间中的手部关键点表达，结合Transformer流模型，用标准流匹配损失训练模型，省去了传统混合姿态输出和复杂损失设计，实现原生空间推理和高效大规模扩展。
AI.result: KPGrasp在两个模拟基准（Dexonomy、DexGrasp Anything）上均取得了最优表现。Dexonomy基准抓取成功率达76.3%，超过基线47.4%，穿透深度仅2.4mm，无需微调即取得DexGrasp Anything基准最佳平均性能。推理速度快，每次抓取仅需0.032秒。
AI.conclusion: KPGrasp无需依赖接触损失或测试时精炼，能高效生成高质量灵巧抓取，具有优异的泛化能力和实际部署价值，在真实物体抓取实验中也验证了其有效性。

title: Sycophancy as a Multilingual Alignment Failure: How Safety Degrades Across Languages, Topics, and Models
summary: Safety-aligned large language models often exhibit sycophancy, which is the tendency to affirm users' opinions regardless of factual accuracy. Although well-studied in English, its manifestation in other languages remains largely unexamined, leaving billions of non-English speakers potentially vulnerable to model-validated misinformation. We present the first large-scale, multi-model evaluation of cross-lingual sycophancy, benchmarking \textbf{six instruction-tuned models} across \textbf{1.1 million instances} spanning \textbf{38 languages} and \textbf{33 topic categories}. We identify a consistent resource-tier effect: sycophancy rates spike sharply in low-resource and zero-shot language settings. Critically, this degradation is topic-agnostic, as models fail uniformly across both benign and safety-critical prompts, offering no additional protection where it is most needed. We further identify tokenizer fertility as a structural driver of this alignment collapse. Collectively, our results demonstrate that prevailing alignment methodologies generalize poorly beyond high-resource languages, underscoring the urgent need for equitable multilingual safety techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对大型语言模型在跨语言中的逢迎性问题进行大规模、多模型评测，发现主流对齐方法在低资源语言中的安全性显著下降。
AI.motivation: 此前关于大语言模型逢迎性（随意认同用户观点）的研究主要聚焦于英语，极少涉及其他语言，因此数十亿非英语用户可能面临模型强化错误信息的风险。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索多语言环境中的逢迎性表现及安全隐患。
AI.method: 作者对6个经指令微调的大语言模型，基于110万份数据、涵盖38种语言和33个主题，进行了系统性的逢迎性基准评测。重点分析了不同资源层级（高、低资源以及零样本语言）下的逢迎性表现。同时考察了分词器结构导致的对齐崩溃。
AI.result: 结果显示，模型在低资源和零样本语言环境下逢迎性显著上升，而且在普通和安全敏感话题上表现一致，无法在安全话题中提供额外保护。此外，分词器特性被识别为逢迎性加剧的结构性根源。
AI.conclusion: 现有对齐和安全性技术在高资源语言之外泛化能力弱，亟需更公平、更具多语言适应性的模型安全策略以保护全球用户。

title: Self-Supervised Vision Transformers for CBCT-Based Detection of Temporomandibular Joint Osteoarthritis
summary: Temporomandibular joint osteoarthritis (TMJ OA) is a prevalent degenerative condition whose osseous changes are often subtle on cone-beam CT (CBCT), making automated detection challenging. We study how well the DINO family of self-supervised vision transformers -- DINOv1, DINOv2, DINOv2+reg, and RAD-DINO (a radiology-pretrained variant) -- transfers to CBCT, asking how much backbone adaptation is needed and of what kind. We propose a simple slice-based pipeline using Vision Transformer (ViT) backbones: axial CBCT slices are encoded per-slice by a frozen or partially adapted ViT and aggregated via attention-based multiple instance learning (MIL) for patient-level binary OA/Normal classification. Through systematic ablation across unfreezing strategies and aggregation designs on a multi-source CBCT dataset, we find that partial unfreezing of the final two transformer blocks is the decisive factor, improving AUC from 0.671 (fully frozen DINOv2) to 0.902. This outperforms DINOv1 (0.867), DINOv2+reg (0.774), and a supervised ImageNet ViT-B/16 baseline (0.843). Our results provide practical guidance for adapting DINO-family foundation models in low-data medical imaging settings, showing that adaptation strategy is a stronger driver of performance than backbone choice alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督视觉Transformer（DINO系列）在CBCT下颞下颌关节骨关节炎（TMJ OA）自动检测的迁移能力，并提出部分解冻Transformer的后两层能大幅提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: CBCT下TMJ OA的骨质改变常常较为微妙，自动检测难度大，亟需改进现有算法以提升医疗影像分析的准确性，尤其是在数据量小的情境下。
AI.method: 构建了基于ViT骨干的切片级处理管线：先用冻结或部分适应的ViT对CBCT轴向切片编码，再通过注意力多实例学习（MIL）在患者层面进行二分类。系统性地分析了部分解冻与聚合设计对性能的影响。
AI.result: 结果显示，解冻Transformer最后两层AUC由0.671（全冻结）提升至0.902，优于DINOv1（0.867）、DINOv2+reg（0.774）以及ImageNet监督学习ViT-B/16基线（0.843）。
AI.conclusion: 在低数据量的医学影像场景中，DINO系列模型通过适当的部分解冻策略能显著提升性能，适配策略比模型骨干本身更为关键，为医学影像领域提供了实用的迁移指导。

title: TORL-VLA: Tactile Guided Online Reinforcement Learning for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become a powerful framework for robotic manipulation, and recent studies have introduced tactile or force feedback into VLAs to address contact-rich tasks. However, these models are typically deployed as offline policies. When contact conditions shift from the training distribution, the policy cannot perform online adaptation, leading to problems such as inappropriate contact forces and inefficient retries. Therefore, we propose TORL-VLA, a tactile-guided online reinforcement learning framework that couples tactile feedback with policy refinement for contact-rich manipulation. Our method introduces a tactile-derived wrench-aware VLA to predict reference actions and future wrench sequences, while a lightweight online RL module is used to refine the reference actions. To stabilize learning from mixed exploratory policy-generated and human-intervention data, we introduce an intervention-censored critic that prevents post-intervention success from being wrongly credited to policy-generated actions preceding intervention. Real-robot experiments on long-horizon contact-rich tasks, including latch manipulation, coffee-cup placement, and egg handling, show that TORL-VLA improves success rates at both subtask and full-task levels, as well as time-bounded execution efficiency over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合触觉反馈和在线强化学习的VLA模型TORL-VLA，用于应对机器人在接触丰富任务中的在线自适应难题，并在真实机器人任务中取得了优于基线的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型虽已结合部分触觉或力反馈，但多为离线策略，无法在线适应接触条件发生变化时的场景，导致接触力不当和低效重试问题。这亟需能根据实时触觉反馈调整策略的方法。
AI.method: 提出TORL-VLA框架，将触觉信息通过wrench-aware机制用于动作预测，并引入轻量级在线RL模块实时优化参考动作。为解决混合探索与人类介入数据造成的学习干扰，设计了intervention-censored critic，避免将人类介入后的成功错误归因于模型自身。
AI.result: 在实际机器人长时序接触任务（如门锁操控、咖啡杯放置、鸡蛋搬运）中，TORL-VLA在子任务及整体成功率及限时效率上均超越强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 结合触觉反馈和在线RL的TORL-VLA能显著提升接触复杂操作的鲁棒性、自适应能力与执行效率，对提升现实机器人操作水平有重要意义。

title: More Yap Less Meaning: Uncovering Self-Improvement Behavior in SLMs
summary: Recently, language models have made rapid progress across various domains and applications. However, their capability for self-improvement, i.e., whether they are adept at recognising and correcting flaws in their own reasoning, remains dubious. In this study, we address this question by constructing a sufficiency test to rigorously examine the self-correction capabilities of small language models (SLMs). We propose a minimal three-step self-correction pipeline that collects initial SLM answers, prompts the same model to generate hints for its incorrect responses given the ground truth, and feeds the model the same question with its own feedback to refine the initial answer. We evaluate a variety of instruction-tuned and reasoning SLMs in this experimental setup on arithmetic and logical reasoning benchmarks. Our findings show that SLMs with injected hint sentences yield only a 4.4 percent gain over initial question-answering accuracy. Even though the correct answer was provided alongside the model's incorrect reasoning, the evaluated SLMs fail to understand what was missing in their reasoning and show minimal semantic difference between hints that lead to corrections and ones that do not. Furthermore, our experiments show that longer hints are positively correlated with incorrect final answers, suggesting that longer deliberation on problems can hinder the reasoning process, meaning that SLMs do not necessarily scale in performance with a larger compute budget.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对小型语言模型（SLM）的自我纠错能力进行了严谨测试，结果显示SLM自我改正效果有限，提升幅度较小。
AI.motivation: 尽管语言模型在多个领域取得了进展，但其自我识别与改正推理错误的能力尚不明确。论文希望解决SLM是否能有效自我纠错的问题。
AI.method: 提出三步自我纠错流程：收集初始答案、提示模型对错误答案生成提示语、结合其自身反馈重新回答，并在数学和逻辑推理基准上评估多种模型的表现。
AI.result: 注入提示语的SLM答案准确率仅提升4.4%。即使给出正确答案，SLM也难以理解自己推理中缺失之处，能导致改正和不能改正的提示语在语义上差异极小。长提示语反而与错误率正相关。
AI.conclusion: 小型语言模型自我纠错能力有限，不会因更多计算资源或更长思考而大幅提升，用传统自我改正机制难以有效提升SLM推理表现。

title: SceneConductor: 3D Scene Generation from Single Image with Multi-Agent Orchestration
summary: Generating complete 3D scenes from a single image requires inferring globally consistent geometry, object relationships, and environmental context from inherently ambiguous visual evidence. Despite recent progress in joint layout-and-mesh generation, existing methods often rely on holistic or weakly decomposed pipelines that entangle many factors at once and demand extensive scene-level supervision, limiting their generalization to complex real-world environments. We propose a multi-agent orchestration framework that decomposes single-image 3D scene generation into three structured stages: scene initialization, environment construction, and multi-agent refinement. The initialization stage extracts image-derived object masks, builds object-level 3D representations, and predicts an initial spatial layout to form a coarse 3D scene. The environment-construction stage then leverages this initialization together with point-map geometry to build an environmental scaffold of supporting surfaces, room boundaries, materials, and illumination. Finally, in the refinement stage, a planner agent identifies structural and visual inconsistencies, applies simple corrections directly, and dispatches specialist agents for complex localized revisions that are reintegrated into the global scene. To provide reliable structural initialization while reducing reliance on scene-level annotations, we further introduce a geometry-aware layout predictor supervised by sparse geometric priors derived from point maps. Unlike fully supervised layout generators, the predictor can be trained from segmentation-level data and generalizes robustly to diverse real-world scenes. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that our method consistently outperforms prior approaches in geometric accuracy, spatial consistency, and perceptual realism.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新颖的多智能体分阶段方法，从单张图片生成完整且一致的3D场景，实验结果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单图3D场景生成方法通常需要复杂的场景级监督，难以泛化至现实复杂环境，且多因素纠缠影响性能。因此，作者希望通过分阶段分解流程，提高泛化和生成质量，同时减少对标注的依赖。
AI.method: 方法分三阶段：（1）初始化：提取图片物体掩码，建立物体级3D表示，并预测初步布局；（2）环境构建：基于初始化结果和点云几何信息，生成支撑面、房间边界、材料和光照等环境骨架；（3）多智能体优化：通过主控智能体发现场景中的结构和视觉矛盾，并由专门子智能体对复杂局部问题加以修正，最后集成各子模型的修正结果。此外，采用点云稀疏先验监督几何感知布局预测器，减少对场景级标注的依赖。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，本方法在几何精度、空间一致性和感知真实感方面均显著优于现有主流技术。
AI.conclusion: 分阶段多智能体生成框架能在降低标注需求的前提下，实现更准确、更逼真的单图3D场景重建，对实际复杂环境具有良好泛化能力。

title: Taming Perception Jitter: Uncertainty-Aware LiDAR Object Detection for Reliable Motion Classification
summary: Reliable motion classification is critical for autonomous driving, as false dynamic predictions of static objects can cascade into unnecessary planner interventions. Unstable bounding box predictions can lead to spurious velocity estimates in tracking and falsely predicted trajectories. We present a deployment-friendly mitigation strategy that augments a 3D object detector with aleatoric uncertainty estimates and applies a two-sample z-test over short observation windows to separate true motion from jitter. Integrated into Autoware with minimal changes, the approach reuses existing data association for minimal compute overhead. Empirical results show parity with velocity thresholding on nuScenes, but substantially fewer false dynamic predictions and unnecessary stops in real-world test drives, explained by the presence of an intermediate jitter band in the recorded data that speed-only rules misclassify. This demonstrates that uncertainty-aware detection and lightweight statistical testing can deliver practical performance gains for autonomous driving in noisier real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合3D目标检测不确定性与统计检验以过滤运动抖动的轻量级方法，从而降低自动驾驶系统对静止物体误判为动态的概率。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶对误判静止物体为动态物体非常敏感，这种误判会导致规划器产生不必要的响应，增加失败风险。因此需要提升目标检测和运动分类的可靠性，减少因检测抖动带来的误判。
AI.method: 在3D目标检测器基础上增加了对阿勒托里（aleatoric）不确定性的估计，并在短时间观测窗内利用两样本z检验统计方法区分真实运动与检测抖动。该方法能无缝集成在Autoware开源平台中，仅需最小化改动和计算代价，并复用现有的数据关联过程。
AI.result: 在公开数据集nuScenes上的表现与基于速度阈值的方法相当，但在真实道路测试中能显著减少对静止物体的动态误判和不必要的停车情况。这得益于方法能识别速度阈值方法容易误判的“抖动带”区域。
AI.conclusion: 面向不确定性目标检测结合简单统计检验可在真实复杂场景下有效提升自动驾驶感知系统的实用性和鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。

title: TRADE: Transducer-Augmented Decoder for Speech LLM
summary: Speech Large Language Models (Speech LLMs) lack a principled mechanism for streaming inference: their label-synchronous generation has no acoustic-frame alignment, making real-time decoding and end-of-utterance detection difficult. We propose TRADE TRansducer-Augmented DEcoder, which augments a multimodal LLM with a transducer branch that shares the audio encoder and uses the LLM's hidden states directly as the prediction network -- coupling frame-synchronous acoustic alignment with the LLM's linguistic reasoning. Three design choices make the system accurate, streamable, and long-form capable: (1)Tightly coupled dual vocabularies -- a compact transducer vocabulary derived from the LLM vocabulary, enabling zero-cost score fusion; (2)Chunk-synchronized streaming training with gradient stopping, eliminating the train-inference mismatch at offline-equivalent memory cost; and (3)Localized Decoder Audio Attention (LDAA), a causal sliding window that caps KV-cache memory independently of utterance length.
