AI.tldr: 本文综述了近年来基于深度学习的人脸表情识别（FER）领域发展，涵盖任务、方法、数据、评测等多个方面，指出当前挑战并展望未来方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习驱动的FER取得快速进展，但此前综述多局限于某一领域、方法或任务，缺乏全面且系统的全景式综述，限制了对该领域整体理解与未来研究指引。
AI.method: 文章系统梳理FER发展历程，将其分为五个阶段，从传统特征和浅层方法到深度卷积、注意力、视觉-语言、多模态及大模型。并以七大维度（如任务类型、输入模态、预处理、架构、学习策略、采集环境、应用领域）对现有文献进行多维度归纳和分析，还检视了公开数据集、评测指标及方法性能对比，探讨了当前挑战与未来趋势。
AI.result: 文献归纳显示不同阶段与架构各有优缺点，特别是在真实场景下的表现差异明显。公有数据集与评测方法日益多样化，主流方法在标准基准数据上取得持续进步，但仍面临数据偏差、泛化不足等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 作者认为，深度学习推动了FER的飞跃发展，但实际部署依然有数据、泛化与场景适应等难题；未来应注重大模型、跨模态、弱监督等方向，加强数据多样性、鲁棒性及实际可应用性。

title: Physics-Aware Sparse Learning and Selective Online Adaptation for Euler-Lagrange Robot Dynamics
summary: Accurate dynamics models are essential for model-based robotic control, yet nominal Euler--Lagrange models often become inaccurate in the presence of payload variation, unmodeled coupling, friction, aerodynamic effects, and changing operating conditions. Most learning-based correction methods improve prediction accuracy by introducing a single additive residual, but do not preserve the internal mechanical structure of Euler--Lagrange systems. This leads to models that do not preserve symmetry, positive-definiteness, or the coupling between inertia and velocity-dependent terms, which can result in physically inconsistent predictions and reduced reliability when embedded in model-based controllers. We propose a structure-preserving residual learning framework that decomposes model mismatch into an inertia correction, the corresponding induced Coriolis term, and a generalized-force residual. The mechanical component is learned under physical constraints, while the disturbance-sensitive component is represented through a sparse history-dependent latent interaction model and adapted online using Bayesian linear regression. This separation preserves key mechanical structure while restricting adaptation to the part of the dynamics most affected by changing conditions. Experiments across multiple robotic platforms, including mobile, aerial, and manipulator systems, show that the proposed method improves dynamics prediction and trajectory tracking under coupled and time-varying dynamics. These results highlight the value of combining structured residual modeling, compact latent interaction selection, and selective online adaptation for real-world model-based control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构保持的残差学习方法，用于提高机器人动力学模型的准确性，尤其是在复杂和变化的环境下。该方法能改善多种机器人系统的动力学预测与轨迹跟踪能力。
AI.motivation: 在负载变化、耦合、摩擦和空气动力学等复杂情况下，传统的欧拉-拉格朗日动力学模型的准确性会下降。现有学习方法加入残差虽能提升精度，但往往破坏了动力学方程的内在机械结构，影响了物理一致性和实际控制中的可靠性。因此，亟需一种能兼顾动力学结构和适应性的残差建模方法。
AI.method: 作者提出将动力学模型的误差分解为惯性修正项、其引起的科氏项和广义力残差。前者在物理约束下建模，后者则通过稀疏历史相关的隐因子模型和贝叶斯线性回归进行在线自适应。这种分离方式保证了动力学方程的结构性，只对易变部分进行适应。
AI.result: 在多种机器人平台（移动、飞行、机械臂等）上的实验表明，该方法能有效提升动力学预测和轨迹跟踪精度，尤其在耦合和时变动力学场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 结构保持的残差学习结合了物理结构性、简洁的隐交互选择和针对性在线适应，为实际的基于模型的机器人控制提供了更可靠和高效的动力学建模方案。

title: Analyzing the Correlation Between Hallucinations and Knowledge Conflicts in Large Language Models
summary:
Hallucinations -- factually incorrect or unverifiable outputs -- remain one of the most challenging limitations of Large Language Models (LLMs), especially in knowledge-intensive tasks. One proposed explanation is internal knowledge conflicts arising from fixed, outdated training data. This paper investigates whether internal representations linked to knowledge conflicts correlate with hallucination behaviors in LLMs.
  Using probing techniques inspired by two prior works, we analyzed activations from hidden, attention, and MLP layers, as well as output logits, across predefined tasks. We probed LLaMA-3-8B on hallucination detection benchmarks and Falcon-7B on a knowledge conflict dataset. Our findings show that, although conceptually related, hallucination activation patterns cannot be fully reduced to or explained by knowledge conflict representations.
  Nonetheless, probing proves a robust tool across multiple languages and activation types, supporting its role in improving LLM interpretability. This work advances the broader understanding of hallucinations in LLMs and underscores the value of fine-grained analysis of their internal behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文探究了大语言模型（LLM）幻觉现象（输出事实错误或无法验证的内容）与内部知识冲突表征之间的关系，发现二者虽相关但不完全等同，并验证了探针方法对LLM内部行为解释的价值。
AI.motivation: LLM在知识密集型任务中易产生幻觉（即输出错误或无验证依据的内容），其中一种解释是由于模型训练时内部知识存在冲突。本文旨在明确幻觉现象是否与知识冲突的内部表征有关。
AI.method: 作者借鉴了两项前期工作，采用探针技术分析LLaMA-3-8B和Falcon-7B模型在幻觉检测和知识冲突任务中的隐藏层、注意力层、MLP层及输出logits的激活模式。
AI.result: 结果表明，幻觉的激活模式虽与知识冲突有一定联系，但无法简单归结或还原为知识冲突的内部表征。同时，探针方法在多种语言和激活类型下均表现出对模型内部解释的强适用性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管幻觉与知识冲突表征相关，但不能完全等同。探针方法为提升LLM可解释性提供了有效技术手段，有助于深入理解和分析大模型的幻觉现象。

title: Harnessing Streaming Video in the Wild
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly required to process unbounded video streams in applications such as video-call assistants, live commentary, and embodied robots. An ideal streaming system should support proactive interaction, long-horizon memory, and real-time processing, while resting on a VLM backbone capable of handling diverse in-the-wild streaming tasks. However, existing VLMs excel at offline video understanding but fall short in streaming capabilities and lack dedicated infrastructure for streaming deployment. We address this gap on three fronts. (i) For backbone capability, we construct \textbf{Streaming-Train-248K}, a streaming dataset paired with a novel training objective for adapting VLMs to streaming interaction and understanding. (ii) For real-world deployment, we introduce \textbf{Streaming Harness}, a plug-and-play system that endows any VLM with three core abilities: proactive interaction (per-second response decisions), long-term memory (12-hour context retention), and real-time processing (sub-second latency). (iii) To drive continued community progress on streaming capabilities, we design \textbf{Streaming-Eval}, a benchmark that reflects models' capabilities across diverse in-the-wild scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent gains from our approach across all core capabilities required for streaming video understanding. We will open-source our data, code, and benchmark to advance the community's shift from offline video understanding to deployable streaming intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文针对现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）在流式视频处理能力上的不足，提出了新的数据集、系统与评测基准，显著提升了VLM在流式应用中的交互性、记忆力和实时性。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM主要专注于离线视频理解，但实际应用中（如视频通话助手、现场解说、机器人等）常需处理连续流式视频，要求具备实时性、交互性和长时记忆能力，现有模型与基础设施对此支持不足。
AI.method: （1）构建了Streaming-Train-248K流式视频数据集，并设计了新颖的训练目标以适应流式场景下的交互与理解需求；（2）开发了Streaming Harness系统，为任意VLM提供按秒响应、长时间上下文保持（最长12小时）、亚秒级实时处理三项核心能力；（3）制定了涵盖多种真实场景的Streaming-Eval评测基准。
AI.result: 经过广泛实验，所提出方法在流式视频理解所需的所有核心能力上都带来了持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为流式VLM应用提供了有力的模型适配、支撑系统及开放评测，有望加速社区从离线视频理解向可部署的流式智能转型，相关数据、代码和基准均将开源。

title: Modeling Components and Connections in Cyber-Physical Systems
summary: Text based configuration files for cyber-physical systems show the hierarchy of component modules well but often hide the details of connections and interfaces between modules. A model-based visual approach to these configuration files can better capture this information. The XML structure of Robot Operating System (ROS) launch files can be improved using a modeling approach. This paper presents ROSLaunchVisual, a model-integrated environment built on WebGME for designing, visualizing, and managing ROS launch files. The tool raises the level of abstraction by allowing developers to create and modify launch files using a graphical interface that represents nodes, publishers, subscribers, and arguments as interconnected components. The tool provides a dynamic system analysis that can then be used in the static development and analysis of new and existing launch files. ROSLaunchVisual incorporates features such as metamodel-driven validation, automatic import/export of launch files, and visual communication mapping. Plugins further enhance functionality by updating libraries, checking for semantic errors, and managing remaps. By making launch file creation more intuitive and less error-prone, ROSLaunchVisual improves development efficiency and system understanding, especially in collaborative or large-scale robotics projects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的可视化工具ROSLaunchVisual，用于直观、高效地设计和管理ROS启动文件。
AI.motivation: 传统文本配置文件虽能展现模块层次，但对模块间连接和接口的描述不直观，容易出错，特别在大型或协作机器人项目中影响效率和正确性。
AI.method: 利用WebGME平台开发ROSLaunchVisual，通过可视化界面展示和编辑节点、发布者、订阅者及参数，将原本XML的ROS启动文件可视化。系统支持模型驱动校验、自动导入导出、可视通信映射，以及插件扩展用于提升功能。
AI.result: ROSLaunchVisual实现了可视化、动态/静态系统分析、自动语义校验等功能，提升了开发效率，简化了启动文件的创建和维护过程。
AI.conclusion: ROSLaunchVisual使ROS启动文件的编辑更直观、用户友好且易于检测错误，尤其适合大型和团队协作的机器人应用场景，提高了系统开发的可靠性和效率。

title: Operationalizing Linguistic Methods through Prompt-Engineering Skills: An Automatic Chinese Web Neologism Detection Pipeline
summary: We present a method for automatic Chinese web neologism detection that operationalizes traditional linguistic identification principles as prompt-engineering skills. The method has four stages: tokenizer-independent character n-gram candidate generation; dictionary anchoring with a Pointwise Mutual Information pre-filter; a well-formedness skill based on Chinese word-formation principles; and a combined rule and three-way classification skill that distinguishes neologism, entity, and none. Applied to the BAAI CCI 3.0 corpus (267M documents), the method produces 226,959 classified candidates including 4,853 labeled neologisms. To evaluate the method, we develop a per-stage conditional recall decomposition in which the pipeline's strict recall factors mathematically into the product of stage conditional recalls. Applied to Hou (2023) (4,199 entries), the decomposition exposes Stage 1 candidate coverage and Stage 4B LLM semantic judgment as the two bottlenecks (R=41.5% and 60.0% respectively), while intermediate stages are near-lossless. A length-stratified analysis further reveals that the structural well-formedness skill is length-invariant (>= 96.9%) whereas the semantic novelty-classification skill is length-dependent (65.6%/59.0%/44.1% across 2/3/4-character candidates), mapping a current boundary of skill-based linguistic operationalization. We release the method, pipeline outputs, and evaluation protocol as public resources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动检测中文网络新词的方法，结合传统语言学理论与Prompt工程，流程化实现了新词识别系列技术环节，在大规模语料上取得了有效成果，并公布了相关资源。
AI.motivation: 随着中文互联网的发展，新词大量涌现，自动检测新词对于语言学研究和实际应用（如搜索、NLP系统）至关重要。传统方法和机器学习方法存在一定局限，亟需兼具语言学解释力与高效性的自动化新词识别方案。
AI.method: 方法分为四步：（1）在不依赖分词器情况下用字符n-gram生成候选新词；（2）基于点互信息（PMI）进行字典锚定和预筛选；（3）应用符合中文构词规律的“结构完形”判断；（4）综合规则和三分类（新词/实体/无新意）进行最终判定。针对整个流程提出了逐阶段条件召回分解的新评估方式。
AI.result: 方法在BAAI CCI 3.0（2.67亿文档）上共识别出226,959个候选项，其中4,853个被标记为新词。针对Hou (2023)的词表进行评估，发现第一步候选覆盖和最后一步LLM语义判断是精度瓶颈（R=41.5%和60.0%），中间步骤几乎无损失。“结构完形”能力与词长无关，而语义新词分类则受词长影响明显（2/3/4字65.6%/59.0%/44.1%）。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法具备可解释性与高效性，能够产业化应用当前新词识别任务，同时揭示了基于技能的语言学操作在新现象层面的界限。全部方法、结果和评测工具开放共享。

title: SSAFE: Simple and Strong AI-Generated Image Detection via Frozen Vision Encoders
comment: Preprint. 22 pages, 10 figures, supplementary material included
summary: The rapid advancement of generative models has blurred the boundary between synthetic and real imagery, creating an urgent need for reliable deepfake detection. Yet most existing approaches rely on massive real--fake datasets, which are increasingly difficult to maintain as new generators continue to emerge. In this work, we investigate how much information about image authenticity is already encoded in modern multimodal vision representations. We find that frozen multimodal encoders naturally separate real and synthetic images in their embedding space, enabling a simple linear classifier to achieve strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning. Motivated by this observation, we develop a representation-aware data curation strategy that selects a compact set of representative generators for training. The resulting training set contains only 10K images, compared to 288K in AIGIBench and 4M in OpenFake, while improving robustness to unseen generators and distribution shifts. We additionally introduce RealWorldBench, a benchmark consisting of modern camera photographs, contemporary stock images, and outputs from recent commercial generators. Experiments across multiple benchmarks show that combining frozen multimodal representations with carefully curated training data provides a simple and effective approach to AI-generated image detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需大规模数据集、依赖冻结多模态视觉编码器与精心挑选训练集的高效深度伪造（deepfake）图片检测方法。
AI.motivation: 随着生成模型的快速发展，AI合成与真实图像界限日益模糊，现有检测方法严重依赖庞大的数据集，但维护这些数据集变得越来越困难。因此急需更高效、适应性更好的检测方法。
AI.method: 作者发现现代多模态视觉编码器的特征空间中，真实与伪造样本已经天然分离，使用简单的线性分类器就能取得优异性能，无需专门微调。基于这一发现，作者提出了一种表征感知的数据筛选方法，从多个生成器中挑选少量有代表性的样本形成训练集。
AI.result: 相较于现有AIGIBench（28.8万图像）、OpenFake（400万图像）等数据集，新方法只需1万张图片即可训练，并在对抗未见过的生成器或数据分布变化时表现出更强的鲁棒性。同时，作者还构建了含有真实照片、图像与最新商业生成内容的RealWorldBench进行评测，实验结果显示该方法在多个基准上性能优越。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的多模态表征结合精心挑选的小型训练集，为检测AI生成图像提供了简单有效且更具实用性的方案，有助于应对未来生成器不断演进带来的检测挑战。

title: Safe Polytope-in-Polytope Motion Planning and Control with Control Barrier Functions
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Autonomous mobile robots operating in tight environments require motion planning frameworks that account for the physical footprint of the robot. Simplifying the geometry to a point or a circle is conservative and discards information needed to successfully and safely traverse narrow passages. This work proposes a safe local motion planning and control method that guarantees that a polytopic robot footprint stays inside a continuously updated convex free-space region. The containment condition is formulated as a set of discrete-time control barrier function constraints within a model predictive controller. The number of safety constraints depends on the complexity of the local free-space geometry and the robot shape, instead of the number of obstacles. The proposed free-space formulation does not need any obstacle detection or segmentation. A comparative analysis against a polytope-based obstacle avoidance formulation confirms favorable scaling up to a reduction of 91$\times$ in computation time as the number of obstacles increases. The approach is validated in simulation with an autonomous surface vehicle and on hardware with a non-holonomic mobile robot, using both occupancy grids and LiDAR sensing. The experiments demonstrate safe real-time motion planning and control at 10~Hz on an onboard embedded computer, including reactive avoidance of dynamic obstacles.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种能够处理多边形（polytopic）机器人轮廓的安全局部运动规划与控制方法，能实时确保机器人在复杂场景下安全通过狭窄通道。
AI.motivation: 现有简化为点或圆的机器人几何运动规划方法往往过于保守，难以在狭窄和复杂环境下充分利用空间，限制了自主移动机器人的灵活性和通过性。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于多边形轮廓的机器人体积约束方法，在模型预测控制（MPC）框架下，将机器人全局安全性转化为一组离散时间控制势垒函数约束，并持续更新局部凸自由空间区域，与传统基于每个障碍物建立约束的方法相比，新的方法安全约束数量仅与自由空间形状和机器人形状相关，无需进行障碍物检测或分割。
AI.result: 与基于多面体障碍物回避的传统方法对比，作者方法在障碍物数量增加时，计算耗时最多降低了91倍。该方法在模拟环境下（自主水面机器人）以及真实硬件（非完整移动机器人）上进行了验证，可在板载计算设备上实现10Hz的实时规划与控制，并可应对动态障碍物的反应式避障。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法可大幅提高移动机器人在狭窄和复杂环境下的安全性与运动效率，无需障碍物分割，计算效率高，且在实际系统中表现良好，具备实际部署价值。

title: HydraQE: OSU's Submission for the IWSLT 2026 Speech Translation Metrics Shared Task
comment: Accepted to IWSLT 2026; 9 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables
summary: We present HydraQE, our contribution to the IWSLT 2026 Speech Translation Metrics shared task. HydraQE is an end-to-end, reference-free quality estimation (QE) system for speech translation built on a Qwen3-ASR backbone, which accepts source audio and a translation hypothesis as joint input. Hidden states from all backbone layers are combined via a learnable sparsemax scalar mix, then re-encoded by a lightweight bidirectional Transformer to enable full cross-modal interaction prior to pooling into a shared embedding. Three independent prediction heads are trained on complementary supervision signals: human direct assessment (DA) annotations, MetricX-24 pseudo-labels, and xCOMET pseudo-labels. To address the scarcity of human-annotated data, we train on a combination of synthetically corrupted examples and silver pseudo-labeled machine translation outputs, using a curriculum that begins on synthetic and silver data and gradually shifts toward human-annotated examples. HydraQE outperforms cascaded text-based baselines and prior direct speech QE systems, demonstrating that end-to-end speech translation QE is competitive with cascaded approaches.

AI.tldr: HydraQE 是一种端到端、无需参考文本的语音翻译质量评估系统，基于 Qwen3-ASR，并融合多种监督信号与训练机制，在 IWSLT 2026 评测任务中取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 当前语音翻译质量评估（QE）存在对参考译文依赖，且人工标注数据稀缺，难以实现端到端、一体化的自动评估。作者为提升评估效率与准确性，开发无需参考文本且可利用合成及伪标签训练的新型端到端系统。
AI.method: 以 Qwen3-ASR 为骨干，将源音频和翻译假设作为联合输入，所有骨干层隐藏状态经稀疏混合后，通过轻量双向 Transformer 充分实现跨模态交互，并提取共享嵌入。设计三组独立预测头，分别用人工评估、MetricX-24 伪标签、xCOMET 伪标签监督。训练过程中先用合成和伪标签数据，逐步过渡到人类标注实例。
AI.result: HydraQE 超越了级联型基线系统和以往直接语音质量评估方案，实现了与主流级联方法相媲美甚至更优的表现。
AI.conclusion: HydraQE 证明了端到端、无需参考的语音翻译质量估计不仅可行，且具有竞争力，对今后自动语音翻译质量评估系统设计具有参考价值。

title: Learnable Token Sparsification for Efficient Gigapixel Whole Slide Image Reasoning
summary: The processing of gigapixel whole slide images within vision language models faces a major difficulty due to an excessive number of visual tokens. Existing solutions typically rely on spatial downsampling or heuristic pruning strategies that operate without training, and these methods often discard subtle but clinically meaningful patterns because pathological evidence is scattered irregularly across the tissue. To overcome this limitation, we reformulate token reduction in whole slide images as a trainable sparsification problem, allowing the model to learn an optimal selection strategy instead of following fixed heuristics. We propose a decoupled routing architecture. To enable gradient propagation through the nondifferentiable pruning operation during training, we introduce a component called SparseLearn. This component uses a variance-preserving noise gate that regulates the information flow of each patch via a differentiable Soft Top-K operator, together with a diagonal attention denoiser that recovers perturbed representations without leaking spatial information. At inference time, the SparseLearn module is entirely discarded, and the trained scorer applies a deterministic Hard Top-K operator to keep only the highest scoring 32 tokens, incurring no extra computation. By compressing the visual sequence down to a sparse set of just 32 tokens, which represents as little as 0.78% of the original length, our framework achieves 73.32% overall accuracy on SlideBench (TCGA), consistently surpassing sampling-based baselines and general-purpose vision language models. It also demonstrates strong zero shot generalization on SlideBench (BCNB) and WSI VQA*. By resolving the visual context bottleneck and preventing the dilution of sparse diagnostic evidence, this work provides a highly efficient paradigm for end to end gigapixel whole slide image reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效处理全景切片图像（gigapixel whole slide images，WSI）的视觉语言模型新架构，通过训练可学习的稀疏化策略，将原始庞大视觉token序列极大压缩，仅保留最有诊断意义的少数token，从而提升模型准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 以往处理WSI时，由于需要输入大量视觉token，导致计算量庞大，且常用的下采样或启发式裁剪会丢失稀疏但重要的病理特征，影响诊断效果。因此需要一个既能显著减少token数量，又能保留重要细节的智能选择机制。
AI.method: 作者提出将token削减建模为一种可训练的稀疏化问题，设计了名为SparseLearn的模块。该模块集成可微的Soft Top-K算子与方差保持型噪声门控，以及对角注意力去噪器，以此帮助模型在训练时自适应选择关键视觉区块。在推理阶段则直接用Hard Top-K对token排序，仅保留分数最高的32个token，且无需额外计算。
AI.result: 模型能将token数量压缩至仅原来的0.78%（32个token），在TCGA数据集SlideBench上取得73.32%的准确率，显著优于采样类等强基线模型，并在SlideBench（BCNB）及WSI VQA*任务上表现出较强的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过提出可学习的稀疏token筛选机制，有效突破了WSI处理中的视觉上下文瓶颈，既保证了诊断相关证据不被稀释，又极大提高推理效率，为端到端WSI智能分析提供了新范式。

title: ProbeAct: Probe-Guided Training-Free Failure Recovery in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate strong perfor-1 mance on language-conditioned robotic manipulation within their training dis-2 tribution, yet their generalization capabilities remain fundamentally limited. They3 lack the robustness required to handle perturbations, frequently failing when con-4 fronted with lighting changes, altered camera viewpoints, or small initial-state5 variations. We propose PROBEACT, a training-free runtime intervention frame-6 work that detects and recovers from grasping and placement failures in pre-7 trained VLA policies without modifying their weights or requiring additional8 demonstrations. PROBEACT combines three components: (i) a lightweight multi-9 target hidden-state probe that predicts the 3D positions of task-relevant objects10 from intermediate VLA features, with Hungarian-matched identity tracking for11 multi-object scenes; (ii) an object-agnostic kinematic state machine that detects12 grasp, transport, and placement failures using only gripper-internal signals and13 end-effector kinematics; and (iii) a hierarchical Control Barrier Function (CBF)14 filter that encodes repeated-failure locations as soft safe-set constraints, mini-15 mally correcting VLA actions while preserving baseline behavior. As a plug-and-16 play, training-free intervention loop, PROBEACT is orthogonal to existing train-17 ing pipelines. Evaluated on the LIBERO-plus benchmark, our framework acts as18 a universal safety net, improving the success rate of the OpenVLA-OFT model19 from 69.6% to 74.1%, while demonstrating broad applicability to both base and20 fine-tuned VLA policies.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了PROBEACT，一个无需训练、可在运行时对VLA模型操作失败进行检测与恢复的框架，从而提升机器人在变动环境下的操作鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在训练数据内表现优秀，但面对如光照变化、摄像机视角变动、初始状态不同等情况时泛化能力有限，经常导致操作失败。本研究旨在弥补这一缺陷，提升VLA模型在实际应用中的健壮性和可靠性。
AI.method: PROBEACT由三部分组成：(1) 轻量级多目标隐状态探测器，通过中间特征预测任务相关物体的3D位置，并用匈牙利算法实现多目标跟踪；(2) 与物体无关的运动学状态机，仅通过夹爪信号和末端执行器动力学，检测抓取、搬运和放置的失败；(3) 分层控制障碍函数（CBF）滤波器，记录重复失败点作为软安全集约束，在尽量不改变原有行为的前提下修正VLA动作。整个系统作为即插即用的训练外循环，可在各种VLA策略上部署。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-plus基准测试上，将开放源OpenVLA-OFT模型的成功率从69.6%提升至74.1%，并在基础和微调后的VLA策略中获得了广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: PROBEACT无需修改模型权重或额外示范，作为运行时安全“兜底”方案，有效提升了预训练VLA模型在多变环境下的操作成功率和泛化能力，在现有训练流程之外提供了实用的补充。

title: Co-Evolving Skill Generation and Policy Optimization
summary: Skill-augmented reinforcement learning improves language agents by storing reusable procedural knowledge acquired from past experience. Existing methods typically use strong language models to analyze trajectories, generate skills, and update a retrievable skill bank during online training. However, they rarely assess whether a newly generated skill is useful before it is stored and reused. We find that this assumption is unreliable: even skills generated by proprietary frontier LLMs exhibit highly mixed utility, with many providing little benefit or even degrading performance. Once such skills enter the bank, their effects are difficult to identify, because subsequent rollout feedback is delayed and usually reflects the combined effect of multiple retrieved skills rather than the marginal contribution of any individual skill. We propose an online reinforcement learning framework for pre-storage skill validation. The framework estimates whether a candidate skill contributes useful information beyond the skills already retrieved for the current task. It uses the standard rollout budget to form two matched groups under the same task and retrieval context: base rollouts conditioned on the currently retrieved skills, and skill-augmented rollouts conditioned on the same skills plus one candidate skill induced from the base trajectories. The reward gap between these two groups estimates the candidate skill's context-dependent marginal utility, enabling the framework to promote useful skills while filtering ineffective or harmful ones without additional rollout overhead. The framework further uses this marginal-utility signal to train the policy itself as a skill generator, reducing reliance on repeated calls to proprietary models. The learned skill-generation likelihood serves as a context-dependent score for retrieval-time reranking and outdated-skill pruning as the policy evolves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的在线强化学习框架，对即将存储的技能进行有效性验证，从而提升语言智能体的技能质量，避免无效甚至有害的技能进入技能库。
AI.motivation: 现有技能增强强化学习方法通常直接存储大型语言模型生成的新技能，几乎不验证这些技能实际是否有用。实验证明部分技能不仅无益，甚至可能损害最终性能，而且后续难以追溯具体影响。
AI.method: 提出在存储技能前，利用标准rollout预算，将同一任务下检索到的已有技能为基准，分别对比加入和不加入候选技能的表现，依据奖励差估算该技能的边际有效性。从而在不增加rollout开销的前提下，过滤无效/有害技能。同时用此信号反向训练策略生成技能的能力，降低对外部大型模型的调用依赖，并应用于检索时的技能排序和淘汰。
AI.result: 该框架有效筛选了有用技能，显著减少了无效或有害技能对性能的破坏。实验还表明，训练后的策略生成技能能力更强，且技能库维护更高效。
AI.conclusion: 使用边际奖励信号实现技能预验证和利用，有效提高了技能增强强化学习的性能和可持续性。

title: FiberTune: Preserving Action-Fiber Visual Residuals in Vision-Language-Action Fine-Tuning
summary: Action-supervised fine-tuning of vision-language-action (VLA) policies fits demonstrations effectively but constrains only the directions that change predicted actions, leaving visual structure consistent across action-equivalent states free to collapse. We formalize this as residual visual collapse along local action fibers and propose FiberTune, a training-time objective that preserves teacher-structured visual residuals without adding inference-time overhead. FiberTune uses an online action probe to estimate action-predictive feature directions, filters them from intermediate visual-token representations, and aligns the resulting probe-filtered residuals to a frozen visual teacher while regularizing their effective rank. Under identical training conditions, FiberTune improves over task-loss-only fine-tuning in every one of six controlled simulation settings spanning two benchmarks and two architectures (pi_0.5 and OpenVLA-OFT), as well as on physical SO-101 pick-place; representative gains include +10.7 percentage points SR(5) on long-horizon CALVIN ABC-to-D and physical SO-101 task success rising from 72.7% to 78.1%. Residual diagnostics show that these gains coincide with increased probe-filtered residual teacher alignment and effective rank, consistent with the action-fiber motivation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FiberTune方法，通过保持视觉特征残差结构，实现对视觉-语言-动作(VLA)策略的更高效微调，显著提升了下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA策略微调主要关注预测动作的方向，对视觉表征中的结构并未充分约束，导致在动作等价状态间视觉结构可能崩溃，这影响了模型泛化与表现。
AI.method: FiberTune在训练时利用online action probe估计与动作相关的特征方向，并将其从中间视觉token特征中过滤，进而将过滤后的视觉残差与冻结的视觉教师对齐，同时规范残差的秩（信息维度），无需推理时开销。
AI.result: FiberTune在六个受控仿真环境、两个公开基准和两种架构下（pi_0.5和OpenVLA-OFT）均优于仅用任务损失的微调方法；实际物理任务SO-101的成功率也从72.7%提升到78.1%；如CALVIN ABC-to-D长任务成功率提升10.7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: FiberTune有效避免动作等价状态下视觉结构的崩溃，增强了视觉-语言-动作策略模型的泛化能力和任务表现。

title: Your Model Already Knows: Attention-Guided Safety Filter for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated impressive end-to-end performance across a variety of robotic manipulation tasks. However, these policies offer no guarantees against collisions with task-irrelevant objects in the scene. Existing safety filters sidestep this problem by querying a vision-language model (VLM) to identify obstacles and their locations. This, however, is too slow to run in the control loop and can only be invoked at episode initialization, leaving the filter unable to track moving obstacles. We discover that a small number of attention heads within a VLA model reliably localize the object the policy intends to approach. These heads can be exploited within a training-free safety framework that obtains the active target from the attention heads at every step, treats the remainder of the scene as obstacles, and feeds these into a Control Barrier Function (CBF) filter. Together with a lightweight real-time object tracker, this allows for collision avoidance for non-static obstacles. We evaluate our framework on SafeLIBERO, which we extend with moving obstacles. On the original static benchmark, our method performs comparably to an oracle that uses privileged simulator state to identify the target, emulating a VLM-based identification step run once at episode initialization. On the dynamic variant, where the oracle's init-time target assignment becomes stale, our method substantially outperforms it by 43%, on average. Our findings suggest that the perceptual signals needed for real-time safety filtering are already present within VLA policies and can be exploited without additional training or heavy auxiliary models.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种无需额外训练和辅助模型，能实时实现机器人物体避障的新方法。通过分析VLA模型内部注意力头，仅用少数关注目标物体的注意力头定位当前目标，其余对象视为障碍物，结合控制屏障函数（CBF）和实时跟踪器实现动态避障，显著优于现有基于VLM的静态方案。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型虽然在机器人操作任务中表现优异，但无法保证与场景中与任务无关的物体不发生碰撞。现有安全方法依赖VLM进行障碍物识别，推理速度慢且不适合实时动态场景，迫切需要更高效的在线安全过滤方案。
AI.method: 作者发现VLA模型内某些注意力头能稳定定位政策想要接近的目标，而其他对象可视为障碍物。提出一种无需训练的安全框架：在每个步长提取目标注意力，结合CBF过滤和轻量物体跟踪，在控制回路中实时规避非静态障碍。
AI.result: 在扩展的SafeLIBERO基准（添加动态障碍）上评估，该方法在静态任务上与利用仿真器特权信息的‘oracle’表现相当。动态任务下，该方法比使用初始静态目标分配的oracle平均表现提升43%。
AI.conclusion: VLA模型本身内部已有足够感知信号供实时安全滤波利用，无需额外训练或复杂模型，即可高效实现动态障碍物规避。

title: RadOT-Eval: Auditable Structured-Evidence Transport for Radiology Report Evaluation
summary: Automatic evaluation is critical for high-stakes text generation, where errors often involve omitted findings, hallucinated content, polarity reversals, location changes, uncertainty mismatches, and temporal-comparison errors rather than low surface similarity alone. Radiology report generation provides a challenging test case because generated reports must preserve structured clinical evidence across sources. We present RadOT-Eval, an interpretable structured-evidence optimal transport framework for offline auditing of radiology report generation. RadOT-Eval decomposes reference and candidate reports into attribute-structured clinical evidence units, aligns corresponding evidence using entropy-regularized optimal transport, and uses clinically meaningful side-channel discrepancies in a monotone risk model to predict error burden. All transport, feature, and readout choices are selected using the ReXVal dataset, and the frozen system is evaluated on the independent RadEvalX dataset. RadOT-Eval achieves Spearman correlations of 0.715, 0.548, and 0.399 with total, clinically significant, and clinically insignificant annotated error burden, respectively, yielding higher point estimates than standard evaluation metrics and the open-source large language model (LLM)-based evaluator GREEN-radllama2-7B. In a frozen auxiliary corruption-sensitivity stress test on ReXErr-v1, RadOT-Eval achieves 0.768 AUROC and a 0.990 corrupted-greater-than-clean paired win rate. These results show that structured evidence transport provides an auditable, rank-oriented evaluation tool for high-stakes generated clinical text under ReXVal-only model selection and frozen RadEvalX testing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RadOT-Eval框架，通过结构化临床证据的最优传输方法，实现在放射报告生成任务中的自动化、高解释性结果评估。
AI.motivation: 高风险文本生成（如放射报告）中，传统自动评测方法难以识别遗漏、幻觉、极性反转、位置变化及时间等语义层面的错误。因此需要更细粒度、结构化且可解释的评测方法。
AI.method: RadOT-Eval首先将报告分解为结构化的临床证据单元，然后借助熵正则化最优传输对齐参考与生成报告的对应证据，利用临床相关的特征差异，通过单调风险模型预测错误负担，最后在独立数据集上进行评测。
AI.result: RadOT-Eval在不同类型的错误（总错误、临床显著错误、非显著错误）负担上分别达到0.715、0.548、0.399的Spearman相关系数，明显优于现有评测方法与开源LLM评测器。同时在应对数据损坏的测试中表现出极高的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化最优传输评测为高风险临床文本生成提供了可审核、面向排序的先进工具，兼具评测准确性与解释性。

title: WaveDiT: Distribution-Aware Wavelet Flow Matching for Efficient 3D Brain MRI Synthesis
summary: Large and demographically balanced datasets are essential for reliable neuroimaging biomarkers. Full-resolution 3D brain MRI synthesis can support data augmentation in this setting, but existing approaches either incur prohibitive computational cost at volumetric scale or rely on lossy latent compression that may compromise anatomical detail. As a result, practical 3D generative augmentation often requires specialized compute infrastructure. We propose WaveDiT, a conditional flow matching framework operating in the coefficient space of a 3D Haar Discrete Wavelet Transform. The model combines factorized spatio-depth attention with band-wise heteroscedastic uncertainty modeling derived from higher-order wavelet statistics. Predicted log-variance is integrated directly into both the flow objective and conditioning pathway, enabling adaptive precision consistent with the heavy-tailed and input-dependent variance structure of anatomical detail. This formulation supports full-resolution 3D synthesis under practical memory and time constraints on a single modern GPU. Evaluation on a multi-site cohort demonstrates improved alignment between generated and real MRI distributions, together with enhanced downstream brain age prediction and region-level anatomical agreement relative to diffusion, latent, and wavelet-based baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/sisinflab/WaveDiT

AI.tldr: WaveDiT是一种创新的3D脑MRI图像生成方法，可以在单张GPU上高效生成全分辨率数据，提升了合成数据与真实数据的分布一致性及下游任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有3D脑MRI生成方法要么计算代价极高，要么为提升效率使用有损压缩，导致细节损失，无法兼顾高分辨率和通用设备运行。因此急需一种既保留解剖细节、又能在普通GPU上实现全分辨率合成的创新方法。
AI.method: 提出WaveDiT，核心为在3D Haar离散小波变换系数空间中进行条件流匹配建模，采用分解的空间-深度注意力机制及基于高阶小波统计的带内异方差不确定性建模，将预测的对数方差直接引入流目标和条件通路，适配解剖细节的厚尾与输入相关的不确定性分布，实现有自适应精度的合成。
AI.result: 在多中心数据上，WaveDiT生成的MRI在分布对齐、脑龄预测准确率、区域解剖一致性等指标上均优于扩散、潜变量和传统小波方法。
AI.conclusion: WaveDiT能在单GPU下高效生成全分辨率3D脑MRI，兼顾带内不确定性建模和高质量解剖细节，在数据增强等实际应用中具备优越性。

title: Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to ICLR 2026. Code and demos available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/darp-site/
summary: Parametric imitation learning via behavior cloning can suffer from poor generalization to out-of-distribution states due to compounding errors during deployment. We show that reusing the training data during inference via a semi-parametric retrieval-based imitation learning approach can alleviate this challenge. We present Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning (DARP), a semi-parametric retrieval-based imitation learning approach that addresses this limitation by reparameterizing the imitation learning problem in terms of local neighborhood structure rather than direct state-to-action mappings. Instead of learning a global policy, DARP trains a model to predict actions based on $k$-nearest neighbors from expert demonstrations, their corresponding actions, and the relative distance vectors between neighbor states and query states. DARP requires no additional assumptions beyond those made for standard behavior cloning -- it does not require additional data collection, online expert feedback, or task-specific knowledge. We demonstrate consistent performance improvements of 15-46% over standard behavior cloning across diverse domains, including continuous control and robotic manipulation, and across different representations, including high-dimensional visual features. Code and demos are available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/darp-site/.

AI.tldr: 传统的基于行为克隆的仿射学习容易在分布外状态下泛化不良，本文提出DARP方法，通过检索专家轨迹的k近邻来辅助决策，显著提升了多领域仿射学习表现。
AI.motivation: 克隆专家演示（行为克隆）在实验部署时，因连续小错误积累，会频繁陷入未见状态并导致泛化能力低下。作者想要解决这种泛化不强、易受分布外状态影响的问题。
AI.method: 提出DARP（Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning）方法：不直接学习状态到动作的全局映射，而是每次通过检索专家演示的k近邻，通过近邻的状态、对应动作和与查询状态的相对差异向量，预测当前动作。这种方法无需额外数据采集、无需专家反馈，也不需额外任务知识。
AI.result: DARP在连续控制和机器人操作等多个领域、不同特征表示（包括高维视觉特征）上，较标准行为克隆方法有15-46%的稳定性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DARP作为一种无需假设、数据或专家成本的通用检索增强行为克隆方法，可有效提升仿射学习的泛化能力，为多样任务应用提供了稳健的新手段。

title: TeamHerald@CHIPSAL 2026: Hate Speech Detection and Sentiment Analysis of Nepali Memes using Transformer-based Architectures and Ensemble Learning
comment: Accepted at the 2nd Workshop on Challenges in Processing South Asian Languages (CHiPSAL 2026) at LREC 2026
summary: The analysis of internet memes in the Nepali language is complicated by frequent code-mixing and a lack of established baseline resources. While memes inherently combine visual and textual elements, this study focuses on a text-centric approach by extracting embedded text using an OCR layer and modeling it with Transformer-based architectures. We evaluate six distinct models and investigate the comparative effectiveness of Hard and Soft Voting ensemble strategies across two tasks: binary hate speech detection and three-class sentiment analysis. Experimental results show that a standalone decoder-only model achieved the highest performance for binary classification, whereas the Soft Voting ensemble performed best for the multi-class sentiment task, yielding a 15.8% relative improvement in Macro F1-score over the strongest standalone baseline. These findings suggest that ensemble strategies behave differently across binary and multi-class tasks, highlighting the importance of selecting aggregation methods suited to the classification objective.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究尼泊尔语网络表情包文本的情感与仇恨言论自动识别，比较多种模型与投票集成方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 尼泊尔语表情包经常夹杂多语种且缺乏基线数据资源，现有研究多关注视觉信息，本研究希望用文本为中心的方法提升针对尼泊尔网络表情包的自动分析能力。
AI.method: 首先利用OCR技术从表情包中提取文字特征，采用基于Transformer的六种模型进行文本建模，并在二分类（仇恨言论识别）和三分类（情感分析）任务上，比较独立模型与硬/软投票集成策略的效果。
AI.result: 单独的解码器模型在二分类任务表现最佳，而软投票策略在三分类情感分析任务中超越了最强单模型，Macro F1得分相对提升15.8%。
AI.conclusion: 模型集成的方法在不同任务表现差异明显，需针对具体分类任务选择合适的集成和聚合策略。

title: Learning to Solve Generative ODEs Beyond the Linear Span
summary: Diffusion and flow generative models sample by integrating a learned ODE, but high quality still requires many sequential model evaluations. Solver learning reduces this cost by adapting scalar coefficients, timesteps, or both, while keeping the backbone model fixed. In this work, we identify a structural bottleneck in this update family: each step remains span-limited. Since the scalar-coefficient update lies in the span of buffered velocity evaluations, it can fit only the in-span component while leaving any out-of-span residual unreachable by scalar recombination alone. We propose SpanLift, a lightweight neural solver that augments scalar-coefficient updates with a spatial residual operator. SpanLift keeps a fixed base solver as an in-span prior and learns a spatial residual operator over the state and velocity buffer. The operator is trained by endpoint teacher matching, preserves the pretrained backbone, and adds no model NFEs. Empirically, the learned correction transfers across base solvers and is predominantly out-of-span. Across pixel-space diffusion, latent flow matching, and precipitation nowcasting, SpanLift achieves state-of-the-art few-step sampling. With only 3 NFE, it improves CIFAR-10 FID from 8.16 to 5.69 and ImageNet FID from 17.37 to 11.83.

AI.tldr: 提出SpanLift神经求解器，通过空间残差修正现有生成ODE方法的采样缺陷，实现更少步骤下的高质量采样。
AI.motivation: 扩散和流生成模型采样需多步序贯计算，高质量生成成本高；现有solver learning仅能拟合有限子空间，难以突破结构瓶颈。
AI.method: 分析现有标量系数更新的空间限制，提出SpanLift方法，结合原基线求解器和空间残差操作符，端点 teacher matching 训练，零额外NFE开销，无需修改主干模型。
AI.result: SpanLift在多任务上（扩散采样、flow matching、降水预测）表现优异，比如CIFAR-10的FID由8.16降至5.69，ImageNet由17.37降至11.83，且只需3步NFE。
AI.conclusion: SpanLift成功突破求解器空间限制，在保持主模型权重不变与推理开销极低条件下，显著提升ODE生成模型的采样效率与质量。

title: AetheRock: An Arm-Worn Robot Teaching System for Force-Guided Vision-Tactile Learning
summary: Force and tactile sensing are indispensable in contact-rich manipulation. However, force-aware robot learning faces critical challenges due to the incompatible assembly of tactile and force sensors in handheld or wearable devices. To address these limitations, we first introduce AetheRock for gripper-force, vision, and tactile data collection, which is an arm-worn device featuring a modular and easily manufactured visuo-tactile sensor, GelSlim-MiniFab, at the fingertip, a resistive pressure sensor at the human finger contact region, a customized PCB module, and a wearable kit for comfortable and robust collection. Building on this, we propose ForceVT, a representation learning framework that uses force and vision to guide fidelity-agnostic tactile learning, enabling robust inference in any tactile situation. Real-world experiments show that AetheRock achieves qualified data efficiency and that ForceVT effectively alleviates inefficiencies when visuo-tactile sensors exhibit manufacturing and utilization inconsistencies. Overall, our work mitigates the limitations of gripper-force vision-tactile robot learning through innovative hardware design and algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本论文针对机器人在力感应操作中面临的多传感器融合难题，提出了AetheRock可穿戴数据采集系统和ForceVT学习框架，有效提升了感知数据的采集质量与鲁棒学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有力觉与触觉传感器的组装方式常受限于设备结构，导致在机器人抓取、操作任务中，力觉与触觉信息融合困难，影响力感知学习的应用和性能。
AI.method: 作者设计了一套名为AetheRock的手臂佩戴式数据采集装置，包括模块化、易制造的视觉-触觉传感器、压力传感器与自定义电路板，实现了舒适且稳定的数据采集。此外，提出ForceVT融合学习框架，利用力和视觉信息辅助触觉表征学习，提升在各种传感环境下的鲁棒性及通用性。
AI.result: 实验表明，AetheRock系统可高效采集高质量的多模态数据，ForceVT框架能够在传感器制造与使用存在差异的情况下，显著提升触觉推断和学习的效率。
AI.conclusion: 论文通过创新的硬件与算法设计，缓解了以往机器人视觉-触觉-力觉学习在传感融合和生产应用中的诸多瓶颈，为力觉机器人学习提供了更高效和通用的解决思路。

title: The Amplifying Mirror: Locating and Steering the Partisan Direction inside a Large Language Model
summary: Large language models are rapicly replacing search engines as the primary interface between people and information. Unlike search engines, which retrieve existing content, LLMs generate novel text shaped by internal representations learned during training. Here we show that partisan political identity is encoded in the model's activation space, and that this direction directly shapes generation. Using 190,491 tweets from sitting members of the U.S. Congress as labeled training data, we train linear probes on the hidden states of the Llama 3.1 8B Instruct model. We identify a single geometric axis at layer 18 that separates Republican from Democratic text with an AUC of 0.945 and a Cohen's d of 1.94, and use sparse autoencoders to decompose that axis into interpretable partisan features. Causally intervening along this axis, ablating or amplifying the partisan component mid-generation, produces systematic shifts in the model's output. We witness stance reversals, register shifting, and structured fabrications of authority. Our results demonstrate that partisan bias in language models is not a vague emergent property but a learned geometric feature that can be precisely located and steered. Partisan bias is not a bug to be patched, but a structural property of how these models encode information about their users. As LLMs displace search engines as the interface to knowledge, understanding that product design (and its consequences) will be essential for navigating the legal, social, and political transitions from an information ecosystem that is curated to one that is generated.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示大型语言模型在生成文本时，存在可被精准定位和操控的党派偏见，并具体分析了模型内部如何编码和表达这种偏见。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）逐渐取代搜索引擎成为人与信息的主要交互界面，理解其偏见的本质与机制变得尤为重要，尤其是在政治敏感的语境中。
AI.method: 作者收集了美国国会现任议员的19万余条推文，作为带有党派标签的数据。利用Llama 3.1 8B Instruct模型的隐藏层状态，训练线性探针，定位划分共和党和民主党文本的几何轴，并用稀疏自编码器进一步解释该轴代表的具体特征。此外，通过对该轴的干预，直接操控生成文本的党派倾向。
AI.result: 在模型第18层发现了一个能够高效区分党派身份的几何方向（AUC 0.945, Cohen's d 1.94），并能通过在文本生成过程中放大或削弱该方向，显著改变模型输出的政治倾向和内容。
AI.conclusion: 党派偏见在大型语言模型中并非模糊的涌现属性，而是一种可定位、可控制的结构性几何特征。理解与引导这种结构，将在未来知识获取方式转变过程中具有重要社会、法律和政治意义。

title: BioVid: Autoregressive Video Generation with Biological Behavior Semantic Comprehension
summary: Existing video generation frameworks treat sequence duration as an externally prescribed parameter -- fixed frame counts or text prompts -- producing clips whose temporal boundaries are decoupled from the statistical structure of real behavioral data. This assumption is fundamentally misaligned with biological behavior, where action duration varies naturally across individuals and instances and is encoded in the data itself. We present BioVid, a data-driven autoregressive video generation framework that learns the temporal structure of biological behaviors directly from training data, including their natural length distributions. In the first stage, a Finite Scalar Quantization GAN (FSQ-R3GAN) tokenizer encodes each video frame into a compact discrete representation, combining the stabilized relativistic training objective of R3GAN with FSQ's guaranteed codebook utilization to achieve high-fidelity spatial reconstruction without codebook collapse. In the second stage, a causal Transformer models the resulting token sequences autoregressively and learns to emit an End-of-Sequence (EOS) token when the behavioral event reaches semantic closure, with the termination distribution emerging naturally from the training data rather than any human-specified constraint. Experiments on a human drinking behavior dataset (NTU RGB+D, A001, n=94) demonstrate that BioVid's generated length distribution closely matches that of held-out test data, achieving a Wasserstein-1 distance of 1.24 against the ground truth -- compared to 6.05 for a fixed-length baseline and 15.48 for VideoGPT -- while maintaining competitive spatial fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BioVid框架，可以自动从生物行为数据中学习视频的自然时长分布，实现可变长度视频生成，显著优于传统定长方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法需要人为设定视频长度，与真实生物行为自然变化的时长分布不符。作者希望开发一种能自适应地学习、生成符合真实时长分布的视频模型。
AI.method: BioVid采用两个阶段：1）使用FSQ-R3GAN对视频逐帧编码为离散token，兼得GAN高质量重建和codebook高效利用；2）用因果Transformer自回归建模token序列，模型可自然学习何时发出EOS（序列结束）信号，时长由数据驱动得到。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D人类饮水数据集上，BioVid生成视频的时长分布与真实样本接近（Wasserstein-1距离1.24），明显优于定长/VideoGPT基线，并能保持竞争性的空间细节还原。
AI.conclusion: BioVid有效解决了传统视频生成定长的局限，实现了可变长度且符合真实分布的视频生成，意义重大，可推广至其它行为类生物视频建模。

title: SynManDex: Synthesizing Human-like Dexterous Grasps from Synthetic Human Pre-Grasps
summary: Human hand-object interactions encode functional intent, but direct transfer to robotic hands often fails under morphology, contact, and reachability constraints. We present SynManDex, a synthetic pipeline that uses generated human pre-grasps as affordance-aware proposals and resolves the final contacts with robot-native optimization. SynManDex samples object-conditioned digital human pre-grasps, retargets them to dexterous robotic hand poses, optimizes force-closure contacts on the target embodiment, and admits trajectories that pass checks from each step. The resulting keyframes support both grasp-and-lift demonstrations and various prehensile manipulation tasks such as tea pouring, photo taking, and flute playing, designed via VLM agents. As a result, SynManDex combines high grasp quality (86.4\% grasp stability) with 4.67/5 human-likeness (93.4\%). It achieves 80.7\% successes in simulation and 25/30 (83.3\%) real-robot successes when applied to a 36-DOF bimanual dexterous robotic platform.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为SynManDex的新型合成流程，实现人类抓取意图向高自由度机器人手的有效迁移，提升了抓取质量和仿人性，并在实际和仿真环境中取得较高成功率。
AI.motivation: 人类与物体的交互表征了丰富的功能意图，但直接将人类抓取动作迁移到机器人手时，常因机器人手形态、可接触性、可达性等约束导致失败。因此，亟需一种能更有效转移并优化人类先验抓取得姿的方法。
AI.method: 设计了SynManDex合成流程，包括：1) 以物体条件生成数字人类预抓取动作；2) 将其重定向为灵巧机器人手的姿势；3) 针对具体机器人实体优化抓取点实现力闭合；4) 在每一步设有轨迹筛查。关键帧动作既支持抓取演示，也适用于多种器物操作任务，利用VLM智能体设计。
AI.result: 在36自由度双臂灵巧机器人平台上，仿真环境下成功率80.7%，真实机器人上25/30（83.3%）任务成功。抓取稳定性达86.4%，抓取仿人性得分4.67/5（93.4%）。
AI.conclusion: SynManDex流程有效将人类抓取动作迁移并适配到复杂机器人手，实现高质量高仿人性抓取和多样操作，验证了其实用性和泛化能力。

title: Continuous Language Diffusion as a Decoder-Interface Problem
summary: Gaussian-corrupted sentence embeddings have no direct linguistic interpretation, yet continuous diffusion language models can generate fluent text from them. We study this puzzle through Embedded Language Flows (ELF) and identify a decoder-basin mechanism: denoising succeeds when trajectories reach regions where the native decoder can read stable tokens. We introduce a diagnostic protocol for denoisability, semantic recoverability, order sensitivity, decoder compatibility, and trajectory reliability. It exposes failures hidden by scalar metrics: low mean-squared error can discard linguistic content, low perplexity can reflect low-entropy collapse, and clean latent reconstruction can coexist with a narrow decoder basin. A decoder-margin bound explains why token recovery depends on margin and local decoder sensitivity, not latent error alone. Auditing public ELF checkpoints reveals an interface phase diagram: early predictions are weakly readable, mid-trajectory disagreement marks a competition region, and late predictions enter a high-margin final-token basin. Once inside, token realization is surprisingly simple on generated ELF states: frozen T5 token-embedding lookup recovers $93$--$96\%$ of native decoder decisions, and a single linear readout reaches $97.9\%$ agreement at 32k samples, leaving about a 1.1 perplexity gap in a structured residual tail. A conservative margin gate exits $17$--$27\%$ earlier in denoising steps under an explicit diagnostic monitor. Boundary checks on LangFlow, BitstreamDiffusion, and the Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model (Cola-DLM) show that the same interface questions remain meaningful when the state object and decoder change. Continuous and latent diffusion language models should therefore be evaluated as representation-decoder systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了高斯扰动后的句子嵌入（Gaussian-corrupted sentence embeddings）与流畅文本生成间的关系，提出并分析了“解码器流域”机制（decoder-basin mechanism），对连续扩散语言模型的表征与解码性能进行系统诊断和评价。
AI.motivation: 尽管高斯扰动后的句子嵌入缺乏直接语言学解释，但连续扩散语言模型能据此生成流畅文本。作者试图破解这种无解释嵌入和可读文本生成之间的矛盾现象。
AI.method: 提出并利用Embedded Language Flows（ELF），分析嵌入解噪轨迹及其与解码器的关系。引入包括可解噪性、语义恢复、顺序敏感性、解码兼容性与轨迹可靠性的系统诊断协议，并检测传统标量指标的局限性。通过解码器边界理论分析token恢复的决定因素。
AI.result: 审计ELF公开检查点，揭示了解码轨迹三阶段界面（读入、竞争、高边界收敛区）。发现只用冻住的T5词嵌入查找表可恢复原解码器93-96%决策，线性读出达到97.9%一致率；引入边界门控策略后，判定可提前17-27%完成解噪。此外，主要结论在不同解码器和扩散模型下仍保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 建议将连续与潜变量扩散语言模型作为“表征-解码器”系统整体进行评估，而不仅依赖单一评价指标。提出的诊断协议和机制有助于理解与改进扩散式语言生成模型的表现。

title: Distortion-Aware PETR for BEV Object Detection with Mixed Pinhole-Fisheye Cameras
summary: Fisheye cameras are widely deployed in autonomous driving perception suites for their low cost and full-coverage field of view (FOV), yet their potential remains underleveraged in 3D object detection. Severe radial distortion challenges most BEV detectors by violating the fundamental assumption of uniform sampling. To bridge this gap, we propose Distortion-Aware PETR (DAPETR), a projection-free detector tailored for mixed pinhole-fisheye camera setups. DAPETR incorporates two key learned-adaptive modules: a unified distortion-aware positional embedding that harmonizes positional encodings for image representations with fisheye geometry, and a bidirectional feature-geometry co-modulation module that mutually adapts image features and 3D positional embeddings. In our experiments on a converted KITTI-360 benchmark, we systematically compare our learned adaptive approach against PETR in polar coordinates (PolarPETR). We find that while both methods improve over the baseline, our learned modules achieve superior performance. Crucially, we uncover a negative interaction when combining both strategies, revealing that learned adaptation and explicit geometric reparameterization can conflict. Our final DAPETR model significantly advances the research and benchmark for fisheye BEV detection, providing critical insights into effective distortion-aware 3D perception design other than image rectification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新方法DAPETR，针对鱼眼和针孔相机混合的3D检测场景，显著改善鱼眼镜头因畸变带来的感知问题，并在KITTI-360数据集上取得了优异效果。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼相机因成本低、视野广被广泛应用于自动驾驶领域，但传统基于BEV（鸟瞰图）的方法难以处理其带来的径向畸变，从而限制了鱼眼在三维目标检测中的潜力。
AI.method: 作者提出了Distortion-Aware PETR（DAPETR），不依赖图像映射投影，设计了两类自适应学习模块：一是结合鱼眼几何特性的统一畸变感知位置编码，二是图像特征与三维位置编码双向协同调节模块，使特征表达和位置更适应畸变；并用转换版KITTI-360数据集与PolarPETR进行了系统对比。
AI.result: 实验显示，DAPETR及PolarPETR均优于基线方法，但DAPETR的自适应学习模块效果最佳；两类策略（自适应学习与显式几何重参数化）结合反而存在负面作用，表明二者可能冲突。
AI.conclusion: DAPETR极大推动了鱼眼相机BEV 3D目标检测的研究，为畸变感知3D感知系统设计带来了新的见解，证明无需图像矫正也能实现高精度感知。

title: AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing
summary: World-action models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot manipulation, jointly modeling visual scene dynamics and actions to inject physical priors into policy learning. However, existing world-action models couple world prediction and action execution at the same temporal resolution, forcing the world branch to model near-term frame variations that are redundant and weakly informative. We posit that strictly binding world prediction and action execution to the same temporal rhythm may underutilize the potential of the video branch for embodied control. Therefore, we propose AHA-WAM, an Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Model built on a dual Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that reorganizes world-action modeling around this temporal asymmetry. AHA-WAM instantiates the video DiT as a low-frequency world planner that maintains rolling key-value memory over past observations and exposes reusable layerwise latent context encoding long-horizon scene evolution, while a high-frequency action DiT executes short action chunks in closed loop by querying this context through layerwise joint attention. To support asynchronous execution, we introduce horizon-adaptive offset training and Observation-Guided Video-Context Routing (OVCR), which together let the action expert exploit long-horizon world context while remaining responsive to real-time execution state without rerunning the video DiT. Experiments on RoboTwin and real-world manipulation tasks show that AHA-WAM achieves state-of-the-art performance without any robot-data pretraining, attaining 92.80% average success on RoboTwin and 78.3% success across 4 real-world tasks, while reaching 24.17 Hz closed-loop control with a 4.59x speedup over Fast-WAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异步时域自适应的世界-动作模型AHA-WAM，通过分离视觉世界预测和动作执行的时序，实现更高效的机器人操作策略学习。
AI.motivation: 现有世界-动作模型在时间尺度上强绑定视觉世界建模和动作执行，导致对短期帧动态的冗余建模，降低了视频分支在机器人控制中的潜力。作者希望通过打破这种耦合，提高模型利用长时序世界语境并提升动作响应效率。
AI.method: 提出AHA-WAM模型，其基于双重扩散Transformer（DiT）架构，将视频预测和动作执行分为低频世界规划器和高频动作执行器。视频DiT以低频率处理世界动态并编码长时序场景演化的潜在语境，动作DiT以高频率根据当前状态和长时序上下文进行动作决策。通过自适应时域偏移训练和观测引导的视频语境路由，支持动作分支及时响应，且不需反复运行视频分支。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin仿真和实际机械臂任务上，AHA-WAM无需机器人数据预训练即可达到92.8%的平均成功率（RoboTwin）以及78.3%（4项实际任务），且在24.17Hz闭环控制频率下，比先前模型Fast-WAM快4.59倍。
AI.conclusion: AHA-WAM通过异步、时域自适应的世界-动作分离建模，显著提升了机器人操作策略学习和执行的效率与效果，达到了业内最新水平。

title: PaperMentor: A Human-Centered Multi-Agent Writing Tutor for AI Research Papers on Overleaf
comment: Accepted to the ACL 2026 Demo Track
summary: Expert writing feedback from experienced researchers is critical for early-career scholars to improve their manuscripts, yet high-quality feedback often remains scarce because reviewing research papers is labor-intensive. Emerging AI-powered writing assistants largely focus on grammar fixes or simulating peer review with final scores, yet they fall short of providing concrete, actionable suggestions that help students improve their papers during drafting. We present PaperMentor, a human-centered writing assistant system that delivers actionable suggestions as Overleaf-native inline comments while leaving the actual writing entirely to human authors. PaperMentor integrates an expert skill library carefully curated from established researchers' writing advice with 12 specialized agents covering different aspects of paper writing, such as formatting compliance, phrasing accuracy, and terminology consistency. In a user study (n=14), 90.6% of the generated comments were rated actionable and 67.5% were rated valid, significantly outperforming a GPT-5.2 baseline uswithout the skill library. We release PaperMentor as open source for public use. Our code is publicly available under the AGPL-3.0 license at https://github.com/jiarui-liu/overleaf

AI.tldr: PaperMentor是一款集成专家技能库的写作辅助系统，能够针对论文写作各环节在Overleaf上以批注形式给出具体可行建议，并开源发布。
AI.motivation: 早期学者很难获得高质量的论文写作反馈，传统的AI助手仅提供语法等表层修正，缺乏具体、可操作性的建议，难以真正助力稿件改进。
AI.method: 设计具备12个专门代理的系统，结合资深研究者写作建议汇编而成的专家技能库，在Overleaf环境中以批注形式提供建议。并通过用户研究与GPT-5.2基线模型进行对比。
AI.result: 在14人用户研究中，90.6%的系统评论被认为可操作，67.5%被认为有效性高，均优于无技能库时的GPT-5.2基线。
AI.conclusion: PaperMentor能有效提升写作建议的可操作性和有效性，有助于学生提升稿件质量，已以开源方式发布。

title: BLUE: Toward Better Language Use in Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: We present BLUE, a minimal method for better language use in vision-language-action (VLA) models for autonomous driving (AD). Through extensive analysis, we reveal that language matters on only a small fraction of routes, but on those routes it can greatly improve or degrade performance. Generating language at every frame is therefore inefficient, since most computation is spent on frames that do not benefit from language. We further show that pretrained VLA hidden states potentially already encode whether language will benefit a given frame, even though scene complexity and kinematic features alone struggle to predict this. Based on this finding, BLUE trains a lightweight gate on frozen VLA hidden states to decide per frame whether to activate language generation or predict actions directly, without modifying the backbone or requiring additional human annotation. With just a 0.11M-parameter gate, BLUE sets a new state of the art on both benchmarks, achieving 76.2% success rate on Bench2Drive and 36 driving score on Longest6 v2, while delivering 2.54x inference speedup and 8.9% success rate improvement over the backbone. BLUE provides a practical path toward efficient language-augmented AD, showing that VLA models can retain the benefits of language at a fraction of the cost. Our code, data, logs and checkpoints are fully available on https://github.com/George-Ling3/BLUE.

AI.tldr: BLUE是一种改进自动驾驶视觉-语言-动作模型语言使用效率的最小方案，在仅部分关键场景下激活语言，显著提升效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶的多模态模型中，语言输入只在少量场景下有明显帮助，但传统方法在每一帧都生成语言，计算浪费严重。因此需要找到只在关键帧激活语言生成的方法，追求高性能和高效率并存。
AI.method: 通过分析模型的隐藏状态，发现其本身能预判当前帧是否受益于语言输入。BLUE训练一个轻量化门控网络，根据不变的隐藏状态判断当前帧是否需要语言生成，其他帧直接输出动作，无需修改模型主干或额外标注数据。
AI.result: 仅用11万个参数的门控网络，BLUE在 Bench2Drive 和 Longest6 v2 两大基准上取得新SOTA，速度提升2.54倍，成功率提升8.9%。
AI.conclusion: BLUE无需人工额外标注及模型大幅改造，就能高效结合语言优势和速度。为视觉-语言-动作自动驾驶模型的实用化提供了新思路和实践路径。

title: iMaC: Translating Actions into Motion and Contact Images for Embodied World Models
summary: Embodied world models have emerged as a pivotal paradigm for visual robotic decision-making and interactive environment simulation. However, conventional embodied frameworks rely on low-dimensional structured action vectors (e.g., joint angles and end-effector poses), which suffer from limited expressive capacity, poor generalization across diverse embodiments, and unnatural dynamic modeling for complex physical interactions. To address these limitations, this paper proposesiMac (Image as Action Control), a novel unified control paradigm that treats raw visual images as native action representations for embodied world models. Departing from traditional explicit kinematic action encoding, iMac formulates continuous visual manipulation as image-based action tokens, which inherently encapsulate spatial motion intentions, interactive geometric constraints and subtle physical dynamics. We construct a dual-branch embodied architecture consisting of an image-action encoder and a dynamic world predictor: the encoder compresses target-driven visual images into compact action embeddings, while the predictor learns environment transition rules conditioned on image actions to achieve high-fidelity future state prediction and closed-loop embodied control. Extensive experiments are conducted on public embodied manipulation benchmarks and real-world robotic scenarios. The results demonstrate that iMac outperforms vector-based action control baselines in prediction accuracy, task success rate and cross-scene generalization ability. Moreover, our image-action design eliminates the reliance on manually defined action spaces, realizing flexible and universal control for heterogeneous embodied agents. This work provides an innovative visual-action perspective for embodied world models, offering a simple yet effective paradigm for scalable robotic perception and manipulation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出的iMac方法用图像作为机器人控制的行动表示，提升了表达能力和泛化性，实验中在预测准确率、任务成功率及跨场景泛化方面优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的机器人控制多采用低维度的结构化动作（如关节角、末端位姿），但这种方式难以处理复杂物理交互、表达能力有限且泛化性能差。为突破这些瓶颈，探寻更自然、具有表达力和通用性的行动表示成为亟需解决的问题。
AI.method: 作者提出iMac（Image as Action Control）新范式，将原始视觉图像作为机器人的原生行动表达。该方法构建了双分支的模型架构：通过图像-动作编码器将目标图像压缩为紧凑的动作嵌入，动态世界预测器根据图像动作学习环境的状态转移，实现高保真未来预测和闭环控制。
AI.result: 在公开的机器人操作基准和真实场景中，iMac在未来状态预测准确性、任务完成率和场景泛化性方面，均超越基于向量的传统方法。同时无需手工预定义动作空间，实现异构机器人通用、灵活的控制。
AI.conclusion: iMac为具身世界建模提供了创新的视觉-动作新视角，是实现机器人可扩展感知与操作的简单且有效新范式。

title: Building Customer Support AI Agents at 100M-User Scale: An Evaluation-Driven Framework
summary:
The rapid rise in LLM capabilities has made AI agents increasingly viable across a broad range of tasks. Among the most promising applications is building production-ready customer-facing agents, a challenge that demands coordinated excellence in evaluation methodology, context engineering, training, and online measurement. Yet these critical pillars are typically developed in isolation, creating blind spots that only surface after deployment.
  In this paper, we present a unified framework that bridges offline development with online impact for customer support AI agents at Nubank, a company with 100M+ users. Our approach integrates several key components: (1) structured context engineering tailored to customer support agents, (2) systematic human-in-the-loop prompt iteration, (3) rigorous LLM judge evaluation with measured inter-rater agreement and GEPA optimization for consistency, and (4) ideation-to-production validation.
  A central insight is that evaluation-pipeline quality directly determines iteration velocity. We present results from five production deployments spanning distinct domains: card delivery, debt management, credit-limit support, card management, and product explanation. These deployments deliver consistent customer-satisfaction gains while substantially accelerating iteration. In our card-delivery deployment, large-scale A/B testing yields a 37 percentage-point improvement in AI transactional Net Promoter Score and a 29 percentage-point gain in self-service rate over prior agent variants, alongside a strong correlation between offline simulation metrics and online outcomes, demonstrating that eval-driven development reliably predicts production impact. On most use cases, AI satisfaction reaches within a few percentage points of expert human agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对客户支持AI代理的统一开发与评估框架，并在Nubank的五个真实应用场景中取得了显著的客户满意度提升和开发迭代加速。
AI.motivation: 虽然LLM为客户支持等实际场景中的AI代理带来了巨大潜力，但现有的评测、上下文工程、训练和在线指标优化常常各自为政，导致实际部署后出现问题。本文旨在整合这些关键要素，为大规模客户支持AI的生产落地提供更高效、值得信赖的方法。
AI.method: 提出并实施了一个统一开发框架，包括：1）针对客服AI的结构化场景上下文工程，2）结合人工反馈的prompt迭代流程，3）严谨的LLM判官评测方法（带有一致性评估与GEPA优化），4）从创意到生产的全链路验证。通过线上A/B测试和多轮实地部署分析了框架效果。
AI.result: 五大领域真实部署均获得了客户满意度的持续提升和迭代加速。例如，在银行卡配送场景的A/B测试中，AI代理的NPS提高了37个百分点，自助服务率提升29个百分点。同时，离线模拟指标与线上效果高度相关，评测主导的开发流程能有效预测实际生产效果。大多数用例下，AI满意度已接近专家级人工客服。
AI.conclusion: 统一的开发与评测框架能够有效提升客户支持AI代理的生产力和客户体验，实现高效的研发迭代以及生产影响的可靠预测。该方法具有可扩展性和推广价值。

title: Shift-Dependent Asymmetry: Orthogonal Inverse Low-Rank Adaptation for Federated Medical Segmentation
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables efficient federated fine-tuning of segmentation foundation models for medical imaging. However, most federated LoRA methods adopt a uniform aggregation rule, which breaks under the encoder-decoder asymmetry in medical segmentation: the encoder is dominated by appearance shifts, while the decoder is dominated by supervision variations. This mismatch entangles shared anatomy with site-specific biases and harms generalization. To address this, we propose Inverse Asymmetric Tuning (IAT). IAT aligns adaptation with heterogeneity sources by personalizing module-specific components in the encoder to absorb appearance shifts and in the decoder to accommodate site-dependent supervision, while retaining a shared pathway for transferable consensus. However, structural separation alone is insufficient under LoRA's bilinear parameterization, where multiplicative coupling can still cause site-specific updates to leak into the shared direction. We therefore introduce a Subspace Orthogonality Regularizer that penalizes shared-local collinearity in the effective update space, mitigating leakage without extra communication. Experiments show consistent improvements over strong federated LoRA and parameter-efficient FL baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种逆向非对称调优方法（IAT），并设计正交约束，显著提升了医疗图像分割的联邦LoRA泛化能力，并优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦LoRA方法在医学图像分割中采用统一聚合策略，但由于编码器/解码器对异质性来源（外观与监督）响应不同，导致泛化能力受限。需要更精细地调整各模块以提升性能。
AI.method: IAT分别对编码器（适应外观漂移）和解码器（吸收监督变异）模块进行个性化调整，并保留可迁移的共享通路。此外，引入子空间正交性正则项，避免LoRA参数耦合导致信息泄漏。
AI.result: 实验证明本文方法在多个医学联邦分割任务中，比强基线（包括现有的联邦LoRA和高效参数共享算法）均有一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 区别化调优与正交约束显著提升了联邦LoRA在医学图像分割中的泛化能力，对不同异质性应对更适应，具有实用价值。

title: MemoryVLA++: Temporal Modeling via Memory and Imagination in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Temporal modeling is essential for robotic manipulation, as effective control requires both memory of past interactions and imagination of future states. However, most VLA models rely primarily on the current observation and therefore struggle with long-horizon, temporally dependent tasks. Cognitive science suggests that humans rely on working memory to buffer short-lived context, the hippocampal system to preserve episodic memory of past experience, and internal models to imagine possible future state evolution. Inspired by these mechanisms, we propose MemoryVLA++, a full temporal modeling framework that equips VLA models with memory and imagination for robotic manipulation. A pretrained VLM encodes the current observation into perceptual and cognitive tokens, forming working memory. These tokens query a Perceptual-Cognitive Memory Bank to retrieve relevant historical context. This bank stores low-level details and high-level semantics from past interactions, and is updated through redundancy-aware consolidation. A world model imagines future states in a denoising latent space, and the imagined latents are integrated under memory guidance to form full temporal-aware tokens. The resulting tokens condition a diffusion action expert to predict temporally consistent action sequences. We conduct extensive experiments on 5 simulation benchmarks and 3 categories of real-robot tasks across 3 robots, covering general manipulation, long-horizon temporal tasks, robustness, and generalization. Our method achieves strong performance across Libero, SimplerEnv, Mikasa-Robo, Calvin, Libero-Plus, and diverse real-robot tasks, validating the effectiveness of full temporal modeling with memory and imagination. For example, on real robots, it achieves +9%, +26%, +28% gains on general, memory-dependent, and imagination-dependent tasks. Project Page: https://shihao1895.github.io/MemoryVLA-PP-Web

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MemoryVLA++框架，通过引入记忆与想象机制显著提升机器人操作任务中的时序建模能力，并在多个仿真和真实机器人任务中取得显著效果提升。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA（视觉-语言-动作）模型主要依赖当前观测，难以解决长期时序依赖的机器人操作任务。人类的记忆和想象机制在认知科学中的成功启发了对机器人系统时序建模能力的改进需求。
AI.method: 受人类认知机制启发，提出完整的MemoryVLA++时序建模框架：1）利用预训练VLM将当前观测编码为工作记忆；2）通过感知-认知记忆库存储和检索历史信息（包括低层细节和高层语义）；3）使用世界模型在潜空间进行未来状态的想象；4）将历史与未来信息整合，指导扩散动作预测专家输出连贯动作序列。
AI.result: 在5个仿真基准和3类真实机器人任务（涉3种机器人）上进行大量实验，涵盖一般操作、长期时序、鲁棒性与泛化能力。方法在Libero、SimplerEnv、Mikasa-Robo、Calvin等多种任务中都有突出表现。在真实机器人任务上，对一般任务、记忆依赖、想象依赖任务分别提升了+9%、+26%、+28%。
AI.conclusion: MemoryVLA++显著增强了机器人任务中的完整时序建模，尤其在需要记忆和想象能力的长时依赖任务中表现更优，有效提升了机器人操作能力。

title: PerspectiveGap: A Benchmark for Multi-Agent Orchestration Prompting
summary: Real-world LLM applications are moving beyond single-agent workflows toward orchestrated multi-agent systems, yet current models still struggle to determine what each sub-agent needs to know. To measure this, we introduce PerspectiveGap, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs' ability to compose orchestration prompts for multi-agent systems. PerspectiveGap contains 110 scenarios, each evaluated through two distractor-mixed task formats: role-fragment assignment and free-form prompt writing. These scenarios are organized into 10 topologies, which are distilled from the authors' real-world engineering practice and framed by the Prompt Economy principle: building loop-centered orchestrations that maximize utility with minimal role and engineering overhead. In experiments with 27 commercial models from 10 companies, GPT-5.5 substantially outperforms all competitors, whereas Opus 4.7 shows a notable weakness in orchestration prompting despite its strong coding performance. Nevertheless, PerspectiveGap remains challenging: the evaluated models achieve an average combined pass rate of only 14.9\% (GPT-5.5 62.0\%) and an average overall leakage rate of 246.5\% (a per-scenario information leak-event count, not a proportion; GPT-5.5 49.1\%). These findings suggest that multi-agent orchestration prompting is a distinct and under-evaluated capability, and PerspectiveGap provides a foundation for measuring and improving it systematically.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PerspectiveGap基准，用于评估大模型(LLMs)在多智能体系统中生成编排提示的能力，并通过大量实验揭示当前主流模型在此任务上的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着真实世界中的大模型应用逐步从单一智能体演变为多智能体编排，如何合理分配信息与任务、减少工程开销成为亟需解决的问题。传统评测不足以衡量LLM在多智能体编排中的提示生成能力，因此需要新的基准。
AI.method: 作者提出PerspectiveGap基准，包括110个场景，涵盖10种典型多智能体拓扑结构。任务设计为两种格式：角色-片段匹配和自由提示撰写。通过实际工程经验抽取场景并以Prompt Economy原则组织。实验证明，使用27种主流商业模型进行测试。
AI.result: GPT-5.5在编排提示任务表现最佳，远超其他模型（通过率62%），而Opus 4.7尽管编程能力强，但在此任务表现较弱。整体上，各模型平均通过率仅14.9%，信息泄漏事件平均246.5，GPT-5.5为49.1。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体编排提示是LLM目前尚不充分具备的能力，主流模型对此仍具较大提升空间。PerspectiveGap为该能力的系统性评估与改进提供了标准化基础。

title: PRPO: Perception-Reinforced Policy Optimization via Token-Level Dynamic Advantage Reshaping
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning capability of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). However, existing RLVR methods primarily rely on trajectory-level outcome rewards, which assign identical learning signals across all generated tokens. This coarse-grained credit assignment is fundamentally mismatched to multimodal reasoning, where only a sparse subset of tokens is causally grounded in visual evidence. Consequently, these pivotal perceptual tokens receive weak supervision and are often overwhelmed by language priors or reasoning-template tokens. To address this limitation, we propose Perception-Reinforced Policy Optimization (PRPO), a token-level reinforcement learning framework that explicitly identifies and reinforces pivotal perceptual tokens within long-horizon multimodal reasoning trajectories. PRPO introduces Robust Visual Dependency (RVD), a principled metric that identifies tokens whose predictions are both visually grounded and perturbation-stable, filtering out brittle or noisy visual tokens. Based on RVD, we further propose Perceptual Advantage Reshaping (PAR), a token-level credit assignment technique that amplifies perceptually informative tokens while preserving stable gradients for non-perceptual tokens. Extensive experiments on seven multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PRPO consistently outperforms strong LVLM baselines across both 3B and 7B model scales, achieving average gains of 23.3% and 21.1%, respectively. PRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance with improved training efficiency and stronger cross-task generalization. Our findings highlight the importance of fine-grained credit assignment for scalable multimodal reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种名为Perception-Reinforced Policy Optimization (PRPO)的新型多模态强化学习方法，通过更精细地识别和强化视觉相关的关键token，提高了大规模视觉-语言模型（LVLMs）的推理能力，并在多项基准测试中取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法（RLVR）在多模态推理任务中，通常只针对整段生成序列进行统一的奖励分配，无法有效识别在视觉证据支持下的关键token，导致这些token受到较弱的监督，影响模型的推理精准度和泛化能力。
AI.method: 作者提出了PRPO，一个以token为粒度的强化学习框架。该方法首先提出Robust Visual Dependency (RVD)指标，自动识别在视觉证据支持下表现稳定、可靠的token，然后通过Perceptual Advantage Reshaping (PAR)技术，对这些关键token赋予更高的奖励信号，同时对其他token维持平稳的梯度，从而实现细粒度的奖励分配。
AI.result: 在七个多模态推理基准上，作者在3B和7B两个模型规模下，都显著优于强基线，分别获得平均23.3%和21.1%的性能提升，实现了最先进的性能、训练效率和任务泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 精细化的奖励分配对于大规模多模态模型的可扩展强化学习至关重要。PRPO方法在提升模型推理能力、训练效率和泛化性方面显示出巨大潜力。

title: From Statute to Control Flow: Span-Grounded Deontic Trees for Defeasible Scope Parsing
summary: Rule-following agents tasked with executing policies and regulations often fail via Silent Scope Omission (SSO): a model applies a general rule but silently drops nested exceptions or counter-exceptions, producing outputs that appear compliant yet break on important edge cases. Although such failures are often framed as an agentic-systems problem, the underlying bottleneck is statutory and policy understanding, a capability typically studied in legal NLP. However, most existing legal NLP benchmarks emphasize end-task outcomes, which can overlook the structural omissions that cause SSO. To diagnose and mitigate SSO, we introduce NormBench, a benchmark of 2,290 provisions spanning Chinese (laws and local policies), English (U.S. tax law, GDPR, and corporate policies), and cross-lingual settings, designed for defeasible scope parsing: identifying precisely which clause overrides which. NormBench uses Span-Grounded Deontic Trees (SG-DT), a compiler-style intermediate representation that anchors every logical branch to source spans and requires explicit exclusion guards, enabling deterministic compilation and audit. Evaluations of frontier LLMs reveal two recurring pathologies: (1) Recursion Decay, where performance drops sharply as defeater depth increases, and (2) an Auditability Trap, where models retrieve relevant spans but fail to assemble correct control flow. Using SG-DT as a constrained intermediate output improves whole-tree fidelity and defeater recovery, and downstream experiments show that its utility is mechanism-specific: gains concentrate on exception-active, SSO-prone cases, while aggregate accuracy can be mixed when the added structure is unnecessary or parser fidelity is low.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Silent Scope Omission (SSO)问题，即模型在执行规则时，表面上合规但实际忽略了内嵌的例外或反例外，从而在重要边界情况下失败。作者为此设计了NormBench基准，并用Span-Grounded Deontic Trees (SG-DT)表示，揭示主流大模型在处理例外关系时的两大难题与提升方式。
AI.motivation: 推动执行政策与法规的智能体在应对复杂的规定和例外时，容易忽略嵌套的例外条款，产生难以察觉但严重影响正确性的错误。现有法律NLP基准多强调最终任务结果，容易遗漏导致这类问题的结构性缺漏，因此需要更精细化的评测体系与诊断工具。
AI.method: 构建了跨中英文、跨法规体系的NormBench基准，包括2,290个规定片段，专注于可推翻作用域解析，并提出Span-Grounded Deontic Trees（SG-DT）作为中间表示，严格锚定每个逻辑分支至原文，明确标记何处被排除，以支持可确定性编译与审计。
AI.result: 实验显示，大型语言模型在例外递归加深时，性能大幅下降（Recursion Decay），或虽能检索相关文本但无法正确组织控制流（Auditability Trap）。采用SG-DT约束型中间输出，有助于提升整体树结构还原和例外条款恢复能力，但该方法对机制敏感，在例外频繁场景收益明显，而在结构需求弱或解析能力较低时则整体准确率变化不一。
AI.conclusion: 针对法规执行中的SSO问题，提出的NormBench及SG-DT表示，有效揭示并缓解结构性遗漏的模型盲点，可助力更高保障的规则遵循型AI设计，尤其在例外密集的实际应用环境下具有重要价值。

title: Thinking Without Images: Internalizing Visual Manipulation with On-Policy Self-Distillation
summary: ''Thinking with Images'' has emerged as an effective paradigm for fine-grained visual reasoning: by explicitly zooming into relevant regions and reasoning over crops, models can access local evidence that is difficult to recover from a single global image. However, this benefit comes with redundant tool invocations and longer inference traces. Moreover, when such behaviors are learned mainly from outcome reward, the resulting intermediate crops or visual cues can be noisy or fail to faithfully capture task-relevant visual evidence. In this work, we ask whether the reasoning benefits of ''Thinking with Images'' can be internalized through Thinking with Imagination: an internal process that decides where to look and imagines what visual cues closer inspection would reveal without actually invoking tools. We propose Imagine-OPD, an on-policy self-distillation framework in which a teacher plays the role of a ''Thinking with Images'' reasoner during training: it receives privileged zoomed evidence views derived from annotated regions, and supervises the model's own imagination reasoning trajectories. Imagine-OPD does not require an external teacher or high-quality imagination demonstrations. Experiments on vision-centric benchmarks show that Imagine-OPD achieves the best average performance among compared models while significantly reducing inference overhead compared with ''Thinking with Images'' methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Imagine-OPD框架，实现无需实际调取局部图像即可高效进行细粒度视觉推理，性能超过传统“思考与图像”范式，并显著减少推理开销。
AI.motivation: 细粒度视觉推理依赖'思考与图像'方法，通过反复调取图像局部信息提升推理表现，但带来冗余操作和噪声信息，推理效率低下，如何在不牺牲性能的情况下减少推理消耗和噪声成为关键问题。
AI.method: 提出Imagine-OPD，一种on-policy自蒸馏框架，训练阶段使用特权的局部视角（由注释区域获得）作为教师，监督模型学习无需实际裁剪图像即可进行内部'想象式思考'，无需外部教师或高质量想象示范数据。
AI.result: 在以视觉为核心的多个基准测试上，Imagine-OPD在平均表现上优于当前'思考与图像'方法，同时显著减少了推理过程中的开销。
AI.conclusion: 通过Imagine-OPD，模型无需多次局部特征调取即可实现高效且准确的细粒度视觉推理，为视觉推理任务提供了更经济高效的新路径。

title: PACT: Learning Diverse Diagnostic Strategies via Privileged Synthesis and Branch Consensus
summary: Clinical diagnosis requires flexible use of multiple reasoning paradigms under incomplete patient information. Existing LLM-based medical agents show strong medical reasoning ability, but single-paradigm or naively mixed dialogue supervision makes these paradigms difficult to learn without interference. We propose \textbf{PACT} (Periodic Anchor Consensus Training), a framework that couples supervised multi-paradigm dialogue synthesis with consensus-based Branch training. At the data level, \textbf{DPS} (Doctor-Patient-Supervisor) uses complete electronic medical records (EMRs) for quality control while keeping the doctor agent restricted to patient-visible information. This produces validated dialogues under four diagnostic reasoning paradigms without leaking hidden clinical answers. At the training level, PACT trains one paradigm-specific LoRA Branch per paradigm and periodically aggregates Branches into a shared Anchor through sign consensus. We further construct a dynamic multi-turn Chinese medical diagnosis benchmark for interactive consultation. Experiments show that PACT achieves state-of-the-art performance among compared proprietary, medical-specialized, and task-adapted baselines on diagnostic outcome and consultation-process metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的训练框架PACT，用于提升医学大模型在多诊断推理范式下的表现，并在新构建的多轮中医诊断基准上取得了最优效果。
AI.motivation: 当前医学大模型往往只能学习单一推理范式或混合监督，难以在信息不全情况下灵活推理。医学诊断实际需要不同推理范式的融合，因此需要新的方法提升大模型多范式推理能力。
AI.method: 提出了PACT框架，在数据层面采用DPS（Doctor-Patient-Supervisor）设计，保证对话质量和信息安全；在训练层面，针对每个推理范式各自训练LoRA分支，并通过一致性聚合机制周期性整合为主模型。
AI.result: PACT在新构建的动态多轮中医诊断数据集上，在诊断结果和诊疗过程等指标超越了多种专有、专业和适配型医学大模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过多范式、分支-主干协同训练的方法，显著提升了医学大模型在复杂临床对话中的推理能力和诊断表现。

title: AUCp: Pseudo-AUC for Inference Model Selection with Unlabeled Validation Data in Abnormality Detection
summary: Abnormality detection is a crucial yet challenging task in medical image analysis. Distinguishing abnormalities from normal data by learning to reconstruct normal-only data alleviates the reliance on labeled datasets. However, many studies, even if unsupervised, rely on a labeled validation set to select the best model for inference from multiple training iterations. For many diseases labeled data are unavailable and substantially time consuming to obtain. To address this, AUCp - a novel metric that supports abnormality detection for unsupervised and self-supervised methods is proposed. Instead of evaluating the realism of reconstructed images to select the best of model for inference, it focuses on actual detection performance and without requiring an annotated test set. Assuming the pseudo ground truth of all unannotated samples in the test set as abnormal/positive and using traditional AUC calculation, AUCp scores are derived. Given a large and representative training set of normal samples, we show mathematical and empirical evidence that model selection using AUCp scores improves disease detection in terms of unsupervised and self-supervised methods over conventional metrics. Using two unsupervised methods for neurologic disease detection and self-supervised methods on diverse datasets, our results demonstrate that the AUCp score effectively identifies the optimal model for inference, significantly enhancing abnormality and disease detection. The corresponding implementations are available in https://github.com/mahfuzmohammad/AUCp.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的AUCp指标，无需人工标注数据就能在无监督或自监督的医学异常检测任务中选择最佳模型，提升异常检测效果。
AI.motivation: 医学异常检测任务中标注数据稀缺，现有无监督方法往往仍依赖标注的验证集来选择模型，限制了其应用范围。
AI.method: 作者提出AUCp指标，将测试集中未标注的样本都视为异常，使用传统AUC方式评价模型检测性能，从而无需标注即可选模型。通过数学推导与实验证明AUCp具有效用。
AI.result: 在神经疾病检测等多类无监督及自监督方法、多个数据集上，采用AUCp指标选出的模型显著提升了异常及疾病检测效果。
AI.conclusion: AUCp为无监督及自监督医学异常检测提供了无需依赖标注数据的模型选择标准，提升实际应用性能，有助于推广相关技术。

title: Multilingual Sentiment Aware Text Summarization A Reinforcement Learning Approach for Consistency Maintenance
summary: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has significantly improved the quality and fluency of large language models in text summarization. However, its impact on affective properties remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we study sentiment drift, a systematic shift toward neutral sentiment in RLHF-based summarization outputs compared to source texts.
