AI.tldr: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在隐式多跳推理任务上表现不佳，即使其能够回答相关的单步问题，仍然难以进行多步组合推理。本文通过受控实验，证明了此问题源于预训练阶段缺乏组合性语境的暴露，而非知识缺失。仅数据增强也仅能提升已见个体的组合推理能力，对新个体无效。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs虽然在单步知识抽取任务上表现良好，但在隐式多步推理、需要将多个事实组合推断的任务上失败。研究动机是揭示其具体失败原因，是知识本身未记住，还是推理机制存在局限。
AI.method: 作者设计了受控的自然语言环境，将部分实体预训练于组合性语境，部分实体只见于孤立语境，再通过严格分组检测模型在多跳问题上的表现。同时，尝试了九种以数据增强为主的方法检测对组合推理能力的提升。
AI.result: 结果发现，即便单步知识准确率达到97%，LLMs在组合推理上仍然显著失败，这种失败仅出现在未曾在预训练阶段接受组合语境的实体。数据增强方法只能提高暴露过的实体的组合推理能力，对未暴露实体无效。
AI.conclusion: LLMs隐式多跳推理能力的缺陷主要归因于预训练时缺乏组合性语境的暴露。不只是知识缺失的问题，只有通过预训练阶段提供有组合性的语境，模型才能对相关推理任务泛化。

title: When Vision Misleads, Let Location Speak: A Worldwide Image Geo-Localization Method via Location Attention Mechanism and Large Multimodal Models
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia in March 2026
summary: Worldwide image geo-localization aims to determine the capture location of an image on a global scale. Existing methods often mislocalize images by matching them to visually similar scenes from different geographic regions, which limits reliability in practical applications. To address this issue, we propose TransGeoCLIP, a novel retrieval-based framework that integrates a location attention mechanism and large multimodal models (LMMs). Using the Transformer encoder with location attention to encode GPS coordinates, TransGeoCLIP can effectively distinguish geographic features among visually similar images. The framework consists of two stages: 1) Retrieval database construction, which employs Transformers equipped with location attention mechanisms to encode labeled GPS coordinates and enhance location semantics, subsequently enables joint image-text-GPS embedding through CLIP; 2) Retrieval-augmented inference, which leverages LMMs to infer the final image location prediction from retrieved database results. Extensive experimental results on diverse datasets, including IM2GPS, IM2GPS3k, YFCC4k, and YFCC26k, demonstrate that TransGeoCLIP significantly enhances localization performance for visually similar images. Particularly, street-level localization accuracy (within 1 km error) is substantially improved, surpassing state-of-the-art methods by 1.5%, 1.07%, 7.18%, and 9.75% on these benchmarks, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransGeoCLIP框架，利用Transformer和大规模多模态模型结合位置注意力机制，提升全球图像地理定位的准确率，尤其在区分视觉相似但地理位置不同的场景上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有全球图像定位方法常因视觉相似性导致跨地理区域错误匹配，影响实际应用的可靠性，亟需提升区分地理特征的能力。
AI.method: 使用带有位置注意力机制的Transformer对GPS编码，结合CLIP实现图像-文本-GPS的联合嵌入。系统分为数据库构建（对有标签GPS数据建库与增强）和检索增强推理（LMM推断最终位置），兼顾地理语义和多模态信息。
AI.result: 在IM2GPS、IM2GPS3k、YFCC4k和YFCC26k等多个数据集进行实验证明，TransGeoCLIP优于现有方法，街道级（≤1km）定位准确率提升1.5%-9.75%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升了视觉相似图像的地理定位精度，尤其是在街道级定位任务上，具有较强的应用潜力和推广意义。

title: In-Context Learning for the Imputation of Public Opinion Data with Large Language Models
summary: Large language models have been widely evaluated as simulators of individual survey responses. In practice, however, fully unobserved responses are rare; the dominant problem is partial non-response. Imputation aims to restore the overall structure of a survey dataset by filling in these missing values. It has its own well-defined evaluation criteria and differs fundamentally from prediction. We propose to impute missing survey data through in-context learning (ICL). We systematically evaluate ICL design choices across different missingness mechanisms (MCAR, MAR, MNAR) on 150 opinion variables spanning 15 waves of the American Trends Panel. Compared to well-established statistical methods for data imputation like MICE PMM, our ICL approach consistently reduces absolute error across all missingness mechanisms, with the largest gains under non-random missingness (MNAR). Notably, the best-performing specification (gpt-oss-120b with 100 in-context examples) achieves near-nominal aggregate coverage (approaching the 95% level) with confidence intervals two to five times narrower than MICE PMM. We publish a Python package with an sklearn-like API to enable easy deployment of our method using local and proprietary LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用大语言模型进行问卷调查数据缺失值的插补，通过in-context learning(ICL)方法显著提升了插补精度，特别是在非随机缺失情况下，并开发了便于部署的工具包。
AI.motivation: 实际中的调查数据很少完全缺失，更多是部分答案缺失，主流问题是如何合理填补这些缺失值，传统插补方法（如MICE PMM）存在局限，因此需要更有效新方法来提升数据质量。
AI.method: 采用in-context learning方法，设计不同实验以比较ICL和传统方法对不同缺失机制（MCAR、MAR、MNAR）的插补效果；在美国趋势调查数据集（共150个观点变量，15个时间点）上进行实证研究，并测量多种指标。
AI.result: 与MICE PMM等方法相比，ICL在所有缺失机制下均显著降低了绝对误差，在非随机缺失下效果提升最突出。最佳设定（gpt-oss-120b+100个ICL例）能实现接近95%名义覆盖率，且置信区间宽度比MICE PMM窄2-5倍。
AI.conclusion: ICL方法是一种优于传统方案的调查数据插补新方式，尤其适用于高难度的缺失情况，同时作者还提供了便于使用的Python包，促进实际应用。

title: PolyBuild: An End-to-End Method for Polygonal Building Contour Extraction from High-Resolution Remote Sensing Images
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing (JSTARS)
summary: Extracting building polygon contours from high-resolution remote sensing images is a fundamental task for various mapping applications. However, the presence of varying imaging conditions and complex building structures, makes automatic contour extraction extremely challenging. Mainstream approaches for building extraction often rely on pixel-level segmentation followed by multiple post-processing steps to produce building contour, which can be computationally intensive and prone to errors. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end method named PolyBuild, which can directly extract building vector polygons from high-resolution remote sensing images without the need for any post-processing operations. The proposed method leverages two primary modules: an Initial Contour Generation Module (ICGM) and a Contour Optimization Module (COM). The ICGM is designed to generate an initial building contour by utilizing concatenated sub-region center features for each building instance. It performs simultaneous object detection and initial contour extraction by generating bounding boxes and using the center features of four sub-regions to represent each building. The Contour Optimization Module (COM) further refines the generated building contours by iteratively integrating Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) features and contour positional information in a Transformer-based decoder. The hybrid CNN-Transformer architecture effectively captures both local and global spatial relationships within the building contour, ensuring high-quality boundary delineation. Extensive experiments are conducted on three building datasets to evaluate the performance of PolyBuild. The results demonstrate that PolyBuild significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, including mask-based and contour-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种能直接从高分辨率遥感图像中提取建筑物多边形轮廓的端到端方法PolyBuild，无需后处理，精度高于当前主流方法。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑物轮廓提取方法依赖于像素级分割并需复杂后处理，既算力消耗大又容易出错，且复杂的建筑结构与成像条件增加了自动提取的难度。
AI.method: PolyBuild包括两个核心模块：初始轮廓生成模块（IGCM）利用子区域中心特征结合目标检测，直接生成建筑物的初步多边形轮廓；轮廓优化模块（COM）结合CNN特征与变换器（Transformer）结构，通过解码器迭代优化轮廓，捕捉局部与全局空间关系，实现高质量边界修正。
AI.result: 在三个建筑物数据集上进行大量实验，实验结果显示PolyBuild在轮廓提取质量和精度方面均显著优于当前的掩膜法和轮廓法等主流方法。
AI.conclusion: PolyBuild作为一种端到端的建筑物轮廓提取方法，无需后处理步骤，能高效且高质量提取遥感图像中的建筑物多边形边界，具有良好的实际应用价值。

title: Is Text All You Need? Text as a Universal Information Bottleneck for Speech LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) provide a powerful reasoning backbone for speech understanding, but integrating continuous acoustic signals into a frozen LLM remains challenging. Existing speech-to-LLM interfaces typically operate at two extremes: either enforcing near-discrete token alignment, which benefits transcription but loses paralinguistic information, or learning unconstrained continuous representations, which can drift away from the LLM's input space and degrade autoregressive decoding. In this work, we propose Convex Gate (C-Gate), a speech-to-LLM bridge that constrains all speech representations to lie within the LLM's input embedding manifold with an architectural convex-hull constraint. Concretely, each frame is represented as a convex combination of token embeddings, ensuring compatibility with the pretrained LLM while preserving continuous expressivity. Across automatic speech recognition (ASR) and emotion recognition, C-Gate achieves strong joint performance, improving LibriSpeech WER by up to 48.7% relative while matching or exceeding single-task emotion accuracy. Beyond performance, our analysis reveals a key insight: information is not carried by discrete token identities, but by time-resolved trajectories in the embedding space. Causal interventions confirm that both the trajectory structure and alignment to the pretrained embedding manifold are critical for performance. These results suggest that geometry, rather than token discreteness, is the fundamental design factor in speech-to-LLM interfaces, and provide a controlled regime for studying multimodal integration in frozen LLMs. We release the checkpoint, per-sample outputs, mechanism dumps, and intervention suite for replication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的语音到大语言模型（LLM）接口方法C-Gate，通过凸包约束使语音表示始终位于LLM输入嵌入流形内，兼顾表达能力与与LLM的兼容性。在ASR与情感识别任务中显著提升性能，并强调了几何结构比离散token更为关键。
AI.motivation: 当前语音到LLM的接口有缺陷：要么过度离散化损失语音细节，要么表示不受限且与LLM输入空间不兼容，影响推断表现。急需一种既能与冻结LLM兼容又能最大化保留语音表达力的桥接方式。
AI.method: 提出C-Gate方法，将每一帧语音表示为预训练token嵌入的凸组合，从而强制语音表征属于LLM的输入空间；同时保留其连续性和可表达性。通过结构性约束控制嵌入空间内的映射，同时支持多任务（ASR与情感识别）性能。
AI.result: 在ASR（如LibriSpeech）任务上将WER相对降低最多48.7%，同时情感准确率不低于甚至超过单一任务模型。分析发现，语音信息主要通过嵌入空间的轨迹分布而非离散token传递，凸包对齐和空间轨迹结构对性能至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 接口几何特性（而非token离散性）才是语音到LLM连接的核心问题，C-Gate为多模态集成提供了新范式，可用于进一步探索冻结LLM的多模态信息融合机制。

title: NutriMLLM: Multimodal Large Language Models for Dietary Micronutrient Analysis
summary: Comprehensive estimation of dietary micronutrients from food images could improve clinical nutrition care, but training such models requires large multimodal datasets linking diverse foods to complete nutrient profiles. We first show that existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs), including leading proprietary models, are unreliable for this task. Across five model families and four independent evaluation benchmarks (ASA24, SNAPMe, FNDDS, and NutriBench), models frequently abstained or returned statistically implausible values. To address this gap without costly expert annotation, we repurposed a decade of population-scale 24-hour dietary recalls as structured prompts for text-to-image generation. This pipeline produced a synthetic corpus of about 1.1 million image-description-nutrient triplets, each pairing a generated food image with a complete 65-nutrient label. To our knowledge, this is the largest synthetic food-image corpus with comprehensive micronutrient annotation planned for public release upon publication. Fine-tuning Qwen3-VL (2B/4B/8B/30B) and GLM-4.6V-Flash on this corpus yielded NutriMLLM, the first family of vision-language models specialized for comprehensive dietary micronutrient estimation. We evaluate these models with a four-component framework that separately measures abstention, hallucination, overall usability, and per-nutrient numerical accuracy. On real food images, every NutriMLLM variant achieved near-complete coverage across all 65 nutrients, and the largest variant matched or exceeded proprietary baselines (GPT-5, Gemini 3, and Claude Sonnet 4.5) in accuracy on most nutrients. These results show that recall-driven synthetic supervision can make image-based comprehensive micronutrient estimation a tractable engineering problem and support dietary assessment, personalized nutrition guidance, and population-scale micronutrient surveillance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用合成数据训练多模态大模型，实现从食物图片全面估算微量营养素含量的新方法，并首次发布了配有完整65种营养素标注的超大合成数据集。新模型NutriMLLM在多个真实任务上表现优异，达到了甚至超越了主流专有模型的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在从食物图片估算营养素任务上表现不佳，严重依赖昂贵专家注释数据，缺乏覆盖全面营养素的公开数据集，限制了临床与大规模健康应用。
AI.method: 作者利用十年大规模饮食回忆数据，通过结构化提示生成食物图像，构建了约110万条图像-描述-营养素三元组的合成数据集。使用该数据集微调多种模型，构建专用于营养素估算的NutriMLLM系列，并以四维评价框架进行全面评估。
AI.result: NutriMLLM系列模型在真实食物图片上的65种营养素预测任务均取得极高覆盖率，最大模型在精度上超过或持平于GPT-5、Gemini 3等主流专有模型，大幅优于现有多模态大模型。
AI.conclusion: 面向全面营养素估算的模型可借助合成数据大幅提升，极大促进图像营养分析的工程可行性，可支持临床、个性化营养及公共健康监测等应用。

title: Precision Is Not Faithfulness: Coverage-Aware Evaluation of Grounded Generation with a Complete Oracle
comment: 8 pages, multilingual (EN/ES/PT). A reference-free faithfulness metric adding recall (coverage) against a complete structured oracle: precision-only rewards abstention; requiring coverage reorders models. Code: https://github.com/vectrayx/precision-is-not-faithfulness Demo: https://huggingface.co/spaces/jsantillana/faithful-strategy-engineer-f1
summary: Reference-free faithfulness metrics verify each atomic claim a model makes against ground truth, and are increasingly used to evaluate grounded generation. We show they share a blind spot: they measure only precision -- are the stated claims supported? -- and therefore reward abstention, since a model can score near-perfect faithfulness by saying almost nothing. We make this measurable using Formula 1 telemetry, a domain where strategic ground truth is derived deterministically and, crucially, completely: for each decision we know the full set of facts that mattered. This completeness -- absent in open-domain faithfulness benchmarks -- lets us measure recall (coverage of the relevant facts) exactly, alongside precision. On a multilingual (EN/ES/PT) benchmark of 7,253 decision instances spanning 150 races, the most precise frontier model covers under half of the relevant facts and ranks last by F1, so requiring coverage reorders the systems; the same effect reappears in a second complete-oracle domain (NOAA weather forecasts). A prompt ablation shows the low coverage is not an under-prompting artifact: explicitly asking models to be thorough does not close the gap. We pair faithfulness with coverage into a single score, validate the metric (controlled perturbation; agreement across a model-free regex extractor and a cross-family LLM extractor, system-level Spearman 1.0), and give a verifier-guided generation method that improves precision and recall without references. We release the benchmark, structured annotations, metric, baselines, and an interactive demo.

AI.tldr: 本文指出了现有无参考事实性评价指标只注重精确率（precision）而忽视召回率（recall），从而鼓励模型保守输出。作者在F1赛车遥测和天气预报两个“事实全集”领域，展示了完整召回的度量方法，并提出结合精确率与召回率的新评分方法，同时发布了相关基准和工具。
AI.motivation: 当前生成模型事实性评价多为无参考（reference-free）方式，聚焦于模型输出结论是否被事实支持（即只考察精确率），但这容易导致模型通过避答、少说而获得高分，实际覆盖面很窄。缺乏召回率指标，使得系统难以奖励信息完整的生成。
AI.method: 作者选择F1赛车遥测和NOAA天气预报领域，利用这些领域每个决策对应的事实全集（ground truth），定量分析模型在相关事实的覆盖率（召回率），并测量现有系统的精确率和召回率。作者构建EN/ES/PT多语种基准，系统实验证明单靠精确率排行会导致模型信息覆盖极低。此外，作者验证了提出的新综合指标，并开发了一个在无参考情况下指导生成以提升精确率和召回率的方法。
AI.result: 在多语种F1赛车数据集上，最原始（精确率最高）的模型对相关事实的覆盖率不足50%，由F1值排名最低。更改指标后，系统排行榜重排。同样的情形在天气预报领域重现。融合精确率与召回率的新指标，通过控制扰动和跨模型一致性测试，表现稳定。提出的生成方法能有效提升事实覆盖。
AI.conclusion: 论文指出，单一无参考事实性指标忽视召回率，会导致输出内容空洞。通过在事实全集领域精确度量覆盖，作者提出了更合理的度量体系，鼓励模型输出更多有用事实。相应基准和工具可促进更全面可靠的文本生成评价。

title: Rethinking 3D Shape Generation: Diffusion over Superquadrics
summary: Diffusion models have advanced 3D shape generation, yet most methods still denoise in high-cardinality spaces (e.g., voxel/SDF grids, meshes, or point clouds), which is computationally and memory intensive and makes it difficult to scale in terms of both higher resolution and stronger controllability. We rethink the diffusion representation and propose to move diffusion from dense geometry to compact geometric primitives, representing each shape as a small set of superquadrics. Instead of operating on thousands to millions of geometric representation values, we leverage 7KB superquadric parameters (pose, size, and shape), drastically reducing diffusion-state dimensionality and per-step compute/memory. Our diffusion-over-superquadrics improves scalability by supporting broader capabilities (e.g., resolution-free point-cloud decoding, part-level editing, and constraint-based design) and achieving competitive surface-fidelity and distributional performance on standard benchmarks after point-cloud decoding, while enabling efficient generation within 0.6s per shape for most conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在3D形状生成中通过超二次曲面（superquadrics）进行扩散的创新方法，大幅减少了计算和内存消耗，并提升了生成效率和可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D扩散模型通常在高维度、庞大数据的空间（如体素网格、点云、网格等）进行去噪，导致内存和计算开销极大，限制了分辨率提升和模型可控性。因此，迫切需要一种能够降低扩散状态维度、提升拓展性的表示方法。
AI.method: 作者提出将扩散过程从稠密几何空间迁移到紧凑的几何基元——超二次曲面，将一个形状用极少量的超二次曲面参数来表示（如位姿、大小、形状），每次只需操作约7KB的参数，大大减少计算量与内存占用。同时支持无分辨率限制的点云解码、部件级编辑和基于约束的设计。
AI.result: 该方法在标准基准测试中，经过点云解码后，在表面保真度和分布性能上达到与主流方法相当的结果。此外，大多数情况下，每个形状的生成效率达到0.6秒以内，并具备更优的可扩展性和功能，如高分辨率支持和部件编辑。
AI.conclusion: 通过超二次曲面参数进行扩散，有效提升了3D形状生成的效率、可扩展性和可控性，实现了较低的资源消耗和高质量生成，有望推动复杂可控的3D生成任务规模化发展。

title: LexRubric: A Rubric-Guided Diagnostic Benchmark for Open-Ended Legal Tasks
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to real-world legal tasks, evaluating the reliability of their open-ended legal responses has become essential. These tasks require context-sensitive answers and allow little room for error, motivating fine-grained and diagnostic evaluation that can identify specific sources of response quality failures. We introduce LexRubric, a rubric-based benchmark for evaluating open-ended Chinese legal tasks. LexRubric contains 649 instances from legal consultation and judicial examination, which reflect both everyday legal needs and professional legal reasoning and cover 14 legal scenarios. It further includes 12,337 expert-written atomic scoring criteria organized under a unified six-dimensional framework, enabling accurate evaluation and diagnostic analysis across tasks and evaluation dimensions. To validate the reliability of the evaluation, we test multiple judge models and compare model-based judgments with human judgments. We further evaluate 18 recent general and legal-domain LLMs on LexRubric. Results show that different models exhibit distinct capability profiles, and that open-ended legal question remains challenging for current LLMs. Data is available at: https://github.com/foggpoy/LexRubric.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LexRubric，这是一个面向中文开放式法律任务的基于评分细则的基准，用于更精细地评估大语言模型（LLM）在法律领域的表现。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在法律实际应用中的普及，开放式法律问题的自动回答变得重要，但准确性和可诊断性评价方法有限，因此需要一个能细致辨析模型表现的评价体系。
AI.method: 作者构建了LexRubric基准，包含649个法律实例和12,337条专家制定的原子评分标准，涵盖14种法律场景和六维评价体系。同时，作者对多种判分模型进行了可靠性验证，并用此基准评测了18个主流通用及法律领域LLM。
AI.result: 实验发现，不同模型在各评价维度上表现各异，且当前模型在开放式法律问答任务上仍存在较大挑战。LexRubric有效支持细致诊断并揭示现有模型的不足。
AI.conclusion: LexRubric为开放式法律问答领域的LLM科研和应用评价提供了高质量数据和评价标准，有助于推动法律AI的发展和落地。但当前模型仍需进一步提升质量以满足实际需求。

title: ChinaHeritaQA: A Culturally-Grounded Visual Question Answering Dataset for World Heritage Sites in China
summary: We introduce ChinaHeritaQA, a multimodal benchmark dataset for evaluating the cultural reasoning abilities of vision-language models (VLMs) on UNESCO World Heritage sites in China. The dataset comprises 2,279 in-the-wild images paired with 14,133 bilingual (Chinese/English) multiple-choice QA pairs spanning seven cognitive dimensions, from basic identity recognition to historical periodization and architectural analysis. Guided by a UNESCO-aligned heritage ontology and verified through rigorous human annotation, the dataset ensures linguistic quality and factual consistency. Evaluations of state-of-the-art VLMs reveal that while top models exceed human performance on average, substantial task-level variation emerges: models excel at visual recognition but struggle with culturally grounded reasoning. Performance also varies by dynasty and region. ChinaHeritaQA reveals that strong visual retrieval does not extend to cultural and historical understanding. We release the dataset to support future research on culturally aware multimodal learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChinaHeritaQA，这是一个用于评估视觉-语言模型在中国联合国教科文组织世界遗产地文化推理能力的多模态基准数据集，包含丰富的图片与中英文多选问答对，揭示现有模型在文化推理上的短板。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型虽在图像识别等任务表现优异，但针对文化与历史理解的推理能力尚未受到深入评估。缺乏针对中国世界遗产、多模态、结构完善的数据集，阻碍了相关研究和技术发展。
AI.method: 构建了包含2,279张真实场景图片和14,133组中英文多项选择问答的数据集，覆盖七个认知维度（如识别、历史分期、建筑分析等），并基于UNESCO的文化遗产本体设计内容，经人工严格注释以保证语义和事实一致性。使用该数据集系统性评测多款主流视觉-语言模型。
AI.result: 顶尖视觉-语言模型在整体表现上超过了人类平均水平，但各任务之间表现差异明显，模型在基础视觉识别上表现突出，但在文化推理任务和对不同朝代、地区的信息处理上明显不足。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态模型视觉检索、识别能力优秀，但在文化和历史推理任务上还有明显差距。ChinaHeritaQA能够推动模型在文化敏感性和推理能力的进一步研究与提升，数据集已公开以促进该领域的发展。

title: PriFT: Prior-Support Guided Supervised Fine-Tuning
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is an efficient approach for downstream task adaptation and often serves as the initialization stage for reinforcement learning (RL), but it can show weaker generalization than RL. A key limitation is its off-policy objective: SFT fits fixed demonstrations token by token, including targets poorly aligned with the model's pretrained distribution, which can lead to overfitting. A recent line of work addresses this issue by assigning larger training weights to tokens better aligned with the current model's predictive distribution, with the intuition that fitting these tokens are less distortive to the model's pretrained knowledge and representations. However, computing the token weights from the model that is currently fine-tuned entangles token weights with the optimization trajectory, inducing a self-reinforcing dynamics as the distribution rapidly departs from the pretrained model. To address this, we propose PriFT (Prior-support guided Fine-Tuning), which derives token weights from a frozen pretrained reference to obtain a stable reweighting signal unaffected by fine-tuning. This signal estimates prior support: the extent to which each target token is supported by the pretrained distribution. Across multiple existing token-reweighting rules, replacing the reweighting signal from the online model to pretrained model consistently improves performance. We introduce two instantiations: PriFT-prob uses pretrained token probability, while PriFT-mass selects tokens by cumulative probability mass under the pretrained distribution. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning, code generation, and medical question answering show that PriFT achieves state-of-the-art results among SFT baselines and provides a better initialization for subsequent RL training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的有监督微调方法PriFT，使用冻结的预训练模型来指导Token重加权，解决了传统SFT泛化能力弱、易过拟合的问题，验证了在多个任务上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统的有监督微调（SFT）会出现泛化能力弱、对模型预训练知识干扰大的问题，尤其是在对模型分布不支持的标签过度拟合时。现有方法通过加权更符合模型当前分布的Token进行训练，但这种在线加权受当前微调轨迹影响，固化和放大偏差。作者希望寻求一种更稳定、泛化更强的加权方式提升SFT性能。
AI.method: 本文提出PriFT方法：利用预训练时冻结的参考模型，根据其输出（即token在预训练分布下的概率或累计概率质量）计算每个Token的权重，从而引导SFT聚焦于预训练分布支持的内容，避免优化过程中的自我强化偏移。具体实现包括PriFT-prob（按概率加权）和PriFT-mass（选取累计概率质量内的Token）。
AI.result: 实验覆盖数学推理、代码生成、医疗问答等多项任务，结果显示用PriFT方法指导的SFT在所有基线方法中表现最佳，并作为后续RL训练的初始点时也带来更优性能。
AI.conclusion: PriFT方法通过引入预训练分布的先验支持，有效解决了SFT泛化和对分布外目标过拟合的问题，显著提升了主流下游任务的性能，也为后续RL训练打下更好基础。

title: EPS3D: End-to-End Feed-Forward 3D Panoptic Segmentation
comment: ICML 2026. The code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/Runsong123/EPS3D}{https://github.com/Runsong123/EPS3D}
summary: This paper introduces EPS3D, a new end-to-end feed-forward framework for open-vocabulary 3D panoptic segmentation. Unlike existing methods relying on additional preprocessing, we design an end-to-end architecture, with a distillation-based training strategy on diverse 3D scenes to predict 3D-aware semantic and instance features from multi-view images, improving 3D consistency and avoiding error accumulation. We further propose a mutual enhancement module to enforce inherent semantic-instance consistency. By aligning semantics within instances (Ins2Sem) and refining instance features with semantic guidance (Sem2Ins), we achieve more coherent 3D scene understanding. Ultimately, EPS3D outperforms SOTA baselines on two benchmarks (e.g., +13% mIoU for semantics on Replica) with high efficiency (e.g., 1s per scene), supporting tasks like robotic manipulation and 3D scene editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的3D开放词汇全景分割框架EPS3D，实现了高效且高一致性的3D语义分割和实例分割，并大幅优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D全景分割方法通常需额外预处理且易累计误差，难以实现高效一致的3D场景理解。因此，亟需一种高效且一致性更好的端到端方法。
AI.method: 1. 设计端到端的前馈网络架构，通过多视角图像提取3D融合的语义和实例特征；2. 引入基于蒸馏的训练方法提升3D一致性；3. 提出语义-实例互增强模块，通过Ins2Sem和Sem2Ins机制提升二者一致性。
AI.result: EPS3D在Replica等两个基准数据集上超过SOTA方法，语义分割mIoU提升13%，推理效率为每场景1秒，支持机器人操作和3D场景编辑等应用。
AI.conclusion: EPS3D有效提升了3D全景分割的准确性和效率，为实际的3D视觉理解任务带来较大进步，可广泛应用于机器人和3D内容编辑等领域。

title: Introducing multiplex semantic networks as multifaceted representations of creative associative knowledge across multilingual samples
summary: Creativity is a complex cognitive ability that relies on knowledge organisation and retrieval from semantic memory. Yet most research uses a single task to measure it, capturing only a fraction of this complexity. This study investigates multiplex networks - layered semantic networks obtained from six cognitive tasks - as a more comprehensive approach to modelling the associative knowledge underlying creativity. We collected data from N=518 individuals from four countries (Austria, USA, Singapore, Italy). From their responses to verbal fluency, sentence-chain, free association, and narrative writing tasks, we constructed semantic networks and assembled them in a multiplex structure. AI persona-based responses provided a comparison baseline. Structural reducibility analyses showed that different task layers captured distinct, non-redundant information about semantic organisation, supporting the use of multiple tasks over any single one. The networks from high- and low-creative groups remained structurally distinct, while AI-generated networks showed near-identical structures regardless of creativity group. Finally, we used 12 features (network measures, emotional scores, and spreading activation simulations) in a machine learning model using ridge regression to predict individual creativity scores. The combination of structurally similar layers, as identified in the previous stage, improved a proof-of-concept prediction accuracy by 50%. Structural measures showed the highest feature importance, with spreading activation dynamics providing additional predictive power. Together, these findings indicate that multiplex semantic networks capture a richer, cross-cultural picture of associative knowledge underlying creativity. We also release our diverse dataset and code to foster diverse computational approaches within the creativity community.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多层语义网络（multiplex networks），结合六种认知任务的数据，更全面地刻画创造力背后的联想知识结构，并用机器学习模型预测个体创造力水平。
AI.motivation: 现有的大部分创造力研究通常只采用单一任务测量创造力，无法反映创造力的复杂性，本研究旨在通过多任务语义网络揭示创造力背后更丰富的语义组织方式。
AI.method: 招募518名来自奥地利、美国、新加坡和意大利的被试，完成词语流畅性、句子串联、自由联想、叙述写作等认知任务，基于受试者的回答构建多层语义网络结构。通过和AI生成回答进行对比，并用网络特征、情感分数、激活扩散等12项特征，采用岭回归机器学习模型预测个体创造力得分。
AI.result: 结构可约性分析显示，不同任务层捕获了语义组织的不同、非冗余信息。高创造力组与低创造力组的网络结构明显不同，而AI生成网络结构无明显区分。结合结构相似的网络层，创造力预测准确率提升了50%，其中网络结构特征贡献最大，激活扩散特征则进一步提升预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 多层语义网络能更丰富反映创造力联想知识结构，具有跨文化适用性，为计算建模和创造力测量提供新思路。同时公开了数据集和代码，促进相关社区发展。

title: Scaling by Diversified Experience for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models face significant challenges in real-world deployment due to the entanglement of high-level reasoning with low-level control, and the instability of policy optimization. In this paper, we introduce SyVLA, a robust VLA model trained with diversified experiences. We propose an Intention Decoupling algorithm to isolate control-relevant features from reasoning contexts and a similar-sample guided RL pipeline to stabilize policy updates and mitigate distribution shift. Extensive experiments on real-world robotic tasks and multi-modal benchmarks demonstrate that SyVLA achieves superior task success rates and stronger out-of-distribution generalization compared to existing methods, while effectively preserving core vision-language capabilities. Codes and Datasets is released on \href{https://sy-vla.github.io/}{project page}.

AI.tldr: 提出了SyVLA模型，通过意图解耦和相似样本引导强化学习方法，提高了视觉-语言-动作模型在实际机器人任务中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型在实际部署中，由于高层推理与低层控制的耦合、策略优化不稳定等问题，可靠性和泛化能力都有限。
AI.method: 提出SyVLA模型，提出了意图解耦算法用于将控制相关特征和推理环境隔离，并设计了相似样本引导的强化学习流程来稳定策略更新、减轻分布漂移。
AI.result: 在真实机器人任务和多模态基准上，SyVLA在任务成功率和分布外泛化方面显著优于现有方法，并且很好地保持了核心的视觉与语言能力。
AI.conclusion: SyVLA通过算法创新显著提升了VLA模型的鲁棒性和泛化性，对实际机器人控制任务有重要意义，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: What Should a Skill Remember? Quality-Cost Trade-offs in Cost-Aware Skill Rewriting for Language Model Agents
summary: Large language model agents increasingly rely on skills: reusable procedural documents encoding workflows, tool use, implementation patterns, validation checks, and domain rules. Skill rewriting is often treated as prompt compression, but shorter skills can make agents more expensive by removing sparse operational anchors that prevent exploration, debugging, and recovery. We study skill rewriting through this economic lens. Our controlled framework profiles skill structure, rewrites skills using information-preservation strategies, and evaluates the rewrites under fixed task instructions, environments, and verifiers. Experiments on SkillsBench reveal distinct quality--cost trade-offs across strategies: API/code anchoring, workflow guarding, and rule/formula anchoring benefit different task families, with no universally dominant template. In the main held-out evaluation, the learned policy reduces total cost by 7.0\% and downstream agent-token cost by 6.0\%; in frozen cross-model transfer, the corresponding reductions average 14.7\% and 13.7\%, while verifier quality is preserved. These results position skill design as cost-aware operational knowledge engineering rather than prompt compression. Resources: \href{https://github.com/1Reminding/Skill_EE}{SkillEE}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型代理在使用技能（即可复用的程序化文档）时，如何通过经济视角权衡技能重写策略带来的效率与成本，并提出了一套新的分析与评测方法。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型逐渐以技能（流程、工具用法、模式等）为核心能力，如何优化和重写这些技能以提升效率并降低成本成为重要课题。过去关注于压缩提示长度，但过度压缩反而可能导致后续操作变得更复杂和昂贵，作者希望能系统研究不同重写策略下的成本与质量权衡。
AI.method: 作者提出一个受控实验框架，通过分析技能结构，运用信息保持的重写策略（如锚定API/代码、守护操作流程、锚定规则/公式等），在统一的任务指令、环境和验证器下评测不同重写方式的效果与成本。实验平台SkillsBench用于对比策略。
AI.result: 不同技能重写策略在不同任务中展现出独特的质量-成本权衡，并没有放之四海而皆准的模板。在主集保留测试中，学习到的策略把总成本减少7%，代理的token成本减少6%；在跨模型迁移中分别减少14.7%和13.7%，且验证器的质量没有下降。
AI.conclusion: 技能设计应该是面向成本的操作知识工程，而不能仅当作简单的提示压缩。该研究为技能重写提供了全新视角和实践工具。

title: Toward Signing Activity Projection in Sign Language Interaction
summary: Social robots must interact robustly not only with users assumed by speech-centered systems but also with diverse users whose communication relies on different modalities, e.g., sign language. One important capability gap is predictive turn-taking with signing users. Although Voice Activity Projection (VAP) has been successfully used to model future voice activity in spoken interaction, it remains unclear whether the framework transfers to sign language interaction. This paper presents an initial transfer study of adapting a VAP architecture to dyadic sign language interaction. Using interaction recordings from the Public DGS Corpus, we derive binary signing activity streams from lexical sign annotations and formulate proxy tasks for turn-taking prediction. The model uses pose-derived hand, eye-region, and mouth-region features extracted for each signer. The results show that SHIFT/HOLD prediction is promising, especially with hand cues, while SHIFT-prediction remains difficult. These findings provide initial evidence for both the promise and the current limitations of transferring predictive turn-taking models from spoken interaction to sign language interaction. Predictive modeling of sign language interaction still requires sign-language-specific event definitions that go beyond speech-derived categories.

AI.tldr: 本文尝试将语音交互中的预测轮换模型（VAP）应用到手语交互，并分析其效果和局限。
AI.motivation: 当前社交机器人多依赖语音交互，但实际用户有多样的交流方式（如手语）。手语用户的轮换预测尚存明显空白，亟需填补预测模型的能力短板。
AI.method: 利用Public DGS语料库的交互录像，根据词汇手语标注生成二值的手语活动流，设计轮换预测代理任务。模型提取和利用手部、眼部、口部特征来训练和测试轮换预测能力。
AI.result: 结果显示利用手部线索进行SHIFT/HOLD预测效果较好，而SHIFT预测依然较难。证明预测模型在手语交互有潜力，但也揭示了局限。
AI.conclusion: 语音交互中预测轮换方法在手语交互中具有一定前景，但需要结合手语特有的事件定义和特征，不能直接依赖传统语音类别。

title: Frequency Decoupled Framework for Screen Content Image Super-Resolution
summary:
Methods based on implicit neural representations have demonstrated superior performance in Screen Content Image Super-Resolution (SCISR) . However, they overlooked the inherent frequency characteristics, leading to suboptimal performance. We propose a frequency decoupled framework (FDF) that rethinks SCISR from a phasor perspective by capturing structured energy in amplitude and relational continuity in phase, and jointly exploiting them with bespoke implicit representations to faithfully recover the regular textures and global configuration of Screen Content Image (SCI).
  Amplitude-Phase Factorization Network (APFN) first separates images into amplitude and phase streams, where Amplitude Clustering Module (ACM) organizes sparse yet high-energy amplitude responses into representative prototypes for periodic pattern extraction, while Phase Consistency Self-Attention (PCSA) progressively reinforces configuration through continuous consistency propagation.
  And Oscillation-Anharmonic Implicit Fitting Network (OAIF-Net) integrates periodic and coherent implicit representations for efficient exploitation of the periodic patterns and coherent context embedded in SCI.
  Experimental results show FDF achieves state-of-the-art SCISR performance at multiple scales across four public SCI datasets. Ablation experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of each component in extracting and exploiting periodic patterns and coherent context.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的频率解耦框架（FDF），通过对振幅和相位的联合建模，显著提升了屏幕内容图像超分辨率（SCISR）任务表现，并在多个公开数据集上取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的方法在屏幕内容图像超分辨率中展现出优越性能，但忽略了图像的内在频率特性，导致重建性能不佳，因此需要更好地建模和利用频域信息。
AI.method: 作者提出FDF框架，首先通过‘振幅-相位分解网络’（APFN）把图像分为振幅和相位两个通路。振幅聚类模块（ACM）提取周期性纹理，强化图像规律性的表示；相位一致性自注意力模块（PCSA）通过持续一致性传播强化结构。最后，‘振荡-非谐隐式拟合网络’（OAIF-Net）将周期性和相干上下文联合建模，实现对SCI中周期信息和整体结构的高效利用。
AI.result: 实验表明，FDF在四个公用SCI数据集和多个尺度下实现了最先进的超分辨率效果。同时，通过消融实验证明了各模块在提取及利用周期模式和相干上下文中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FDF框架通过频率解耦和振幅-相位联合建模，有效提升了屏幕内容图像的超分辨率重建能力，并为相关领域方法提供了新思路。

title: Guide Me Out: A Framework to Benchmark VLM Operators Communication in Crisis Scenarios
summary: Effective crisis response requires spatially grounded communication that bridges linguistic guidance of civilians with the physical environment, accounting for structural bottlenecks, evolving threats, and agent-specific contexts. Yet, current NLP research in crisis communication remains mainly limited to static, text-only classification settings, overlooking the critical communicative role of AI operators in dynamic, embodied scenarios. We address this gap with a novel benchmarking framework for evaluating Vision-Language Models (VLMs) tasked with guiding civilian agents through simulated evacuations. We test two communication strategies (narrowcast vs. broadcast), two environment representations (visual vs. graph-based), and two threat behaviors (static vs. moving) across nine maps of varying structural complexity. Our results show that Narrowcast consistently reduces civilian Fail rates compared to Broadcast across all difficulty levels. Guidance quality depends heavily on how the VLM operator represents the world: the visual modality drives performance, while adding an adjacency graph is model-dependent and often harmful. Moving threats raise Fail rates across all conditions as communication must continuously adapt over time. Together, these findings show that deploying VLMs as AI operators in evacuation scenarios remains a non-trivial challenge, where the choice of communication strategy and input representation can directly determine the success or failure of the intervention.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于评估视觉-语言模型（VLM）在危机撤离情景中指导平民的新基准框架。实验测试了不同沟通策略、环境表示和威胁行为，并发现窄播比广播播有效，视觉表示提升表现，但加入图结构效果不一。移动威胁增加所有条件下的失败率。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP在危机沟通领域多局限于静态文本分类，忽视了在动态、具身情景下AI操作员的沟通作用。因而亟需一种能反映现实复杂性的新型评估方式。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一套基准框架，要求VLM模型引导模拟撤离场景中的虚拟平民。框架考察两种沟通策略（窄播/广播）、两种环境表示（视觉/图结构）和两类威胁行为（静态/动态），在九个不同难度地图上进行全面测试。
AI.result: 实验发现，无论场景难度如何，使用窄播策略均能有效降低平民失败率。以视觉为主的环境表示带来最佳指导表现，而附加图结构视模型而定但往往反而有害。动态威胁普遍提高了失败率，说明动态调整沟通极具挑战。
AI.conclusion: VLM作为危机撤离情景AI操作员应用面临重大挑战，沟通策略和环境输入方式的选择对任务成败影响显著。有效部署需精心设计信息传达与感知方式。

title: CRANE: Knowledge Editing for Reasoning MLLMs
summary:
The emergence of reasoning multimodal large language models (MLLMs), which generate explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning before producing answers, has introduced a new challenge for knowledge editing: methods that appear successful under traditional metrics (teacher-forcing accuracy up to 100%) can fail severely when the model's reasoning process is examined (Grounded Success as low as 0%). We identify three failure modes: (1) Structural Collapse, where weight-modifying methods destroy the CoT format; (2) Cognitive Dissonance, where the model's reasoning chain actively rejects the injected edit fact based on visual evidence; and (3) Shallow Internalization, where methods succeed on exact queries but fail on rephrase or multi-hop variants. On reasoning MLLMs, these modes interact: methods that generalize (FT, LoRA) trigger format collapse, while methods without deep modification cannot generalize. To expose these failures, we propose a CoT-aware evaluation protocol and construct ReasonEdit-Bench, with conflict stratification, multi-level probes, and multi-hop portability tests.
  We propose CRANE, a retrieval-augmented framework that requires no per-edit parameter modification. CRANE combines a modality-aware dual-library retrieval system with a two-phase training strategy: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for structural initialization, followed by GRPO with a Cognitive Routing Reward that trains the model to arbitrate between visual priors and injected edit facts. On ReasonEdit-Bench, CRANE achieves 96.9% Grounded Success on conflict scenarios and 96.9% intermediate entity usage in multi-hop chains, with 97.6% text-locality and 68.1% image-locality Edit Independence. On the out-of-distribution MMEVOKE benchmark, CRANE reaches 87.0% under gold retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在知识编辑场景下的推理链失败问题，提出了新评测协议及数据集，并提出CRANE框架以实现更鲁棒、无侵入式的链式知识编辑。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大模型引入显式推理链（Chain-of-Thought，CoT），传统的知识编辑评测（如teacher-forcing准确率）难以反映实际推理效果，部分方法虽表面有效但推理链条存在严重缺陷；因此需要更细致的评测和新的知识编辑方法。
AI.method: 作者分析总结了推理型MLLMs中知识编辑的三种失败模式（结构崩塌、认知背离、浅层内化），构建了CoT感知的评测协议和多维基准数据集ReasonEdit-Bench。提出了CRANE框架，采用多模态检索增强及两阶段训练（SFT初始化+认知路由奖励的GRPO），无需对每次知识编辑修改参数。
AI.result: 在ReasonEdit-Bench基准上，CRANE实现了96.9%的推理链有效编辑率和高度中间实体利用率，并在多跳和编辑独立性测试中表现优异；在分布外的MMEVOKE基准上也取得87%的高分。
AI.conclusion: CRANE能够在无需逐条编辑模型参数的情况下，实现多模态大模型的精确且结构化知识注入，显著提升了推理链一致性、泛化能力和编辑独立性，优于既有方法。

title: MUDIDI: A Two-Stage Framework for Multilingual Dictionary Digitization with Language Models
summary: Multilingual dictionaries are among the most valuable documentary resources for low-resource and endangered languages, yet many remain available only as scans. For many decades, their digitization and conversion into a machine-readable format was nearly impossible due to language-specific scripts, complex multi-column layouts full of entries with abbreviations and cross-references. Recent vision-language models offer a promising solution, but it is unclear how well they preserve characters, markup, and process lexicographic structure. We introduce MUDIDI, a two-stage framework for multi-lingual dictionary digitization. Stage One evaluates the quality of character recognition and markup preservation; Stage Two focuses on dictionary entry segmentation with subsequent mapping into a machine-readable lexicographic schema, SIL's Multi-Dictionary Formatter. We also release a dataset that consists of human-annotated lexicographic entries collected from 30 public-domain dictionaries featuring diverse writing systems, language families, and formats. We benchmark OCR systems, general-purpose Large Language Models (LLMs), and Vision Language Models (VLMs) on the dataset, demonstrating superior performance of LLMs across most writing systems and languages in both stages, and provide practical guidelines on improving the results for more challenging scenarios. Finally, we show that supplementing additional information, such as dictionary introduction, to the LLMs can improve the quality of the digitized dictionary. Github: https://github.com/DavidSamuell/MUDIDI-Pipeline-for-Digitization-of-Multilingual-Dictionary/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多语言词典数字化的两阶段框架MUDIDI，有效提升了低资源和濒危语言词典的数字化质量，并发布了相关数据集和评测结果。
AI.motivation: 许多低资源和濒危语言的多语言词典仅以扫描版存在，受限于手稿复杂、字符集特殊及排版难题，长期难以实现高质量的数字化和结构化处理。随着视觉-语言模型的进步，研究者希望探索这些新模型在词典数字化中的实际效果及改进空间。
AI.method: 提出MUDIDI两阶段框架：第一阶段评估字符识别质量和标记保留情况；第二阶段进行词典条目分割，并将结果映射为机器可读的词典结构（采用SIL的Multi-Dictionary Formatter方案）。同时，作者构建了一个涵盖30种公开领域多语言词典的、人工标注的词典条目数据集，并在数据集上对OCR系统、大型语言模型和视觉-语言模型进行了基准测试。
AI.result: 评测结果显示，大型语言模型在大多数书写系统和语言的两阶段任务中均表现优越。论文还提出了对挑战性场景改善结果的实用指导，并验证了向模型补充词典介绍信息可进一步提高数字化质量。
AI.conclusion: MUDIDI框架显著提升了复杂多语言词典的数字化和结构化效果，尤其是利用LLMs表现出色。作者的数据集、基准和指导方案为改善低资源语言词典数字化提供了实用参考和技术进步途径。

title: Leveraging NeRF-Rendered Images for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Neural radiance field (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) are two mainstream approaches for novel view synthesis. They often show complementary performance, i.e., 3DGS demonstrating faster rendering speed and NeRF demonstrating higher rendering quality. Motivated by this, we propose leveraging NeRF-rendered images for 3DGS. Specifically, we target street scenes and utilize a pre-trained street-specific NeRF method to produce training images for a target 3DGS method. In our 3DGS training, NeRF-rendered images are used to remove transient objects in street-level input views and to generate bird's-eye views as additional views, inheriting the higher-quality rendering of NeRF into 3DGS. We further incorporate a diffusion-based image enhancement to improve the image quality of the additional views. Experimental results on one synthetic and two real datasets demonstrate that our proposed method improves street-scene rendering while preserving the speed of 3DGS and the quality of NeRF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合NeRF（高质量渲染）与3DGS（高效渲染）的街景新视角合成方法，通过将NeRF生成的图像用于3DGS训练，实现了两者优势互补。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法渲染质量高但速度慢，3DGS速度快但质量略低，两者在新视点合成任务上性能互补，因此作者希望结合两者优点。
AI.method: 以街景为主要目标场景，先用预训练的街景NeRF合成高质量训练图像，再用于3DGS的训练。通过使用NeRF图像去除输入中的临时（干扰）目标，并生成更多视角（如俯视图）信息。另外，还结合了基于扩散的图像增强技术提高额外视角图像的质量。
AI.result: 在一个合成数据集和两个真实数据集上的实验显示，该方法有效提升了街景渲染质量，同时保留了3DGS的渲染速度和NeRF的高画质特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证渲染速度的同时，提升了3DGS的图像质量，是街景新视角合成领域对现有两大主流方法的有效互补。

title: Reasoning without Gold Standards: A Proxy-Judge Theory of Autoformalization
summary:
Complex reasoning tasks increasingly require systems to produce outputs whose correctness cannot be judged by exact match against a single reference. Autoformalization (AF) is a representative example; it asks a model to translate informal mathematical or logical reasoning into a formally checkable object, yet expert-validated formalizations do not scale beyond toy cases and a single informal argument can admit many valid formal renderings. Progress therefore depends on whether partial, structured proxies can substitute for exact references.
  We introduce a reference-free proxy-judge framework for AF that replaces gold-standard matching with a vector of per-axis property checks. The framework organizes the proxy along three structural scopes that cover global properties of the elicited object, per-module properties internal to its sub-components, and cross-domain properties that re-align it to the informal source, and aggregates each axis into a verdict vector. The vector drives a reflective refinement loop in which a violated coordinate routes the controller to a matching repair target, so each iteration changes only what is judged wrong.
  Under bounded judge noise, the expected intrinsic gap contracts geometrically to a noise-dependent plateau. Across seven formalization backbones on miniF2F, ProofNet, e-SNLI, and ProntoQA, refinement consistently lifts Pass Rate over the single-shot ICL baseline, and the per-axis proxy outperforms a matched scalar proxy on benchmarks where the baseline has room to improve. Structured proxy judgments therefore provide both a practical refinement signal and a theoretical handle on convergence when exact references are unavailable.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种无需参考答案的代理评审框架，采用多维属性判断替代与标准答案的精确匹配，用于提升复杂推理（如自动形式化）的模型校准与输出质量。
AI.motivation: 当前复杂推理任务（如数学自动形式化）难以用唯一参考答案评价正确性，且专家标注数据难以规模化，任务必须探索部分性、结构化的替代评审方式。
AI.method: 提出一种无需参考答案的代理评审（proxy-judge）框架，设计三类结构属性：全局属性、各子模块属性、与非正式原文的交叉对齐属性，每个属性评判形成向量判决。模型基于该向量判决反射性地自我修正，仅修改被判定有误之处，迭代循环提升输出。
AI.result: 在miniF2F、ProofNet、e-SNLI、ProntoQA等七个数据集与不同基座模型上，所提结构化代理评审和反射-修正法稳定提升了准确率，并在结构化代理优于标量代理情境下展现更佳表现。理论上，该方法收敛速度可控并能抵抗评判噪声。
AI.conclusion: 结构化代理评审方法为在缺乏标准答案的情况下自动形式化等复杂推理任务提供了可行、有效、理论可解释的模型修正和改进信号。

title: MilliVid: Hierarchical Latents for Long-Range Consistency in Video Generation
comment: Ishaan Preetam Chandratreya and David Charatan contributed equally. Project page: https://davidcharatan.com/millivid/
summary: Video generative models have become increasingly powerful, but long-range consistency remains challenging to achieve because even a few dozen frames require impractically long transformer sequence lengths. We show that this issue can be mitigated by generating video using coarse-to-fine rollout within a multi-scale token space. Our approach is simple: first, we pre-train an autoencoder that compresses each frame into a hierarchy of tokens, with levels ranging from the typical latent resolution to only a handful of tokens per frame. The coarsest levels capture the most consequential information, such as scene layout and semantics, while finer levels add high-frequency appearance and texture. Then, we train a video diffusion model to generate these tokens using coarse-to-fine rollout. By carefully controlling the level of detail at which frames are generated and used as context during each rollout step, we are able to preserve long-range consistency in geometry and object permanence while spending less compute on the long-range consistency of less perceptually relevant details. We validate this approach using a custom dataset of long Minecraft videos, where it produces substantially more consistent rollouts compared to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多尺度token空间、从粗到细生成视频的方法，有效提升了长距离一致性，且计算量更小。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型难以在长序列（如数十帧）中实现时空一致性，因序列过长导致Transformer等模型运算不可行。
AI.method: 首先预训练一个自编码器，把每一帧压缩成多层次token，从低分辨率到高分辨率。最粗层抓取场景布局与语义，细层补充外观与纹理。然后用扩散模型分阶段生成这些token，从粗到细逐步细化。在每步生成时根据细节层级灵活控制上下文帧的使用，保证结构一致性的同时减少不重要细节的计算消耗。
AI.result: 在专门制作的长Minecraft视频数据集上，该方法生成的视频长距离一致性显著优于已有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度token粗到细生成策略兼顾效果与效率，有效缓解了长视频生成的时空一致性难题。

title: AbstRAG: Learning to Abstract for Retrieval Problems
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation often fails when the query, the document evidence, and the user's intent are expressed at different levels of abstraction. A query may ask about a class, a relation, or an event, while the document only states specific instances, indirect framings, or scoped formulations. We define this mismatch as an abstraction gap: the minimal set of typed assumptions required to align query intent with the available evidence. To close this gap, we introduce AbstRAG, which treats abstraction as an explicit retrieval object. AbstRAG decomposes the query--evidence gap into expression, conceptual, intent--evidence, and event-type components, and scores relevance by combining match quality, a query-independent utility prior, and the cost of the required bridges. Its central mechanism is reflective refinement: a critic diagnoses retrieval failures, localizes the failed abstraction operator, proposes a minimal stage-specific patch, and accepts the patch only under sufficiency and compression controls. Across three within-document retrieval benchmarks against seven baselines, AbstRAG outperforms on nDCG@10 in 18 of 21 paired-bootstrap contrasts and improves generation accuracy by 1.9%, 5.2%, and 4.0% across the three benchmarks; ablations confirm that reflective refinement drives most of the retrieval gain and the compression control alone reduces over-expansion false positives from 73.7% to 0% on a stress slice.

AI.tldr: 提出了AbstRAG方法，通过反思性补丁机制解决生成式检索中的抽象层级差距，有效提升检索与生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式检索（RAG）中，用户查询、文档证据与用户意图往往分属不同抽象层次，导致查询意图与证据难以对齐，从而影响检索与生成质量。
AI.method: 作者提出AbstRAG，将抽象差距视为显式的检索对象，并将查询与证据之间的差距细分为表达、概念、意图-证据、事件类型四个方面。AbstRAG结合匹配质量、无关查询的效用先验以及补丁代价打分。其核心机制为反思性补丁：诊断检索失败，定位抽象操作符，提出最小的补丁，并通过充分性与压缩性控制机制决定是否采用。
AI.result: 在三个文档内检索基准和七个对比系统下，AbstRAG在21组配对检测中有18组nDCG@10优于对手，并在准确率提升了1.9%、5.2%、4.0%；消融实验显示反思性补丁是提升检索的主因，压缩控制能将过度扩展假阳性从73.7%降至0%。
AI.conclusion: AbstRAG在多种检索生成任务中显著缩小了抽象差距，提升了检索和生成准确率，反思性补丁机制和压缩控制是关键贡献。

title: See More, Think Deeper: Query-Expanded Visual Evidence and Answer-Clue Guided Reflection for Long Video Understanding
summary: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have enabled performance on long-video understanding tasks. However, existing methods still face two key limitations: evidence acquisition often relies on a single search intent, and answer generation lacks an effective visual feedback mechanism. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{CoVER}, a Comprehensive Visual Evidence and Reflection framework for long-video understanding. CoVER enables Video-LLMs to \textbf{See More} by dynamically gathering query-expanded visual evidence, and \textbf{Think Deeper} by verifying draft answers with effective answer-specific visual feedback. Together, these mechanisms shift long-video understanding from answer-centric generation to evidence-centric and visually verifiable reasoning. Experimental results show that CoVER-7B substantially outperforms models with the same parameter scale and even surpasses state-of-the-art closed-source models on certain metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CoVER框架，通过扩展视觉证据搜集与加深视觉反馈机制，显著提升了长视频理解任务中Video-LLMs的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Video-LLMs在长视频理解任务中主要存在两大不足：一是证据获取方式单一，依赖单一检索意图，二是答案生成过程中缺乏有效的视觉反馈机制。因此，亟需提升模型对长视频复杂信息的整合和验证能力。
AI.method: 提出CoVER框架，包括两大创新机制：（1）‘See More’，通过动态扩展检索，采集更全面的视觉证据；（2）‘Think Deeper’，针对草稿答案利用视觉反馈进行验证，确保推理过程更加可视、可证。
AI.result: 通过实验，CoVER-7B在相同参数规模下显著优于同类开源模型，且在部分评测指标上超越了最先进的闭源模型，体现出较强的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CoVER提升了Video-LLMs对长视频内容的理解和推理能力，将长视频问答由‘答案中心’转向‘证据中心’及可视验证，推动了领域发展。

title: H2HMem: A Multimodal Memory Benchmark for Agents in Human-Human Interactions
summary: Large language model agents are increasingly deployed in human-human interaction settings, such as meeting assistants and clinical documentation systems, where they must observe conversations and retain information for downstream queries. Unlike traditional human-assistant settings, these environments are inherently multimodal, involve complex discourse phenomena such as anaphora and deixis, and contain asynchronous or conflicting information from multiple participants. However, existing memory benchmarks largely focus on single-user, text-only interactions, failing to capture these challenges. To address this gap, we introduce H2HMem, a Human-to-Human Multimodal Memory Benchmark for evaluating memory capabilities in complex human-human interactions. H2HMem includes both dyadic and multi-party conversations with multimodal information streams, and evaluates agents along three dimensions: memory recall, reasoning, and application. Experiments with advanced agents reveal substantial limitations in constructing, retaining, and utilizing memories across modalities, participants, and sessions, highlighting substantial room for improvement in next-generation LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了H2HMem基准，用于评估大型语言模型在复杂多人多模态交互环境下的记忆能力。实验表明现有模型在多模态、多人会话记忆和推理方面存在不足。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型记忆能力评测主要聚焦于单用户、文本场景，无法反映现实中多用户、多模态、复杂对话环境中的挑战，因此需要一个更贴合实际的评估基准。
AI.method: 作者设计了H2HMem基准，包括二人和多方、多模态（非仅文本）的会话数据，并从记忆回溯、推理、应用三方面综合评测大模型在复杂环境下的记忆能力。
AI.result: 在该基准上的实验发现，当前高级大模型在多模态、跨参与者和跨会话的信息记忆、保留与利用方面均表现有限，难以胜任复杂交互任务。
AI.conclusion: 现有大语言模型在多模态、多用户实际应用中的记忆与推理能力亟需改进，H2HMem能揭示其不足，有助于推动后续模型提升。

title: REFINE: Super-efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning via Rendering-Free Primitive Importance
summary: Existing pruning methods for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) suffer from either severe quality degradation or prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we propose REFINE, a highly accelerated 3DGS pruning framework centered on a novel rendering-free primitive importance metric. Our approach leverages an analytically approximated, rendering-aware Hessian field to quantify the expected perceptual error induced by the removal of individual primitives. By modeling the joint modulation of visibility, projection geometry and the content adaptive hyperparameter, we entirely bypass costly forward rendering passes and derive an anisotropic perceptual weight field that serves as a high-fidelity proxy for primitive importance. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that REFINE maintains highly competitive rendering quality while achieving an unprecedented $3,000\times$ reduction in pruning-related computational complexity compared to state-of-the-art pruning methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了REFINE，一种加速的3D高斯拆分（3DGS）剪枝方法，通过无需渲染的指标实现高效剪枝，显著降低计算开销，同时保持高渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS剪枝方法要么导致显著的质量下降，要么计算成本极高，因此需要一种在保证渲染质量前提下大幅提升剪枝效率的新方法。
AI.method: 提出基于渲染感知的Hessian场近似分析单元重要性，结合可见性、投影几何和自适应超参数，无需依赖前向渲染，得到各个3D primitive的重要性度量，并据此实现高效剪枝。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上测试，REFINE在几乎不损失渲染质量的情况下，将剪枝相关的计算复杂度降低了3000倍，超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: REFINE有效兼顾了效率与质量，极大推动了3DGS剪枝技术的发展，适用于对效率要求极高的实际场景。

title: DECSELFMASK: Leveraging Unlabeled Text via Self-Relevance-Guided Masking for Decoder-Only Classification
summary: Classification tasks require annotated data, which can often be expensive, time-consuming, or even unfeasible to collect. This is the case of the medical domain, where large datasets often have few annotated examples. To address this, we propose DecSelfMask (Decoder Self-learning by Masking), an approach to enhance decoder-only performance on classification tasks. We build on common self-learning approaches by leveraging a model to create training examples from unlabeled data to propose a novel relevance-guided masking strategy. We use relevance attribution methods to determine what portions of unannotated texts are relevant for a task. We then create self-supervised training examples by masking out those portions, training the model to reconstruct them via next-token-prediction. We hypothesize that those examples convey knowledge about the structure and semantics of unannotated data that can be useful for downstream performance. We test our approach on 136 tasks from a collection of 1.9M clinical notes from an Italian hospital. We quantify DecSelfMask's impact on downstream tasks on 5 models of different scales and families, including a probing analysis. Experiments show consistent gains, outperforming standard supervised fine-tuning approaches (+19.9 points in Macro F1), synthetic label generation (+12.5), and continual pretraining (+6.3), as well as common baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DecSelfMask方法，通过在无标注数据中掩蔽与任务相关的部分提升解码器模型在分类任务上的表现，尤其适用于医学领域缺乏标注样本的场景，并在大规模意大利医院临床数据上取得显著效果提升。
AI.motivation: 传统分类任务需要大量人工标注数据，在医学领域这类数据收集难度高、成本大，导致模型难以获得优异表现。为解决这一瓶颈，作者希望利用无标注数据提升模型能力。
AI.method: 提出DecSelfMask方法，结合相关性归因技术定位任务相关的无标注文本片段，通过自监督地掩蔽这些片段并训练模型重构，利用自学习生成有效训练样本，引导模型学习数据结构与语义信息。
AI.result: 在意大利医院的1.9M临床笔记合集，中测试了五种不同规模和家族的模型，涵盖136个任务。与标准有监督微调、合成标签生成和持续预训练等方法对比，DecSelfMask在Macro F1等指标上有明显提升，最高提升19.9个点。
AI.conclusion: DecSelfMask能有效利用无标注临床文本，提高分类任务性能，优于传统有监督与现有无监督方法，展示出在医学等数据稀缺领域的应用潜力。

title: Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distributions
summary: Reward models are central to text-to-image post-training, but visual preference is subjective and better represented as a distribution over rubric scores than as a deterministic scalar. Existing scalar, score-token, and pairwise reward models over-compress uncertainty and fine-grained score differences, while reasoning-based generative rewards provide stronger judgments but are costly to deploy and difficult to use as direct optimization signals. We propose Z-Reward, a teacher-student reward modeling framework that decouples reasoning-heavy judgment from efficient reward deployment. The teacher is a large VLM that uses reasoning to infer rubric-aligned score distributions, and is trained with Group-wise Direct Score Optimization (GDSO), which combines policy-gradient rewards from distribution expectations with direct pointwise and pairwise supervision on score distributions and score gaps. The student is trained with Reasoning-Internalized Score Distillation (RISD), which transfers the teacher's reasoning-conditioned score distribution into a compact VLM without requiring explicit reasoning chains at inference time. On our internally annotated evaluation set, the 27B GDSO teacher reaches 89.6% human preference accuracy, outperforming SFT, RewardDance, and GRPO, while the 9B RISD student reaches 88.6%, outperforming the OPD baseline and closely matching the larger teacher. We further show that Z-Reward can serve as a differentiable reward signal for text-to-image optimization, yielding a 41.3% net human-preference improvement over the SFT baseline.

AI.tldr: Z-Reward是一种新颖的文本到图像奖励建模框架，通过教师-学生结构有效提升了奖励模型的主观性表达和推理能力，显著超过现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本到图像奖励模型将复杂的人类视觉偏好压缩为单个分数，导致不确定性和细粒度评分区分能力不足。部分基于推理的生成模型虽然判断更强，但推理成本高且难以直接优化，因此需要一种既能捕获主观性又高效部署的奖励建模方法。
AI.method: Z-Reward采用教师-学生结构。教师模型为大型视觉语言模型（VLM），通过复杂推理获取符合评分标准的分布式分数，用Group-wise Direct Score Optimization (GDSO)训练，融合了从分布期望的强化学习奖励、分布点监督和分数差异监督。学生模型则通过RISD方法蒸馏教师推理下的分布信息，得到紧凑模型推断时无需推理链。
AI.result: 在内部标注评测集上，27B教师模型达到了89.6%的人类偏好准确率，优于SFT、RewardDance和GRPO。9B学生模型也达到了88.6%，优于OPD基线，接近更大尺寸的教师。同时，Z-Reward用作可微奖励信号，优化后相较基线模型实现了41.3%的人类偏好提升。
AI.conclusion: Z-Reward有效捕捉并迁移了基于推理的细粒度人类评分分布，同时具备高效推理能力，显著提升了文本到图像任务的奖励建模水平和优化效果。

title: A Finetuned SpeechLLM for Joint Multi-Granular L2 Assessment and Natural-Language Rationales
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2026. This publication is part of the project Responsible AI for Voice Diagnostics (RAIVD) with file number NGF.1607.22.013 of the research programme NGF AiNed Fellowship Grants, which is financed by the Dutch Research Council (NWO)
summary: Automated L2 speech assessment can assign proficiency labels, but often lacks interpretability. We propose a rubric-guided SpeechLLM for multi-aspect, multi-granular assessment, trained with a hybrid objective combining supervised fine-tuning and Bounded Direct Preference Optimization. The model jointly predicts ordinal labels at the sentence-level (accuracy, fluency, prosody), word/phoneme-level accuracy, and generates a natural-language rationale in the same response. On SpeechOcean762, our approach matches or outperforms single-granularity models while remaining competitive with prior approaches. We analyze rationale reliability along two axes: self-consistency with model predictions and alignment with ground-truth labels, using sentiment consistency (plausibility) and mention-based agreement (faithfulness). Rationales are plausible at the sentence level, but faithfulness degrades at the word/phoneme level: references are sparse and weakly aligned with token-level labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于评分标准引导的语音大模型（SpeechLLM），用于多方面、多粒度的自动化二语口语评估，不仅生成多层次评分，还输出自然语言解释。结果证明该方法在主流数据集上表现优异，并对解释的可靠性进行了详细分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动口语评测方法虽然可以给出能力等级，但缺乏可解释性，难以让考生和教师直观理解评分原因。本文旨在提升口语自动评测结果的可解释性，同时兼顾多层次评分需求。
AI.method: 模型采用了结合监督微调和有界直接偏好优化的混合训练目标，同时联合预测句子级（准确性、流利度、韵律）、词/音素级的准确性标签，并生成评分理由作为自然语言解释。
AI.result: 在SpeechOcean762数据集上，提出的方法在评分准确性上与或优于单粒度模型，并与以往方法保持竞争力。对模型生成解释的可靠性从自洽性和与真值标签的一致性两方面进行分析，发现句子层面解释较为可信，但在词/音素层面相关性较弱。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了多方面、多粒度的自动口语评测及合理解释，提升了系统的实用性和解释性，但在更细粒度层面需要在解释的相关性和一致性上进一步改进。

title: Edge-Constrained UAV Small-Object Detection with P2 Enhancement and Quantum-Inspired Lightweight Structure Search
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) object detection requires compact detectors that retain small-object details under onboard computation and memory constraints. Repeated downsampling inlightweight networks weakens shallow spatial information, while manually adding attention orfusion modules may increase cost without stable gains. This study analyzes YOLOX-Nano underedge-deployment constraints by combining a P2 high-resolution detection branch with a quantum-inspired evolutionary algorithm (QIEA) for lightweight structure screening. The search space isdefined by lightweight priority and task specificity, and the evaluation jointly considers accuracy,floating-point operations (FLOPs), latency, memory consumption, and recall. On VisDrone, theP2 branch increases APamall by 31.10% over the YOLOX-Nano baseline. Compared with NanoDet-Plus with similar model size, YOLOX-Nano+-P2 improves APs0.ss by 17.5% and APamal by 44.9%.The QIEA-selected candidate obtains the highest Recallso, but +P2 remains the strongest AP-oriented variant after full training. Full 100-epoch verification of Random-best, GA-best, andSA/QUBO-best candidates further shows that proxy rankings do not necessarily transfer to finalAPse9s. These results support using P2 as the main small-object enhancement path and QIEA as alightweight tool for candidate screening and accuracy-cost analysis. The source code, configurationfiles, diagnostic scripts, and summarized results are available at https://github.com/Ming23233/UAV-QIEA-Edge-Detection

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高分辨率检测分支（P2）与量子启发进化算法（QIEA）的方法，旨在提升轻量化无人机目标检测模型对小目标的检测能力，并兼顾准度和资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 无人机目标检测应用场景对模型的体积、计算与内存消耗有严格限制，但现有轻量级检测网络由于反复下采样易丢失小目标细节，人工引入注意力或融合模块往往带来额外消耗且增益不稳定。因此需设计既高效又能增强小目标检测能力的结构。
AI.method: 在YOLOX-Nano基础上，增加P2高分辨率检测分支，同时利用量子启发进化算法（QIEA）进行轻量结构组合筛选。检索空间以轻量优先和任务特异性为约束，评价指标综合模型准确度、FLOPs、延迟、内存消耗和召回率。通过对多种候选结构进行全面训练与排序分析。
AI.result: 在VisDrone数据集上，加入P2分支后AP_small相比YOLOX-Nano基线提升31.10%。与体积相近的NanoDet-Plus相比，YOLOX-Nano+-P2的AP_0.5提升17.5%、AP_small提升44.9%。QIEA筛选出的候选在Recall_50上表现最佳，但P2分支方案综合AP方面表现最强。候选结构短期代理排名与最终完全训练后表现不完全一致。
AI.conclusion: P2高分辨率分支是提升小目标检测效果的主要路径，QIEA方法可作为轻量候选结构筛选和精度-成本分析的有效工具。相关代码与实验流程已开源，有助于边缘部署场景下无人机目标检测模型的进一步优化。

title: Memory Beyond Recall: A Dual-Process Cognitive Memory System for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
summary: Long-term memory for an LLM agent is more than retrieving the right passage at the right time. Current memory systems collapse belief revision, causal coupling, and cross-domain abstraction into a single retrieval surface tuned for surface recall, and consequently struggle on implicit personalisation that requires reasoning over how a user has evolved. We propose DCPM, which reorganises agent memory along a cognitive capability hierarchy ascending from raw inputs and atomic facts, through diachronic belief trajectories and identity, to domain schemas, latent intentions and cross-domain patterns. The hierarchy is driven by two processes inheriting the architectural split of dual-process theory: a synchronous daytime writer (System1) that records belief revisions as doubly linked supersedes chains, and an asynchronous nighttime engine (System2) that induces schemas and intentions and sweeps for cross-domain collisions abstracted into higher-level core schemas. On LongMemEval, PersonaMem and PersonaMem-v2, enabling System2 contributes most where the benchmark rewards implicit cross-session inference (up to +5.20 on PersonaMem-v2) and least on span recall, matching the architectural prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全新的LLM长期记忆框架，将记忆划分为多个认知层级，并通过白天和夜间两个进程进行联动，有效提升了跨会话推理等能力，在多个数据集上效果显著。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统仅关注检索表层信息，无法适应用户身份演化带来的隐式个性化需求，缺乏对信念演化、因果关联及抽象模式的深层建模。
AI.method: 提出DCPM系统，将记忆划分为从原始输入、事实，到信念轨迹、身份、领域模式和隐含意图等不同认知层级。采用双进程架构：System1负责实时记录信念变迁，System2在异步时段整理抽象模式并检测跨领域冲突。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval、PersonaMem及PersonaMem-v2等基准上，DCPM在奖励隐式跨会话推理能力的任务上取得显著提升，尤其System2的引入带来最高+5.20的性能增益，而单纯记忆回溯任务增益较小。
AI.conclusion: DCPM通过分层次、分流程组织记忆机制，将LLM的长期记忆扩展到更复杂的推理和个性化应用层面，验证了认知分工架构在智能体长期记忆中的应用有效性。

title: Driving Video Retrieval for Complex Queries with Structured Grounding
summary: Video retrieval at scale is central to data curation and safety validation in autonomous driving, where users want to find not only scenes but also dynamic events such as cut-ins and hard braking. Existing vision-language and keyword-based retrieval methods often miss these events because the relevant motion may not be explicitly described in text or captured by lexical overlap. Rule-based retrieval can encode such events more directly, but it is brittle: generated or hand-written rules often fail when their assumptions do not match real driving data. We propose STRIVE-D, a data-calibrated retrieval framework for driving videos. It uses weakly labeled in-domain videos to estimate when a query rule is reliable, adapt rules that mismatch observed data, and fuse calibrated rule scores with vision-language and keyword-based retrieval signals. Across three driving benchmarks, including newly released human-annotated event data on DrivingDojo, STRIVE-D delivers up to 84% relative improvement in top-1 accuracy over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶视频大规模检索的新方法STRIVE-D，通过数据校准提升事件级别（如并线、急刹等）检索的准确率，在多个自动驾驶数据集上显著优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言和关键词检索在检测动态事件时表现不佳，因为移动事件往往没有明确定义的文本描述，基于规则的方法虽可直接编码事件，但易受规则假设影响，面对真实驾驶数据容易失效。因此需要一种兼具灵活性和鲁棒性的检索方法。
AI.method: STRIVE-D框架利用弱标注的领域内视频，对查询规则的可靠性进行数据驱动的估计，并对与观测数据不匹配的规则进行自适应调整，同时将这些校准后的规则分数与视觉-语言及关键词检索信号融合，提升整体检索准确率。
AI.result: 在三个自动驾驶基准上，尤其是在包含新发布的人类标注事件数据集DrivingDojo上，STRIVE-D框架在top-1准确率上较现有最先进方法最高提升84%。
AI.conclusion: STRIVE-D通过数据校准有效解决了文本与规则检索对动态驾驶事件描述不足的问题，融合多种信号后可大幅提升自动驾驶视频事件检索表现。

title: Detecting Differences Is Not Understanding Structure: Large Language Models Fail at Graph Isomorphism
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown impressive performance on diverse reasoning tasks, yet their capacity for structural reasoning in graphs remains unclear. We investigate whether LLMs can genuinely understand graph isomorphism -a fundamental problem in graph theory. While LLMs achieve near-perfect accuracy on isomorphism detection, we show this performance is illusory. When identical graphs are presented with permuted node labels, LLMs fail to identify their isomorphism. This finding suggests that LLMs exploit patterns rather than reasoning about abstract graph structure. Since permutation invariance is a fundamental requirement for valid structural reasoning, these results indicate that success on graph reasoning benchmarks should not be interpreted as evidence of genuine topological understanding.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，大型语言模型（LLM）在图同构任务上虽表现优异，但实际上并未真正理解图结构，仅仅依赖表面模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在人类语言推理任务上表现出色，但其在更抽象的结构推理，特别是图同构判别的能力仍然存疑。该问题在图论中极为基础，检验LLM是否具备真正的结构理解能力具有理论和实际意义。
AI.method: 作者首先在常规图同构检测任务上评估LLM表现，然后通过对节点标签的全排列操作，考察模型对结构不变性的把握能力。
AI.result: 结果显示，LLM在原始任务下几乎可以完美检测同构，但在节点标签被打乱（结构保持不变）后，模型严重失效。
AI.conclusion: LLM并非真正理解了图结构，而是利用了输入中的表面模式。因此，现有图推理基准上的高分不能代表其具备抽象的拓扑理解能力。

title: HDRAgent: An Agentic Framework for Multi-Exposure HDR Imaging
summary: Most existing multi-exposure HDR methods follow a fixed feed-forward reconstruction paradigm, making them prone to ghosting artifacts in complex dynamic scenes. To address this issue, we propose HDRAgent, the first agent-driven framework for HDR imaging, which adaptively selects reconstruction strategies according to the current scene conditions. Specifically, to provide scene-specific prior knowledge, we introduce a fine-grained contextual knowledge matching (FCM) module. This module leverages multimodal large language model (MLLM)-derived scene perception to retrieve relevant historical cases and tool knowledge, organizing them into structured evidence for MLLM-based adaptive tool scheduling. In addition, we propose a perception--distortion feedback mechanism that transforms post-execution quality assessment and artifact diagnosis into structured feedback, which is accumulated in historical memory to help subsequent contextual knowledge refinement and strategy selection. Furthermore, considering that extreme motion can invalidate alignment methods, we design an agent-guided generative alignment strategy that uses MLLM-based dynamic-region parsing to reconstruct unreliable contents in non-reference frames under reference-frame guidance. Experiments demonstrate that HDRAgent effectively reduces ghosting and local artifacts while achieving competitive or superior objective performance and visual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HDRAgent，这是首个基于agent驱动的高动态范围（HDR）图像重建框架，通过自适应选择重建策略，有效减少了动态场景中的鬼影和伪影。
AI.motivation: 当前多曝光HDR方法普遍采用固定的前馈重建模式，在复杂动态场景下易出现鬼影伪影，对动态适应性不足。亟需一种能根据场景自适应调整策略的方法提升HDR图像质量。
AI.method: 1. 引入HDRAgent框架，能根据场景条件自适应选择HDR重建策略；2. 提出细粒度上下文知识匹配（FCM）模块，利用多模态大模型实现场景感知和历史案例、工具知识检索以辅助决策；3. 设计感知--失真反馈机制，将质量评估转为结构化反馈以优化后续策略；4. 针对极端动态场景，提出agent指导的生成式对齐策略，通过大模型解析动态区域并引导内容重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，HDRAgent有效减少了鬼影及局部伪影，在客观指标和视觉质量上达到或超越现有水平。
AI.conclusion: HDRAgent通过agent驱动的自适应决策和多模态知识增强，有效提升了动态HDR的重建质量，为复杂动态场景HDR提供了新的解决思路。

title: Self-Harness: Harnesses That Improve Themselves
summary: The performance of LLM-based agents is jointly shaped by their base models and the harnesses that mediate their interaction with the environment. Because different models exhibit distinct behaviors, effective harness design is inherently model-specific. Yet agent harnesses are still largely engineered by human experts, a paradigm that scales poorly as modern LLMs become increasingly diverse and rapidly evolving. In this paper, we introduce Self-Harness, a new paradigm in which an LLM-based agent improves its own operating harness, without relying on human engineers or stronger external agents. We operationalize Self-Harness as an iterative loop with three stages: Weakness Mining, which identifies model-specific failure patterns from execution traces; Harness Proposal, which generates diverse yet minimal harness modifications tied to these failures; and Proposal Validation, which accepts candidate edits only after regression testing. We instantiate Self-Harness on Terminal-Bench-2.0 using a minimal initial harness and three base models from diverse families: MiniMax M2.5, Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, and GLM-5. Across all three models, Self-Harness consistently improves performance, with held-out pass rates increasing from 40.5% to 61.9%, 23.8% to 38.1%, and 42.9% to 57.1%, respectively. Qualitative analyses further show that Self-Harness does not simply add generic instructions, but effectively turns model-specific weaknesses into concrete, executable harness changes. These results suggest a path toward LLM-based agents that are not merely shaped by their harnesses, but can also participate in reshaping them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自我进化范式Self-Harness，使基于LLM的智能体能够自主改进其操作harness，无需依赖人工工程师或外部更强模型，在不同基座模型上均显著提升了任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM模型种类日益多样且更新快速，人工设计适应每种模型的harness变得难以规模化，急需一种能自动适配且持续进化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Self-Harness范式，将模型harness的改进流程分为三个阶段：1)弱点挖掘，根据执行追踪识别特定模型的失败模式；2)harness提案，针对失败生成多样且最小化的修改建议；3)提案验证，对候选修改进行回归测试，只有通过测试的编辑才被接受。该方法在Terminal-Bench-2.0基准，选用三种不同LLM模型进行实验。
AI.result: 在三种基座模型（MiniMax M2.5、Qwen3.5-35B-A3B、GLM-5）上，Self-Harness显著提升了任务通过率，分别由40.5%提升到61.9%、23.8%到38.1%、42.9%到57.1%。进一步分析表明，该方法针对性地解决模型弱点，并非简单添加通用指令。
AI.conclusion: LLM智能体不仅受制于harness的设计，也能自主参与和推动harness的演化，为开发具备自我进化能力的智能体提供了新路径。

title: Illumination-Invariant Anomaly Detection for Sub-Canopy UAV Multispectral Point Clouds
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) multispectral point clouds (MPC) provide high-dimensional spatial-spectral data for sub-canopy target detection; however, their efficacy is significantly compromised by severe illumination heterogeneity caused by vegetation shadows. To address this, we propose a prior-free anomaly detection framework capable of robustly handling lighting variations. First, we formulate solar angle estimation as an inverse optimization problem. By coupling spectral indices with a ray-tracing model, this strategy achieves Prior-Free Shadow Extraction without relying on flight metadata, effectively distinguishing dark objects from true shadows. Second, to mitigate spectral distortions, we introduce an Illumination-Consistent Sparse Representation mechanism. Unlike standard reconstruction methods, we construct a background dictionary strictly from neighbors sharing the same illumination state. This constraint effectively disentangles spectral reflectance from lighting variations, ensuring that targets are represented solely by physically consistent background points. Experimental results indicate that the proposed method significantly improves the separability between anomalies and background in complex forest environments, demonstrating superior performance over state-of-the-art baselines. This framework is particularly suited for identifying camouflaged military targets, mapping fallen tree trunks, and uncovering archaeological ruins hidden beneath dense foliage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无先验异常检测框架，有效应对无人机多光谱点云中由植被阴影引起的光照不均，提高了复杂森林环境下目标检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 无人机多光谱点云由于植被阴影导致的剧烈光照异质性，严重影响了林下目标（如伪装军事目标、倒木、考古遗迹等）的检测效果。现有方法极度依赖先验或飞行元数据，适应性有限，机制亟待改善。
AI.method: 1）通过将太阳角度估计转化为逆优化问题，结合光谱指数与光线追踪模型，实现无先验阴影提取，无需飞行元数据，区分真实阴影与暗物体；2）构建光照一致的稀疏重建机制，仅用相同光照状态下的邻域点建立背景字典，实现反射与光照的解耦，有效减轻光谱失真。
AI.result: 实验证明，所提方法能显著提升异常体与背景的可分性，在复杂林地环境下优于现有主流对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在复杂植被和光照变化条件下表现出色，适用于伪装目标识别、倒木定位与林下考古等多场景，具备较强的实际应用前景。

title: Emergence of Context Characteristics Sensitivity in Large Language Models
summary: During instruction fine-tuning (IFT), large language models (LLMs) learn to follow instructions by using the provided context to answer a query. While prior work has studied how context characteristics correlate with context usage by the LLM, this analysis has been limited to inference time, leaving open how these relationships are acquired in the first place. Here, we measure how models' sensitivity to such characteristics shifts across successive IFT stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT), direct preference optimization (DPO), and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Experiments across four models and three datasets show that SFT makes models more likely to use contexts that are easy to understand, such as containing high length, context-query similarity, and fluency. Post-SFT dynamics may either reinforce or resolve these preferences depending on the training dataset. Our findings reveal that context usage is actively reshaped at each IFT stage, and designing a balanced IFT dataset is important in ensuring robust context utilization of instruction-tuned models.

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了大语言模型在指令微调（IFT）各阶段对上下文特征敏感性的变化，并发现微调集设计对模型最终利用上下文的能力有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管之前的研究分析了大语言模型推理时上下文特征与模型利用上下文能力间的关系，但尚不清楚这些关系是在模型训练的哪个阶段形成的。本研究旨在揭示模型在IFT各阶段中对上下文特征敏感性变化的机制。
AI.method: 作者在四个模型和三个数据集上，测量了模型在IFT的三个阶段——有监督微调（SFT）、直接偏好优化（DPO）和可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）——中对诸如上下文长度、上下文与问题相似度、流畅性等特征的敏感性变化。通过实验证明了各阶段模型的上下文利用倾向如何发生变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，SFT阶段使模型更倾向于利用易于理解的上下文（如高长度、高相似度、高流畅性的上下文）；而SFT之后的阶段（DPO与RLVR）对这些倾向可以进一步增强，也可能减弱，这取决于训练集质量与构建。
AI.conclusion: 各阶段的微调都会显著重塑模型的上下文利用方式，因此构建平衡且有代表性的IFT数据集对于提升指令微调大模型的健壮性和上下文利用能力至关重要。

title: An Enhanced Geometric-Spectral Feature Learning Framework for Airborne Multispectral Point Cloud Classification
summary: Multispectral point cloud (MPC) is composed of 3D spatial-spectral information, which holds tremendous potential for accurate land-cover classification. However, the representation power of classification models is limited by inherent high-dimensional and heterogeneous spatial-spectral information, unbalanced sample distribution, and inter-class spectral similarity of airborne MPCs. We build two MPC datasets and propose an enhanced geometric-spectral feature learning framework based on attentions for airborne MPC classification. A key component in our model is a two-stream feature fusion method with attention mechanisms, which enhances the representation capability of spatial-spectral features from high-dimensional heterogeneous MPCs. The first stream aims to extract position-encoded global spectral features with fusion self-attention, and the second stream comprises a multikernel point convolution and feature aggregation attention to extract spectral-guided geometric features. We then develop a residual attention fusion block to integrate the most informative geometric-spectral features from the two parallel streams. Another important contribution of this work is a joint loss function to improve the learning ability on unbalanced and interclass similar samples. Experimental results on two airborne MPC datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, the codes and datasets used in this paper will be made available freely at https://github.com/HITlixian/TGRS_GSFF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的增强型几何-光谱特征学习框架，实现了对高维异质多光谱点云的高效分类。
AI.motivation: 多光谱点云(MPC)在地表覆盖分类中具有巨大潜力，但其高维且异质的空间-光谱信息、不平衡的数据分布以及类别间的光谱相似性，极大限制了现有分类模型的表达能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了两个MPC数据集，并提出了一个基于注意力机制的几何-光谱特征增强学习框架。方法包括两条特征融合分支：第一分支通过融合自注意力，提取全局光谱特征；第二分支采用多核点卷积和特征聚合注意力，提取光谱引导的几何特征。随后，残差注意力融合块进一步整合两条分支的关键特征。除此之外，设计了联合损失函数以提升对不平衡和类别间高度相似样本的判别能力。
AI.result: 在两个自建的机载MPC数据集上，提出的方法在分类性能上优于主流方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架显著增强了模型对高维异质多光谱点云的分类能力，尤其是在面对样本分布不均和类别间光谱相似性高时表现突出。相关代码与数据集已公开。

title: Overcoming Decoder Inconsistencies in Whisper for Dravidian and Low-Resource Languages
comment: Accepted at INTERSPEECH 2026, 5 pages, 1 figure, 5 tables
summary: Multilingual ASR models such as Whisper perform well on high-resource languages but exhibit substantially higher Word Error Rates (WER) for Dravidian languages compared to Indo-Aryan ones. Through linguistic and dataset analysis, we show that Dravidian languages have longer words, higher vocabulary diversity, and lower repetition, resulting in sparse token distributions and frequent character-level substitution errors. Baseline fine-tuning further reveals decoder imbalance between self-attention (linguistic context) and cross-attention (acoustic cues). Although synthetic token-repetition experiments indicate potential gains, they are impractical. Motivated by these observations, we introduce two decoder-level enhancements: Weighted-Attention, which adaptively balances attention sources, and Self-Conditioning, which reinjects intermediate predictions to improve token consistency. Experiments demonstrate consistent WER reductions for low-resource and agglutinative languages.

AI.tldr: 当前多语种ASR模型如Whisper在高资源语言表现良好，但对达罗毗荼语系的WER显著高于印欧语系。通过深入分析，作者提出了解释原因并给出两种解码器改进方法，有效降低了低资源和黏着语的识别错误率。
AI.motivation: 发现多语种ASR模型对资源稀缺且形态复杂的达罗毗荼语系表现不佳，并通过词汇长度、词汇多样性和低重复性分析揭示这些特性导致解码困难。
AI.method: 1）词汇和数据集分析揭示错误来源；2）基线微调显示解码器自注意与交叉注意不平衡；3）通过加权注意力控制解码器关注音频与语言信息的平衡；4）自条件机制将中间预测信息反馈，提高token一致性。
AI.result: 经过实验，提出的两种解码器增强方法对低资源及黏着型语言在ASR任务中实现了稳定的WER提升，优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 针对黏着、低资源语种ASR表现低下的问题，论文提供了基于结构及注意力机制的有效改进思路，为多语种模型在复杂语言上的应用提供了提升路径。

title: A Geometric Framework for Absolute Pose and Velocity Estimation with Event Cameras
summary: Despite the rapid advancements in event-based motion estimation, current geometric methods primarily focus on velocity estimation. However, absolute pose estimation, which is equally crucial for key applications such as robotic navigation and augmented reality, remains relatively underexplored. Consequently, the simultaneous recovery of absolute pose and velocity from event streams remains an open and challenging problem. To address this gap, we propose a geometric framework for absolute pose and velocity estimation by leveraging 3D lines in the scene and the events they trigger. At the core of the framework lie two key geometric constraints: the orthogonality between a 3D line and the normal vector of its corresponding event plane, and the collinearity of an event with the 2D projection of its associated line. Based on these constraints, we present both linear and polynomial solvers for absolute pose estimation. The former enables efficient computation, while the latter provides a globally optimal solution for rotation. For velocity estimation, we develop an efficient linear solver and a more accurate optimization-based solver to recover both angular and linear velocities. Notably, our methods require a minimum of three event-line correspondences to determine the 6-DoF absolute pose or velocities independently. Extensive experiments in simulation and on real-world datasets demonstrate that our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance, with significant improvements in accuracy and computational efficiency compared to existing methods. The demo code is publicly available at https://github.com/Zibin6/EventPoseVelocity.
