AI.motivation: 放疗中需要通过DIR将不同时间的影像配准以评估累积剂量，但DIR的不确定性可能导致剂量估计有误差，因此需要量化和表达这种不确定性对剂量评价的影响。
AI.method: 作者提出用概率方式建模每个体素的配准对应关系，通过局部确定性贴图（如安全边界、结构不匹配或结构级的不确定性值）来定义随机变量。加入结构引导的in/out方案以提升解剖位置的合理性。整个框架侧重参数简单、计算高效和结果易解释。
AI.result: 在前列腺放疗案例上实验，比较多种确定性贴图和概率核的策略。结果表明，确定性贴图策略对剂量和DVH的不确定性界影响远大于具体概率核类型。结构引导in/out方案的增益较小且依病例而异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为放疗剂量评估提供了一种透明、实用的手段，将DIR不确定性清晰地反映在剂量相关指标上，有助于研究不同建模选择对剂量转移结果的影响。

title: Self-supervised Learning Matters: A Simple Ensemble Solution for Micro-Gesture Recognition
summary: In this paper, we present XInsight Lab's solution to the micro-gesture classification track of the 4th MiGA Challenge at IJCAI 2026, in which our solution ranked first and achieved a new state-of-the-art result. We propose a multimodal ensemble framework that integrates a self-supervised RGB-based model with supervised multi-stream models from previous solutions. The self-supervised RGB model is pretrained on 120K unlabeled clips via masked video modeling and then fine-tuned on iMiGUE. This simple yet effective RGB baseline achieves 69.224% top-1 accuracy on the iMiGUE test set, demonstrating the benefit of learning transferable representations from unlabeled in-domain videos. By incorporating this model as a complementary branch, the final ensemble reaches 74.419% top-1 accuracy, surpassing the previous state of the art by 1.206 percentage points. Experimental results on iMiGUE, including ablation studies on the ensemble strategy, validate the effectiveness of self-supervised RGB representation learning for micro-gesture recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多模态集成框架用于微手势分类，通过结合自监督RGB模型和以往的多流模型，在国际竞赛中取得了第一名并刷新了准确率记录。
AI.motivation: 在微手势识别领域，如何利用大量未标注视频数据提升模型泛化能力和准确率依然是难点。作者希望通过自监督学习方法，为模型提供能迁移的有效表征，进一步提高识别性能。
AI.method: 提出融合自监督RGB模型和以往的监督多流模型的集成框架。RGB模型使用120K无标签视频片段，通过掩码视频建模进行预训练，再在iMiGUE数据上进行微调，最终模型与其他分支集成。
AI.result: 自监督RGB模型在iMiGUE测试集上达到了69.224%的top-1准确率，集成后提升至74.419%，超过先前SOTA 1.206个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 利用自监督RGB表征学习对微手势识别非常有效，多模态集成框架可进一步提升性能，实验和消融分析均验证了方法有效性。

title: See More, Match Better: Multi-Source Feature Fusion for Two-View Correspondence Learning
comment: Correspondence Learning, Multi-Source Feature Fusion, Outlier Removal, Camera Pose Estimation
summary: Two-view correspondence learning aims to distinguish true correspondences (inliers) from false ones (outliers) in image pairs by leveraging their underlying differences. Existing methods mainly rely on coordinate-based geometric consistency. However, they often struggle with pseudo-consistent outliers in scenes containing repetitive structures, textureless regions, or locally similar geometric patterns. To address this limitation, we propose TriMatch, a multi-source feature fusion framework for two-view correspondence learning, which consists of two parts: feature extraction and feature refinement. In feature extraction, TriMatch jointly extracts geometric, texture semantic, and structural semantic features to provide complementary evidence for correspondence discrimination. To bridge the gap between semantic and geometric features, texture and structural semantic features are aligned with geometric features through dedicated Texture-Geometric Alignment and Structural-Geometric Alignment modules, respectively. We further introduce a Semantic-Guided Correspondence Modulation module, which modulates geometric features using semantic information to suppress geometrically plausible but semantically inconsistent correspondences. In feature refinement, a Hierarchical Semantic-Enhanced Correspondence Refinement strategy progressively models correspondence dependencies and recalibrates multi-context feature responses, enabling more reliable inlier-outlier discrimination. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness, robustness, and generalization capability of TriMatch.

AI.tldr: 该文提出了TriMatch框架，通过融合多源特征提升两视图图像匹配中的内点-外点判别能力，有效解决伪一致性外点问题。
AI.motivation: 现有两视图匹配方法多依赖几何一致性，面对重复结构、无纹理区域、局部几何相似场景时，难以识别真正一致点，容易被伪一致性外点误导。本文旨在利用更多类型的特征辅助匹配判别，提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: TriMatch框架包括两部分：特征提取和特征精炼。特征提取阶段，同时抽取几何特征、纹理语义特征和结构语义特征，通过两种特定对齐模块（纹理-几何对齐、结构-几何对齐）融合不同特征。此外，引入语义引导的匹配调制模块，用语义信息调整几何特征，抑制仅几何一致但语义不一致的匹配点。特征精炼阶段，采用层次化语义增强的策略，逐步建模对应关系和多上下文特征反应，从而提升内点与外点的判别能力。
AI.result: 大量实验验证了TriMatch方法在有效性、鲁棒性及泛化能力方面的优势。具体实验细节未在摘要列出，但表明优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TriMatch通过多源特征融合和层次化的特征精炼，有效提升了两视图点对的正确匹配判别能力，特别适用于含有复杂结构和困难场景的图像对。

title: EditSSC: Toward Editable Semantic Occupancy Scenes with Unconditional Diffusion Models
summary: 3D semantic scene generation is crucial for autonomous driving applications, yet most methods rely on complex 3D-specific architectures such as triplane encoders and adapted diffusion networks, limiting both their simplicity and their editing capabilities. We propose EditSSC, an editing-ready method for 3D semantic scene generation using 2D Bird's Eye View (BEV) representations and off-the-shelf latent diffusion network. Our approach reshapes 3D semantic occupancy grids into multi-channel BEV images and leverages the quantized autoencoder and UNet from Stable Diffusion with minimal modifications. We perform diffusion on the latents after quantization, which enables training-free editing capabilities. By exploiting class-to-code correspondences in the codebook, our method supports sketch-guided generation, inpainting, and outpainting without any retraining. On SemanticKITTI, EditSSC outperforms existing 3D-specific baselines on unconditional generation, demonstrating that well-established 2D architectures can be effectively repurposed for 3D scene generation and editing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用2D BEV表示和简单扩散模型编辑3D语义场景的新方法EditSSC，性能优于复杂3D架构，还支持无须重训练的编辑。
AI.motivation: 当前3D语义场景生成方法依赖复杂3D结构，架构复杂且编辑能力有限，亟需更简单且易编辑的新方法。
AI.method: 将3D语义占据网格重塑为多通道BEV图像，利用Stable Diffusion的量化自动编码器和UNet进行最小修改后扩散，支持训练外的编辑操作（如草图引导、修补和外扩），无需重训练。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上的无条件生成性能超越现有3D专有方法，且实现了灵活的编辑功能。
AI.conclusion: 2D架构及通用扩散模型可高效复用在3D语义场景生成及编辑任务，方法简单且编辑能力强。

title: Visual Para-Thinker++: A Single-Policy Multi-Agent Framework for Visual Reasoning
summary: Visual reasoning requires integrating evidence distributed across regions, attributes, and relations, making single-chain reasoning prone to early perceptual commitment and hallucination. We propose Visual Para-Thinker++, a single-policy multi-agent framework in which one shared MLLM policy is instantiated as role-conditioned Main, Worker, and Summary Agents. The Main Agent decomposes the task with fixed allocation patterns; Worker Agents reason in parallel under context isolation; and the Summary Agent reconciles full Worker reasoning traces rather than majority-voting on final labels. The shared policy is trained by Multi-Agent Capability Injection and Role-Decoupled Multi-Agent Optimization, which assign role-specific rewards and advantages to corresponding token segments to reduce gradient conflict among collaborative roles. A native inference engine enables efficient multi-agent rollout through shared visual prefix and KV cache reuse. Across V*, CountBench, the RefCOCO family, and HallusionBench, Visual Para-Thinker++ consistently outperforms single-trajectory and inference-time parallel baselines, with especially strong gains on hallucination-sensitive visual reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种改进的多智能体视觉推理框架Visual Para-Thinker++，通过多角色协作有效提升了任务分解和推理准确性，显著缓解了幻觉和早期错误承诺问题，并在多个视觉推理基准上取得最佳表现。
AI.motivation: 当前单链视觉推理方法易出现过早感知承诺和幻觉现象，难以有效整合分散在不同区域、属性和关系中的证据，因此需要设计更高效且具备并行推理能力的方法来提升综合视觉推理水平。
AI.method: 提出了Visual Para-Thinker++多智能体框架，用一套共享视觉-语言大模型（MLLM）策略，通过Main（主）、Worker（工）、Summary（总结）三类分工协作代理，采用固定分配模式分解任务；各Worker在上下文隔离下并行推理；Summary Agent归纳所有Worker的完整推理过程而非多数投票。此外，提出多智能体能力注入和角色分离优化策略，为不同角色分配独特的奖励和优势，缓解多角色间梯度冲突，并采用共享视觉前缀和KV缓存提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在V*、CountBench、RefCOCO等多项经典视觉推理和防幻觉基准上，Visual Para-Thinker++表现优异，相比传统单链和并行基线方法均有稳定超越，特别是在对幻觉敏感的视觉推理任务上提升明显。
AI.conclusion: Visual Para-Thinker++通过多智能体协作和新型优化机制显著优化了视觉推理，缓解了感知幻觉和推理早期误判问题，为视觉理解和多智能体协同推理提供了新的思路和工程实践。

title: Virtual-point-based Solutions to Handle Generalized Absolute Pose Problem
summary: Multi-camera systems are increasingly adopted in robotics and autonomous navigation for their wide field of view, flexibility, and fault tolerance. Nevertheless, existing PnP solvers fail to handle multiple projection centers. This paper introduces a virtual point formulation that bridges the standard PnP and generalized pose problems, enabling a unified pipeline that transforms existing PnP solvers into generalized pose solvers. Based on this framework, we derive three Virtual-point-based Generalized Pose solvers, namely VGPc, VGPq, and VGPr, leveraging Cayley, quaternion, and rotation-matrix parameterizations, respectively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed solvers inherit the accuracy and efficiency of original PnP algorithms while significantly outperforming existing generalized solvers. Specifically, VGPc achieves higher estimation accuracy under heteroscedastic noise conditions, VGPq maintains global optimality, whereas VGPr provides superior computational efficiency without accuracy degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种“虚拟点”公式，将标准PnP问题与广义位姿问题结合，为多相机系统中的位姿估计提供了统一方法，通过转换，现有PnP算法可直接应用于多投影中心场景。
AI.motivation: 多相机系统常用于机器人和自动驾驶导航，但现有PnP求解器无法处理多个投影中心，局限了其实用性。因此，研究面向多摄像头系统的通用位姿估计方法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出了虚拟点（virtual point）公式，将一般的PnP问题推广为广义位姿问题。基于该框架，提出了三种基于虚拟点的广义位姿求解器：VGPc（Cayley参数化）、VGPq（四元数参数化）、VGPr（旋转矩阵参数化），可直接转换现有PnP算法用于多相机情况。
AI.result: 通过大量实验验证，所提方法在准确性和效率上继承了原有PnP算法优点，并大幅优于现有广义位姿求解器。VGPc在异方差噪声下表现出更高的精度，VGPq保持全局最优，VGPr则实现了更高的计算效率且无精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 文中方法为多摄像头系统的广义位姿估计提供了统一、高效且精确的解决方案，有望在机器人、自动驾驶等领域推广应用。

title: Reason Twice: Segmentation via Candidate Discovery and Comparative Reasoning
summary:
The rapid development of pretrained foundation models has enabled more general image segmentation. Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been widely explored for image segmentation with complex queries that require high-level reasoning. Despite promising progress, existing methods are often constrained by limited training data and the gap between MLLMs and mask generation modules. To better transfer MLLMs' perception and reasoning ability to complex reasoning-based segmentation tasks, we propose a two-stage framework Rea2Seg for mask generation and selection. Specifically, the framework first identifies potential regions as candidate masks based on the attention maps of a segmentation MLLM. It then employs an MLLM to reason over the question and candidate masks and assign scores to each mask. The final segmentation result is obtained by reranking the candidates and selecting the highest-scoring mask, reformulating image segmentation as candidate discovery followed by discriminative mask selection.
  We also notice that a large portion of questions in existing benchmarks focus on commonsense reasoning, and these questions usually do not fully require joint visual observation and reasoning. To address this issue, we introduce a new benchmark called ReasonSeg-SGDR that comprehensively evaluates a model's perception, grounding, and reasoning abilities across multiple dimensions, including discriminative recognition, spatial reasoning, geometric reasoning, and multi-step reasoning, with fine-grained mask generation.
  In addition, we collect training data to enhance MLLMs' ability to jointly understand multimodal queries and candidate masks, and to assign scores through reasoning. Experimental results on the proposed benchmark and ReasonSeg demonstrate the effectiveness of the unified mask generation and selection framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为Rea2Seg的两阶段图像分割框架，并引入了新的基准ReasonSeg-SGDR，实现对复杂推理型分割任务的高效解决。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在复杂问题驱动的图像分割任务中，受到训练数据有限以及MLLM与掩码生成模块能力脱节的约束，难以发挥优势。作者希望更好地迁移MLLM在感知与推理方面的能力，解决复杂推理分割任务。
AI.method: 提出Rea2Seg两阶段框架：第一阶段利用分割型MLLM的注意力图提取潜在候选掩码；第二阶段使用MLLM对问题及候选掩码进行推理，给每个掩码赋分，最后通过排序选出得分最高的掩码，实现图像分割。此外，作者构建了一个新基准ReasonSeg-SGDR，涵盖辨别识别、空间推理、几何推理、多步推理等多维度细粒度分割评价。还采集了新训练数据以提升MLLM多模态理解和推理赋分能力。
AI.result: 在ReasonSeg-SGDR和ReasonSeg基准上进行了实验，验证了该统一的掩码生成与选择框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过Rea2Seg和新数据集的引入，显著提升了多模态大模型在复杂推理型图像分割任务中的表现，推动了领域发展。

title: IB-HFN: Information Bottleneck-Driven SAR-Optical Fusion Network for High-Fidelity Cloud Removal
summary: Synthetic aperture radar (SAR)-assisted optical cloud removal aims to recover surface information obscured by clouds in optical remote sensing images by exploiting complementary SAR observations. Existing multimodal fusion methods typically rely on direct spatial concatenation and pixel-wise supervision, which can propagate SAR speckle noise into optical reconstruction and lead to over-smoothed results. To address these limitations, we propose an Information Bottleneck-driven High-Fidelity Network (IB-HFN) for SAR-assisted optical cloud removal. IB-HFN employs a dual-stream backbone to preserve modality-specific representations before deep semantic fusion, thereby mitigating premature cross-modal contamination. At the fusion stage, we introduce a Spatial Information Bottleneck Fusion module that compresses SAR features through a channel-wise variational information bottleneck to suppress unstructured speckle noise. In parallel, a local-global gating mechanism predicts clear-sky regions and routes reliable optical details through a Dirac-initialized skip connection, decoupling noise suppression from texture preservation. We further develop a joint optimization strategy that integrates feature-level bottleneck regularization with image-level constraints on reconstruction accuracy, structural consistency, spectral fidelity, and contrastive sharpness. A dynamic weighting schedule balances these objectives to stabilize training and reduce hazy artifacts. Experiments on the SEN12MS-CR dataset under challenging spatio-temporal splits demonstrate that IB-HFN achieves superior structural preservation and spectral fidelity over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新颖的信息瓶颈高保真网络（IB-HFN），有效提升了光学遥感图像云去除的效果，解决了现有方法受SAR噪声影响过大和细节损失的问题，在标准数据集上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SAR和光学多源融合的遥感云去除方法，易将SAR斑点噪声引入重建结果，并导致图像过于平滑，影响结构和光谱保真度，因此需要新的方法抑制噪声并保留更多细节。
AI.method: 提出IB-HFN网络结构，采用双流骨干网络区分模态专属特征，利用空间信息瓶颈融合模块对SAR特征进行压缩，减少噪声污染，并通过局部-全局门控机制预测云区路由可靠光学信息，分离噪声抑制与细节保持。同时设计特征级瓶颈正则与图像级多约束联合优化，并采用动态权重调度稳定训练。
AI.result: 在SEN12MS-CR数据集上，该方法在结构保真和光谱保真指标上均优于现有主流方法，在复杂时空分割场景下依然表现突出。
AI.conclusion: IB-HFN有效缓解了SAR斑点噪声引入的问题，加强了光学细节和结构的恢复能力，为SAR辅助的光学云去除任务提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Beyond Humans: Multispecies Animal Face Recognition Using Transfer Learning
comment: This paper extends the work published in the proceedings of CAIP 2025 conference: 'Adapting to the Wild: From Human Face to Animal Face Recognition' by De Marsico, M., Jain, A. K., Miranda, M., & Orlando, A
summary: Individual animal recognition can be useful in the search for lost or stolen pets, the tracking of individuals of endangered species, and the recognition of animals in crowded farms. Present recognition techniques mostly use physical devices, e.g., microchips, often impractical and difficult to apply. These could be replaced by remote recognition via the animal's face; if accurate enough, it provides several advantages: it is non-invasive, can work at a distance, and is difficult to counterfeit, as, for instance, in the case of substituting sick animals for healthy ones in the food industry. The few existing datasets with sufficient per-subject images annotated with a single animal identity are not large enough to train current deep learning architectures. We rather investigate the possibility of transfer learning, exploiting pre-trained network models as backbones. Our experiments compared FaceNet, which is specifically trained on large databases of human faces, with the Vision Transformer (ViT) pre-trained on ImageNet, i.e., on object categories. We used three face datasets of very different animals: dogs, primates (lemurs, golden monkeys, and chimpanzees), and cattle. We report the results and, for each dataset, compare them with the state of the art (SOTA) ad hoc-trained deep networks. The capture conditions differ among the three datasets. Image quality (resolution, motion blur, diverse poses, etc.) decreases from dogs to cattle to primates. The best performance was achieved with dogs, where ViT reached a mean verification accuracy of 96.85% and a Rank-1 Identification Rate of 84.34%. The results for endangered primates are still encouraging, but performance varies across animal classes and tasks (verification or identification), and does not always outperform SOTA. For cattle, the ViT results outperform SOTA, while FaceNet is still competitive.

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨了利用深度学习模型实现动物面部无创远程识别的可能性，比较了ViT和FaceNet在狗、灵长类和牛三类动物上的识别效果。
AI.motivation: 目前对动物个体识别多依赖物理设备（如芯片），存在侵入性和实用性问题。面部识别可为走失宠物、濒危物种跟踪、农场动物管理等场景带来非侵入式且难以伪造的解决方案，因此有实际应用需求。
AI.method: 作者采用迁移学习，分别使用经过大规模人脸库和ImageNet预训练的FaceNet和ViT作为特征提取骨干，针对狗、灵长类、牛三种动物的人脸图片，在不同数据集和拍摄条件下进行个体识别实验，并与SOTA方法对比。
AI.result: ViT在狗的数据集上取得96.85%的验证准确率和84.34%的Rank-1识别率，表现最佳；牛的识别上优于SOTA方法，而FaceNet在牛的识别上也有竞争力。灵长类动物虽识别效果受限但仍有一定潜力，不同动物类别和识别任务下表现差异明显。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习和预训练模型（尤其是ViT）在部分动物的个体面部识别上表现优异，有望替代传统的物理识别方式，但面对低质量图像和不同动物类群时性能仍有限。

title: ExDet: Open-Domain Open-Vocabulary Detection with Cross-modal Extrapolation and Rectification
summary: Open-domain open-vocabulary detection (ODOVD) requires detectors to generalize to both novel categories and unseen domains, making it more challenging than open-vocabulary detection. Existing methods typically train open-vocabulary detectors together with domain generalization modules from scratch, leading to high training cost. we propose ExDet, a lightweight category-domain collaborative generalization framework for ODOVD that enhances the cross-category and cross-domain generalization of existing detectors. ExDet consists of Text-Guided Extrapolation (TGE), a lightweight Detector-Compatible Rectification (DCR) module, and ExRPN. Specifically, TGE exploits the DeltaSpace property of vision-language models (VLMs) to infer category- and domain-aware proxy visual prototypes from text. DCR is learned from the TGE-generated prototypes in a detector training-free and real-data-free manner, and is inserted after the classification head at inference to rectify representations toward a detector-compatible source-domain visual distribution, thereby enhancing classification for targets from novel categories and unseen domains. ExRPN recalibrates proposal scores by combining semantic similarity with RPN confidence, improving recall for novel and domain-shifted objects while providing better support for subsequent classification and DCR. ExDet achieves SOTA performance on OD-LVIS, OV-LVIS, Objects365, and MSOSB.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ExDet框架，一种轻量级的类别与域协同泛化方法，用于开放域开放词汇检测（ODOVD），提升了检测器在新类别与新域上的泛化能力，并在多个公开数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 开放域开放词汇检测（ODOVD）不仅要求模型识别未见过的新类别，还需要适应未见过的新域，比传统的开放词汇检测更具挑战性。目前的解决思路通常需要高昂的训练成本，因此亟需一种高效、泛化能力强的方法。
AI.method: 提出了ExDet框架，包括三个组成部分：1）Text-Guided Extrapolation（TGE），利用视觉-语言模型的DeltaSpace属性，从文本推断具有类别和域意识的代理视觉原型；2）Detector-Compatible Rectification（DCR）模块，基于TGE原型实现与检测器兼容的特征校正，且无需额外训练和真实数据，在推理时插入；3）ExRPN模块，将语义相似性与RPN信心分数结合，重新校准目标提议评分，改善召回和后续分类。
AI.result: ExDet在OD-LVIS、OV-LVIS、Objects365、MSOSB等多项公开数据集上取得了当前最优（SOTA）的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: ExDet为ODOVD任务提供了高效的泛化解决方案，通过轻量化设计有效提升了检测器在新类别和新域上的表现，为实用化应用提供了有效思路。

title: Zero-Shot Semantic Re-Identification for Autonomous Driving: A VLM Baseline Study
summary: Re-Identification (ReID) in autonomous driving is typically formulated as a visual matching problem, where observations of vehicles, pedestrians, and cyclists are associated across time, frames, or camera views using learned appearance embeddings, often complemented by motion, geometric, or multimodal cues. However, purely visual representations may be sensitive to viewpoint, occlusion, illumination, and sensor-domain variations, limiting their interpretability and robustness in complex driving scenes. We propose a baseline study of a zero-shot pipeline using Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to generate textual descriptions of detected traffic participants and evaluate whether these descriptions can support identity matching across observations. Instead of relying only on low-level visual similarity, the proposed formulation represents each object through structured semantic attributes, including category, color, shape, pose, visible parts, spatial context, and distinctive visual cues. This study provides an initial benchmark for language-based re-identification in autonomous-driving scenarios, discussing and evaluating the strengths and limitations of current VLMs for this task. Results demonstrate that zero-shot semantic descriptions can support effective object re-identification, achieving retrieval performance comparable to a supervised CNN baseline while offering greater interpretability through explicit identity cues. However, the experiments also reveal important challenges, including attribute inconsistency across viewpoints and limited fine-grained discrimination between visually similar instances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用视觉-语言模型（VLM）生成交通参与者的文本描述进行再识别（ReID），验证语义描述是否可用于自动驾驶视觉匹配。实验证明该方法具有可比的性能和更好的可解释性，但也存在细粒度区分和属性一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 纯视觉特征在自动驾驶场景中的再识别任务易受视角、遮挡、光照及传感器差异影响，导致可解释性和鲁棒性不足。作者希望探索更具语义性、易解释且抗扰动的再识别新范式。
AI.method: 设计零样本管道，利用视觉-语言模型（VLM）为检测到的目标生成结构化的语义属性文本描述（包括类别、颜色、形状、姿态、可见部分、空间环境及独特外观），基于这些描述进行跨时空的目标匹配，并与传统CNN方法作对比。
AI.result: 零样本语义描述方法在再识别检索任务中达到与有监督CNN基线相当的性能，同时通过显式的身份提示大幅提升了可解释性。但在不同视角下属性一致性和对外观相似目标的区分能力仍有不足。
AI.conclusion: 基于VLM的语义再识别方法在自动驾驶场景下具有良好的可行性和潜在优势，但属性不一致和细粒度辨识能力有待进一步研究与提升。

title: RT-SDGOD: Real-Time Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection
summary: In real-world deployment under strict real-time constraints, weather and imaging variations induce significant distribution shifts, severely degrading detectors. Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection aims to mitigate this issue, yet existing methods rarely investigate-at the level of problem formulation-the generalization capability of real-time detectors under such constrained inference budgets. To this end, we introduce Real-Time Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection (RT-SDGOD), which focuses on how real-time detectors can achieve cross-domain generalization under zero extra inference overhead by relying solely on training-time representation learning. We observe that, under domain shift, DETR-based real-time detectors mainly degrade through increased missed detections, rooted in limited and unstable object-level discriminative evidence. Based on this, we propose RT-SDGDet, a multi-evidence collaborative modeling framework for RT-SDGOD. The core idea is to enable multiple queries of the same object to collaboratively cover more sufficient discriminative evidence while maintaining the stability of such evidence modeling across views. Specifically, we use one-to-many (O2M) supervision to construct stable object-specific query groups, and further design Discriminative Evidence Diversity Learning (DEDL) and Dual-view Evidence Consistency Learning (DvECL) to expand object-level evidence coverage and improve evidence stability under appearance perturbations, respectively. Since all components are introduced only during training, our method incurs no extra inference overhead. Extensive experiments show that the proposed method achieves better generalization performance than existing approaches across multiple unseen target domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在严格实时约束条件下提升单域目标检测器跨域泛化能力的新方法，重点是保证推理零额外开销的同时提高检测性能。
AI.motivation: 实时目标检测器在实际部署中会遇到天气、成像等带来的分布偏移，现有方法很少关注在严格推理预算下，主流实时检测器的泛化能力和问题本身。因此亟需探索如何在不增加推理负担的前提下提升其跨域性能。
AI.method: 作者提出了Real-Time Single-Domain Generalized Object Detection (RT-SDGOD)新任务，并基于DETR检测器，分析其在域偏移下主要因漏检率上升导致性能下降。为此，提出了多证据协同建模框架RT-SDGDet，包括O2M（one-to-many）监督、判别证据多样性学习（DEDL）和双视角一致性学习（DvECL），通过训练时构建对象查询组、增强判别证据及保证证据稳定性，实现提升泛化能力。全部创新模块仅用于训练阶段，推理时无额外计算。
AI.result: 提出的方法在多个未见目标域测试中，均优于现有主流泛化检测方法，显著提升跨域检测性能，且不带来任何推理负担。
AI.conclusion: RT-SDGDet框架能有效提升实时目标检测器的单域泛化能力，兼顾提升性能与控制推理开销，为实际部署环境下的目标检测带来了更优解。

title: PhysScene: A Scene Graph Dataset for Scientific Visual Reasoning in Physics Experiments
summary: Scene Graphs (SGs) provide structured representations of visual scenes by modeling objects and their pairwise relationships. Despite recent progress, existing datasets primarily focus on generic natural contexts, leaving domain-specific and function-oriented scenes largely underexplored. This limitation restricts the evaluation of relational reasoning in scientific experimental scenes, thereby hindering the development of intelligent monitoring, analysis, and related applications in such scenes. To address this gap, we introduce PhysScene, the first SG dataset tailored to physics experiments. PhysScene encompasses specialized instruments, structured experimental setups, and functional relations intrinsic to experimental environments, enabling reasoning that extends beyond spatial co-occurrence to logical dependencies. Rather than pursuing large data scale, PhysScene focuses on strong semantic constraints and high relation density in experimental scenes, posing new challenges for existing scene parsing algorithms while offering opportunities for further improvements. Extensive analyses and experiments show that PhysScene complements existing benchmarks and establishes a valuable testbed for advancing scientific visual reasoning. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/ZMH-SDUST/PhysScene.

AI.tldr: PhysScene是首个面向物理实验场景的scene graph数据集，拥有高语义约束和高关系密度，能推动科学视觉推理的发展。
AI.motivation: 当前场景图数据集多聚焦于通用自然场景，科学实验等领域场景数据稀缺，限制了关系推理和智能分析系统在科学场景的发展。
AI.method: 构建覆盖物理实验仪器、严密实验布置和功能关系的高质量场景图数据集PhysScene，强调语义约束和关系密集度。
AI.result: 数据集测试显示，PhysScene能补充现有基准，提升现有场景解析算法挑战，并推动科学领域视觉推理能力。
AI.conclusion: PhysScene为科学实验领域的场景图推理提供了重要基准，推动智能监控及分析等应用发展。

title: Echo-DM: Ultrasound Marker Removal via Conditional Latent Diffusion and Region-Aware Fusion
summary: Clinical ultrasound images often contain artificial markers, such as measurement calipers and text, to assist diagnostic interpretation and comparison. However, these markers can introduce shortcut bias in downstream automated analysis, encouraging deep learning models to rely on marker-related cues rather than clinically meaningful anatomy. Existing marker removal methods are either mask-dependent and vulnerable to error propagation, or mask-free deterministic restorers that may over-smooth ultrasound texture and perturb unaffected background regions. To address these challenges, we present Echo-DM, a framework for ultrasound marker removal via conditional latent diffusion and region-aware fusion. Echo-DM follows a common encoder-diffusion-decoder pipeline, where a DiT-based conditional latent diffusion network performs global restoration and a region-aware fusion module enforces preservation-aware image-space refinement under end-to-end mask-free inference. Building on this fixed core design, we further instantiate Echo-DM-V and Echo-DM-R with VAE-based and RAE-based latent modules, respectively, which demonstrates that the Echo-DM architecture is compatible with diverse latent-module instantiations. Extensive experiments on Echo-PAIR, a large-scale paired clinical ultrasound dataset, demonstrate superior marker removal and strong anatomical fidelity compared with representative two-stage baselines, while providing favorable quality--efficiency trade-offs across deployment settings. Data, code and models will be released at https://github.com/MiliLab/Echo-DM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无掩码的超声标记去除方法Echo-DM，该方法在保持图像结构和细节的同时有效去除人工标记，且兼容多种潜在空间设计，优于现有主流方法。
AI.motivation: 临床超声图像常包含用于诊断的人工标记（如测量卡尺和文字），这些标记会在自动化分析中引入捷径偏差，影响深度学习模型对关键信息的挖掘。因此，发展能无掩码、精确恢复原始解剖结构的去标记方法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者提出了一套基于条件潜在扩散与区域感知融合的Echo-DM方法。整体采用编码器-扩散-解码器结构，通过DiT条件潜在扩散网络实现全局修复，再利用区域感知融合模块在像素空间细致优化，无需用户提供标记掩码。该方法可灵活结合VAE或RAE潜在模块。
AI.result: 在大规模临床超声配对数据集Echo-PAIR上的实验显示，Echo-DM在标记去除和解剖保真度上均优于经典两阶段方法，并在不同部署条件下展现出较优的效率与质量平衡。
AI.conclusion: Echo-DM不仅提升了超声标记去除效果，还具备良好的通用性和部署灵活性，能够促进临床自动化影像分析的可靠性，相关资源已开放以供进一步研究。

title: An Opticalmechanics Framework for Dynamic Estimation of Multibody Systems
summary: Conventional dynamics analysis of the human body is often constrained by the need for contact force and torque sensors and controlled laboratory environments. To address this issue, this study proposes an opticalmechanics kinematic-dynamic integrated estimation framework for multibody systems. Specifically, a constrained multibody model is established to describe the system dynamics, while image-measured kinematic quantities are used as non contact inputs for dynamic estimation. The unknown joint torque is then identified through a genetic-algorithm based optimization by minimizing the discrepancy between model-predicted and image-measured kinematic quan tities. Experimental validation on an air-bearing platform showed that the wrist joint torque estimated from image data achieved a mean absolute error of 0.46 Nm compared with sensor measurements. In the forward prediction test, the model-predicted angular velocity achieved a mean absolute error of 0.006 rad/s relative to the image-measured results. This study demonstrates the potential of combining image measurement and mechanical modeling for non-contact dynamic estimation in scenarios where direct force and torque measurement is difficult.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光学力学一体化的多体系统运动学-动力学联合估算框架，实现了无接触状态下的人体动力学分析。通过利用图像测量的运动学量作为优化输入，准确估算了未知关节力矩。实验显示，该方法达到较高精度，有望应用于无法直接测量力和力矩的场合。
AI.motivation: 传统的人体动力学分析依赖接触式传感器（如力传感器、力矩传感器）和严格的实验环境，带来不便且应用受限。实际场景中，常难以实现直接力和力矩的测量。因此，发展一种无需接触式传感器的方法，对于拓展动力学分析应用极具意义。
AI.method: 建立了受约束的多体动力学模型，以系统的图像测量运动学量作为无接触输入。通过遗传算法优化，最小化模型预测与图像测量之间的差异，从而识别未知的关节力矩。该框架经实验（空气轴承平台）验证。
AI.result: 经实验，利用图像数据估计的手腕关节力矩与传感器测量值的平均绝对误差为0.46 Nm；模型预测的角速度与图像测量结果的平均绝对误差为0.006 rad/s，显示出较高准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了光学测量与机械建模结合，可实现无接触动力学估计，为难以直接测力/力矩的应用场合提供了有效新途径。

title: CapRL++: Unified Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Dense Image and Video Captioning
comment: 26 pages, 10 figures. Project page: https://github.com/InternLM/CapRL. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2509.22647
summary: Image and video captioning are fundamental tasks that bridge the visual and linguistic domains, playing a critical role in pre-training Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). Current state-of-the-art captioning models are typically trained with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), a paradigm that relies on expensive, non-scalable annotations and often causes models to memorize specific ground-truth answers, limiting their generality and ability to generate diverse, creative descriptions. To overcome these limitations, we propose applying Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to the open-ended task of multimodal captioning. We introduce Captioning Reinforcement Learning++ (CapRL++), a novel reference-free training framework that redefines caption quality through its utility: a high-quality caption should enable a non-visual language model to accurately answer questions about the corresponding visual content. CapRL++ employs a decoupled two-stage pipeline where an LVLM generates a caption, and the objective reward is derived from the accuracy of a separate, vision-free LLM answering Multiple-Choice Questions based solely on that caption. Evaluations on more than 20 image and video benchmarks show that CapRL++ improves dense caption quality and strengthens caption-based pretraining across tasks such as spatial and temporal understanding. Pretraining on scalable image and video caption datasets annotated by CapRL++ yields substantial downstream gains. Furthermore, within the Prism Framework for caption quality evaluation, compact models trained with CapRL++ achieve dense captioning performance comparable to substantially larger models such as Qwen2.5-VL-72B and Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B. These results validate that CapRL++ effectively trains models to produce generalizable, high-fidelity descriptions, establishing a robust foundation beyond the limitations of traditional SFT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新颖的无参考强化学习训练框架 CapRL++，用于提升多模态图像和视频描述任务的泛化能力和多样性，打破传统有监督微调(SFT)的局限。
AI.motivation: 传统图像与视频描述方法依赖于昂贵且不易扩展的人工标注，通过有监督微调训练，导致模型容易记忆标准答案，泛化能力和创意描述有限。为了解决注释高成本和提升模型生成能力，作者提出用可验证奖励的强化学习替代SFT。
AI.method: CapRL++采用两阶段流程：第一步，LVLM生成描述；第二步，根据一个“无视觉”的语言模型能否仅凭该描述，准确回答视觉内容相关的选择题，来判断和赋予奖励。这种无参考的奖励设计突破对标准答案的依赖，并基于实际任务效用重新定义描述质量。
AI.result: 在20多个图像和视频基准上，CapRL++不仅提升了描述的丰富性和质量，还增强了描述驱动的下游任务表现。在Prism评价框架下，CapRL++训练的小模型在密集描述任务中可与大模型（如Qwen2.5-VL-72B、Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B）媲美。证明了方法的高效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: CapRL++有效提升了多模态描述模型的泛化能力及高质量描述产出，为打破传统SFT带来的限制提供了坚实基础，在视觉与语言任务中展现出极大潜力。

title: vesselFM-CT: Segmenting All Blood Vessels in CT Images for System-Level Cardiovascular Analysis
summary: The vascular network in the human body is characterized by blood vessels exhibiting drastic structural variations in radius, length, topological properties, and branching patterns. This heterogeneity, together with location-specific anatomical background variations, poses a significant challenge for robust, large-scale analysis of the entire cardiovascular system. As a result, most research has focused on narrow, isolated segments of the vascular network. While such targeted studies provide valuable insights, they inherently limit the ability to assess the systemic health and functional integrity of the vascular network as a whole. In this work, we aim to bridge this gap to advance both clinical diagnostics and our fundamental understanding of vascular physiology. We propose the task of segmenting all vessels in CT images, ranging from the largest components of the cardiovascular system to even minuscule mesenteric vessels. To this end, we introduce vesselFM-CT, the first model capable of robustly segmenting all blood vessels in 3D CT images. VesselFM-CT is trained via an iterative, multi-step process and optimizes our proposed TubeLoss loss function, effectively addressing the inherent heterogeneity of the cardiovascular system. We demonstrate that vesselFM-CT outperforms all baselines and enables automated, precise extraction of the cardiovascular system from CT images, thereby unlocking a wide range of clinical and technical perspectives, including automated disease classification and synthetic CT image generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出vesselFM-CT模型，可以在CT图像中鲁棒地分割所有血管，无论其尺寸和分布，实现了对整个人体血管网络的自动化精确提取。
AI.motivation: 血管网络的复杂异质性（如管径、长度、拓扑以及分支等多样性）导致现有研究只关注局部血管，无法系统性分析全身血管网络的健康状况。
AI.method: 作者提出任务：在CT图像中分割所有血管。为此，开发了vesselFM-CT模型，通过迭代的多阶段训练过程，并设计了TubeLoss损失函数，解决了血管网络的异质性难题。
AI.result: vesselFM-CT在血管分割任务上优于所有基线方法，能够自动精确地从CT图像中提取全部血管。
AI.conclusion: 该方法对临床诊断和血管生理学理解提供支持，并可拓展至疾病自动分类、合成CT图像生成等多个应用领域。

title: Leveraging Morphology for Historical Script Metrological Analysis
summary:
Advances in handwritten text recognition have enabled large-scale transcription of historical documents, but still provide limited access to interpretable visual measurements for paleography, the study of historical scripts. In this paper, our main insight is that morphological script analysis, in particular the capacity to learn character prototypes from line-level transcriptions, enables the definition of scalable, meaningful, and stable paleographic measurements. More precisely, we leverage a transformer-based detection architecture together with a prototype-based line reconstruction module to learn prototypical characters and their occurrence, deformation, and positioning.
  Our contributions are twofold. First, we introduce a deep architecture and learning methodology that enables efficient character modeling with only line-level transcription supervision, significantly improving over the Learnable Typewriter baseline and enabling accurate character bounding box prediction, unlocking its potential for paleographic measurements. Second, we introduce and demonstrate the paleographical relevance of automatic measurements enabled by our architecture for characters, bi-grams, and spaces between graphical units. For this demonstration, we extend the annotations of the codex Paris, BnF, fr. 2813, commissioned in the late fourteenth century by Charles V and copied by four hands, to 160 pages. We visualize our measurements over these pages, showing how they enable us not only to differentiate graphical profiles, but also to discover and analyze subtle variations. This case study outlines the scalability of our approach and its frugality in terms of required training data, since a single column of text is sufficient to compute our measurements on each of the 160 pages.
  Data and code are publicly available at: https://malamatenia.github.io/morphology4metrology-analysis.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于transformer的检测架构和原型重建模块，用于实现历史手稿字符的可解释视觉测量，不仅提升了字符检测精度，还能自动进行细致的书写特征分析。
AI.motivation: 虽然手写文本识别技术取得了很大进展，但对于古文字学需要的可解释视觉测量能力仍然不足。研究人员需要一种能大规模、可靠地量化和分析历史文稿中字符形态及其变化的方法。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种新颖的深度学习架构——结合了transformer检测器和基于原型的行重建方法，仅利用行级转录数据，学习并检测手稿中的字符原型，自动获得字符、双字母组合和图形间距的相关指标。此外，通过扩展和标注一个十四世纪抄本的数据集来验证方法的效果。
AI.result: 新方法比Learnable Typewriter基线模型表现更优，尤其是在仅用线级标注下准确预测字符边界框，并支持细致的古文字学分析。还可自动测量并区分不同书写者或微小风格变化。扩展后的案例研究展示了方法在数据量极为有限情况下的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅提升了手稿字符检测和分析的准确性，还为古文字学领域提供了全新的自动化量化工具，具有良好的通用性和低数据需求，对历史文献分析有重要意义。

title: GD-MIL: Grade-Disentangled Multiple Instance Learning for Multimodal Biochemical Recurrence Prediction in Prostate Cancer
summary: Biochemical recurrence (BCR) after radical prostatectomy is a critical endpoint in prostate cancer, yet risk stratification relies almost entirely on variables dominated by Gleason grade. Whether H&E whole slide images (WSIs) carry prognostic signal beyond grade, and whether multiple instance learning (MIL) can recover it, remains unsettled. A key obstacle is that many pipelines select model checkpoints on the evaluation fold, artificially inflating concordance. We construct a rigorous benchmark on TCGA-PRAD (487 patients, 101 BCR events) using strict out-of-fold scoring over five-fold cross-validation repeated across five seeds. The choice of MIL aggregator (ABMIL, CLAM, TransMIL, PatchGCN) has little effect (C-index 0.61-0.64 with UNI2-h), while the feature extractor is the dominant factor (ResNet50 0.566 versus pathology foundation models up to 0.639). A clinical Cox model on grade, stage, and age reaches 0.687; no imaging-only model significantly outperforms it (p > 0.10). We introduce Grade-Disentangled MIL (GD-MIL), a gated-attention MIL encoder trained with a gradient-reversal grade adversary that encourages the slide representation to be invariant to Gleason grade before late fusion with clinical variables. GD-MIL achieves C-index 0.704, significantly outperforming both the clinical baseline (delta-c = +0.029, p = 0.0005) and the best imaging-only model (delta-c = +0.062, p = 0.039), suggesting H&E morphology contains prognostic information complementary to grade. A median risk split yields log-rank p < 0.0001 separation in BCR-free survival (~20% vs ~70% at five years).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的Grade-Disentangled MIL（GD-MIL）方法，并在前列腺癌根治术后的生化复发（BCR）预测中超过了仅基于临床特征的模型，发现H&E切片中蕴含了除Gleason分级外的额外预后信息。
AI.motivation: 尽管前列腺癌BCR风险分层高度依赖Gleason分级，但是否可以利用H&E切片（WSI）获得超越分级的信息还未明确，而多实例学习（MIL）能否捕获这些预后信号也是未知数。
AI.method: 作者基于TCGA-PRAD数据集，设计了严格的五折交叉验证和评分流程，对比了不同MIL聚合器和特征提取器的影响，提出了Grade-Disentangled MIL（GD-MIL），通过引入分级对抗训练使切片表征脱敏分级信息，并与临床变量后期融合。
AI.result: MIL特征提取器影响大，聚合方法影响小。单用影像模型未超过临床模型，而GD-MIL融合模型C-index达0.704，显著高于临床基线（0.687）和最佳影像模型（0.639）。风险分层对BCR无复发生存的区分性极强（log-rank p<0.0001）。
AI.conclusion: H&E切片中含有可用于BCR预测的、独立于Gleason分级的形态学预后信息。GD-MIL方案能充分利用这一补充信息，提升实际风险分层能力。

title: Training-Free Generalized Few-Shot Segmentation through Open-Vocabulary Semantic Arbitration
summary: Generalized Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation (GFSS) has traditionally been approached as a representation-learning problem, requiring task-specific adaptation to incorporate novel classes from limited support examples. Recent foundation models, however, already exhibit strong open-vocabulary recognition and segmentation capabilities, raising a different question: can GFSS be solved through inference-time coordination of frozen semantic priors rather than parameter adaptation? We answer this question with Open-V, a training-free GFSS framework that combines Segment Anything (SAM3) Promptable Concept Segmentation (PCS) with a K-shot CLIP support centroid through calibrated per-pixel semantic arbitration. OpenV introduces no trainable components and supports arbitrary semantic categories at inference time. Beyond segmentation performance, our study contributes three broader findings. First, we show that support information can be incorporated through inference-time semantic grounding, and that its contribution increases as foundation-model text priors weaken on label-disjoint vocabularies. Second, we identify a reproducibility confound in foundationmodel segmentation, demonstrating that preprocessing and evaluation-space mismatches can silently distort reported performance. Finally, we validate Open-V across PASCAL5i, COCO-20i, and ADE-OW, showing that training-free coordination of foundation-model priors generalizes across both conventional GFSS and open-vocabulary evaluation settings. On PASCAL-5i (1-shot), Open-V attains base/novel/harmonic mIoU of 78.4/77.5/77.9, without GFSS-specific training surpassing the strongest trained baseline by +17.7 HM.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了Open-V，无需训练即可进行广义小样本语义分割，通过推理时协调基础模型的语义先验（如SAM3和CLIP）实现，表现优于现有训练方法。
AI.motivation: 传统GFSS方法依赖任务适应和模型训练以处理新类别，但基础模型已具备较强开放词汇能力。作者希望探讨能否仅用冻结模型推理实现GFSS，减少对训练和参数更新的依赖。
AI.method: 提出Open-V框架，结合了Segment Anything (SAM3) 的Promptable Concept Segmentation（PCS）和多次CLIP支持样本中心，通过每像素的语义裁定进行推理，无需额外训练或参数微调。
AI.result: Open-V无需GFSS专用训练，在PASCAL-5i 1-shot等多个数据集上达到了优异的分割性能（如base/novel/harmonic mIoU分别为78.4/77.5/77.9），超过了目前最强的训练基线17.7个百分点。此外，分析了支持信息、评估方法误差和基础模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Open-V证明了通过冻结基础模型和推理时语义协调就能实现优异GFSS性能，减少训练开销，对开放词汇语义分割具有良好通用性和实际应用潜力。

title: Efficient Minimal Solvers for Visual-Inertial Relative Pose Estimation in Multi-Camera Systems
summary: Estimating the relative poses of multi-camera systems is a fundamental problem in computer vision, with critical applications in autonomous vehicles, mobile devices, and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). However, existing solutions often suffer from high computational complexity or rely on an excessive number of point correspondences, limiting their real-world applicability. To address these limitations, we propose two efficient minimal solvers for estimating the relative poses of multi-camera systems using a novel parameterization. The first solver leverages the vertical direction prior provided by Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs), while the second utilizes the rotation axis direction prior from IMUs. Our methods require only four point correspondences and reduce the problem of multi-camera relative pose estimation to solving a univariate 6th-degree polynomial, a significant improvement over existing approaches, which typically involve 8th-degree polynomials. This reduction in computational complexity and correspondence requirements makes our solvers particularly effective when integrated into RANSAC frameworks, demonstrating strong potential for visual odometry applications. Through rigorous evaluations on synthetic data and the KITTI benchmark, our methods achieved superior computational efficiency and competitive accuracy compared to state-of-the-art algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种高效的多相机系统相对位姿估计算法，依赖IMU传感器提供的先验信息，降低了所需点对应数和计算复杂度，在视觉里程计等应用中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有多相机系统的相对位姿估计算法要么计算复杂度高，要么需要过多的点对应，难以应用于实际，如自动驾驶、无人机等领域。作者希望解决计算高效性和点对应数量的问题。
AI.method: 提出了两种最小解算器，一种依赖IMU给出的垂直方向，另一种依赖旋转轴方向，对多相机相对位姿问题进行新参数化。每种方法只需4个点对应，并将问题转化为6次单变量方程求解；而以往方法需解8次多项式且用点多。
AI.result: 在合成数据和KITTI基准测试上进行了严格评估，两种方法在计算效率显著提升，精度上也表现得与现有最优算法相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在减少点对应和计算量的基础上，实用性强，特别适合嵌入RANSAC和应用于视觉里程计等实际场景，具有很高的工程和研究价值。

title: Optical Music Recognition for Real-World Manuscripts with Synthetic Data
comment: Accepted for publication at the ICDAR 2026 conference
summary: Optical Music Recognition (OMR) has seen major progress in model design, with end-to-end methods now capable of recognising notation at all levels of complexity. However, the impact of this progress has been limited by the visual domains of available training datasets, which are largely born-digital. Existing large collections of sheet music in libraries and other heritage institutions contain predominantly manuscripts, whose visual domains are highly diverse and different, so existing OMR systems fail when applied in the real world. These institutions are often resource-constrained, so large in-domain datasets cannot be expected. We provide a first baseline on real-world manuscripts with complex piano notation in the resource-constrained scenario. Using fine-grained music notation graph (MuNG) annotations and the Smashcima synthesis tool, we then show that while some direct transcriptions of in-domain data remain essential, domain adaptation using synthetic musical manuscript images brings significant improvement. Furthermore, the symbols used do not need to be in-domain, so the expensive fine-grained annotation can be avoided. We thus bring OMR closer to one of its stated goals: preserving and promoting musical cultural heritage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了针对现实世界复杂手稿钢琴谱的光学音乐识别(OMR)基线，证明通过合成乐谱图像进行领域自适应能显著提升识别效果，无需大量手工精细标注。
AI.motivation: 现有OMR模型在数字化乐谱上的表现优异，但现实中的手稿乐谱视觉样式复杂多样，现有系统泛化性差，且文化机构缺乏大规模标注数据，限制了OMR在实际音乐遗产保护中的应用。
AI.method: 作者在受资源约束的场景下，基于真实复杂手稿钢琴谱建立首个基线系统，并利用精细音乐符号图(MuNG)标注和Smashcima合成工具，探索以合成手稿图像实现领域自适应，同时研究无需同域符号的可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明，适量的同域数据转录虽必需，但结合合成手稿图像的领域自适应，能极大提升OMR在现实手稿乐谱上的表现，且无须依赖高昂的细粒度标注。
AI.conclusion: 提出方法显著缓解了标注稀缺与领域不匹配问题，使OMR更接近保护和传播音乐文化遗产的目标。

title: ContextShift: A Controlled Benchmark for Context Dependence in Object Detection
summary: Modern object detectors achieve strong performance on standard benchmarks, yet their robustness to contextual variation remains insufficiently understood. Prior evaluations largely rely on aggregate metrics such as AP on uncontrolled distribution shifts, which can obscure how performance degrades under context change. We introduce ContextShift, a controlled benchmark that systematically manipulates object--context relationships while preserving object appearance. Built on COCO 2017, it isolates context as an independent variable through geometric transformations and synthetic and natural background substitutions, including a continuous compatibility axis based on normalized pointwise mutual information (NPMI). Across diverse detector architectures, we observe a consistent degradation pattern: false negatives increase by up to 227% and prediction volume decreases by up to 44%, while false positives remain stable or decline. This suppression behavior is not captured by aggregate metrics such as AP, which can mask substantial recall loss and changes in prediction dynamics. Further analysis suggests that degradation is driven less by reduced confidence than by a reduced formation of valid detection candidates. Moreover, performance along the statistical compatibility axis is non-monotonic, peaking at intermediate NPMI and degrading toward both extremes, indicating that statistical co-occurrence does not correlate linearly with effective visual context. Finally, we show that context-aware augmentation improves robustness: every augmented variant outperforms the dataset-only baseline on both original and manipulated test images, partially recovering performance lost to prediction-suppression failures by exposing models to object--context decoupling during training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContextShift基准，系统性地分析了目标检测器在不同上下文变化（背景、关系等）下的鲁棒性，揭示传统AP等指标无法全面反映模型的退化特征。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代目标检测器在常规模型测试集上表现优异，但其对上下文变化的鲁棒性尚未被充分理解，现有评测方法掩盖了上下文变化导致的性能下降细节。
AI.method: 提出了ContextShift基准，通过几何变换和合成/自然背景替换，系统性操纵COCO2017中的目标-上下文关系，并引入NPMI兼容性轴，实现对上下文变量的独立控制。对多种主流检测架构在该基准下进行全面评测和分析。
AI.result: 多种检测器在上下文变化下表现出一致的退化趋势：假阴性数量最多可增长227%，预测数量下降最高44%，而假阳性保持稳定或下降。AP等指标无法发现这些现象。进一步分析发现，退化主要源于有效检测目标产生减少，而非置信度降低。NPMI兼容性轴上，模型性能呈非单调变化，在中等兼容性下表现最好，而在两极时退化。上下文增强训练可以显著提升模型鲁棒性，对原始和变换测试集都有效。
AI.conclusion: 主流目标检测器对上下文变化高度敏感，现有聚合指标无法揭示其中的退化原因。通过ContextShift分析表明，提升鲁棒性的关键在于训练中引入上下文去耦合机制。

title: Prisma-World: Camera-Controllable Multi-Agent Video World Model
summary: Video world models have made rapid progress in generating controllable visual experiences, but most of them still simulate the world from a single observer. Extending such models to multiple agents raises a central challenge: if each agent's future state is generated independently, overlapping views may instantiate different versions of the same scene, leading to inconsistent objects, layouts, and appearances across agents. Conventional camera conditioning controls individual trajectories, but it does not explicitly couple the generation of views that should agree under shared scene geometry. We introduce Prisma-World, a camera-controllable multi-agent world model that formulates multi-agent generation as a joint geometry-aware denoising process for cross-view consistency. Prisma-World processes all agent videos within one full-attention sequence, uses a multi-agent RoPE design to distinguish agent identities while preserving synchronized temporal coordinates, and injects relative camera geometry into attention to bias overlapping viewpoints toward shared scene evidence. To further strengthen multi-view consistency and enhance global spatial perception, we augment our framework with an overlap-decaying curriculum training paradigm alongside minimap-conditioned structural guidance. To facilitate the training and evaluation of multi-agent models, we introduce PrismaDataset, a large-scale UE5 dataset with panoramic acquisition across diverse scenes, composable multi-agent view groups with flexible agent counts and complex camera trajectories, and precise camera/action annotations for consistency training and evaluation. Experiments show that a single Prisma-World model can generate high-fidelity multi-agent videos with flexible agent numbers, camera controllability, improved cross-view consistency, and spatial grounding under minimap guidance.

AI.tldr: Prisma-World提出了一种具备多智能体控制和视角一致性的视频世界模型，能高质量生成多智能体可控视频，并推出了配套大规模数据集PrismaDataset。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频世界模型大多只关注单一观察者，扩展到多智能体时，多个视角可能导致场景不一致问题（如同一对象在不同视角表现不同）。现有方法无法保障多视角下的一致性。
AI.method: 提出Prisma-World模型，将多智能体联合生成建模为几何感知去噪过程，通过全局注意力机制、改进的多智能体RoPE编码、相机几何注入等，强化跨视角一致性。此外，提出overlap-decaying课程训练和minimap结构指导，并发布PrismaDataset数据集支持训练评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，Prisma-World单模型可生成高保真、多智能体、具备灵活控制和良好跨视角一致性的视频，且在minimap引导下空间对齐表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Prisma-World为多智能体视频世界模型提供了有效方案，显著提升了多视角一致性、相机可控性和空间理解，推动了多智能体世界建模发展。

title: Securing Self-supervised Data Curation for Foundation Models Robustness
summary: Self-supervised data curation provides a pathway to scaling and improving the generalization capabilities of machine learning models. By leveraging self-supervised learning (SSL) for data curation, the demand for massive training datasets required by foundation models can be effectively met. SSL greatly alleviates the costs associated with annotation and manual dataset curation while minimizing the need for human oversight. However, the integrity of SSL-curated datasets must be rigorously checked, as reliance on anonymous and unvetted external sources can substantially increase the risk of data poisoning. In this paper, we propose a Poisoned Data Detector (PDD), an active defense mechanism designed to ensure the integrity of SSL-curated datasets prior to foundation model training. PDDs are designed using a combination of the pretrained ImageBind model and traditional classifiers, including Random Forest (RF), k-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Naive Bayes (NB), and Support Vector Machines (SVM). We rigorously evaluated PDDs using 176,200 images from three diverse datasets and three different adversarial attacks encompassing both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios. Notably, SVM-PDD achieves superior performance for both in-distribution (Set3-Set5) and out-of-distribution (TrueFace and 140K RealFace) datasets. Our design demonstrates strong scalability and enables the rapid integration of new adversarial attack detectors through an ensemble approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自监督学习（SSL）数据集毒化检测机制（PDD），提升基础模型训练数据的安全性和高效性。实验显示该方法在不同数据集和对抗场景下表现优异，尤其是SVM-PDD模型。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习的数据集可显著降低人工标注和数据整理成本，并拓展训练数据规模。然而，广泛使用未审核外部数据易引入恶意毒化样本，严重威胁下游模型安全，亟需高效的数据集完整性检查方法。
AI.method: 提出一种名为Poisoned Data Detector（PDD）的主动防御机制，结合预训练的ImageBind模型特征和传统机器学习分类器（如RF、KNN、NB、SVM），用于检测SSL整理数据中的毒化样本。方法在多个大规模公开数据集和多种对抗攻击场景下进行系统评测。
AI.result: 在176,200张图片、三组数据集、三类常见对抗攻击下评测PDD，结果表明SVM-PDD在分布内（Set3-Set5）和分布外（TrueFace、140K RealFace）均达到领先性能。此外，PDD结构支持多判别器灵活集成，具有良好扩展性。
AI.conclusion: PDD为自监督数据整理带来有效的毒化样本检测手段，显著提升大模型数据训练的完整性与安全性，具备可扩展与快速适配新攻击检测的能力。

title: SwiftVR: Real-Time One-Step Generative Video Restoration
summary: Real-time video restoration (VR) for live streams requires high-resolution outputs under strict per-frame latency constraints. Existing one-step diffusion-based VR models remain difficult to deploy on consumer-grade GPUs due to two main bottlenecks: quadratic spatial attention at high resolutions and the latency-memory overhead of large video autoencoders. We present SwiftVR, a streaming one-step generative VR framework that reduces both bottlenecks under a causal chunk-wise protocol. For attention, mask-free shifted-window self-attention gathers each spatial window into a dense tensor via deterministic indexing, keeping all attention calls on the dense scaled dot-product attention path without masks, cyclic shifts, padding, or hardware-specific sparse kernels. Because SwiftVR uses only standard dense SDPA calls, the trained model transfers to consumer GPUs without retraining or custom kernels. For autoencoding, a lightweight Restoration-aware Autoencoder enables fast chunk-wise decoding while preserving reconstruction quality. On a single H100, SwiftVR sustains 31~FPS at 2560x1440 and 14~FPS at 3840x2160, whereas all compared diffusion-based VR baselines exceed the memory limit at 4K. On a consumer RTX~5090, SwiftVR reaches 26~FPS at 1920x1080. To our knowledge, SwiftVR is the first generative VR model to achieve real-time 1080p streaming on a consumer-grade GPU, while attaining strong no-reference perceptual quality with lower inference cost. Project is available at https://h-oliday.github.io/SwiftVR.

AI.tldr: SwiftVR是一种新的实时视频修复方法，能够在消费级GPU上以高分辨率和低延迟实现高质量的视频修复，突破了以往扩散模型的部署瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有一步扩散视频修复模型在高分辨率下，空间注意力机制和大型自动编码器带来的计算和内存瓶颈，使其难以在消费级GPU上实现高效部署，限制了实时应用的发展。
AI.method: 提出了SwiftVR，一种基于因果块状处理协议的流式一步生成视频修复框架。1）采用无需掩码的shifted-window自注意力机制，通过确定性索引聚合每个空间窗口，全部操作基于标准稠密SDPA，无需特殊硬件或稀疏核；2）设计了轻量级Restoration-aware自动编码器，实现分块快速解码且保持高重建质量。
AI.result: 在单块H100上，SwiftVR可在2560x1440分辨率下实现31 FPS，在3840x2160下为14 FPS。而同类扩散视频修复方法在4K分辨率下超出显存限制。消费级RTX 5090上，1080p下可达26 FPS，且感知质量强、推理成本低。
AI.conclusion: SwiftVR是首个能在消费级GPU上实现1080p实时流式生成的视频修复模型，为高分辨率、低延迟的实时视频修复应用带来了重要突破。

title: Adversarial Attack and Disturbance Detection by Hadamard-Coded Output Representations for Object Detection and Semantic Segmentation
summary: Conventional one-hot encodings often yield poorly calibrated models, being overconfident under attack, and letting entropy-based detection algorithms fail. Previous image classification works have demonstrated that Hadamard-coded output representations can improve adversarial robustness. However, attempts to integrate Hadamard codes into semantic segmentation fall far behind state-of-the-art models in mean intersection-over-union performance. Regarding object detection, such output encodings have not yet been investigated at all. Further, no prior art addressed intrinsic codeword inconsistencies or actually exploited intrinsic codeword redundancy. Accordingly, we first derive a novel decoding procedure for Hadamard codewords towards optimal class-wise probabilities, solving the underlying optimization problem by using the projection onto the probability simplex. Second, our optimization delivers a measure of prediction inconsistency. Third, we are the first to show how to exploit these inconsistencies for adversarial attack and disturbance detection. Fourth, we introduce HadamardNet, a framework employing Hadamard codes as output representations for semantic segmentation and object detection models and tasks. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation both on disturbances and adversarial attacks, achieving state-of-the-art perturbation detection performance for both tasks in only a single detection pass, while delivering equivalent or close-by reference performance on clean data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用Hadamard码作为输出表征，通过特殊的解码策略显著提高了语义分割和目标检测中的扰动与对抗攻击检测能力，同时保持了正常情况下的高精度。
AI.motivation: 常规的one-hot编码容易导致模型置信度过高，对抗攻击下失真，影响基于熵的方法进行异常检测。之前研究表明Hadamard编码对图像分类提升鲁棒性，但在语义分割和目标检测任务中应用不足，且相关的解码方法与码字一致性和冗余问题未得到有效研究。
AI.method:
1. 推导了一种新的Hadamard码字的解码过程，将其转化为概率简单形上的投影优化问题。
2. 通过优化过程引出预测一致性的度量方法。
3. 创新性地利用预测不一致性进行对抗攻击和干扰检测。
4. 提出HadamardNet框架，将Hadamard编码应用于语义分割和目标检测任务，对模型进行端到端评测。
AI.result: 在干扰检测和对抗攻击检测的任务中实现了最先进的检测性能，仅需单步检测流程，同时在干净数据上的分割与检测性能与主流模型相当或非常接近。
AI.conclusion: Hadamard编码结合新解码与一致性利用方法能大幅提升分割和检测模型对异常干扰的鲁棒性，并能保持正常条件下的性能，是语义分割和目标检测领域的一种有效新方法。

title: A VideoMAE-v2 Approach to Zero-Shot Traffic Accident Anticipation
summary: Traffic accident anticipation -- predicting the likelihood of an imminent collision at every frame of a dashcam video -- is safety-critical yet difficult to scale, because collecting in-domain annotated accident footage for every deployment scenario is prohibitively expensive. We study this task under a zero-shot setting where no target-domain training data is available: the model must learn exclusively from a publicly available binary-labelled driving-accident dataset and generalise to unseen dashcam footage. We propose a framework that bridges the gap between the frame-level temporal risk estimation task and coarsely labelled binary accident datasets by coupling a VideoMAE-v2 backbone with a per-frame prediction head under a sliding-window protocol. Our method achieves 2nd place in the 2026 CVPR@AUTOPILOT Zero-Shot Accident Anticipation competition. Code is available at https://github.com/TimeSouth/zero-shot-taa-solution.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种能够在零样本情况下进行交通事故预测的方法，无需目标域训练数据，直接利用公开的二元标注交通事故数据，实现了有竞争力的效果。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶领域对于交通事故预测的需求极高，但实际获取丰富的目标场景交通事故数据成本昂贵，难以扩展，因此迫切需要能跨域泛化的方法。
AI.method: 作者提出利用VideoMAE-v2作为视频特征提取主干网络，在统一滑动窗口协议下，通过帧级预测头将粗粒度的二元事故标签转化为细粒度的逐帧风险估计，实现端到端的交通事故预测。
AI.result: 在2026 CVPR@AUTOPILOT的Zero-Shot Accident Anticipation竞赛中，本文方法获得了第二名，表明在无目标域数据的前提下依然能取得高度的泛化效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架有效地解决了零样本事故预测中的标签粒度不匹配问题，为交通事故预测在实际部署和跨域应用中提供了新的技术途径。

title: Streaming Interventions: Can Video Large Language Models Correct Mistakes as They Occur?
comment: Qualcomm Interactive Cooking: Ego-MC-Bench -- available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/neuripsedtracksub/ego-mistake-corrections and Ego-CoMist -- available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/neuripsedtracksub/ego-counterfactual-mistakes
summary: Learning everyday skills, like cooking a dish, relies increasingly on instructional media such as online videos. This opens the door to the use of video (and multimodal) large language models (LLMs) as task guidance assistants. A crucial capability for the real-world success of a prospective task guidance assistant is it's ability to intervene proactively as soon as a mistake is apparent in order to guide the user. To evaluate this crucial capability, we introduce Ego-MC-Bench (Mistake Corrections), a benchmark for evaluating reactive, step-by-step task guidance in realistic cooking scenarios. Extensive experiments show that Ego-MC-Bench is highly challenging for state-of-the-art video LLMs. We argue that a key reason is the limited availability of training data for fine-tuning models on this task. Although there exists a wide range of cooking video datasets, existing datasets lack examples of mistakes along with appropriately timed interventions. To help address this data limitation, we also introduce Ego-CoMist, a counterfactual synthetic dataset created by transforming non -interactive cooking videos into supervised training examples showing proactive interventions. We show that fine-tuning on Ego-CoMist yields performance gains especially for smaller and more efficient video LLMs that are well suited for delivering assistance on edge devices.

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦于以视频为核心的多模态大模型在实际任务指导中的反应式干预能力，提出了新标准和数据集以提升模型在厨房场景中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有任务指导助手（如用视频指导做饭）缺乏主动、及时纠正用户错误的能力，主要因相关训练数据稀缺。作者希望推动模型实现更智能的交互式任务辅助。
AI.method: 1) 提出Ego-MC-Bench基准，专注测试AI在烹饪场景下发现并纠正错误的能力；2) 构建Ego-CoMist合成数据集，通过改造原有烹饪视频生成包含错误及时干预的训练样本；3) 对多模态大模型在此基准上进行广泛实验和微调。
AI.result: 实验表明：Ego-MC-Bench对当前主流视频大语言模型是极具挑战的任务，但在Ego-CoMist上微调后，尤其是高效小模型的表现有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 及时纠错对任务指导AI至关重要。缺乏具备错误及干预数据，是现有视频LLM性能瓶颈。作者的方法和数据集推动了模型向实际应用迈进。

title: TUDSR: Twice Upsampling-Diffusion for Higher Super-Resolution
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have achieved remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR). With tiled diffusion techniques, these models can produce high-resolution images that exceed their native-supported resolution. However, the quality of such high-resolution (e.g $2048^2$) outputs often remains extremely poor, primarily due to two factors we consider: the image upsampling ratio (e.g $\times8$) exceeding the model's native-supported upsampling ratio (e.g $\times4$), and the model's native-supported resolution. In practice, training a native high-resolution model requires larger architectures, which incur significant computational overhead and GPU memory costs, making it hard on limited-resource equipment. Thus, we present TUDSR, a Twice Upsampling-Diffusion framework for higher SR. The TUDSR framework mainly consists of two stages: the first involves training at $R$-resolution, and the second introduces a looped chunk-based training strategy at $NR$-resolution. Each stage adapts a one-step GAN architecture comprising a generator and a discriminator. Based on SD2.1-base, we develop TUDSR-S, which achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that TUDSR-S generates high-quality images at the resolutions of $1024^2$ and even $2048^2$, significantly outperforming existing approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/wuer5/TUDSR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TUDSR框架，通过两阶段训练和块状增量方法，实现了超大分辨率图像的高质量超分辨率重建，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在高分辨率（如2048^2）的图像超分辨率任务上表现较差，主要原因在于超分辨率倍率过高和模型本身的分辨率上限，训练高分辨率模型则需要巨大的计算资源。作者为了解决高分辨率超分的质量和资源问题，提出了创新性框架。
AI.method: TUDSR分为两阶段：第一阶段在基础分辨率（R分辨率）下训练，第二阶段引入循环分块训练方法，在更高分辨率（NR分辨率）下进一步训练。两个阶段都采用基于SD2.1-base的一步式GAN架构（含生成器与判别器）。
AI.result: 在多项基准测试中，TUDSR-S在1024^2和2048^2分辨率下超分重建的图像质量均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: TUDSR框架既提升了高分辨率超分辨率图像的质量，又兼顾了有限计算资源环境下的可训练性，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: ATN3D: Density-Aware LiDAR-Radar Early 3D Object Detection Under Extreme Sparsity
summary: 3D object detection is the backbone of perception for automated vehicles (AV) and broader intelligent transportation systems applications. Long-range detection is challenging because sensing evidence is sparse; yet this ``long-range'' scenario is routine in traffic. Although >30m is often labeled long-range in computer vision, on roadways it affords only approx. 1-2s for perception and decision-making. Under such extreme sparsity, two core challenges arise. First, early multimodal fusion tends to discard sparsity information and inject noise from empty or falsely occupied cells, degrading long-range recall. Second, context-agnostic uniform channel supervision favors dense and near-range samples, leaving far and small objects under-optimized, delaying the earliest detection of distant objects. We propose ``Ask The Neighbor'' (ATN3D), a LiDAR-Radar framework tailored for sparse-range conditions. ATN3D introduces (i) Density-aware early fusion with cross-modal gating that conditions fusion on per-voxel density/sparsity and Radar evidence, (ii) Occupancy-gated neighborhood aggregation with circular kernels to aggregate only from credible cells, (iii) Evidence-conditioned channel self-attention to adapt channel weights with weather/range, and (iv) a Range-aware loss that re-balances classification and localization by distance, aligning training with distance-stratified evaluation. On the VoD benchmark across clear and foggy conditions, ATN3D surpasses strong baselines: +3.55% mAP in clear weather and +8.41% mAP under simulated heavy fog; for >30m objects, gains are +3.33% (clear) and +2.09% (heavy fog). These results indicate earlier and more reliable long-range detections under sparse sensing in on-road traffic.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为ATN3D的框架，通过改进LiDAR与Radar的早期融合机制，有效提升在稀疏、远距离感知条件下的3D目标检测性能，特别适用于自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 远距离目标检测对自动驾驶车辆至关重要，但由于感知数据极为稀疏，现有方法在长距离目标检测上的召回率较低，且易受到噪声影响。现有监督方式也使远距小目标训练效果不佳，极大限制了实际应用效率。因此，亟需面向稀疏和远距离场景的更优融合与检测方法。
AI.method: 提出ATN3D框架，包含四项创新：(1)密度感知的早期融合，依据体素稀疏性和Radar信号，自适应地进行多模态数据融合；(2)基于占有状态的邻域聚合，用环形核函数只聚合可信体素信息；(3)带证据的通道自注意力机制，根据气象/距离动态调整通道权重；(4)距离感知损失，对不同距离的目标进行再平衡训练。
AI.result: 在VoD公开基准测试集（晴天与浓雾两种情况）上，ATN3D分别相比强基线方法提升3.55%（晴天）和8.41%（浓雾）的mAP分数，针对距离大于30米的目标也有明显提升（晴天+3.33%，浓雾+2.09%）。
AI.conclusion: ATN3D框架在极端稀疏和远距离交通感知条件下，能显著更早、更可靠地检测目标，提升自动驾驶与智能交通系统远距感知性能。

title: CineDance: Towards Next-Generation Multi-Shot Long-Form Cinematic Audio-Video Generation
summary: The fidelity and structural diversity of training datasets fundamentally determine the capabilities of video generation models. While commercial systems showremarkableabilitytogeneratecinematicnarratives, the progress of open-source models remains limited by the scarcity of high-quality training data. To bridge this gap, we introduce CineDance-1M, a large-scale, open research Text-to-Audio-Video (T2AV) dataset designed specifically for multi-shot, long-form joint audio-video generation. Averaging 92.8 seconds and 24.2 continuous shots per video, it provides configurable, structured annotations for both audio and video modalities. This exceptional quality is achieved through a rigorous three-stage curation pipeline: i) diverse sourcing and comprehensive cleansing, ii) film-theory-inspired narrative parsing, and iii) hierarchical dual-modal captioning. For a comprehensive assessment, we propose CineBench, featuring a diverse prompt suite and a six-dimensional, human-aligned metric system tailored for complex narrative audio-video evaluation. Furthermore, we adapt LTX-2.3 into CineDance, which demonstrates exceptional single-modality quality alongside precise audio-video alignment and robust subject and environment consistency, effectively validating our curation strategy and the high quality of CineDance-1M. We anticipate that this work will serve as a solid foundation for accelerating future research in multi-shot, long-form joint audio-video generation. Our project page is available at https://aliothchen.github.io/projects/CineDance/.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了CineDance-1M，这是一个大规模、开放式的多镜头长视频文本-音频-视频（T2AV）数据集，用于推进开放源代码视频生成模型的发展。
AI.motivation: 当前开源视频生成模型受限于高质量训练数据的稀缺，无法与商业系统匹敌。该论文旨在通过构建高质量、多样化、结构性强的大规模数据集，加速音视频联合生成领域的研究进展。
AI.method: 构建流程包括三步：1）多样化数据源采集与全面清洗；2）借鉴电影理论进行叙事结构分析；3）分层次对音频与视频进行详细标注。此外，提出了CineBench评价体系，针对复杂叙事音视频生成，设计了六维人类主观一致性评分。
AI.result: CineDance-1M平均每段视频92.8秒、24.2个连续镜头，拥有可配置的结构化标注。基于该数据集改造LTX-2.3（变成CineDance模型），在单模态和音视频配合上均展现了优异性能，验证了数据集和流程的高质量。
AI.conclusion: CineDance-1M为多镜头长视频的音视频联合生成提供了高质量开源基础数据，有望极大促进该领域后续的发展和创新。

title: MAVIS: Multi-Agent Video Retrieval via Structured Video Understanding
summary: The dominant paradigm in video retrieval relies on embedding-based full-corpus scanning, which suffers from inherent computational inefficiency and the semantic asymmetry between information-dense videos and sparse textual queries. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{MAVIS}, a novel multi-agent framework that rethinks retrieval as cooperative reasoning rather than brute-force search. MAVIS first bridges the granularity mismatch by parsing raw videos into a \textbf{Structured Semantic Library}, enabling explicit attribute-level indexing. During retrieval, a planner decomposes complex user intents into atomic sub-tasks, dispatching specialized agents to independently nominate candidates. Crucially, MAVIS employs a \textbf{Logic-aware Debate} mechanism with a strict veto protocol, where agents collaboratively prune logical mismatches to identify a compact set of ``controversial'' candidates for fine-grained verification. This agentic workflow effectively bypasses the inefficiency of full-library traversal. Extensive experiments on MSR-VTT, MSVD, and ActivityNet demonstrate that MAVIS achieves competitive performance without task-specific fine-tuning, offering a scalable and interpretable alternative to traditional dual-encoder approaches.

AI.tldr: MAVIS是一种新的视频检索多智能体框架，相较传统方法更高效且可解释。
AI.motivation: 传统视频检索依赖于全库嵌入扫描，既计算效率低，又存在视频信息丰富与文本查询稀疏的语义错配问题。作者希望提出一种能提升效率和语义匹配的新方案。
AI.method: MAVIS用多智能体协作方式进行视频检索：先将原始视频解析为结构化语义库，实现显式属性索引；检索时，规划器将复杂意图分解为原子子任务，由专门代理独立推荐候选项；通过具有严格否决规则的逻辑辩论机制，智能体协作筛除逻辑不匹配，最终只保留需精细验证的小候选集，有效减少了全库遍历。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD和ActivityNet等数据集上，MAVIS在无需专门微调的情况下取得了有竞争力的表现。
AI.conclusion: MAVIS无需针对性微调便表现优秀，是传统双编码器方法之外，一种可扩展、可解释的高效检索新框架。

title: Do Video Foundation Models Understand Intuitive Physics? A Layerwise Probing Analysis
summary: We study whether pretrained video foundation models encode intuitive-physics information in their frozen representations, and how this information varies across model families, layers, and probe types. Using frozen-feature probing on IntPhys2 and Minimal Video Pairs (MVP), we compare predictive joint-embedding models (V-JEPA), masked reconstruction models (VideoMAE), and a diffusion-based video generator (LTX-Video). V-JEPA achieves the strongest overall results across benchmarks, especially with probes that model temporal dynamics, while VideoMAE remains competitive and LTX-Video recovers weaker but non-trivial signal. Layerwise analyses show that physics-relevant information is weakest in early layers and becomes most accessible at intermediate-to-late depth, and temporal controls show that disrupting frame order substantially reduces performance, especially on MVP. Together, these results suggest that intuitive-physics knowledge emerges reliably in pretrained video representations, but its accessibility depends strongly on pretraining paradigm, representational depth, and readout mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练视频基础模型中是否编码了直观物理信息，并分析这种信息在不同模型、层次和读取方式下的变化。
AI.motivation: 视频基础模型是否能自动学到直观物理常识，是理解其认知能力和选择更优预训练范式的关键。
AI.method: 作者采用冻结特征探针（frozen-feature probing）的方法，针对IntPhys2与MVP数据集，比较了预测式联合嵌入模型（V-JEPA）、掩码重建模型（VideoMAE）和扩散式视频生成器（LTX-Video）在物理常识任务上的表现。分析包括不同层次、不同探针类型以及扰乱帧序的对比实验。
AI.result: V-JEPA模型在基准测试中表现最佳，尤其在考虑时序动态的探针下；VideoMAE有竞争力，而LTX-Video虽信号较弱但非无效。物理信息在早期层最弱，在中后层变得更易读取。打乱帧顺序显著降低模型性能，尤其在MVP数据集上。
AI.conclusion: 预训练视频模型中能自发涌现直观物理知识，但其可读取性高度依赖预训练范式、表示深度及读取机制。

title: Visual Prompting Meets Feature Reconstruction-Based Anomaly Detection with Dual-Teacher Supervision
summary: Recent Anomaly Detection methods achieve perfect detection and segmentation scores on well-established datasets, such as MVTec. However, many of these methods face challenges when foundational assumptions - such as consistent object scale, viewpoint, background, illumination, and centered placement - are violated. Those variations that occur render anomaly detection methods unusable in many real-world scenarios. To address these limitations, we introduce three key contributions: (1) a visual prompting pipeline that isolates objects using foreground-background masking; (2) a mechanism for unfreezing the teacher in student-teacher models to improve domain adaptability; and (3) a data augmentation strategy leveraging diffusion-generated synthetic images to enhance anomaly detection performance. We achieve a 3.5 percentage point improvement over the previous state-of-the-art on the challenging AeBAD dataset by using the Masked Multiscale Reconstruction (MMR) model as our backbone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新方法，通过视觉提示、解冻教师网络和基于扩散模型的数据增强来提升异常检测在实际场景下的适应性，并在AeBAD数据集上取得了新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有异常检测方法在受控数据集表现优异，但在真实环境中，由于尺度、视角、背景、光照等变化，性能大幅下降，急需提高其鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.method: 主要包括三项创新：(1) 视觉提示流程，利用前景-背景掩码分离目标对象；(2) 允许学生-教师模型中教师部分解冻，提高领域适应性；(3) 利用扩散模型生成的合成图像进行数据增强。以Masked Multiscale Reconstruction (MMR)为骨干网络。
AI.result: 在AeBAD这个更具挑战性的实际数据集上，新方法相比之前的SOTA提升了3.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效提升异常检测算法在多样复杂条件下的适应性和性能，证明其在实际应用中的潜力。

title: SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting:Retraining and Post-Processing Extensions to the FOOTPASS Baselines
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet Player Centric Ball Action Spotting Challenge, Rank 7
summary: We describe our system for the SoccerNet 2026 Player-Centric Ball-Action Spotting Challenge, which requires predicting who performs which action and when, across eight classes in broadcast soccer. Building on the three FOOTPASS baselines [1] (TAAD, TAAD+GNN, and TAAD+DST), we contribute four extensions: (1) gradient check pointing to enable full-backbone fine-tuning on a single GPU; (2) fusion of GNN logits into the DST encoder, combining graph-based tactical context with per-player visual features; (3) square-root frequency class weighting to address the 213:1 pass-to-tackle imbalance in the training data; and (4) a post processing pipeline comprising per-class logit gating, temporal frame refinement, jersey re-assignment, and a two-model ensemble. Our system achieves 0.548 Macro F1 on the test set and 0.446 on the challenge set (server evaluation).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套用于SoccerNet 2026以球员为中心的足球动作识别任务的系统，针对多类别判别目标，在原有基线基础上新增了四种改进方法，最终在测试集和挑战集上取得有竞争力的Macro F1得分。
AI.motivation: 目前足球中球员动作识别任务受困于类别极度不平衡、动作准确定位的挑战，以及单GPU有限的训练能力。该研究旨在解决这些问题，提高系统在实际比赛广播视频中的动作识别准确性。
AI.method: 在FOOTPASS三种基线方法(TAAD、TAAD+GNN、TAAD+DST)基础上，新增：（1）梯度检查点技术，实现全骨干网络的单GPU微调；（2）将图神经网络（GNN）输出与DST编码器结合，融合图结构上下文与球员视觉特征；（3）采用平方根频率类别加权，处理类别极度不平衡（传球与抢断比例为213:1）；（4）通过后处理流程，包括每类得分门控、时间帧细化、球衣号码重分配及两模型集成。
AI.result: 系统在测试集Macro F1=0.548，挑战赛集（官方评测）Macro F1=0.446，表现优于常规基线。
AI.conclusion: 引入上述四项改进后，模型有效提升了不同类别的动作识别与定时准确率，证明了融合图结构信息、类别平衡调整及多模型融合的有效性，在同类任务中达到领先水平。

title: GenEyePose: Patient-Free, Knowledge-Based Saccadic Eye Movement Modeling for Digital Neurophysiologic Biomarker Development
summary: Eye movements, including saccades, are widely regarded as highly sensitive and objective biomarkers of neurophysiologic states. Detecting saccadic signatures in neurologic diseases offers a rapid, portable alternative to brain imaging, avoiding access and cost barriers. Currently, there are no robust AI-enabled video-oculographic solutions (e.g., digital biomarkers) for screening, triaging, or localizing brain abnormalities due to privacy issues and scarce datasets. In this work, we propose the first fully synthetic, patient-free, multimodal eye movement generation pipeline for generalizable saccade analysis. Using this synthetic dataset, we trained a deep learning classifier to distinguish between normal and abnormal (hypometria and hypermetria) saccadic accuracies and evaluated its performance on real-world clinical data. The model achieved an AUROC of 0.76 and a sensitivity of 0.71, showing that the synthetic data has strong potential to generalize for clinical applications, including as a screening tool in at-home and emergency room settings or a tool for precise neuroanatomic localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全合成、无需真实患者数据的多模态眼动生成流程，并基于此训练深度学习模型识别正常与异常眼动，验证了其在真实数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 目前基于眼动学的神经疾病筛查检测由于隐私和数据稀缺问题，缺乏成熟的AI数字生物标志物解决方案。解决这一难题可大幅降低成本、提升可及性。
AI.method: 研发了一个全新的、仅基于合成数据的多模态眼动生成流程，并利用这些数据训练了深度学习分类器对正常及异常（低幅性、高幅性）眼动进行区分。最后用真实临床数据检验其表现。
AI.result: 模型在真实临床数据上达到AUROC 0.76、灵敏度0.71。结果表明，完全基于合成数据训练的模型在真实应用中具备较好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无患者隐私顾虑下快速、大规模神经功能筛查、定位提供了新工具，适用于家庭和急诊等场景，具有临床推广潜力。

title: Cranio-Diff: Diffusion-based Cross-domain Craniofacial Reconstruction with 2D X-ray Skull Guidance and Structural Identity Constraints
summary: The state-of-the-art generative models, such as CycleGAN, Pix2Pix, and diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable performance in the face generation task. However, they fail to effectively capture cross-modality semantic information in craniofacial reconstruction when translating from the skull (x-ray) to the face (optical) domain, due to a mismatch in the alignment of structural identity across modalities. To address this issue, we propose Cranio-Diff, a diffusion-based framework for cross-domain cranio-facial reconstruction from 2D X-ray skull images. The proposed approach integrates skull-conditioned structural guidance through ControlNet with biometric text conditioning to generate a face which is more semantically and structurally aligned with the given skull. The proposed Cranio-diff method is evaluated on skull-face dataset obtained from X-ray scans of 120 subjects in lateral and frontal views. To enable controlled evaluation, each face image is synthesised across three age groups (25, 45, 65) and three BMI variations of -10%, baseline and +10%, yielding 4320 paired samples. To the best of our knowledge, this is the only X-ray-face dataset with this magnitude. Extensive experiments showed that the proposed method outperforms recent existing approaches in both generated image quality and retrieval task. Finally, to evaluate the performance of our proposed method, we have evaluated the quality of the generated image using FID, IS, SSIM, LPIPS, PSNR and ArcFace score. Additionally, retrieval performance is evaluated using recall@k, mAP@k and MRR@k. Obtained experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can be used as an alternate tool in providing aid in forensic investigations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于扩散模型的跨模态颅面重建方法——Cranio-Diff，能够从2D X光头骨图像重建更结构化和语义一致的人脸图像，并在多个基准指标和任务上超过了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前主流生成模型（如CycleGAN、Pix2Pix及扩散模型）在人脸生成任务上表现优异，但在从头骨（X光）到人脸（光学）领域的跨模态重建中，因结构身份对齐不佳，难以捕捉到关键语义信息。该领域的技术瓶颈限制了其在法医等实际应用场景的效果。
AI.method: 作者提出Cranio-Diff框架，基于扩散模型，融合了ControlNet进行头骨结构引导，并通过生物识别文本条件生成更符合给定头骨语义和结构的人脸。作者在包含120位受试者、不同朝向和多组年龄、BMI变化的大规模配对数据集上进行了系统评估。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，Cranio-Diff无论在人脸生成质量（FID、IS、SSIM、LPIPS、PSNR、ArcFace分数）还是在检索任务（recall@k、mAP@k、MRR@k）上均优于最新方法。
AI.conclusion: Cranio-Diff方法不仅提升了颅面重建的结构和语义一致性，也展现出良好的检索和法医辅助应用潜力，可作为该领域现有方法的有效补充或替代方案。

title: HDSL: A Hierarchical Domain-Specific Language for Structured 3D Indoor Scene Generation and Localized Editing with LLM Agents
summary: Text-driven indoor scene generation and editing require an intermediate representation that language models can both produce and revise. Existing LLM-based systems often rely on scene graphs or global constraint lists, which are compact but underspecify local geometry and make instruction-based edits difficult to localize. We frame this problem as structured program generation and local program repair, and propose Hierarchical Descriptive Scene Language (HDSL), an XML/CSS-style domain-specific language for structured 3D indoor scenes. HDSL represents rooms, regions, objects, and support surfaces as a tree with local coordinates, making complex scenes easier to plan recursively and easier to retrieve for editing. Our pipeline uses LLM agents to generate HDSL subtrees with bounded verification, grounds non-virtual nodes through multimodal asset retrieval, and applies force-directed layout optimization to repair boundary and collision errors. For editing, Hierarchical Retrieval-Augmented Generation retrieves the relevant subtree, asks the LLM to rewrite only that local context, and merges the result back through a deterministic three-way merge. In our reproduced benchmark, HDSL improves average object coverage, text-scene alignment, and generation time over full text-to-scene baselines while remaining competitive with recent layout-only reproductions on geometry metrics; for editing, HRAG reduces token use by $5.22\times$ and runtime by $6.19\times$, produces valid DSL for all eight paired edits, and better preserves unrelated scene objects.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于分层结构的新型场景语言（HDSL），用于提升文本驱动的室内场景生成与编辑的效果，并展现了优于传统方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM场景生成多依赖场景图或全局约束列表，虽紧凑但难以精确控制和局部编辑，且在复杂几何处理上存在局限，亟需更适合描述与编辑复杂3D场景的中间表示。
AI.method: 作者将问题建模为结构化程序生成与局部修复，提出类似XML/CSS风格的分层描述场景语言（HDSL）。该语言树状表示房间、区域和物体，使场景分解与递归编辑更便捷。整体流程包括：1）LLM逐步生成/修复子树（含必要校验）；2）结合多模态资产检索；3）基于力导向的布局优化边界/碰撞问题。编辑时，通过分层检索增强生成方法（HRAG）只编辑相关子树，并以三方合并保证稳定融合。
AI.result: 在复现基准上，HDSL在室内物体覆盖度、文本与场景一致性、生成效率等方面超过全流程文本生成方法，并在几何指标上与最新布局类方法相当。编辑环节，HRAG显著减少LLM的token消耗和运行时间，所有测试对八类编辑均产出有效结果，并优于传统方法在保留无关物体方面的表现。
AI.conclusion: 分层描述场景语言（HDSL）与HRAG方法可更高效、精确地支持基于文本的室内场景生成与局部编辑，为复杂空间AI创造与互动提供更好基础。
